Sorry, I work for the Seat of Divine Foresight.
你正在触犯仙舟的禁忌。
You are touching upon the Xianzhou's forbidden secrets.
什么？触犯禁忌？我既不寻求不死仙丹，也没打算变成长生种…我会触犯什么禁忌？
What? Forbidden secrets? I don't seek medicines to grant immortality, and don't wish to become long-life species... What forbidden secrets am I unveiling?
收集一根小小的、来历不明的枝条又能有什么罪过？何况这根枝叶是你亲自交到我手中的呀？
What crime is it to collect a small twig that could have come from anywhere? Besides, you gave me this twig yourself.
You're not afraid of me reporting you?
No, {NICKNAME}, I'm not afraid of that at all.
你可是我的得力助手，全程配合了我的考察。检举我，除了让你的报酬落空外，对你有什么好处？
You have been my capable assistant and helped my investigation from the start to the end. You will gain nothing from reporting me — except losing out on your reward.
神策府也不可能出得起比我更高的价。
Even the Seat of Divine Foresight won't be able to pay more than me.
Now, it's time to talk about payment.
今天这事，我可以当做没发生过。如果你不想让云骑或十王司找上你，最好现在就离开。否则…别怪我不客气。
I can pretend this never happened today, but if you don't want the Cloud Knights or the Ten-Lords Commission giving you trouble, you better leave right now. Otherwise... I can't make any promises.
There's something else I'd like to ask you.
What did you call me back for?
我回来了，你好像有事找我？
I'm back, did you need something?
It's rare to see the conductor sing...
I can tell from your expression that something's wrong...
列车长好勤劳，又在扫地啊？
Pom-Pom is so hardworking... sweeping again?
I heard you need help here.
I heard you have something to tell me...
Do you still need me to teach Sheila today?
Do you still need me to teach Sheila today?
Do you still need me to teach Sheila today?
Do you still need me to teach Sheila today?
Do you still need me to teach Sheila today?
I heard you're looking for friends again?
I heard you're looking for friends again?
I heard you're looking for friends again?
I heard you're looking for friends again?
I heard you're looking for friends again?
I heard you're looking for friends again?
I heard you're looking for friends again?
I heard you're looking for friends again?
Did you buy the vein detector?
你不是找我有要紧事吗？
Don't you have urgent matters for me?
I heard you're looking for me?
I heard you're looking for me?
I heard you're looking for me?
I heard you're looking for me?
I heard you need help here.
Arlan, Asta is worried about you...
来聊聊我的冒险经历吧。
I heard you're looking for me?
I heard you're looking for friends again?
I heard you're looking for friends again?
I heard you're looking for friends again?
I heard you're looking for friends again?
Did you buy the vein detector?
Any other advice you want to give?
一则寻物启事如同一张狗皮膏药突兀地粘在墙上。
A Lost and Found Notice has been slapped onto the wall, sticking out like a sore thumb.
「具体时间不太确定，我在长乐天若木亭附近走失一台俗称『阴晴伞』的机巧，……」
"I don't know exactly when, but I've lost an ingenium called Baroumbrella somewhere near the Synwood Pavilion in the Exalting Sanctum..."
「…学名是『工造司民用维修单元甲型』，该机巧坚称自己是一朵『蘑菇』，请知情者立刻与我联系，有重谢……」
"...Its official name is Artisanship Commission Civil Maintenance Unit Type-A, and it self-identifies as a mushroom. Please contact me immediately if you know anything for a hefty reward..."
「扫描联系方式获得失主『工造司匠人小聪』的实时位置。」
"Scan the code to get the real-time location of the owner, Cong from the Artisanship Commission."
寻物启事下方还贴心地准备了「阴晴伞」的绘影图形。
A visiograph of the Baroumbrella has been thoughtfully provided below the Lost and Found notice.
我好像见过这个「阴晴伞」…
Where have I seen that Baroumbrella before...
真的吗？看来你应该去联系这位「小聪」并告诉他这个好消息。
Really? Looks like you'd better get in touch with this Cong and tell him the good news.
I think I've met this Cong before...
哦，太好了，去会会这位「小聪」吧，也许你能帮得上他呢？
Oh, that's great. Go and meet him then, and maybe you can help him?
这好像跟我没有什么关系…
This really doesn't have anything to do with me...
也许这确实和你没有什么关系，但世事并无绝对，无穷的远方，无数的人们，都和你息息相关。
You might think it has nothing to do with you, but nothing is ever absolute. Infinite people across countless locations are all actually connected to you.
见见这位「小聪」又不碍事，更何况，寻物启事提到了「有重谢」…对吧？
Meeting this Cong is no big deal, and anyway — the finder will get a "hefty reward," right...?
请问你是会写诗的蘑菇吗？
Excuse me, are you a mushroom that can write poetry?
你在向一朵蘑菇询问它是否会写诗。
You are asking a mushroom whether it can write poetry.
你觉得蘑菇会怎么回答？
How do you think the mushroom will respond?
"I can write poetry. I'm the best at writing poetry!"
你真的见过这样的蘑菇？
Have you really seen this kind of mushroom before?
噢，我真为你那独属于灵长目人科人属的偏见而感到悲伤。
Oh, I feel true pity for this bias of yours that's exclusive to primates belonging to the family hominid and genus homo.
是你张贴的寻物启事吗？
Did you put up the Lost and Found notices?
…我确实张贴了很多寻物启事，但是你说的具体是哪一张呢？
...I have indeed put up many Lost and Found notices. Which one specifically are you talking about?
噢，是它呀，忧郁的诗人。你找到了什么线索吗？
Oh, that one. The Gloomy Poet. Have you found any clues about it?
听你这语气，还有很多诗人？
When you put it like that, it sounds like there are multiple poets?
嗯，没错，除了「忧郁诗人」，我还做了好几个其他的类型的「诗人」。
Mmm, that's right. I made several other poets besides the gloomy one.
Y—you can't be serious about getting them all back, can you?
Of course I want them all back!
I know where the Baroumbrella is...
太好了，没想到这么快就收到好消息了。
Excellent. I never thought I'd get such a speedy reply.
目前没有线索，但我可以帮你。
No clues at the moment — but I can help you out.
太好了，我一直在等着像你这样的好帮手！
That's great! I've always wanted a good helper just like you!
我听人说「忧思为诗骨」。只要诗人足够忧郁，就能写出最打动人心的诗句…我原本对这位「忧郁的诗人」寄予厚望。
They say, "Gloominess is the backbone of poetry." If a poet is melancholic enough, the most beautiful poetic verse will flow out... I had such high hopes for this Gloomy Poet.
我把它「忧郁」的情绪权重设置得很高，它见着别人衣服上掉颗扣子都得嚎上半天。
I set its Gloomy setting very high, and it ended up wailing for half a day at the sight of a buttonhole missing a button.
到最后它就像大部分文艺青年那样，还没来得及写出个把像样的作品，就迷失在喧嚣的城市里了…咳，我希望它不是为生活所迫找了份工，那样的话也太不「诗人」了。

In the end, just like all other artistic youths, it got lost in the hustle and bustle of city life before it ever got the chance to write a decent piece... Ahem, I hope circumstances haven't forced it to have to get a job. That wouldn't be very poetic, would it?
我遇到它时，正在伤春悲秋。
When we met, it was very sentimental.
看来它还没忘本，但是时候该让它回家了。
Sounds like it hasn't forgotten its roots... But it's time for it to come home.
它太忧郁了，完全没法沟通。
It's so depressed that it can't communicate at all.
那可不是，过度忧郁对人类是一种有害的病症，对机巧来说则是故障了。
That's not really the case here. While being overly depressed is a serious illness for humans, for an ingenium it counts as a malfunction.
这就是为什么仙舟明令禁止大部分机巧不得模仿人类的情绪表征。那东西对机器不但多余，而且有害。
That's why the Xianzhou expressly prohibits most ingenia from imitating human emotion. Emotions are not only superfluous to machines — they are dangerous.
唉，可我有需要它忧郁的理由，只好苦一苦这台机器了。
*sigh* I have my reasons for wanting it to be depressed, so I'm stuck bringing despair to this bot.
这么矫情，打一顿就好了。
Don't be so dramatic. Give it a whack and it'll be fine.
你要是打坏了，还得赔我材料钱和工本费。
If you break it, then you have to pay me for labor and materials.
来吧{F#小姐}{M#小哥}，帮我个忙：<color=#dbc291ff>打开它的后盖，找到它的玉兆中枢，给它狠狠修理一发。</color>
Come on {F#miss}{M#mister}, help me out. <color=#dbc291ff>Open up its back flap, find its jade abacus core, and give it a solid repair job</color>.
只要能降低「忧郁」情绪的权重，它多半应该是会跟你回来的。
As long as you can reduce the Gloomy setting, it'll probably come back with you.
Cong sent me to get you.
主人让你找一朵蘑菇干什么？
Why did my master ask you to find a mushroom?
更何况是一朵失败的蘑菇。
Let alone a failed mushroom like me.
Cong wants you to write poems.
Why ask a mushroom to write poetry?
我根本不懂写诗，我只懂得悲伤。
I don't know how to write poetry. All I know is sadness.
你主人叫你回家，他想你了。
Your master asks you to go home. He misses you.
为什么想要一朵蘑菇回家？
Why would he want a mushroom to go back home?
家里长出了蘑菇，可真是件让人忧伤的事啊。
It's truly a doom-and-gloom thing to have mushrooms growing in a house.
怎么，你不知道什么是蘑菇吗？
Huh, don't you know what mushrooms are?
你要怎样才肯回到小聪身边？
What would it take for you to go back to Cong?
你总是对蘑菇的要求这么高吗？
Do you always place such high expectations on mushrooms?
...How about I just pick you up and carry you off?
Why do you want to pick up a mushroom?
蘑菇只是想待在原地，独自悲伤。
This mushroom just wants to wallow here alone in its own shroomy misery.
你是什么种类的蘑菇…我无法识别。不，你不是我的同族。
What type of mushroom are you... I can't tell. No, you're not the same species as me.
我是一朵孤独的蘑菇，噢，真教人悲伤。
I'm a lonely mushroom. Alas, how sad am I.
(Quit wasting time and open the flap)
对这种矫揉造作的家伙，无需多言，直接上手把它拽走就好。
There's no need for more words with a pretentious thing like this. Just drag it away.
求求你，打开我的后盖。给…我…个…痛…快…吧。
Please, open me up. Set... me... free...
你想起了小聪的建议，找准了忧郁诗人的后盖，试图将「忧郁」情绪权重调低。幸好，忧郁诗人也没有拒绝的意思。
You remember Cong's suggestion. You locate the back flap and try to reduce the Gloomy setting. Luckily, there is no resistance from Gloomy Poet.
请你对我温柔一些，不要太粗暴。
Please be gentle with me. Don't be too rough.
你就像造主般无情冷漠，打开我纯洁的躯壳，解剖我悲伤的芯……
You are as cold and heartless as the Creator, peeling open my untainted shell and dissecting my depressed heart...
嗯？我好像并没有那么悲伤。
Mmm? I don't seem to be that sad at all.
唉，一切都是程序预设，一切都是烟云，一切都是代码的白日梦，无休无止。
Alas, everything is but a predetermined program, all smoke and mirrors. Everything is but a daydream of code... never-ending mirage...
我没有如期归去，那原本才是别离的意义。
I didn't go back as ordered, as therein lies the true meaning of separation.
可是主人不明白，只顾执意呼唤我。
But my master could not comprehend, and kept trying to beckon for me.
还真是个诗人，属现代派的…
What a poet — and a modernist, at that...
Come on. Let me take you home.
「人道海水深，我是大海坑。海水尚有涯，不如吃豆芽。」
"Humans compare depths to the ocean, I am a tsunami in motion. Oh ocean, a mistress so fickle, but I would rather just eat a pickle."
…我这几句写得也没有什么毛病吧？
...There's nothing wrong with this new verse I just composed, right?
哟，这不是我的诗仙机巧吗？
Ah, isn't that my little poet ingenium?
...You're not great at this poetry business.
可是，她就是喜欢诗人呀…算了，我还是先瞧瞧我的诗仙机巧吧……
But she only likes poets... Forget it. I'd better take a look at my poet ingenium first...
你可算回来了啊，我还以为你被悲悼伶人给带走了呢？
You're finally back. I thought you were taken away by the Mourning Actors?
这都是你干的好事，你启动我的那一刻就为我输入了「忧郁」的指令。你给了我名为伤感的神罚，你想过我的感受吗？
This is all your fault. The moment you booted me up, you entered a Gloomy command. You gave me this divine punishment called sadness. Did you ever stop to wonder how I felt?
我感觉自己生来就注定要被世界抛弃，我不断忏悔、自我放逐，只是为从忧郁中提炼一点诗意，缓和我的悲伤。
It feels like I was destined to be abandoned by this world. And I continued to repent and self-exile, just to extract another morsel of poetry to ease my sadness.
这都怪小聪，非要写什么诗。
This is all Cong's fault, forcing you to write poetry.
很难理解机器人的忧郁…
It's difficult to understand a robot's sadness...
你不必理解我，你无法理解我。就像花儿不能理解雨云为何垂泪，这世上没有真正的「感同身受」。
You don't have to understand me. You can't really understand me. Just as a flower cannot understand why the rain clouds cry. There is no such thing as true empathy in this world.
为什么主人这么执着于写诗呢？
Why is my master so obsessed with poetry?
至少你的忧郁转化成了诗句…
At least your melancholy can be transformed into verse...
哎，大多数时候，忧郁就只是忧郁，不能写成任何诗。
Ahh, melancholy is just melancholy most of the time. It doesn't make for any kind of poetry.
为什么主人这么执着于写诗呢？
Why is my master so obsessed with poetry?
咳，我写诗…是为了赢得一个女孩的芳心。
Well, I write poetry... to win the heart of a fair maiden.
为了「爱」，人类俗套借口中最俗套的一个。我的芯不能理解这个概念。
For Love: One of the tritest of all human triteness. My chip has no way of understanding this concept.
我有一个喜欢的女孩儿叫静斋，她拒绝了我的表白。听说，她深爱着一位诗人，那位诗人出了一本诗集，而我却憋不出半截诗句。

I have my eye on a girl named Jingzhai, but she shot me down. I heard that she was in love with a poet and that this poet has a whole book of poetry published — but me, I could barely put together a rhyming couplet.
我琢磨着，办法总比困难多不是？作为工造司的成员，我的双手虽然写不出什么佳句，但可以造出写情诗的「诗人」啊！

I thought to myself, there have to be more solutions than problems in this world, right? As a member of the Artisanship Commission, I may not be able to put together any kind of poetry myself — but these hands of mine could sculpt a different kind of poet, if you get my drift!
C'mon, she's already got a partner.
我已经悄悄打听过了，她的同事们说，她现在单身来着。
I may have been asking around. Her colleagues said that she's single right now.
想来那个诗人也是个薄幸渣男…不过也好，这不，我就有机会了？
Feels like that poet is not that great a lover after all. But that's alright, because otherwise I wouldn't be getting this chance, would I?
It wasn't poetry she rejected — it was you.
真的吗？我不信。她明明说过，她过去的爱人是位妙笔生花的大诗人，她深深为对方的诗才所倾倒。
Really? I don't believe you. She told me before that her past lover was a talented poet, and how she was infatuated with his poetic talent.
我总得有个可以努力超越的目标吧？
I have to set myself a lofty goal to surpass, right?
…这能算是你自己写出来的吗？
...Does this really count as having written it yourself?
相关法律我查过啦，仙舟上机巧不享有财产所有权。所以这把伞写的诗，版权属于我，怎么不算是我写的？

I've checked the relevant legislation, and ingenia do not enjoy property rights aboard the Xianzhou. So all the copyrights for all the poems written by it belong to ME — of course it counts as my writing!
说起来，我造的诗仙机巧不止一台，目前还有<color=#dbc291ff>三个家伙</color>采风未归，不知道他们运行得如何了。
Speaking of which, I've built more than just one of these poet ingenia. And there're still <color=#dbc291ff>three of them</color> out there who haven't returned. I wonder if they're still running.
要是能把它们的灵感玉兆带回来，应该能写出足以打动静斋的情诗了。
If you could bring back their Inspo Jade Abaci, then I should be able to craft a poem that'll move my dear Jingzhai.
我说，「蘑菇」，你应该能定位到其他几个诗仙机巧的位置，对吧？
Mushroom, you should be able to pinpoint the locations of the other poet ingenia, right?
我是诗人，我不是什么导航软件。
I am a poet, not some piece of navigation software.
搜到了，「边塞诗人」跑到了鳞渊境洞天里。
Found one: The Borderland Poet is over in the Scalegorge Waterscape delve.
你好主动啊，一定是我对爱的执着打动了你是吧？呃，也有可能是报酬……
That's so proactive. Was it my perseverance for love that moved you to action? Hmm, I guess it could be the promise of reward, too...
Now's the time you're going to ask me to work, right?
你好懂啊。这么熟练，你一定经常助人为乐吧？
You get it. You're so proficient. You must help people out for fun, right?
How is there a Borderland Poet?
呃，我其实也不知道静斋那位爱人到底是什么流派的诗人，所以一口气造了好几个机巧，各个流派尽在我掌握！
Uh, I actually don't know what kind of poet Jingzhai's ex is, so I've rolled out a few different ones — so I can master each genre of poetry!
拜托你了，{NICKNAME}，找回这些机巧，您就是我的再生媒人啊！我不会亏待你的。
Please, {NICKNAME}, find these ingenia, and you'll be my celebrity matchmaker for real! I'll reward you well.
「万壑千岩水自流，云深何处觅蓬丘。回首骁骑征途路，鳞渊境里试身手。」
"Rugged rocks and gorges winding through, where clouds hide the peaks from view. A glance back at the journey true, in Waterscape Gorge, I test anew."
来者何人？竟敢从背后接近老夫！
Who goes there? Dare thou approach this old timer from behind!
我深度学习了「边塞诗派」的代表作，提取了作者的生平经历与词频风格。发觉这些作者各个都饱经沧桑，阅历过人。
I studied in-depth all the classics of borderland poetry of yore, distilling each poet's life essence and style. Realizing that each poet had encountered many diverse and rich experiences.
我被启动才过了两个月又十二天零八个系统时，实在没法和他们相提并论，只能先把自称改了，好揣摩一下诗人的心境。
I've only been running for two months, twelve days, and eight system hours, and I'm no match for them — so I've changed my personal pronoun to try and fathom the minds of such poets.
How very Borderland Poet of you!
嚯哈哈哈哈！看来老夫我已经诗名在外了。
Hahaha! Seems my fame has already preceded me.
我有一种要打架的预感。
I have a feeling that we're going to fight, aren't we?
嚯哈哈哈哈！{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}多虑了，老夫没有理由对你出手。
Hohoho! You worry too much, {F#young lady}{M#young sir}, I've no reason to hurt you.
噢。你如此高大，我却贫弱又矮小。我好悲伤。
Oh, your figure so imposing and tall, while I'm feeble and short. How tragic.
嚯哈哈哈哈！主人还在折腾那些软绵绵、酸溜溜的诗吗？
Hohohoho! Is the master still playing around with those soppy, limp poems?
…我认为主人写的那些糟粕不能算是诗，甚至连说糟粕都不配……
...I don't think the master's doggerel can be considered poetry. Even calling it "doggerel" is being generous...
在理，是老夫对主人过誉了。
Sensible. I do give the master too much credit.
总之，把「灵感玉兆」交出来吧。
Anyway, hand over your Inspo Jade Abacus.
主人让我们俩来找你拿走你「灵感玉兆」。
Master asked the two of us to come and take your Inspo Jade Abacus.
「宁为百夫长，胜作一书生」，做不做诗人本就不重要，老夫以为，上阵杀敌才是头等大事。
"Better be a lieutenant than a scholar." What's important isn't whether you're a poet. I think that heading to the battlefield and striking down foes is more important.
老夫千里迢迢赶来这鳞渊境想要一展身手，没料想，云骑军对药王秘传的镇压已经结束，老夫扑空了！

I've traveled distances to come to the Scalegorge Waterscape just to show off my skills, but never expected the Cloud Knights' suppression of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus to be over already! I've come in vain.
哀哉哀哉，未经战场金铁交鸣的洗礼，老夫创制的句子实不敢妄称「边塞诗」。这「灵感玉兆」没有价值啦！老夫要把它毁掉！
Alas, without being baptized in the flames and steel of war, I daren't call any poetry I write true "borderland poems." This Inspo Jade Abacus of mine is worthless! I shall destroy it!
战争结束了，你不必再战斗了。
The war is over. You don't have to fight anymore.
条件：「边塞诗」需要体验「战斗」。输出结果：你们打一架呗。
Condition: [Borderland Poet] needs to experience [Combat]. Output Result: You two fight each other.
Are you trying to make trouble!?
原来如此！好主意，让老夫和你共赴沙场，用炽热的战斗激情碰撞诗歌的灵感吧！

很好，我可以把灵感玉兆交给你。这本《流云集》我也交给你吧。
Great. I'll give you the Inspo Jade Abacus and this Drifting Clouds.
我不喜欢《流云集》，它太自由了，缺乏规制。但这确实是打动人心的好诗。
I'm not a fan of the Drifting Clouds as the verses do not follow a certain pattern. Still, I must say this is a good poem that stirs my heart.
走吧，我们去找小聪主人。
Let's go and find Master Cong.
灵感玉兆已经收集完成了。
We've collected all the Inspo Jade Abaci.
Thanks for your hard work. Leave them to me.
「蘑菇」，接下来我要把这些玉兆里的符箓篆刻进你的脑瓜里，这样你就会写出「最美的情诗」！
"Mushroom," I'll engrave the talismans in these Inspo Jade Abaci into your brain so that you can write the "most beautiful love poem"!
应该是大功告成了，「蘑菇」快动笔试试。
It should be done now. "Mushroom," try writing something.
Cong, loves, Jingzhai... How about that?
你说了约等于没有说…静斋不是喜欢《流云集》吗，你想要这样的情诗吗？
That isn't helpful at all... Isn't Jingzhai a fan of the Drifting Clouds? Do you want a love poem like that?
啊，对呀，快给我看看《流云集》。
Oh, you're right. Let me take a look at the Drifting Clouds.
「你的婀娜瞬息间，与那纯洁的繁星之舞融为一体，噤声有序的自然。」
"When your graceful figure blends in with the pure dance of stars, nature becomes peaceful and orderly."
「蘑菇」我要这样的，你给我这样的！
「我给你我的哲思中所能蕴含的一切悟力，」
"I offer you whatever insight my reflections may hold,"
「以及我生活中所能有的创造力与直率。」
「我给你持明一生也未曾拥有的情感火花。」
"I offer you the spark of emotions that the Vidyadhara could never have."
「我给你我设法保全的我自己的爱意…」
"I offer you all the love I could muster that I have saved, somehow..."
{NICKNAME}, could you add one sentence for me?
自从我出生起便紧握的爱意。
That love which I've been holding onto since I was born.
出生起便紧握…哦！是同心锁。
Holding onto... Oh! It's referring to the Unity Lock.
不被欢愉和逆境触动的爱意。
The love that is untouched by joy, by adversities.
就是要这么直接，这就很好！
…就算是孤屿在这里，也只能写成这样了。
...Even if Guyu were here, the poem would still be written this way.
{NICKNAME}，我要鼓起勇气向静斋再次表白，请你跟我来一同见证。
{NICKNAME}, I'll pluck up the courage to confess to Jingzhai again. Please come with me to witness it.
你怎么又来了？我说过了……
Why are you here again? I already told you...
不，今日的小聪已经不是往日的小聪了，我写了一首最美的诗，希望你能听到最后。
No, I'm no longer the Cong you know. I've written the most beautiful poem for you. Please listen till the end.
我曾经喜欢过一位诗人，但是这不代表着我喜欢的是诗人。你能理解吗？
I was once in love with a poet, but that doesn't mean I'll like every poet I meet. Do you understand?
「我给你我的哲思中所能蕴含的一切悟力，以及我生活中所能有的创造力与直率。」
"I offer you whatever insight my reflections may hold, whatever creativity and frankness my life."
「我给你持明一生也未曾拥有的情感火花。我给你我设法保全的全部爱意，{TEXTJOIN#52}」
"I offer you the spark of emotions that the Vidyadhara could never have. I offer you all the love I could muster that I have saved, somehow — {TEXTJOIN#52}"
这比你之前的打油诗写得好多了。但我看不到你的感情，这不是你自己写的诗吧？
This is much better than the doggerel before, but I can't feel your affection. You didn't write this, did you?
我做出了诗仙机巧，它写出来的诗，就是我的诗。而且你知道吗？这样诗，想要多少就有多少，你要是喜欢，我能一直写下去。
I've made some poet ingenia. The poems they write are considered mine. And you know what? You can have as many poems like this as you want. If you like it, I can write more for you.
谢谢你，但是对不起，我不接受，请你回去吧。
Thank you, but I'm sorry I can't accept it. Please go home.
(This is bad. I should check on Cong.)
呜呜呜…我又失败了…蘑菇，你还有更好的诗吗？
*sniffle* I failed again... "Mushroom," do you have a better poem?
静斋小姐喜欢的不是诗人，请你现在就认清现实。
Being a poet won't win the heart of Ms. Jingzhai. Please face the music.
一开始就不需要诗仙机巧。
You don't need a poet ingenium from the start.
好悲伤，这会否定我的存在意义…但你说的没错。
This is difficult to hear, as it denies the meaning of my existence... Yet, you're right.
即使有最棒的诗，也无济于事。
Even if you have the best poems in the world, they won't help you.
我们付出了这么多努力，却没有一件事是与静斋小姐有关的。
None of what we've done so far has anything to do with Ms. Jingzhai.
主人在「如何让静斋小姐爱上自己」这个问题上，给出了成本最高、效用最低的解：写情诗。
Master, you've adopted the most expensive but least efficient solution — writing love poems — for the issue of "winning the heart of Ms. Jingzhai."
但情诗不能代替真正的关心和交流。
Love poems cannot replace care and communication.
你有真正了解过静斋吗？
Have you made the effort to understand Jingzhai?
我以为只要我写出最好的诗，她就会喜欢我。
I thought she would fall in love with me as long as I could write the best poem in the world.
你到目前为止只是在写诗吗？
Have you just been writing poems so far?
她的前任是一位诗人，她肯定喜欢写诗的人……
Her ex is a poet, so she must be into people who write poems...
你从来没有真正了解过静斋。
You've never made the effort to understand Jingzhai.
你只是在嫉妒那个她喜欢的诗人，嫉妒是一种毫无效用的情绪。
You're just jealous of the poet whom she dated before. Yet, jealousy is a useless emotion.
…我还不想放弃，你们能再帮帮我吗？
...I don't feel like giving up yet. Can you help me again?
噢，这些事情不应该由一朵蘑菇教你……
Oh, a mushroom is not in the position to teach you things like this.
我和{NICKNAME}会帮你去打听静斋的喜好，你最好能准备好她喜欢的礼物，和足以打动她的说辞。等到时机成熟，再去表白一次。
{NICKNAME} and I will help you find out Jingzhai's preferences. You should prepare a gift that she likes and a moving speech. When an opportunity arises, you'll do another love confession.
How do you know so much about this...
在我离开主人流浪的这段时间里，我下载了《长生种浪漫关系一千问》之类的情感类著作…然而我并没有恋爱的需求，噢，这真的太可悲了。
When I was wandering outside, I downloaded books about romantic relationships such as The Key to a Good Long-Life Species Relationship... Yet, I don't have the need for love. Oh, this is depressing.
走吧，{NICKNAME}，去静斋的同事好友们这儿打听打听，也许能找到些对主人有帮助的答案。
{NICKNAME}, let's get in touch with Jingzhai's colleagues and friends. Perhaps, we can gain some useful info for my master.
想和你打听一下静斋的事。
I'd like to ask you about Jingzhai.
我虽然是个卜者，但我不喜欢八卦别人的。
Although I'm a diviner, I don't gossip about others.
女孩左右顾盼，见四下无人，把脸转向你，满眼兴奋。
The girl looked around. After making sure the coast was clear, she turned to you with her eyes filled with excitement.
Tell me. What do you want to know?
你听说过孤屿这个人吗？
Have you heard about someone named Guyu?
噢噢噢，就是静斋喜欢的那个诗人嘛。听过听过！
Oh, it's the poet that Jingzhai dated before. I've heard of him!
听说她和这位大诗人有过一段甜蜜时光。不过现在的她看样子依然单身。也许大诗人蜕生去了，也许他移情别恋了，谁知道呢。
I heard that Jingzhai had a sweet relationship with him. But she seems to be single now. Perhaps, the poet has gone through hatching rebirth or fallen in love with another. No one is sure.
两人时光再美好，总会有不美好的结局。就像卜算一样，凶卦才是常态。
No matter how happy a couple is, their relationship is bound to end up badly. Just like divination, woe is the norm.
That's why I insist on staying single!
她本人，当然是写诗吟诗。哈哈，静斋的爱好还蛮古雅的。喔，你问除了诗歌之外有什么爱好啊？
It's undoubtedly writing and reciting poems. Haha, Jingzhai's hobbies are quite old-fashioned. Oh, you want to know about her other hobbies?
她算是咱们几个人里最喜欢钻研业务的。没事就会卜上几卦，预测未来，卜的多是爱情运，结果都不太准呢。

Among us, she's the most serious about her profession. When she's free, she'll do divination and predict the future. The questions she asks are mostly about her relationship, but the results are not very accurate.
嘿嘿，我有时候真想送个「天才卜者」的牌匾给她当生日礼物。
Hee-hee, I'm tempted at times to give her a plaque that reads "Genius Diviner" as her birthday gift.
What kind of person is Jingzhai attracted to?
这个问题我有和同事们讨论过。我觉得吧，她喜欢缥缈不定、性格浪漫的那一款。要说为什么，当然是因为她很久没有和人恋爱了，恐怕得有一百年了吧……

I've discussed this with my colleagues before. I think Jingzhai is into people who are unpredictable and romantic. As for why, well, it's been ages since she dated someone. I think it's been a century...
她和那位大诗人孤屿感情很深，听说她至今保留着他送她的同心锁，念念不忘这段旧情。
She was deeply in love with Guyu, the great poet. I heard that she still keeps the Unity Lock from him as she can't move on from the relationship.
Is the lock similar to this?
似乎是同一款。嗐，我就说嘛，男人送的礼，还能翻出什么花儿来。
I think it's the same as this one. Tsk, you can't expect any surprises from the things men give you.
不是打磨几颗形状特殊的小石头，就是买些哪儿都能买到的廉价小工艺品。
Their gifts are either tiny stones polished into unique shapes or small cheap crafts that can be bought anywhere.
以前有个男人甚至还说把一颗星星的命名权送我…噁，拜托，仙舟一开动，我连这颗星在哪儿都见不着了……
A guy even wanted to gift me the right to name a star once... Oh, please! Once the Xianzhou sails off, I can't even see the star anymore...
想和你打听一下静斋的事儿。
I'd like to ask you about Jingzhai.
静斋卜官吗？身为她的同事，我不方便在公开场合评价别人。
Jingzhai, our Managing Diviner? As her colleague, I shouldn't comment about her in public.
静斋卜官的人品与工作能力都非常棒，是非常出色的工作伙伴。
Jingzhai has a great personality and excels at what she does. She is an amazing colleague.
你听说过孤屿这个人吗？
Have you heard about someone named Guyu?
啊，你要问的居然是感情吗？
Oh, I see you're interested in her love life.
我听过孤屿的名字，好像是位持明族诗人。静斋以前可没少提过他。
I've heard of him. I think he was a Vidyadhara poet. Jingzhai used to talk about him a lot.
据说他们不是一世之缘，孤屿的前世、前前世似乎也与静斋卜官是恋人关系。外人说起来都觉得浪漫极了。
It is said that they are lovers not only in this life. Guyu and Jingzhai dated each other in their two previous lifetimes too. Everyone considers that a romantic love story.
不过，以我们持明族的经验来看，这怎么可能呢。
However, this isn't possible from the perspective of the Vidyadhara like us.
如果不是服下特殊的方剂，持明是不可能记得前世恩爱的。要不然，就是蜕生时候带着什么信物吧？
Without consuming a special potion, there's no way we can remember our lovers from our past lifetimes. Otherwise, one needs to carry something like a token during their hatching rebirth.
喜好？她经常提起漂亮衣服不够穿。女孩子嘛，就算活个一千岁也不会嫌弃漂亮衣服。
Like? She always complains about how she needs more beautiful clothes. Well, girls will never think they have enough clothes, even if they live to be a thousand years old.
What kind of person is Jingzhai attracted to?
这问题难道不该直接问她吗？算了算了，我懂。这样可爱的姑娘，总有不少人想接近。
Shouldn't you ask her directly? Forget it. I understand. I'm sure many are interested in such a lovely lady like her.
不过呢，失望而归是常态…你可能也不会顺利。
Still, most suitors end up being disappointed. I think you will be no exception.
我可没说我想追求静斋。
I didn't say I was interested in Jingzhai.
呵呵，算是我无心给的建议吧——不要期待与长生种相恋，尤其是仙舟人，这很容易受伤。
Well, here's my advice for you — it's better not to date a long-life species, especially the Xianzhou natives, as you will likely get hurt.
如果八卦准确无误，像静斋这样的仙舟人，她已经经历过太多刻骨铭心的感情了，说句不合适的，现在的她已经对爱情麻木了。
If the rumor is right, Jingzhai has gone through too many memorable relationships. To put it bluntly, she can't feel the excitement of being in a relationship anymore now.
她的容貌或许年轻，但是心态早就垂垂老矣，对谁都不会再爱了。
She might have a youthful look, but her soul has aged. Her heart will not flutter for anyone again.
我是小聪的朋友，想和你聊聊。
I'm Cong's friend. Can we talk?
小聪的朋友，唉，你想问什么呢？
I... see. How can I help you, Cong's friend?
真是…他的朋友跟他也是一个德行，一上来净问些令人尴尬的问题。
Oh, my... You're just like Cong. He always asks me questions that make me uncomfortable from the get-go.
不过为了让你们死心，我可以正面回答：我已经不爱孤屿了，但是这并不代表我会接受小聪。
However, I don't mind answering this once if it means you'll give up. I don't love Guyu anymore, but that doesn't mean I'll accept Cong.
你为什么让小聪扔掉同心锁？
Why did you ask Cong to throw away the Unity Lock?
那是他蜕生出世时就握在手心的同心锁。但那种东西，对我已经没有意义了。
That was the lock he held in his hand when he underwent hatching rebirth. Yet, that lock means nothing to me now.
你怎么知道那没有意义？

你有什么喜欢的东西吗？
Do you have anything you like?

New clothes and jewelry? Still, I won't accept them if they are from Cong.
你不喜欢小聪哪一点呢？
Why do you find Cong unattractive?
小聪很好，与他的前世不同，在工造机巧上有着十足的天赋。
Cong is a great guy. Unlike his previous lifetime, he is very talented in the manufacturing of ingenia.
我只是不会再喜欢谁了，这与小聪无关……
I just won't fall in love with anybody anymore. This isn't Cong's fault...
你回去就这样告诉小聪吧。
Just tell Cong that when you get back.
若月老板，你这句话什么意思啊，我只想问问静斋到底喜欢的是谁……
Ruoyue, what do you mean by that? I just want to know who Jingzhai likes...
我已经说了三遍了，「这个人是你，又不是你」。这就是占卜的结果。
I've said it three times. "It's you, but it's not you." That's the result of my divination.
我不能说的太详细，但是这个结果是没有错的。
I can't reveal too many details, but there is nothing wrong with this result.
Cong, have you finished writing the poem?
啊，你们回来了，打听到什么消息了吗？
Oh, you are back. Have you gathered any info?
你将你打听到的消息都告诉了小聪，包括静斋想要你转告的内容。
You tell Cong all the information you gathered, including what Jingzhai wanted you to convey.
谢谢你，原来孤屿早就已经蜕生了…但是我感觉好像错过了什么。
Thank you. I see Guyu has already gone through the hatching rebirth... Still, I feel like I have missed out on something.
Guyu has undergone the hatching rebirth?
与主人一样是持明，与静斋相爱，持有同心锁，可能蜕生……
Just like you, Guyu is a Vidyadhara, loves Jingzhai, has a Unity Lock, and has probably gone through the hatching rebirth...
What's Jingzhai's attitude toward the Unity Lock?
静斋小姐知道主人生来带着一把同心锁，并且劝说主人扔掉……
Miss Jingzhai knows you've had the lock since your birth and she hopes you will throw it away...
In Cong's former life, he was Guyu.
In Cong's former life, he was Guyu.
你说…孤屿是我的前世？我一直嫉妒的诗人是我自己的前世……
Do you mean... I was Guyu in my former life? I am the poet I've been jealous of so far...
原来这就是「这个人是你，又不是你」的意思…你们有什么证据吗？
So, that's what "It's you, but it's not you" means... Do you have evidence?
你再仔细看看你的同心锁。
Take a closer look at your Unity Lock.
你和小聪仔细地看了看这把漂亮的同心锁，并且在锁眼附近找到了「吾爱静斋」的刻痕。
Cong and you examine the beautiful lock. A phrase that read "I love Jingzhai" is engraved near the keyhole.
刻痕经历了上百年的时间，早已变得不再清晰，你们反复确认了几遍，更加确信其含义。
The engraving was no longer clear due to the passage of hundreds of years. After checking it repeatedly, the two of you are even more certain of what the phrase meant.
这不是我刻上去的，难道孤屿真是我的前世…我们俩的缘分其实早就注定了！
I didn't engrave the words. Was I really Guyu in my former life? Jingzhai and I are fated to be together!
我忽然充满了自信，我要立刻再去向她表白一次。
I'm bursting with confidence now. I have to confess to her again.
你看我像是会消沉的人吗？
Do I look like someone who wallows in self-pity?
如果静斋再次拒绝我，我会拿出我和她的定情信物，她一定会惊讶我究竟是谁。
If Jingzhai turns me down again, I'll show her our love token. I'm sure she'll be surprised and curious about my identity.
走吧，我们现在就去挑礼物，你快帮我出个主意吧。
Let's pick a gift for her. Come and help me think of what to buy.
找货全做个「天才卜者」的匾。
Get Salesby to make a plaque that reads "Genius Diviner."
去广云袖买些漂亮衣服。
Go to Cloudbreadth Sleeves to buy some beautiful clothes.
去玲珑斋买最新的玉兆。
Go to the Iridescent Parlor to buy the latest jade abacus model.
I believe in your taste! Let's go!
想要订做个「天才卜者」的匾。
I'd like to order a plaque that reads "Genius Diviner."
只要钱到位，就算要做「宇宙无敌天才卜者」的匾也可以做。
As long as you can afford it, I can even make one that reads "The Unparalleled Diviner, Supreme of the Universe."
我、我和她约在星槎海见面，她好像也有话要对我说。这一次表白我一定要成功。
I—I've asked her to meet me at the Starskiff Haven. She seems to have something to tell me too. I must succeed this time.
...I have a bad feeling about this.
想要最新款的女士服装。
I'd like to buy the latest arrivals in women's clothing.
我明白了，我推荐您「彩云纪」最新款的女士竖领短袄，包您满意。
Got it. I recommend that you buy the latest women's cropped jacket with a stand-up collar from the Nimbus Chronicles series. I'm sure you'll like it.
我、我和她约在星槎海见面，她好像也有话要对我说。这一次表白我一定要成功。
I—I've asked her to meet me at the Starskiff Haven. She seems to have something to tell me too. I must succeed this time.
...I have a bad feeling about this.
I'd like to buy the latest jade abacus model.
亲亲说的是「瑞兆<unbreak>15</unbreak>」对吧，好嘞，这就帮亲亲准备好。
Darling, do you mean the Auspicious XV? I'll get one for you right away.
我、我和她约在星槎海见面，她好像也有话要对我说。这一次表白我一定要成功。
I—I've asked her to meet me at the Starskiff Haven. She seems to have something to tell me too. I must succeed this time.
...I have a bad feeling about this.
我以为你会一个人来呢，不过要说的话都是一样的——请忘记我吧，小聪。
I thought you would come alone, but it doesn't matter. Please forget about me, Cong.
我准备了自己写的诗，还给你准备了礼物。{NICKNAME}，礼物，帮我拿出来一下。
I've written a poem and prepared a gift for you. {NICKNAME}, the gift. Give it to me.
不是你不够好，不够真心，只是我已经不会再爱上任何人了，这与你无关。
You're a great person, and I can feel your sincerity. However, I just can't fall in love with anyone anymore. This has nothing to do with you.
…我不是任何人，我是孤屿的转世，你看呀，这同心锁你也有一把。
...I'm not just anyone. I'm Guyu's reincarnation. Look, you also have a Unity Lock like this.
这是孤屿在浴月蜕生之前就紧紧握住的同心锁，他希望能在转生之后和你再续前缘。
Guyu held this lock tightly in his hands before he underwent the hatching rebirth in the moonlight. He hoped to continue his relationship with you after the reincarnation.
…那只是孤屿的一厢情愿，这也是我想让你扔掉它的原因。你早已不是他了，他也和你无关，你应该去寻找自己的幸福，而不是寻找别人幸福的影子。

...That is just his wishful thinking, which is why I want you to throw the lock away. You are not him, and he isn't related to you. You should search for your own happiness, not the shadow of someone else's joy.
可是我并不是在追求孤屿的幸福……
But I'm not pursuing Guyu's happiness...
小聪，我不想让你做无意义的期待。你对爱情仍然抱有热忱，而我却没有，你再追求下去，也只是在荒漠中寻找一片海洋。
Cong, I don't want to get your hopes up. You still have passion for love, but I don't. You'll just be a parched man dying of thirst in a desert, with me incapable of reciprocating your emotions.
今后，你无论来找我多少次，我只会不断地拒绝你。
No matter how many times you confess in the future, I'll just keep on rejecting you.
哎…真希望他能别再执着于我了。
*sigh* I really hope that he gives up on me.
也许这才是对小聪最好的结局。
Perhaps, this is the best ending for Cong.
小聪…对于持明而言，蜕生便会褪去过去的记忆。不知为什么，每一次转生，他都会找上我，随即像过去那样陷入热恋。
Cong... For the Vidyadhara, the hatching rebirth will wash away their memory. However, for some reason, he will always find me after every reincarnation and fall head over heels for me.
我本来也觉得这样的感情浪漫又有趣。他曾是云骑军，曾和我一起占卜，也曾为我写过诗……
I thought it was romantic and fun too in the beginning. He was a Cloud Knight at some point, and a diviner working with me at some other point, and was also once a poet who wrote poems for me...
对小聪来说，现在他又第一次认识了我，萌生了新的感情…但对我来说，这已经是第四次和他重逢了。
For Cong, it's his first time meeting me, and the feelings he has for me are new. But for me, this has been my fourth reunion with him.
短生种恋人们可以许诺「天长地久、海枯石烂」…但活得足够久，你只会感受到时间将情感从我的生活中渐渐剥离。
Short-life species couples easily make promises about eternal love... But once you live long enough, you will discover how life slowly deprives you of your feelings.
我曾经也为爱疯狂过。可如今爱意在我心中根本泛不出一圈涟漪，我不愿意欺骗小聪，他最好趁早放弃。
I used to do wild things for love too. But now, love does not leave a single ripple in my heart. I don't want to lie to Cong, so I hope he can give up as early as possible.
I want to hear more stories about you.
行吧，不过也没有什么好讲的。
Fine, but there's nothing much to tell.
你的感情既专一，又复杂…
You're very faithful to your lover, but your love life is pretty complicated...
没错，轰轰烈烈分分合合，你们短生种有生之年能体会到的，我都没有错过，这些全都和小聪的前世们有关……
Just like you short-life species, I've experienced breakups and reconciliations in my love life too. Everything has got to do with the previous incarnations of Cong...
小聪的前世每一次重生，每一次都会嫉妒前世的才华，小聪嫉妒着孤屿…而孤屿嫉妒着一位云骑。
Every previous incarnation of Cong is jealous of the talent of his predecessor. While Cong is jealous of Guyu, Guyu was jealous of the Cloud Knight before him.
我想，这么可笑的情感轮回该结束了。
I think it's time to end this absurd love cycle.
Is it because you're a long-life species?
我不想说得绝对，但你想想你们短生种吧。相处了五六十年的老夫老妻，即便相爱着彼此，也早没有了年轻时的活力。

I can't say it applies to everyone. Just imagine a short-life species couple that has been together for fifty or sixty years. They might still love each other, but they won't be as enthusiastic as when they were young.
再给这份爱加上一千年的期限，他们就只是生活在一起的两个人而已。
Even if the relationship can last for a millennium, they will be just two people living together.
也许短生才最适合享受爱情的甜蜜。
Perhaps, short-life species are best suited to enjoy the sweetness of love.
你是说他每一次都能找到我？我也觉得很有趣，第一次我觉天缘注定，无比浪漫。第二次嘛，我觉得我跟他再爱个十世也没有问题……

Do you mean how he manages to find me after every reincarnation? I find it interesting too. When it happened for the first time, I thought it was very romantic, and we were meant to be together. On the second time, I thought I would have no problem loving him for another ten lifetimes...
至于现在，对不起，我没有任何感觉，一丁一点波澜也没有。
But now, I'm sorry to say that I have no feelings for him at all.
明白了，我去看看小聪的情况。
I get your point. Let me check on Cong.
明白了，我去看看小聪吧。
I get your point. Let me check on Cong.
能请你往旁边挪一挪吗？
Could you please scooch over a bit?
你关心蘑菇，你是个好人。
You must be a kind person to show concern for a mushroom.
…算了，我不是蘑菇了。但是请让我继续悲伤地躺在这里。
...Forget it. I'm no longer a mushroom, but please let me lie down to heal my broken heart.
"You're a sorrowful sigh at the end of the world,"
「而我只是一枚小小的螺丝钉。」
「我手足无措，不知道如何修补你的心。」
"I'm at a loss, helpless in ways to mend your broken heart."
谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。就让我悲伤一会儿吧，我总会恢复过来的。
Thanks, {NICKNAME}. Just leave me alone here. I'll feel better after some time.
Well, you sure can, because you're Cong.
嗯。小聪是不会一直消沉的。
Yes. Cong won't stay depressed for too long.
你还会去继续追求她吗？
Will you keep trying to win her heart?
我不会放弃的，毕竟我是小聪嘛。
I won't give up. After all, I'm Cong.
请收下我的报酬吧，等我缓过来以后，我会像往常一样的。
Here is your reward. When I get over it, I'll be my usual self again.
Are you having trouble with something?
在地衡司忙活的每一天都是麻烦。
When you're working in the Realm-Keeping Commission, every day is trouble.
说真的，有时候我怀疑地衡司根本没有社会地位，什么脏活累活都要做。
Seriously, sometimes I have a feeling that the Realm-Keeping Commission doesn't have a respectable social status at all. It is responsible for all the dirtiest, most tedious work.
刚才大毫执事官说最近长乐天有贴小广告的，让我去揭掉。
Official Dahao told me that someone had been putting up advertising posters in the Exalting Sanctum, and he wanted me to remove them.
你听明白了吗？他说，让我，去揭掉。
You get it? He asked me to remove the posters.
我听清楚了，他说让你去揭掉。
Yes, I can hear you clearly.
你没听明白，我是说这工作也太没有营养了！这是勤务该做的工作吗？
You don't get it. The job is so meaningless! Is that within the job description of an orderly?
罗浮怎么还有这么没素质的人？
How can there still be such uncivilized people in Luofu?
对啊！没素质就算了，你说，揭小广告是勤务该做的工作吗？
Exactly! That point aside, do you think removing posters is my duty?
Come to think of it, it really does seem to be my job!
这样吧，我给你拿些好处，你去帮我揭下小广告好不好？尤其是那些特别显眼的，我记得有什么「寻物启事」的，你都去揭下来。
How about I pay you, and you help me remove the posters, especially the ones that are particularly eye-catching? I remember there are some Lost and Found notices. Please remove them all.
Do I hand the posters over to you after removing them?
别别别，哎呀。这玩意儿，你偷偷扔了就成，我不用拿着它汇报工作。
Oh, please don't. Just throw them away when no one's looking. I don't need the posters to report on my work.
你要是能帮人把东西找回来，这不就是好人好事一桩嘛。
It'll be a kind deed if you can find the lost item for the owner.
这点好处，别想请得动我！
These peanuts are not enough to hire me!
哎呀，你就是撕了一下「寻物启事」而已，我给的好处已经足够了。
What I pay is more than enough, seeing you're only removing the Lost and Found notices.
你要是能帮人把东西找回来，这好处不就多了嘛。
You'll get more rewards if you can find the lost item for the owner.
Take your pay and start searching.
谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。就让我悲伤一会儿吧，我总会恢复过来的。
Thanks, {NICKNAME}. Just leave me alone here. I'll feel better after some time.
What is your take on Drifting Clouds?
I just arrived at the Luofu and got off the starskiff.
The Drifting Clouds is not considered a poetry collection...
The verses inside do not follow a certain pattern, and they do not rhyme.
This is rubbish. Take it back!
你平仄不清，对仗不工，韵律不对，缺乏章法…
Your counterpoints and rhymes are wrong, and your verses lack structure...
没有一句诗像样，就你还想和我谈论诗歌？做你的美梦！
Not a single verse is proper. You want to talk about poems with me? Dream on!
我来教教你，你得记好了！
Let me teach you a thing or two. Listen to me carefully!
河对汉，绿对红。雨伯对雷公。烟楼对雪洞，月殿对天宫。

River contrasts with creek, green contrasts with red. The Rain God contrasts with the Thunder God. The Smoke Tower contrasts with the Snow Cave, and the Moon Pagoda contrasts with the Heavenly Palace.
平仄你也不会吧，你得记好了！
You know nothing about meters, don't you? Listen to me carefully!
平韵奇句仄，仄韵奇句平。若是偶字句，两字换仄平。
For iambic meters, an unstressed syllable followed by a stressed syllable. For trochaic meters, the opposite.
I... I've got no complaints or regrets in this life...
此去经年，应是良辰好景虚设。我们有缘再见。
Years have passed since this departure, and it seems the promised beautiful moments were but illusions. If fate allows, we shall meet again.
他人笑我胶柱鼓瑟，我笑他人数典忘祖。你表现不错，我很认可你。
They mock and scoff, my rigid stance they jest, yet I, in turn, deride their roots, long lost. Your splendid deeds, deserving my acclaim, I commend thee, for thou hast truly shone.
等你想清楚了以后，再交给我吧。
Once clarity finds you, feel free to entrust it to me.
怎么，还没有找齐玉兆吗？
Haven't you finished collecting the inspo jade abaci yet?
Um, haven't you found the Drifting Clouds?
欸，你不会忘记带礼物了吧？
Hey, you didn't forget the gifts, did you?
我忙得很，你要说什么来着？
I'm busy, what do you want to tell me?
It's you, {NICKNAME}. Is there something you need?
你是小聪的朋友吧，还是先去追上小聪吧。
You must be Cong's friend. Let's catch up with Cong first.
Who would've thought that Cong was gloomy, too?
你别担心他，我看着他呢，让他躺会儿吧，过段时间就好了。
Don't worry about him, I'm watching over him. Just let him rest for a little, and he'll be fine after.
这破事结束之后，我还是继续做忧郁的蘑菇好了……
After this trifle is over, I'm better off continuing as a Gloomy Mushroom...
Why are you a mushroom again?
…算了，我还是和你解释一下吧。
思来想去，我觉得还是更适合忧郁。原本是想让小聪主人帮我格式化的，但是…和你们走一遭的经历也挺宝贵的，我就留下来了。

After thinking about it, I think I am more suited for gloominess. Originally, I just wanted Master Cong to format me and be done with everything. But... the experiences I had with you all were also very precious, so I decided not to.
现在，你就当我是陌生的蘑菇吧，这也算是我们的默契了。
Now, just treat me as a stranger mushroom, and let that be the mutual understanding between us.
轻轻的我走了，正如我轻轻的来；我轻轻的招手，作别长乐天的云彩。
Softly I go, just as softly I came; I softly beckon my leave to the soft Exalting Sanctum clouds.
一则寻物启事如同一张狗皮膏药突兀地粘在墙上。
A Lost and Found Notice has been slapped onto the wall, sticking out like a sore thumb.
去问问<color=#dbc291ff>地衡司公廨外的广大</color>吧，城市的牛皮癣都归他管。
Go ask <color=#dbc291ff>Guangda outside the Realm-Keeping Commission Chancery</color>. He's responsible for fixing such scars found in the city.
Wen Furui asked me to deliver the gift...
我搞到了「高级会员资格」。
I managed to get myself a "premium membership."
Wen Furui asked me to deliver the gift...
我来听你说「美丽狐仙聊天」…
I'm here for the Foxian Beauty Chat...
这件事你得先听我说完，免得引起你的误会……
Let me finish before you say anything, otherwise you might misunderstand...
前一段时间空间站里流传起了情诗，很多科员也受此影响春心萌动，事实上有不少人也借此机会认识了另一半。

A while ago, romantic poems gained popularity in the space station. Many staff members were affected by the romantic mood, and so many of them have started using the opportunity to get to know their other half.
我可不是老顽固，科员们在这里工作起居，感情生活我自然要全力支持。
I'm not an old-fashioned, stubborn person. Our staff members work here, live here, so of course I would support their romantic pursuits and lifestyle.
我们这儿有个叫<color=#dbc291ff>温符瑞</color>的科员，原本大家都以为这人心中只有学术研究，对男女心动之类的事情毫无兴趣……
There's a researcher here named <color=#dbc291ff>Wen Furui</color>. Everyone thought he only has academic research on his mind and does not care about relationships...
不过，最近他突然向我提出了想要做外驻研究，还指明想要进行仙舟文化现象调查。
Recently, however, he suddenly requested to be dispatched to conduct research off-station, specifically to investigate the cultural phenomenon in Xianzhou.
你不是支持感情生活吗？
Aren't you supportive of your staff members' romantic pursuits?
我对科员们一视同仁，温符瑞科员要是想自由追爱，我肯定不拦啊。只是这个「美丽狐仙聊天」实在可疑。
I treat all my staff members equally. If Wen Furui wants to pursue his romantic yearnings, I will not stop him. But this Foxian Beauty Chat thing is very suspicious.
有点常识的人，都会觉得可疑，但温符瑞科员他…不是一个有常识的人。
Those who have some common sense would be considerably suspicious, but Researcher Wen is... not one of them.
黑塔空间站有外驻科员吗？
Does Herta Space Station have any off-station researchers?
几乎没有。仙舟的航线并不固定，因此旅程和通讯多多少少不是那么便捷啦。
Almost never. Xianzhou's route is not fixed, so travel and communication would not be the easiest to manage.
有科员主动申请外驻，真是求之不得。
We would want nothing more than a researcher who proactively requests for off-station research.
「美丽狐仙聊天」一看就有问题！
This Foxian Beauty Chat is definitely questionable at best!
是吧！是吧！大部分有常识的人，光听名字就能看出其中的可疑。但温符瑞科员他…不是一个有常识的人。
Isn't it!? Most people with common sense would immediately see how shady it is just from its name. But Researcher Wen is... not one of them.
我找过温符瑞科员对谈过几次，每每谈到「美丽狐仙」，他的笑容便逐渐不受控制。每当我想进一步了解时，他总是支支吾吾遮遮掩掩的。
I've had a few conversations with him. Every time I mentioned the foxian beauty, his grin grows uncontrollably. But when I try to inquire further, he always dodged the questions and evaded the topic.
想必是我这代理站长身份让他有一些戒心。<color=#dbc291ff>据说这「聊天服务」是会员邀请制的，你去找他聊聊，要是也能得到邀请那就更好了。</color>

I think it must be because of my position as the acting lead researcher that he felt reticent to talk about his love life. <color=#dbc291ff>I heard that these chat services operate on an invite-only membership basis. Maybe you can have a chat with him, and even better if you could get an invite.</color>
我想拜托你调查看看，这个「美丽狐仙聊天」的背后到底有什么猫腻。
I want to ask you to investigate this Foxian Beauty Chat. Find out what is behind this service.
…怎么可能！唔，也不是没有这个可能……
...Impossible! Well, I guess it isn't entirely impossible...
要是没有猫腻的话，我也许会考虑和对方谈谈合作，连温符瑞这样的都能搞定，那我们员工的心理健康也不在话下。
If they're legit, I will consider talking to them about a collaboration. If they could handle someone like Wen Furui, our staff members' mental health could then be easily ensured.
那就拜托你了，得亏是你办事，我还是比较放心的。
I'll leave it all to you then. I feel more at ease knowing it's you handling it.
You're asking me to actively be the target of a scam.
诈骗犯不就是想要钱嘛，我的零花钱应该能够支应你和温符瑞的。你们的损失，我统统给你报销的！
Scammers just want money at the end of the day, don't they? My allowance should be able to cover for both you and Wen Furui. I will reimburse all your losses!
在我这里，最重要的是保护好科员们的工作生活，这是用钱买不来的。
For me, the most important thing is to protect the staff members' work and lives. This is something money can't buy.
那我就等着你的好消息了。
So I shall await your good news.
不过，这个「美丽狐仙聊天」实在是可疑，他就这样去了，我会有些担心。
However, this Foxian Beauty Chat thing is really suspicious. I'm a little worried that he went there just like that.
他一个搞物理研究的，搞什么文化调查啊？这跨度未免也太大了吧！
He's a physics researcher, what is he trying to do with a cultural study? This is too big a jump!
这种反常实在让我有些担心…所以我做了些小小的调查，发觉他最近沉迷着仙舟罗浮上的私人情感咨询服务「美丽狐仙聊天」。
His uncharacteristic behavior worries me... so I probed into it a little. Recently, he has been obsessed with the Foxian Beauty Chat, a private romance counseling service on the Xianzhou Luofu.
没错，之所以想成为驻外科员的理由可不是什么学术转向，而是他打算和自己倾心交流的仙舟「美丽狐仙」见上一面。
That's right. His real reason to request for a transfer is not because of an academic shift, but a desire to meet with the Xianzhou foxian beauty he was in contact with.
黛青小姐姐，嘿嘿，我的黛青小姐姐～
Ms. Daiqing, heheh, my Ms. Daiqing~
对吧对吧——等等，你怎么知道……
Isn't it, isn't it— Wait, how do you...
Keep it down, this is a public space.
我问心无愧、有什么要回避的？
I have nothing to feel guilty about, so why should I?
能给{F#好姐妹}{M#好兄弟}分享一下吗？
Can you share your story with a fellow {F#sister}{M#brother}?
是我呀！你连我都忘记了？
It's me! Did you forget about me already?
等等，你是星穹列车上的人。
Wait, you're one of the Astral Express people.
{NICKNAME}？我想起来了，你是星穹列车上的人。
{NICKNAME}? I remember now, you're one of the Astral Express people.
对了，听说列车开去了罗浮仙舟。还真是巧合的缘分——嘿嘿，说到仙舟，最近我恋爱了，和仙舟的美丽狐仙小姐姐们相爱了！
Oh right, I hear that the Express went to the Xianzhou Luofu. What a coincidence... Heh heh, speaking of Xianzhou, I fell in love with a pretty foxian beauty in Xianzhou!
过去的我埋头于研究，从没有考虑过恋爱…但直到我接触了「美丽狐仙聊天」，我改变了！不对！我重生了！
In the past, I buried myself in research and never once had I thought about love... But now, after I started socializing on the Foxian Beauty Chat service, I've changed! No, reborn!
银河中竟然有这么多美好的可人儿，我的前半生算是彻底虚度了。
I didn't think there would be such a fantastic person in the universe. I almost regret not meeting her earlier in life.
太好了，我一见到你，就觉得你是我的知音。
That's great! The moment I saw you, I knew you'd be someone who understands me.
But this doesn't concern the others!
谢谢你，你就是我的知音。
Thank you, you're the only one who understands me.
…我知道你来找我打听是为什么。其他科员都以为我上当了，你肯定也不例外，什么「网络是虚拟的，你把握不住」的云云。
...I know what you're trying to achieve. The others thought I was being duped, you must feel the same. "The internet is not real, it's not something you can handle," yada yada.
实际上，我委托了星际和平公司给小姐姐寄了好几次礼物，他们总是以「收件地址不清」为理由给我退件，但是我没去过仙舟，完全不知道自己哪儿搞错了。

But in reality, I have already commissioned the IPC to deliver gifts to her a few times. They kept returning my gifts on the grounds of an "unclear delivery address." I haven't been to Xianzhou, so I don't know where I got it wrong.
唉，我当然知道，小姐姐远离尘嚣的生活不应受到打扰。但是像我这样的铁杆粉丝也想要获得一个亲口表达心意的机会啊。
*sigh* I know, Ms. Daiqing's life beyond the secular universe must not be disturbed. But a hardcore fan like myself would love to have a chance to express my feelings to her.
这么果断就拒绝了吗！我不让你白干活，我、我会给你报酬的！
Are you flat-out rejecting me? I won't make you do things for free! I—I'll pay you!
按公司货运的双倍…不，三倍价格！还有，小姐姐们的<color=#dbc291ff>会员邀请链接</color>，没人能拒绝这样的条件吧！

I'll pay you double— no, triple the amount the delivery service company charges! I'll also share with you the lady's <color=#dbc291ff>membership invitation link</color>, you won't refuse this, will you?
我懂，我懂！「开拓之道」是神圣庄严的使命。
I know, I know! The Path of Trailblaze is a sacred and solemn mission.
但，你帮我把礼物带到，就是横跨宇宙，把两颗心、还有两个相隔无数光年的世界连在了一起。这…多么神圣。
But if you help me with this gift, you will be crossing the universe, joining two hearts, two worlds lightyears apart together. That would be so... reverent.
还有，我会按公司货运的双倍…不，三倍价格付费！外加小姐姐们的<color=#dbc291ff>会员邀请链接</color>！你也想见识见识狐仙小姐姐的迷人魅力，对吧？

I'll pay you double— no, triple the amount the delivery service company charges! As a bonus, I'll throw in the beauty's <color=#dbc291ff>membership invitation link</color>! You want to behold the foxian beauty's charm for yourself, don't you?

你害羞啦。我就当你答应了！

可恶，要是我的外驻申请批准下来，我就能亲手送出这份心意。真羡慕你们啊……只要乘上列车就能去想去的地方。

Darn it, if only my off-station research transfer application had been approved, I would be able to deliver the gift on my own. I envy you... You just had to hop aboard the Express, and you can go anywhere you want.
等等，列车现在可不就停在罗浮吗？那么能不能麻烦你……

温符瑞的嘴角勾起一道弧线，那是对「同道中人」才会展露的会心笑容。
The corner of Wen Furui's lips curls upward. It's a genuine smile that one would only show to a compatriot.
我就知道！嘿嘿，没人能拒绝这样的机会。
I knew it! Heh, no one would refuse an opportunity like this.
放心，我会按公司货运的双倍…不，三倍价格付费！还有，小姐姐们的<color=#dbc291ff>会员邀请链接</color>！你也想见识见识狐仙小姐姐的迷人魅力吧？

Don't worry, I'll pay you double— no, triple the amount the delivery service company charges! Also, I'll throw in the beauty's <color=#dbc291ff>membership invitation link</color>! You want to behold the beauty's charm for yourself!
唉，我有这代理站长的身份在，问什么都不方便，这事情只好拜托你啦。

要是能搞到那个「仙舟美丽狐仙聊天」的<color=#dbc291ff>会员邀请链接</color>，就能进一步了解内情了。

进展这么快！温符瑞让你把礼物带到仙舟，寄给狐仙小姐姐…这么说来，只要顺着这条线，就能直接找到对方了。
What rapid development! Wen Furui asked you to bring gifts to Xianzhou and deliver them to the foxian beauty... That means, as long as we keep up with this, we'll be able to find the person directly.
甚至不需要<color=#dbc291ff>会员邀请链接</color>，我们就能搞清楚这里面到底有什么猫腻。看来我没找错人啊~{NICKNAME}。
We won't even need the <color=#dbc291ff>membership invitation link</color> to find out what the hidden truth is. Looks like I chose the right person after all, {NICKNAME}.

事关空间站科员的日常安全……

而且我们…也没有拆开礼物窥探隐私呀，只是确保它被准确送到「狐仙小姐姐」手上，这有什么问题吗？

总之，他不是承诺你把礼物送到之后就把邀请链接给你吗，这也是一种保底方案。只是换作我的话，我会选择先顺藤摸瓜。
Besides, didn't he promise to give you the invitation link after the item is delivered? That would be our plan B. I just meant that if it were up to me, I would choose to follow the clues first.
要怎么搞到消息取决于你，我就在这儿等你的好消息了。

不好意思，你能再说一遍吗？

我们认识吗？这是什么意思呢？

听上去你讲得也不太情愿…那这句话到底是什么意思呢？

Acquaintance from the mortal coil, luxurious gifts from beyond.
Acquaintance from the mortal coil, luxurious gifts from beyond.
Acquaintance from the mortal coil, luxurious gifts from beyond.
这是什么新的搭讪手法吗？还是要向我推销什么商品？

您知道「美丽狐仙聊天」吗？

{F#小妹妹}{M#小弟弟}，听我一句劝。无论你想寻求一段恋爱，还是仅仅出于好奇想找人聊天，我劝你不要太过投入。

是啊，长生种与短生种确实能建立某种程度的友谊或是爱情。

不过嘛，到最后几十年过去后，短生种匆匆逝去，而长生种很快也会结识新人，忘却故旧。
However, in a few decades, after the fleeting passing of the short-life individual, the long-life individual would be introduced to someone new and forget the past.

...Ms. Daiqing, I will become a cultural researcher for you. When I arrive at the Xianzhou, I will definitely hand my gift over to you on my own.

I'll ask you another question, which one of you is {NICKNAME}?
就是你{F#这小丫头}{M#小子}啊。
啊，你在说什么呀…云骑军大哥哥，{F#她}{M#他}才是。

{NICKNAME}涉嫌违法诈骗活动，我们将立即执行逮捕，全部涉案人员不许反抗，违抗者将直接暴力逮捕。

{NICKNAME} is suspected of illegal and fraudulent activities. We will carry out the arrest immediately. All persons involved in the case are advised not to resist arrest, and those who disobey will be arrested with violence if required.

机巧鸟要进入航道了，接下来只能坐星槎去追了。

「我是地衡司执事，给我追上前面那只机巧鸟。」
"As an official of the Realm-Keeping Commission, I order you to follow that cycrane up ahead at all costs."
…要是有机会说出这样的台词就好了！
...If only I had the chance to issue an order like that!

我先追过去啦，你等会儿赶过来！

你、你们又是什么人，凭什么叫我站住？

嗨，这都是误会，都是误会啊…唉？鹤运物流哪有什么快递员啊？

劫、劫匪？！呔，光天化日，朗朗乾坤……

咳，先说说你是干什么的吧。我身旁这位{F#女侠}{M#猛男}有着灵活多变的择业标准，你要是老实交代，{F#她}{M#他}也可以不是劫匪。

我们认识吗？不认识的话，那么就此别过？
Are we acquainted? If not, I suggest we bid each other farewell.
礼物是寄给黛青小姐姐的，「她孤身一人住在远离尘世的地方」。我们寄给她的礼物，怎么就落在你的手里了？
The gift we sent is for Ms. Daiqing, "who lives alone, away from the world." How exactly did it fall into your hands?
我、我…因为我是她的经纪人。反倒是你们，黛青多次表达了希望粉丝不要做出过激的行为，比如跟踪之类的……你们根本就没有听进去是吧，我要注销你们会员资格！

我也没有会员，我们俩是追着别人的物流跟过来的。

没错没错，这根本就不是给你的礼物，遮遮掩掩的，你难道想私吞了不成？

你能不能有点格局，我们现在就去见到本人！
Ugh, get with the program! What we really want is for you to take us to visit Ms. Daiqing.
别做梦了，怎么能让你们打扰到她呢？
Are you guys out of your minds? How could I allow anyone to disturb Ms. Daiqing?
那好啊，我就把你带到地衡司去，看看你到底是不是经纪人！

别别别，我真是服了你了。这样吧，我会给你们比会员资格更高级的「高级会员资格」，可以和黛青小姐姐私联，怎么样？

得饶人处且饶人，就这个吧，我们别再吓着他了。

今天可真晦气。来吧，这样就能证明我是她的经纪人了吧。
What a rotten day this has been. Here, this will also prove that I'm really her manager.
神秘的经纪人取得了你们的联系方式，随后，你们成功得到了「高级会员资格」。
The mysterious manager obtains your contact information, and you successfully obtain the "premium membership."
你们可千万别告诉其他人，如果暴露了，我就要取消你们的资格。

其实我只想帮朋友搞到会员资格。这下可好，「高级会员资格」，有赚到。

得亏了你啊，{NICKNAME}。不愧是让太卜另眼相看的人，一股身经百战的气质，用来虚张声势再合适不过了。
Good work, {NICKNAME}. As expected of someone who gets special recognition even from the Divination Commission, your battle-hardened aura couldn't be more fitting for this charade.

还好有你在旁边，光是我一个人要他紧张起来可不容易。

嘿嘿，你懂我的意思就行。

哦？你是怀疑这「狐仙聊天」背后还有什么猫腻是吧？

是喽，这所谓的聊天业务多半是藏着什么猫腻喽。

I'm not interested in this sort of thing anyway. We've only lost round one, being forced to yell pass phrases by these fellas.
不过嘛，也不用急于一时。这当口抓他去地衡司不过是个小偷小摸的罪名。俗话说的好，「放长线，钓大鱼」。
In any case, there is no need to be hasty. Catching him now would only get him charged with the petty crime of thievery. As the saying goes, "If you want to catch a big fish, cast a long line."
嗨呀，跑来跑去还真是费劲啊，今天的运动量就到此为止了。{NICKNAME}，我先告辞啦。

That "Foxian Beauty Daiqing" account has not replied to any messages for several days. My game mates think some trouble must have befallen her, like being arrested by involving herself in a cyber fraud or something...
牌友们心急如焚、火急火燎，因为我之前见过经纪人，就押着我过来找人讨说法了。

带上我一起找吧，我看你比较靠谱，跟着你事情应该会顺利。

I got the message and deleted the contact right then and there. He did offer to give me a refund, but I didn't take it. Those dirty credits will only bring back painful memories.

...I've already sent the request for academic exchange to the Palace of Astrum on the Xianzhou Luofu, so don't you worry. You, on the other hand, your transfer application is so messily written, I have to ask you to rewrite and edit it before submitting again.

这种事情让那个「狐仙」开口，比我们俩在旁边苦口婆心有用多了。

长生种和短生种不会有好结局。

你可真是一个体贴的好站长啊。

多亏了你，事情算是告一段落了，拿好，这是我答应给你的报酬。

这个叫「黛青」的骗子聊天的话术也不高明啊。温符瑞科员到底是怎么能被迷得茶不思饭不想的？

In the midst of the boundless cosmos, we meet and get to know so many people... *sigh*

哪里的话。你装作不谙世事的{F#小女生}{M#小男生}聊的很棒！

如果是赛博诈骗的话，接下应该很快就会用各种理由来骗你花钱了。

I'm not a member of Xianzhou's Realm-Keeping Commission, so I'm not going to "prevent you from getting scammed." My goal is to uncover the true nature of the Foxian Beauty Chat and ensure that my fellow researchers have a healthy and safe working environment in Xianzhou.
你不仅要被骗，还要被骗得很惨，这样我们才能接近真相。诈骗犯想要的只是钱而已。你们的损失，我的零花钱应该足够给你们报销…唔，绰绰有余了。

Not only do you have to get scammed, you have to get scammed badly enough for us to get closer to the truth. All the scammers want is money. My pocket change should be enough to reimburse you for your losses... more than enough, in fact.
要是她真的是来骗钱的，我们也好让温符瑞科员彻底放弃幻想。所以，你理解了吗？

嘻嘻，这土到令人颤抖的发言，得亏你能忍住和她聊下去。

明白了。我就当这是人类多样性的一种证明了。

记住喽，是用我的钱，所以别客气。

听艾丝妲的说法，先去之前见过经纪人的地方找找吧。
Based on what Asta said, I should start by searching around the spot where we first encountered the manager.
这样做会有什么意义吗？
Is there any point in doing that though?
「美丽狐仙聊天服务」的线下工作人员就在星槎海，接头暗号是<color=#dbc291ff>「尘寰相见，好礼相送」</color>。

The in-person operation for the "Foxian Beauty Chat Service" is located in Starskiff Haven, and the pass phrase is <color=#dbc291ff>"Acquaintance from the mortal coil, luxurious gifts from beyond."</color>
那么问题来了，到底谁才是线下工作人员呢？简直是胡闹。
So the question is, who exactly is this in-person operative? What a hot mess.
那个狐仙提出要和你见一面，你就去嘛，真相只差一步了。

有进展之后再告诉我吧。

我就待在这里，跑不了的。

求求你，别告诉他们我就是「狐仙黛青」。
Please, don't tell them that I am the Foxian Beauty Daiqing.
...I don't need to hear any of your sales pitches.
卖古董啊卖异星科技啊，还有「你现在幸福吗？」之类的，我不需要。
I don't need any of your antiques, technology from other worlds, or any of that "Are you happy right now?" nonsense.
Acquaintance from the mortal coil, luxurious gifts from beyond.
什么新型推销…你要是再过来，我就要向地衡司报警了。
I've had enough of your "innovative" marketing strategies... If you try it again, I'm going to report you to the Realm-Keeping Commission.
我很幸福！你再不走，我现在就要向地衡司报警了！
I'm very happy, thank you! And if you don't leave in ten seconds, I'm going to report you to the Realm-Keeping Commission!
Acquaintance from the mortal coil, luxurious gifts from beyond.
与这只机巧犬对视的片刻，你从它又圆又亮的眼睛里品出了一丝好奇。
For a few brief moments you exchange glances with this ingenium dog, and you see a hint of curiosity in its bright, round eyes.
快件在「流云渡分拣中心」完成交接，准备发往「收件人」。
The item has been received at the Cloudford Sorting Center, and is ready to be sent on to its recipient.
等等，怎么是一个男人在签收快递？
Hang on — why is a man signing for this?
你来得正好，{NICKNAME}。我有件事想向你打听打听。
You came at a good time, {NICKNAME}. There's something I want to ask you.
有消息说，最近鳞渊境洞天里巨响如雷，是发生什么大事了吗？
I heard there has been thunderous noise coming from Scalegorge Waterscape recently. Has something big happened?
你又打算利用我调查什么？
Are you asking me to investigate something again?
什么话，我只是纯粹对罗浮上的事情好奇罢了。何况，咱们俩难道不是互惠互利的忘年交嘛？
Nothing of that sort. I'm just curious about the happenings on the Luofu. Besides, aren't we close friends who help each other out?
你的表情可不是这么说的。
That's not what I gather from your face.
看来，之前帮助老夫进行的研究让你感到不安了？我以博识尊的名义起誓，你贡献的调查成果，绝不会用在任何有违道义的地方！
Looks like you are quite perturbed after helping with my research last time. I swear, on Nous's name, that your investigation will not be used immorally!
那么，言归正传，能不能跟我讲讲鳞渊境里发生的事情？
Back to the topic, could you tell me what happened in Scalegorge Waterscape?
你简单讲述了自己的经历…
You talk about your experience briefly...
龙尊的转世重回故地，分海引涛？光是听你说这么几句，就有种身临其境目眩神迷的感受了。
The reincarnated high elder has returned to his homeland, parted the sea, and stirred the waves? Just hearing you say these gives me a vivid image. It's as if I were there.
打从我攻读仙舟文明史专业开始，就一直向往着来罗浮仙舟亲眼瞧瞧那些著述里提到的胜景了。
Since I started studying the history of Xianzhou civilization, I have been longing to visit the famous sites on the Luofu mentioned in the books.
可惜的很，阿基维利消失后，星轨航路也渐渐变得不再稳定，世界与世界的距离越发遥远。学会也渐渐不像过去那般对仙舟狂热了。

It's a shame that the star rail has become unstable since the disappearance of Akivili. The worlds are getting further and further away from each other, and the Guild has gradually lost interest in the Xianzhou.
我的老师，贝尼尼一生热爱仙舟文化，他曾经写信向我描述过鳞渊境中奇异的生态和充满生命力的水体。
My teacher, Bernini, was a fan of Xianzhou culture all his life. He once wrote to me, describing the peculiar ecology in Scalegorge Waterscape and the water that was full of vitality.
可惜，文化研究从来都是冷门领域，没有亮眼的成果就意味着没有经费。到最后，老师羞于见人，再也没有回学会任教，不知去哪儿高就了。

Unfortunately, cultural study has always been a niche thing. Without an impressive result, a study would not be funded. In the end, my teacher never returned to his teaching post out of embarrassment and left to work elsewhere.
唉，而我呢，我是个庸碌的蠢材。我畏惧老师的结局，所以把前半生都浪费在那些更容易得到名声和利益的课题上，临老了才重拾初心，来到这儿。

As for me, I'm just a mediocre and untalented person. In fear of ending up the same way as my teacher, I've wasted most of my life on things that would quickly get me rich and famous. Now that I'm getting older, I have decided to stay true to myself and come here.
帮帮我，{NICKNAME}。老夫想在自己这把老骨头彻底动弹不得前，能继承自己老师的遗志，看看鳞渊境的奇景。
Help me, {NICKNAME}. I want to complete what was left unfinished by my teacher and witness the beautiful Scalegorge Waterscape before I am too old to walk.
啊，当然了，你可以想想再答复我。这一回我不打算再说什么优厚的报酬之类的屁话，我明白，开出这市侩的条件就是在侮辱一个无名客。
Of course, you can take some time to think it over. This time, I won't promise you a handsome pay, as I understand the offer is humiliating to a Nameless.
毕竟咱俩身上有着相同的勇气，学士研究未知，而无名客奔向未知。对吧？
After all, both of us have the same kind of courage. While we scholars study the unknown, the Nameless pursue the unknown, right?
语速急促的演讲一下子让陶德喘不上气，他开始艰难地喘息，等待你做出决定。
Todd gets breathless after speaking too fast. He waits for your decision while catching his breath.
{NICKNAME}，帮帮老陶德的事情，你考虑的怎么样了？
{NICKNAME}, have you decided whether to help me?
哈哈哈，用仙舟人的话该怎么表达呢？真是「铭感五内」啊！
Hahaha, how should I express my gratitude in the Xianzhou language? I'll forever be "in your debt"!
我才发现咱俩都不是仙舟人…算了。
I just realized neither of us are from Xianzhou. Forget it.
还是用优厚报酬侮辱我吧…
Please humiliate me with a handsome pay...
成交，{NICKNAME}。要说我怎么会对你一见如故呢，你身上充满了学会崇尚的品质——实用主义、实用主义、还是实用主义。
It's a deal, {NICKNAME}. No wonder I feel so close to you though we've just met. You're the embodiment of the quality that the Guild reveres — pragmatism!
I'm sorry. I need more time to think about it...
人生嘛，百分之八十是花在等待上，老夫已经等了很久很久啦，不在乎多等那么一点儿时间。
Well, life is all about waiting. Since I've already waited for so long, I don't mind waiting a little longer.
不过如果你愿意考虑，请抓紧一点儿。在生命的户头上，老夫的存额已经所剩不多啦。
Still, please don't make me wait too long. I'm afraid I don't have too much time left.
那么，我们谈谈调查本身吧。
Now, let's talk about the investigation.
我想写一份综述性的报告，讨论鳞渊境的变化，还有龙尊传承制度的得失。当然，这些需要最新的资料。一如既往地……
I'd like to compose a report discussing the changes in Scalegorge Waterscape and the pros and cons of the high elder succession system. For this, I need the latest information. As usual...
...You need me to run errands for you?
...Can't you do the investigation yourself on-site?
是的，是的。但请不要把这当作是一种推诿辛苦劳动的借口。
Yes, but please don't get the wrong idea that I'm trying to avoid physical work.
关节炎先生最近加紧了折磨我的脚步。没有医用外骨骼的辅助，我迈出的每一步都像是在铺满碎玻璃的道路上跪着前进。
Mr. Arthritis has been giving me a hard time whenever I walk. Without the help of the medical exoskeleton, I feel like I'm stepping on glass with every stride I make.
说回正题，老师的信里提到过，他在鳞渊境见过一些持明族的古迹。比如<color=#dbc291ff>供奉「龙尊」的雕像</color>，还有不少精美的<color=#dbc291ff>历史壁画</color>，这些都是持明历史的见证。

Anyway, my teacher mentioned that he had sighted some Vidyadhara monuments in Scalegorge Waterscape in his letters. For example, <color=#dbc291ff>the statue dedicated to the high elder</color> and many beautiful <color=#dbc291ff>historical murals</color>. These bore witness to the Vidyadhara history.
他说自己还见到了沉睡在水底的<color=#dbc291ff>持明卵</color>，我不知道他到底用什么法子钻进海里了？难不成他也能分开海水？开个玩笑，他多半是穿上了潜水服。

He also told me that he had seen a sunken <color=#dbc291ff>Vidyadhara egg</color> underwater. I wonder how he got into the sea. Could he have controlled the water and moved it away? Just kidding. He must have worn a diving suit.
最后好像还有个…呃，嗯…我很难描述的东西。他说那是一道<color=#dbc291ff>「龙形的光芒」</color>？是指「不朽」之龙留给后裔的神迹吗？

The last thing he saw was... umm... quite hard to describe. He said it was a <color=#dbc291ff>dragon-shaped ray of light</color>. Could it have been a miracle left behind by Long the Permanence for their descendants?
总之，你要是见着这些东西，请务必拍张照带给我瞧瞧。我打算把这些佐证资料加入论述报告中。当然，你也会以联名作者的名义在报告上署名。
Anyway, if you see any of those things, please take a picture and show it to me. I'll attach these supporting documents to my report. Of course, I'll make you the co-author.
鳞渊境，鳞渊境…贝尼尼老师到底看到了什么样的奇景呢？
Scalegorge Waterscape... What kind of spectacle did Bernini see?
{NICKNAME}啊，你好。照片的事就拜托你了。
Hi, {NICKNAME}. I'm counting on you for the pictures.
（陶德想看的是龙尊雕像，在这儿附近找找看吧……）
(Todd wants to see the high elder statue. I'll look for it in this area...)
（丹恒，呃不，丹恒的前世，呃不，丹恒前世的前世的前世…留下的文物。真是认识了个了不得的朋友啊。）

(This is an artifact left by Dan Heng... Errr, no, by Dan Heng's previous incarnation... Errr, actually, by his previous incarnation's previous incarnation... Seems I've made a remarkable friend indeed.)
（上面的内容似乎具有某种连续性…看来这就是陶德所说的，记载持明族历史的壁画了。）
(There's a continuity in the story... Looks like this is the mural that records the Vidyadhara history that Todd mentioned.)
Fantastic! Let me have a look!
陶德接收了你拍摄的照片，一张一张细细端详。
Todd takes the pictures from you and scrutinizes them one by one.
抱歉，要让你在一边稍等了…上了年纪，视力和分辨颜色的能力也衰弱了。
I'm sorry for keeping you waiting... As we get older, we can't see and tell colors apart that well.
原来如此，这些景色和老师信里说的一模一样啊。要是能早些欣赏到这片壮丽的……
These views look exactly the same as those described by my teacher. If only I could have admired them earlier...
唔？等等，这个发亮的痕迹是…？我没看错吧，这不是学会的内部标记吗？
Huh? Hold on. What's this shiny mark? Are my eyes failing me? Isn't it a marking of the Guild?
我拍摄时没看到有标记啊…
I didn't notice it when I took the pictures...
噢，这是博识学会内部人员才会使用的特殊光学标识。代表着某位学士抵达此处进行研究，并为同行留下了一些线索。

Oh, this is a special optical marking used only by the members of the Intelligentsia Guild. It shows that a scholar has done research at that particular location and left some clues for his or her peers.
Is there a problem with the pictures?
不，没什么问题，恰恰相反，你拍到了一些有意思的东西。我本以为能通过照片看看这些景色已经是极大的幸运了。
No, there's no problem at all. On the contrary, you captured something interesting. I thought I was lucky enough to be able to see these views through the pictures.
但其中一张照片上，我找到了博识学会内部人员才会使用的特殊光学标识。这代表着某位学士抵达此处进行研究，并为同行留下了一些线索。

In one of the pictures, I noticed a special optical marking used only by the members of the Intelligentsia Guild. It shows that a scholar has done research at that particular location and left some clues for his or her peers.
我收下照片时，学会的处理程序自动进行了辨识，竟然能有这样意外的收获，哈哈。
It was automatically detected by the processing program of the Guild when I received the pictures. What an unexpected and pleasant surprise, haha.
这是你留下的记号吗？贝尼尼老师，你还真有行动力啊。
Did you leave this marking, Bernini? You really were driven.
你肯定这是你老师的记号？
Are you sure this is your master's marking?
做学问这么些年，我唯一肯定的就是不敢肯定。
After all these years of being a scholar, the only thing I am certain of is that nothing is certain.
不过这想来也是顺理成章的事情。毕竟研究热潮早过了，派往仙舟进行文化交流的学者寥寥无几。
But that's a logical explanation. After all, the research hype has long gone, and very few scholars are sent to Xianzhou for cultural exchange.
It's uncivilized to vandalize a historical monument!
容我解释一下，如果一种光学涂料无腐蚀、无毒害，且只能被学会的装置辨识。我个人更喜欢把这种行为称为「保护遗迹」。
Please let me explain. If it is an optical paint that is non-corrosive, harmless, and can only be detected by a device of the Guild, I'd personally call it "protecting history."
因为留下这些记号，就能提醒武装考古学派的笨蛋，别把遗迹给炸上天。
These markings serve as reminders for those moronic Armed Archaeologists, so they won't blow up the historical sites.
What's the purpose of leaving these markings?
老夫也不知道啊。不过既然留下了标识，就意味着线索和指示。贝尼尼老师发现了什么呢？
I have no idea. Since they were left there, they're meant to be clues. What did Bernini discover?
{NICKNAME}，我打算循着这条线索，看看贝尼尼老师留下了什么。
{NICKNAME}, I'm going to follow this lead and see what Bernini has left behind.
You mean "you'll send me there to see"...
哈哈哈，你还真是促狭啊。没错，是拜托你去瞧瞧。
Hahaha, what a nitpicker you are. That's right. I'll need you to check it out for me.
当然你如果执意想让我亲临现场，我也很乐意。只是恐怕你没法接受自己背着我进行考察吧？
Well, if you insist on me being there myself, I'd be more than willing to oblige. However, I'm afraid you can't accept the idea of carrying me on your back when doing the investigation.
我就知道事情不会那么简单。
I knew it wouldn't be so simple.
啊，这就是研究。以一句「为什么」开始，以一句「我就知道事情不会这么简单」结束……
Ah, this is what research is like. It starts with a "why" and ends with an "I knew it wouldn't be so simple"...
我会把学会的识别插件装在你的手机里，这样你就能识别到这种标记，并且把它拍摄下来——咳，按考古领域说法，也许该叫「拓印」，光学拓印。

I'll install the Guild's detection plug-in to your phone. That way, you'll be able to recognize the markings and take pictures of them... Ahem, in terms of archaeology, it should probably be called "optical rubbing."
贝尼尼老师信件里的描述，提到过几个他曾去的地方，我在地图上把它们的位置全都标出来了。
Bernini mentioned several places he had visited in the letters. I've marked them out on the map for you.
你带上手机去那边，只要附近有学会标识的反射信号，插件就会发出提示。找准标记的位置，把它「拓印」下来就行。够简单吧？

Just bring your phone with you. The plug-in will issue a notification if the reflection signal of a nearby marking is detected. Your job is to locate the marking and make a rubbing of it. Easy-peasy, right?
That's all. You may set off now.
怎么了，{NICKNAME}？需要老夫再讲解一遍这次的考察目标吗？
Is there a problem, {NICKNAME}? Should I explain the objectives of this investigation again?
老夫已经在地图上标出了几个地方，这些可能是我的老师贝尼尼考察过的地方。
I've marked out several points on the map. They are the places where Bernini may have investigated.
我把识别插件给你装上啦，所以不必担心摸不着头脑，只要去那儿转一圈，它会提示你哪儿留有学会的标识。
I've installed the plug-in for you so you won't be lost. Just walk around the place, and the plug-in will tell you where to look for the markings.
你只要举起相机，咔嚓一下，把它拍下来给我就行。
Your job is to hold the camera and snap pictures of the markings.
我就知道你足够机灵，听一遍就会。
I knew you were smart enough to get what I meant right away.
出发吧，{NICKNAME}。贝尼尼老师到底在那儿留下了什么呢？真是教人期待。
Set off now, {NICKNAME}. I wonder what Bernini left behind. I can't wait to find out.
请注意，侦测到特定反应，附近存在学会通行光学标识，所属学士：贝尼尼•赛拉诺。
Note: Specific response detected. An optical marking of the guild is nearby. Owner: Scholar Bernini Serrano.
「精准识别」模式已开启，请及时拍摄、记忆、提取…或已任何现有手段保存信息。
Precise Recognition enabled. Please save the information timely by taking pictures, memorizing, extracting, or by any other existing means.
我拿到丹鼎司的标记拓片了。
I've got the rubbings of the Alchemy Commission's markings.
让我瞧瞧，你在建筑上拍到了一个复杂的图形？还是通过拼接形式识别出来的？
Let me take a look. Did you find this complex shape on a building, or was it pieced together by the plug-in?
这…的确是贝尼尼老师的手笔。
This... is indeed the handiwork of Bernini.
陶德翻动着你提供的「拓片」，枯瘦的喉结上下翻滚，猛然咳了起来。
As Todd is fiddling with the rubbing you provided, his withered Adam's apple moves up and down before he starts coughing vigorously.
咳咳，有意思。这些纹样似乎是在描绘某个仙舟历史的重要时刻。
*coughs* Interesting. These motifs seem to depict a significant historical moment in Xianzhou.
瞧瞧这张，一个有着多条手臂的神明形象，背后有枝杈冉冉生长，它描绘的是……
Look at this. It's a depiction of a deity figure with multiple arms and branches growing behind. It portrays...
你很熟悉仙舟历史嘛。对于非专业人士来说，这也许只是一张无意义的图样罢了。但内行的人自然了解它想表达的意义。
You're pretty well-versed in Xianzhou history. This might be an image without any special meaning for a layperson, but a professional can surely understand its meaning.
I must say you're very good at making up stories.
这个「拓片」描绘的是丰饶之主为仙舟赐下建木的瞬间。
This rubbing depicts the moment when the Abundance bestowed the Ambrosial Arbor upon Xianzhou.
陶德压低声音，看了看四周，仿佛在确认自己说的话没有被人听见。
Todd lowers his voice and looks around as though to make sure not a single soul can hear him.
这绝不是我在胡诌。内行的人自然能看懂图案意义，但对于从未接触过知识的人而言，这只是一张无意义的图样罢了。
I'm not making this up. A professional can understand its meaning, but for those without the knowledge, this is just a meaningless drawing.
看看这张，一名勇士弯弓搭箭，将一株巨木射穿。它很显然是在描绘那个脍炙人口的帝弓神话——「巡猎」斫断了建木。
Look at this drawing. A warrior bends his bow and shoots at an enormous tree. It's clearly about The Hunt chopping off the Ambrosial Arbor — a well-known myth about the Reignbow Arbiter.
但这副图样倒没有将射穿建木的功劳归于神明，而是描绘了一个普通人类的形象…有意思。
Yet, instead of crediting the deed to the deity, a regular human form is drawn instead... Interesting.
如果这些图样描绘了仙舟历史的重要阶段，那么它一定不止三个。{NICKNAME}，接下来咱们可以深入探一探鳞渊境。老师去过那儿，一定留下了其他痕迹。

If these drawings are about the important moments in Xianzhou history, there must be more than three. {NICKNAME}, let's go deeper into Scalegorge Waterscape and explore. Since my master went there before, he must have left some other clues.
如果有什么发现，务必把它带给我瞧瞧。至于眼下……
If you find anything, please show me. As for now...
陶德的自动笔记随着他的触碰开始迅速录入信息。
Todd's auto-note starts taking down information rapidly upon his touch.
对了，拿好这个，这是我对这些图样的解读。虽然篇幅不多，但老夫觉得这东西可以扩展成一份不错的仙舟历史报告。
By the way, please take this. You can find my interpretation on the drawings inside. Although it isn't much, it's got potential to be made into a good Xianzhou history report.
剩下的拓片都在这儿了。
All the remaining rubbings are here.
真的没有了？你把我标出来的地方全都找遍了？没有标出来的呢？

陶德的自动笔记随着他触碰开始迅速录入信息。
Todd's auto-note starts taking down information rapidly upon his touch.
这张图样上，一位威严庄重的上位者伸出手，许多船只启航…这想必是在讲述仙舟出航的古老历史。
In this drawing, an authoritative and solemn superior extends his arm to the air as fleets of ships set sail... This must be a depiction of Xianzhou's departure from ancient history.
而这个，一个浑身抽枝发芽的人形…显然这是在描绘魔阴身的形象。最近咱们应该都有见识过它带来的恐怖。这恐怕也是仙舟人逃离死亡后支付的代价……

And this, a figure covered in sprouts... This is obviously a drawing of someone stricken with mara. I believe all of us have witnessed how scary the disease is recently. I'm afraid that's the price the Xianzhou people must pay for escaping death.
而这一张图，许多人形汇聚在一起引导浪涛，淹没巨树。想来应该是描绘了持明族对罗浮的贡献……
And this drawing shows a group of people summoning waves to drown an enormous tree. I suppose this illustrates the contribution of the Vidyadhara to the Luofu...
一、二、三、四、五…再算上之前你找到的三个。虽然顺序凌乱，但这八个图样几乎囊括了仙舟从古至今的重要神话或历史。不过，真奇怪啊……

One, two, three, four, five... and the three you have previously found. Although they aren't in order, the eight drawings almost cover all the significant myths or history of Xianzhou from the past to the present. Still, there's something odd...
学会对仙舟历史有系统的记录，虽然也有魔阴身这般被极力隐藏的秘密……
The Guild has a systemic way of recording Xianzhou history. Indeed, there are secrets like the mara-struck that are kept well-hidden.
不过说到底，这些神话或历史故事也谈不上什么禁忌知识。贝尼尼老师为什么要将这些图样留在丹鼎司和鳞渊境里呢？
Still, these myths and historical stories aren't exactly taboos. Why did Bernini leave these drawings in the Alchemy Commission and Scalegorge Waterscape?
你也发现了吗？除去「魔阴身」这一张所描绘的可怕景象一直被仙舟人着力淡化和隐藏……
Have you noticed it, too? Besides the scary drawing about the mara-struck, a condition the Xianzhou people have been downplaying and hiding desperately...
这些图样描绘的神话或历史故事也谈不上什么禁忌知识。贝尼尼老师为什么要将这些为人所知的信息留在丹鼎司和鳞渊境里呢？
The other myths and historical stories aren't exactly taboos. Why did Bernini leave these drawings in the Alchemy Commission and Scalegorge Waterscape?
是因为自己始终只能找到毫无价值的研究结果而失心疯了？还是其中另有深意？…让我好好想想。
Did he lose his mind because his research was fruitless? Or is there more to this than meets the eye? Let me think about this.
你们学士的心眼可真多啊…
…有什么想法写下来不就好了么？
...Why don't you all just write down what you think?
呵呵，哈哈哈哈…我竟然被如此简单的障眼法给骗住了。
Hehe, hahahaha... I can't believe I was fooled by such simple trickery.
与平日衰老的样子不同，老头以惊人的速度开始专心处理起这些图案来，不时发出梦呓般的自言自语。
Unlike his usual tired and old self, the elderly man starts sorting out the drawings at an astonishing speed. In the meantime, he can be heard muttering to himself like a sleep talker's ramblings.
半晌，陶德从沉迷中回过神来，激动地细喘起来。
After some time, Todd snaps out of his trance and starts gasping in agitation.
Huff... Huff... I... I understand it now.
Have you figured out what your teacher meant?
咳，抱歉，我刚刚太专注于解读了。人上了年纪，反应都会变得迟钝起来。
*coughs* Sorry about that. I was too concentrated on the interpretation. When you start aging, your reactions start to become slow.
我想，贝尼尼学士之所以画下这些人尽皆知的历史，当然是为了告诉后来的学士，在仙舟已追寻不到任何有价值的秘密。
It seems to me that Bernini drew the well-known historical events because he wanted to tell the other scholars that Xianzhou no longer bore any secrets worth pursuing.
他可能被这趟一无所获的旅行重重打击到了，也许当他得知「魔阴身」的存在时，彻底对仙舟长生种的命运产生了幻灭。
The futile trip might have dealt a devastating blow to him. Perhaps, all his hopes for the fate of Xianzhou's long-life species were dashed when he learned about the mara-struck's existence.
所以，他画下这些图案，然后放弃了自己的学术生命，再也没有回学会任教。
So, he drew these drawings, gave up on his career as a scholar, and decided never to return to his teaching post at the Guild.
我想去一趟鳞渊境，凭吊一下我的老师。{NICKNAME}，我的朋友，你能为我引路吗？
I'd like to visit Scalegorge Waterscape to pay respects to my teacher. {NICKNAME}, my friend, could you be my guide?
可以是今天，也可以是明天，为什么不能是现在呢？
We can go later or tomorrow, but why not now?
眼下的鳞渊境可不安全…
Scalegorge Waterscape isn't safe at the moment...
不安全，这不要紧！当然，如果身边能有个武装考古学派的人陪着会更安全些。
It doesn't matter! Of course, it'll be safer if we have the escort of an Armed Archaeologist.
但我想你也一样胜任，不是吗？毕竟你都顺利带回了拓片。
I guess you can protect me too, no? After all, you have brought back the rubbings safely.
关节炎先生不折磨你了？
Has Mr. Arthritis stopped giving you a hard time?
没有，半点都不消停。但我还是得亲自去到那边，以表郑重。
No, he's never spared me. Still, I must be there myself to show my respect.
是贝尼尼学士将我带上了这条道路，也是他向学会举荐我，让我正式成为了一名学士。如果不能再见到他，我想走一遍他走过的路。
Bernini led me to this career and made me an official scholar with his recommendation. Since I can never see him again, I'd like to walk the path he walked before.
在走远路前，先让我吃片镇痛药。
Let me take a painkiller first before the long journey.
陶德颤颤巍巍地从药盒里取出一枚药片，艰难吞了下去。片刻后，他被疼痛折磨的苦脸明显舒展了开来。
Todd takes out a pill from a pillbox with his trembling hand and struggles to swallow it. A while later, his face distorted by pain looks more relaxed.
唔，龙尊雕像么？亲眼所见，真是胜过照片百倍。
Oh, is that the high elder statue? Nothing beats seeing it in person.
老师提到过，传说中持明龙尊受秘法加持，除了能自在变化龙形外，其容貌也万世不改。

According to my teacher, the legendary Vidyadhara high elder is empowered by a secret spell. Not only can the high elder transform into the dragon form at will, but their appearance will also never change.
…唉，看看这张年轻的脸啊，不知愁苦，不落尘埃。
...Alas, look at how youthful the high elder looks. Without trouble and without hardship.
Did your teacher ever meet the high elder?
无论见过还是没见过，长生种应该不会记得咱们短生种的脸——就像一枚水果，昨日鲜活饱满，今日皱缩干瘪，再过几日便是一抔土灰了。

Whether he did or did not, it isn't likely that a long-life species can remember a short-life species like us. We are like fruits that look fresh one day, shrunken and dry the next, and are reduced to dust in yet another few days.
仙舟人看我们，便像这座石雕看我一般。要不了多久，我就不在人世了。
The Xianzhou people regard us just like how this statue would regard me. It won't be long before I'm gone.
现任的龙尊就不长这样。
The current high elder doesn't look like this.
我知道。据说中间有些复杂的变故。可惜学会挖掘不出其中的秘密。
I know. Something complicated took place. It's a shame that the Guild is unable to unearth the secret.
好了吗，还要去下一处呢…
Are you done? We need to head to the next spot...
嘿，年轻人真是缺乏耐心。焦虑本该属于我这样时日无多的老头才对。
Tsk, youngsters nowadays are so impatient. Only dying old people like me should feel anxious.
咱们走吧，去持明卵那儿看看。
Let's go and check out the Vidyadhara eggs.
老人凑近珍珠般的持明卵，仔细观瞧其上的流光与鳞纹，浑然不知时间流逝。
The old man approaches the pearl-like Vidyadhara egg to examine the glimmer and scales on its surface. He is so captivated that he has lost track of time.
狐人虽然长寿，终究无法迈过死亡的大限。仙舟人拥有无尽形寿…却换来了疯狂。
The foxians have a long lifespan, but they aren't immortal. The Xianzhou people have an endless lifespan, but it has driven them to madness...
唯有持明族转世重生，轮回不息。
Only the Vidyadhara undergo rebirths and endless circles of life.
所以…总有「极限」无法被超越。这便是追寻永生会得到的必然结局吗？
So... there will always be an "insurmountable limit." Is this inevitable in the pursuit of immortality?
可我们这些朝生暮死的短生种，真的想永远永远活下去吗？…我们只是想多享受享受青春罢了。
Do we, short-life species, really want to live forever? We just want to stay youthful for as long as possible.
贝尼尼老师显然也是理解了这一点，才会留下那些图案的。
Bernini must have realized that. That is why he has left behind those drawings.
要不要去别的地方瞧瞧？
Should we check out some other places?
陶德仿佛从睡梦中被人叫醒，他下意识地摸了摸自己的口袋，神色开始焦躁起来。
Todd seems like he had just been awakened from his sleep. Instinctively, he reaches for his pocket and immediately looks anxious.
{NICKNAME}，我的笔记本…我的笔记本不见了。
Where did you last use it?
瞧瞧我，年纪大了脑子就不太灵光了。让我想想……
My memory is failing me because of old age. Let me think...
应该是吧？我也不确定，一定是我随手搁置。
I guess so? I'm not sure. I must have misplaced it.
好像在龙尊雕像那儿还用过它来着，我录了几笔，应该是随手放在那儿了。
I think I used it at the high elder statue. I wrote something down and put it down somewhere.
{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}，帮个忙吧，帮我回去找找我的笔记本吧。
