{F#M'girl}{M#M'boy}, please do me a favor and help me look for my notebook.
抱歉，药力过去了，我的关节又开始疼起来了，好像有人撒了一蓬针在里面。我实在挪不动了。
I'm sorry. The effect of the pill is waning, and my joints are hurting like there are needles inside. I can't walk anymore.
在满是皱纹的老脸上，陶德的五官紧紧皱缩了起来。
Todd's wrinkled face crinkles up in pain.
{NICKNAME}，行行好，帮老夫去拿回那本笔记好么？
{NICKNAME}, could you do me a favor and help me retrieve my notebook?
{NICKNAME}，怎么样，找到我的笔记本了吗？
一本笔记被弃置在龙尊雕像的底座附近。
A notebook is left near the base of the high elder statue.
（这是陶德的笔记本没错了，可里面的纸页基本都是空白的，并没有什么笔记啊，奇怪……）
(This is Todd's notebook, but it's empty inside. How strange...)
You really can't do much when you're getting old.
年轻时可以不远千万光年地跨越一颗又一颗星星，但眼前这几步路却像要穿过一座疼痛的地狱，向宇宙尽头跋涉。

When I was young, I could hop from star to star no matter the millions of light-years apart. Now, I feel like I'm going through the pain of hell and going on a journey to the end of the universe when taking just a few steps.
年轻时我总是享受孤独的研究和冒险，觉得自己无所不能。现在连一本笔记丢了，都要请求一位好心的年轻人施舍仁慈。
When I was young, I enjoyed taking solo adventures and trips and felt like there was nothing I couldn't do. Now, I have to beg for the kindness of a youngster to retrieve my lost notebook.
Thanks, {NICKNAME}... I owe you a big one.
（陶德给的坐标显示那标识就在附近，可是这里也不见有。）
(The coordinates given by Todd show that the marking is nearby, but I can't find it here.)
（保险起见，还是打开相机用侦测功能看一下吧？）
(Should I switch on the camera's detection system, just to be safe?)
请注意，侦测到特定反应，附近存在学会通行光学标识，所属学士：贝尼尼•赛拉诺。
Note: Specific response detected. An optical marking of the guild is nearby. Owner: Scholar Bernini Serrano.
（咦…这就是陶德口中的「标识」啊…这个图案有点意思，但怎么是不完整的？）
(Hm... Is this what Todd meant by marking? This drawing is interesting, but it isn't complete.)
（可陶德给的坐标明明就在这里，残缺的标识估计就在这附近了，或许…要在这附近找找？）
(But the coordinate that Todd gave leads here. The missing markings are probably around somewhere... Maybe I should look around?)
（好像也没发现什么特别的地方，还是开启侦测功能看看吧？）
(Nothing really looks out of place, maybe I should switch on the camera's detection system?)
（成功了！果然如陶德所说…这玩意是光敏材料，只有在特定角度折射的光线下才能出现。）
(I got it! Just as Todd said... this thing is made of photosensitive material. It only appears under light refracted at specific angles.)
仿佛就在刚才，他又老了十岁，皮肤上每一道皱纹，那些像是永远擦不干净的污渍似的老人斑变得更加清晰可见。
He looks like he has aged another ten years in an instant. The wrinkles and the age spots that resemble stubborn stains on his face suddenly become more visible.
他望向你的眼神浑浊又疲惫，像无助的乞丐蜷缩在命运的死角里，恳求恩主施舍。
His eyes are bleak and weary when he gazes at you. He looks like a helpless beggar cowering in a dark corner, pleading for charity.
你读懂了这无声的哀求，他希望你保持沉默。
You can hear him silent imploring. He wishes for you to stay silent.
(You glance at him without making a comment.)
谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。答应你的酬劳…我说话算话。
Thanks, {NICKNAME}. I'll pay you as promised.
至于知识，我可不会忘记博识学会的对等回报原则。不过还得再晚一些时候，待我将最近的研究成果进行一次总结，我再来和你分享。
As for the knowledge, I'll never forget the Intelligentsia Guild's rule of reciprocity. I'll summarize my recent research and share the results with you.
凭吊结束了，{NICKNAME}，咱们回去吧，好吗？
I'm done paying my respects. Should we go back, {NICKNAME}?
你和陶德返回了星槎海，一路上，你们再也没有交谈。
Todd and you return to Starskiff Haven. None of you have spoken during the journey.
（陶德要找的持明卵…啧，不同持明卵之间的体积差距也太大了吧……）
(Todd is looking for a Vidyadhara egg. Those eggs differ so much in size...)
（无法握住的光芒，却能被相机拍下来…陶德追寻的应该就是这玩意了……）
(The light is untouchable but can be captured by the camera... This should be the one Todd is looking for...)
（陶德想看的是历史壁画，好像就在这附近……）
(The historical murals Todd is interested in seem to be nearby...)
（陶德想看的持明卵，好像就在这附近……）
(The Vidyadhara egg Todd wants to see seems to be nearby...)
（陶德想看的「龙形光芒」…这里视野开阔，正适合远眺，在这附近找找看吧……）
(Todd wants to see the dragon-shaped ray of light... This place has an unobstructed view. Let's look around here...)
请提交在丹鼎司找到的拓片
Please submit the rubbings found in the Alchemy Commission.
请提交在鳞渊境找到的拓片
Please submit the rubbings found in Scalegorge Waterscape.
（这些标识似乎都是残缺不全的，看来在附近仔细找找缺失的部分了。）
(These markings seem incomplete. I should probably look for the missing parts nearby.)
（壮士挽弓，看上去似乎和仙舟历史有极强的关联，不知道这究竟是在讲述哪一段史实……）
(A warrior with a bow. It seems to have a strong association with Xianzhou's history, but I'm not sure which part it is referring to...)
（这个图案…看着有点像什么巨木的树根，难道是…建木？）
(This drawing... looks like the roots of an enormous tree. Is it... the Ambrosial Arbor?)
（图案上有几艘船，难道是…最初的几艘仙舟？）
(There are some ships in this drawing. Could they be... the first few Xianzhou ships?)
（飞天的巨舟，仙舟人喜欢将宇宙和天空称为「天之外海」，还挺浪漫…只是旅程中有多少艰辛或许只有他们自己知道了……）

(A gigantic flying ship. The Xianzhou people like to call the universe the "seas beyond the sky." How romantic... Perhaps, they are the only ones who understand how arduous the journey through the universe is...)
（这个图案的含义晦暗难明，看上去像是某种对抗，这人背后还有翅膀…这到底是什么玩意？）
(This drawing bears an obscured meaning. It seems to portray some kind of resistance, and there is a being with wings on its back... What does it mean?)
（好邪恶的图案，光是远远地看一眼都好像会沾染上某种不幸…这是隐喻了什么吗？）
(What an evil drawing. It seems like one will be stricken with some misfortune just by looking at it... Is there an intrinsic meaning to it?)
（五个人的剪影？不知这些人是谁……）
(Five silhouettes? I wonder who they are...)
（而且…光线折射的角度会影响标识的拼合，届时还要调整一下相机的视角……）
(Also, the angle of refraction will affect the collocation of the marking. I'll have to adjust the camera angle...)
（…那里好像有光亮反应了？过去看看好了。）
(...Something's glimmering over there? It's worth going to take a look.)
（这么说…只要将相机<color=#dbc291ff>调整到合适的角度</color>，就能将标识<color=#dbc291ff>拼合</color>在一起……）
(So... I just have to get the Camera <color=#dbc291ff>adjusted to the right angle</color> and I'll be able to get the markings <color=#dbc291ff>pieced together</color>...)
（不过，这个标识…图案看上去像一棵树，又像是人，到底是什么玩意？树人？）
(This marking... looks half like a tree and half like a human. What exactly is it? A tree person?)
你隐隐觉得有些不对劲，你产生了一种奇怪的预感：陶德的事似乎并没有这么简单，你和他之间的纠缠也不该止步于此。
You sense something is off and a peculiar feeling of foreboding comes over you: Todd's issues don't seem to be as straightforward as they appear, and your entanglement with him shouldn't stop here.
不知陶德是否真的得到了自己想要的一切……
I wonder if Todd has truly gotten everything he wanted...
也许他得偿所愿，会就此离开。<color=#dbc291ff>也许明天他还会联系我</color>？谁知道呢……
Perhaps he got what he wanted and left. <color=#dbc291ff>Or maybe he'll contact me again tomorrow.</color> Who knows...
Same old me. The one and only.
现在用「老夫」已经不妥了，因为这个身体已经不再衰老了。
Although I probably shouldn't say "old," because this body doesn't grow old anymore.
It's me, Todd. The one and only.
这就是我想和你分享的，身为仙舟文化的研究者，我和我的老师探寻的众多知识中，最珍贵的部分已经被我掌握了。
This is what I want to share with you. As a researcher of Xianzhou culture, my teacher and I have combed through all the literature. And I've gotten a good grasp of all the main precious parts.
嘘——小点声！仙舟人对这样的事情分外警惕。
Hey — Shhh! The Xianzhou people are extremely sensitive to that kind of talk.
...Now that's letting your imagination run wild.
长生不老…仙舟联盟拥有所有短生种梦寐以求的奥秘，但他们藏珍自重。
Immortality... The Xianzhou Alliance possesses a secret which all short-life species crave, but they keep it to themselves.
学会一直渴望通过与联盟打交道，获得稳定安全的长生疗法——整个仙舟学的起源便立足于此。
The Guild is always keen to obtain stable and safe longevity therapies from the Xianzhou Alliance — In fact, it forms the basis for all research into Xianzhou culture.
但一代又一代的学士来到此处，老去，却无功而返。到最后，学会几乎要放弃这项课题了。
But generation after generation of scholars came here, grew old, and returned without success. Until finally, the Guild almost gave up this field completely.
我的老师贝尼尼学士也是其中一人。他本该像所有人一样毫无收获。但他别有奇遇。
My teacher, Scholar Bernini, was one of them. He should have gone home empty-handed just like everyone else. But somehow what he found was adventure.
So you want to enter Scalegorge Waterscape...
留在鳞渊境里的那些图案…
Those patterns left in Scalegorge Waterscape...
是啊，我的老师被一位持明带进了圣地，因此将寻求长生的目光转向了持明。
Yes. A Vidyadhara brought my teacher to this sacred place once, which switched his focus on longevity over to the Vidyadhara.
但这个想法触犯了仙舟「十恶逆」的禁律，他知道自己不可以留下只言片语的线索，因此他使用了学会内部的标识，留下了众多看起来只是在描绘历史的图案。

But that violated the Xianzhou's "Ten Unpardonable Sins." Knowing he couldn't leave behind any traces, he used the Guild's markings and left behind a series of patterns that seemed to merely illustrate history.
而我，识别了这些图案内在的编码，也理解了图案的涵义——持明，持明才是寻求长生最正确的答案。
And now that I've deciphered the code to these patterns, I now understand their hidden meaning — the Vidyadhara pursue longevity in the correct manner.
That's a crime on the Xianzhou.
陶德年轻昂扬的脸上露出一丝受伤的表情。
A look of pain falls across Todd's young face.
我从没想过，自己这辈子竟会和「犯罪」扯上关系…可是，{NICKNAME}，当意识到的时候，我已经这么做了。
I never thought I'd ever have anything to do with "crime" in my life, but... {NICKNAME}, by the time I'd realized it, things had already happened.
我提取了一些持明卵内部的生物样本，没有任何人因此受到伤害。
I took a few samples from inside a Vidyadhara egg. Nobody was harmed in the slightest.
那颗持明卵也保持完好，它只是失去了…一点儿「蛋清」。但它对人的造福却显而易见，不是吗？
That egg also remained intact, but it just lost... a little bit of "egg white." That's all. But its benefit to society is obvious, isn't it?
陶德抬起自己曾经干瘪枯瘦的手，那些皱纹已然消失，露出白皙光滑的肌肤。
Todd raised his once dry and skinny hand to show that his wrinkles had disappeared, revealing fair, smooth skin instead.
我本可以一走了之，我本可以保持沉默，一旦将这件事告知他人，我便要承受锒铛入狱的风险。但…对你，我还是想将这一切坦陈相告。
I could have just walked away. I could've just kept quiet — talking to anyone would mean risking jail time. But... It's you, and I wanted to tell you about all of this.
我一生恪守学会的对等回报原则，现在也是如此。若没有你的帮助，我绝对无法走到今天。
My whole life I've always been sticking to the rule of reciprocity, and nothing's changed now. Without your help, I would never be where I am today.
{NICKNAME}，你是个出类拔萃的年轻人，而老夫…而我，动了收徒的念头。
{NICKNAME}, you are an outstanding young {F#woman}{M#man}, and this old timer... Well, you've inspired me to reconsider taking on an apprentice.
我有个提议：加入学会，我们一起共享这秘密带来的荣誉、财富还有漫长的青春。你可以自由做任何你想做的事情。只要在我们离开罗浮前，守口如瓶。

I've got a proposal for you: Join our Guild! We'll split all the glory, the riches, and the extended youth granted by this secret. You'll be free to do whatever you want. Just keep this a secret until we leave the Luofu.
考虑一下如何？然后<color=#dbc291ff>给我一个答复</color>吧？
How about you think it over? And then <color=#dbc291ff>give me your answer</color>, okay?
作为帮助过我的恩人，我不会亏待你的。
As someone who's shown me kindness before, I will not treat you poorly.
你不明白，你根本不了解这个秘密的价值。你和年轻时的我一样轻狂自大，以为自己会有数不尽的可能，以为青春永不消逝。

You don't get it. You don't understand the true value of this secret at all. I was just a know-it-all just like you at your age, thinking I'd have countless possibilities before me and that youth would never fade.
不，你不懂！你根本不会相信、也不可能想象衰老是怎样一种地狱！
No, you don't understand! You could never believe or even imagine what kind of hell aging actually is!
你不知道被失禁的屈辱浸透的滋味，不用被关节炎的刺痛反复折磨，遗忘和失智还没有将你敏锐的脑瓜啃得千疮百孔……

You don't know what it's like to be soaked in the humiliation of your own incontinence. The never-ending torture of arthritis. Memory loss and dementia have yet to gnaw into your quick-witted mind just yet...
{NICKNAME}... One day, we'll all be old.
我不想成为罪犯的帮凶。
I have no intention of becoming a criminal accomplice.
你害怕？你害怕被仙舟联盟狩猎？
You're scared? Are you scared of being hunted by the Xianzhou Alliance?
不必惊慌，当巨富和掌权者都能从中获益时，你会有无数的保护伞。仙舟将对你无可奈何。
Don't panic. You'll find you have plenty of protection when the super-rich and powerful can profit from something. The Xianzhou will be helpless.
你有某种与生俱来的正义感？还是你相信了仙舟人禁绝丰饶的那套说辞？唉，这都不重要了。
Do you have some sense of innate justice? Or do you believe that rhetoric about how the Xianzhou people forbid Abundance? *sigh* None of that matters now, anyway.
既然你已作出了选择，我想为了安全起见，我该离开了。
You've made your choice, I guess for the sake of my own safety, it's time for me to go.
I knew I was right about you.
I don't plan on becoming an apprentice...
无名客那艰辛的道路对年轻更有吸引力吗？我不勉强你。
Is the path of the Nameless more popular with the kids these days? I won't force things.
你不明白，你根本不了解这个秘密的价值。你和年轻时的我一样轻狂自大，以为自己会有数不尽的可能，以为青春永不消逝。

You don't get it. You don't understand the true value of this secret at all. I was just a know-it-all just like you at your age, thinking I'd have countless possibilities before me and that youth would never fade.
如果你后悔了，随时可以联系我，我的提议永远有效。
If you ever change your mind, come find me any time. My proposal stands in perpetuity.
陶德动作流畅地冲你欠身行礼，迅速转身离去。
Todd bows and shoots you a smooth salute, before turning to quickly leave.
大毫耐心听完你的讲述，面不改色。
Dahao patiently listens to you recount the story, expressionless the whole time.
啧，总有不肯死心的学会探子认定联盟的禁忌只是自私自利的谎言……
Tsk, there's always a Guild scout who reckons that the Alliance's taboos are just hypocritical lies and not for them...
「贪取不死」，这条十恶逆的禁律是绝对不容触碰的。我会将事情呈报给十王司的。谢啦，{NICKNAME}。
"Immortality Theft" is one of the most grievous of felonies and is absolutely unpardonable. I'll report this to the Ten-Lords Commission. Thanks, {NICKNAME}.
这位陶德先生的入关文牒，客栈的登记信息，在地衡司的案牍库中都有录入，不管他接下来拥有多少青春，他恐怕都得在幽囚狱里度过了。

Mr. Todd's customs clearance docket and check-in details from the inn have been saved to the document office at the Realm-Keeping Commission. No matter how many more years his newfound youth affords him, he'll be spending the majority of it behind bars at The Shackling Prison.
十王司勾摄人犯，旁人不得干扰。
The Ten Lords are responsible for trying criminals, and bystanders cannot interfere.
你，我认得你，你是景元将军请来的客人。
You, I recognize you. Aren't you General Jing Yuan's esteemed guest?
他显然不会再回住处了，吾等正在追索其踪迹。
He obviously won't be heading back to his residence. My team is on his tail.
天网恢恢，疏而不漏。他逃不了多久的。
You can't run from the long arm of the law. He won't get far.
一个孩子孤零零地站在海边，不知为何，他稚嫩的面庞有些眼熟。
A child stands alone by the sea and, for some reason, his young face looks rather familiar.
我刚刚在<color=#dbc291ff>龙尊雕像</color>那儿等了一会儿。有个一言不发的人一直看着这里，我以为是十王司的人，就先躲到这儿了。

I was just hanging out over at the <color=#dbc291ff>high elder statue</color> and there was this guy, completely silent, who couldn't take his eyes off me. I thought he could be from the Ten-Lords Commission, so I snuck over here.
你怎么变成这副模样了？
How did you turn into... this?
嘿嘿，一次草率的实验，一个必然的结果。
Hehe, I just was a little sloppy with my experiment. An inevitable result.
我本来以为自己已经获得「长生」了，可惜事情并没有这么简单。
I thought I'd gained immortality, but unfortunately things were not that simple.
我的体形在不断缩小。皮肤、肌肉、内脏…我确实越来越年轻了，只是这份「青春」似乎没有尽头。
My body, it keeps shrinking. My skin, muscles, organs... Indeed, I'm getting younger, you see, but this "youth" doesn't seem to have an off switch.
Kind of like the Vidyadhara tradition of hatching rebirth...
是啊，不过据我了解，他们的「蜕生」是有极限的。
Yes. But so far as I know, their "rebirths" have a limit.
从测试结果看，这个逆向生长的过程不会停止。要不了多久，我就会再也认不得字，看不懂自己写的报告，这和老年痴呆似乎没什么不同。

Test results indicate that this de-aging process seems to have no endpoint. It won't be long before I'm illiterate and won't be able to understand my own reports — which would seem no difference from regular dementia.
最终我也许会像持明一样变成一枚卵，也许会重新成为人类的胚胎——毕竟我并不是持明族。
In the end, I might even become an egg again, just like the Vidyadhara. Perhaps I could become a human embryo once again — I mean, I'm not Vidyadhara, am I?
啊…真是个讽刺的结果，不是吗？
Ahh... Isn't it ironic? Don't you think?
我实现了愿望，只是它不是以我所想的形式。人类最古老的故事都是这么个调调。现在看来，这些陈腔滥调也不无道理。
My wish came true — just not in the form I thought it would take. The oldest stories in human civilization are fables that take this line. Seems like they aren't just a cliche, after all.
What can I help you with?
不不，这回不用了。你已经为我做了很多很多了。比我的老师和弟子们加起来都多。而我已不需要再麻烦任何人了。
No no, no need this time. You've already done so much for me. More than my teachers and apprentices combined. And I don't want to bother anyone else anymore.
需要我请丹鼎司的医生吗？
Do you want me to fetch a healer from the Alchemy Commission?
小陶德的眼神里闪过一丝与年龄不符的傲慢。
Todd's little eyes lit up with a flash of arrogance that was beyond his years.
That look in your eyes... Are you pitying me?
拜托，{NICKNAME}，什么都不用做。你能来和我聊聊，我已经很高兴了。
Please, {NICKNAME}. There really is no need for anything. Just coming to chat with me is cause enough for celebration.
我这一生比大部分不知自己所求，又无法得偿所愿的人强太多了。我著书立说，我授徒无数。虽然没有孩子，但我的学生中有不少让我颇为骄傲。

In this life I've been far better off than most people, who don't even know what they want, let alone how to get it. I became a published author, and I've taken on countless apprentices. I may have no children, but there are several of my students of whom I'm rather proud.
最重要的是，我活着完成了自己的研究结果——虽然它更像一个恶劣的玩笑。但是…够了，够了，我很满足了。
Best of all, I lived to see the results of my research — despite it all turning into a nasty joke. But... Enough, that's enough for now. I'm satisfied.
孩子苹果般的脸蛋似乎又小了一圈。
The child's cherub face seemed to be smaller yet again.
…抱歉，之前对你说了很过分的话。
...Sorry. That was a lot to just dump on you.
我只是…想向你道声谢，{NICKNAME}，自始至终你都从旁见证着我。
I just wanted to... say thanks to you, {NICKNAME}, for being there for me right from the start.
对了，我把自己的实验数据都记录下来了，想怎么处理，转交给我的弟子也好，销毁它也罢，甚至是给仙舟人…一切都由你处置。

By the way, I've recorded all the data from my experiments here — whether you want to pass it on to my apprentices, destroy it, or even hand it over to the Xianzhou authorities... The choice is yours.
是呀，我寻摸着{F#小妹妹}{M#小兄弟}身手不凡，又帮龙女大人解过围，深得她的信任……
Yes, you have extraordinary skills, and you earned her trust when you rescued her...
深得信任？什么时候的事？
Earned her trust? When did that happen?
你在魔阴身手下救过她嘛。这也算是过命的交情了。
You rescued her from the mara-struck... I'd say she's forever in your debt.
若由你去见她，她多半就不会一溜烟跑了。
If you go see her, I'm sure she won't run away.
你们怎么老是让我跑腿啊？
Why do people here keep making me run errands?
若不是手里没几个人，我也不至于要求告外援。不过，这件事确实勉强算得上跑腿。
If I had more people, I wouldn't have to ask for external help. But as things stand...
嚯，这么爽快！好啊，大毫在此拜谢恩公了。
Hah, that was fast! Thanks for your help.
是这样的，持明族的龙女，白露大人，又从丹鼎司逃出来了。之所以说「又」，是因为这位龙女性子跳脱，她出逃一事，地衡司早就司空见惯。

Here's the situation: Lady Bailu, the Vidyadhara Dragon Lady, has escaped from the Alchemy Commission again. I say "again" because the Realm-Keeping Commission has seen more than a few of her bad-tempered escapes.
你头一回抵达仙舟吧？那解释起来可麻烦了。持明族是创建仙舟联盟的三大种族之一。
This must be your first time on the Xianzhou... It's a long story. The Vidyadhara is one of the three races that established the Xianzhou Alliance.
他们的血脉传承与我们仙舟人不同。持明具有某种与生俱来的生命力，据说那是「不朽」的遗赠。
Their bloodline is different from us Xianzhou natives. The Vidyadhara are born with great vitality, the gift of the Permanence, as they say.
旁的就不说了，这些和今天的话题没关系。
That's all you need to know. The rest is irrelevant to what's happening today.
What does a Dragon Lady do exactly?
龙女…不是什么职位。只是大部分人对那位小姐的爱称罢了。
A Dragon Lady... isn't an official position. People address her that way out of love.
持明族设有「龙尊」的称号代代相传，地位形同族长。不过那是只有身具龙相，传承龙心的持明人才能接任的。

The Vidyadhara "high elder," on the other hand, is a position similar to a chief — it's been passed down from generation to generation. But only the Vidyadhara that possess draconic features and inherit the dragon heart can be successors.
白露小姐，便是罗浮上持明族未来的龙尊。
And Miss Bailu is the Vidyadhara's future high elder on the Luofu.
传闻她有仅凭触摸和垂泪就能治愈伤患的天分。其后更是拜入丹鼎司研习医道，所以大家也都尊称她为「衔药龙女」。
The rumor has always been that she can heal the wounded merely by touching them and shedding tears. She also studied medicine in the Alchemy Commission. That's why her other title is "Healer Lady."
也不能说是关。持明族的风俗与仙舟人总有些不同。白露天赋异禀，又是要接掌持明的人选，族中把她看得紧一些也是常事。

Not imprisoned exactly... Vidyadhara customs are somewhat different from Xianzhou native customs. Miss Bailu has incredible talents and is next in line to rule over the Vidyadhara — it's normal that her people would want to keep a close eye on her.
不过这位白露小姐的性子可不是一般的跳脱，总能找准时机从自己的潜邸里溜出来。
However, she also has a somewhat free spirit... She always manages to find a way to escape her residence.
之前龙女翘家，都由我们地衡司负责盯梢，派人将她抓住送回丹鼎司。
It used to be the duty of the Realm-Keeping Commission to go after her and take her back to the Alchemy Commission.
不过，这次情况不太一样，星核灾变一生，人力问题就成了无底窟窿。而且，就算我们抓住龙女大人，也暂时没法送她回去。
But, this time is different. Because of the Stellaron crisis, we're constantly short of manpower. Besides, even if we catch the Dragon Lady, we can't take her back anytime soon.
不知道你听说了没有，有人封闭了与丹鼎司有关的几个洞天。
I don't know if you heard — someone locked down the delves connected to the Alchemy Commission.
现在那里没人能进去，也没有人出来，可以说是音信全无。依兄弟愚见，我在其中嗅出了阴谋的味道。
Now nobody can get in or out — it's completely cut off. Something very fishy is going on.
那这龙女是怎么出来的？
So how did the Dragon Lady get out?
这也是我好奇的地方，她多半是乘着洞天闭锁之前溜了出来。也许她知道丹鼎司里发生了什么……
That's what I want to know. I guess she sneaked out before the delves were locked down. She might even know what happened in the Alchemy Commission...
我明明看见了街上有医士…
那些医士都是派驻在其他洞天的医馆里。我已询问过情况了，他们对发生的事情一无所知。
Those doctors came from apothecaries in other delves. I've asked them, and they don't have the slightest clue what's going on.
Then... is there really anything I can do?
我想拜托你两件事：第一是找到龙女大人，在丹鼎司洞天解除封锁之前，照顾好她，别让她跑丢了就行。
I'd like you to help with two things. First, find the Dragon Lady and take care of her until the Alchemy Commission delves are reopened. Don't lose sight of her.
第二件事也许有点难理解…希望能让她别再治疗魔阴身了。
The second thing might be a bit hard to understand... I want you to stop her from treating the mara-struck.
Can't the Realm-Keeping Commission take care of her?
这不是人手不足嘛。龙女大人狡猾得很，让她乖乖待在地衡司公廨里，肯定会趁我们不注意的时候偷溜出去，毕竟，这种事情也不是第一回了。

Like I said — we don't have enough people! The Dragon Lady is smart. If we try to keep her in the Realm-Keeping Commission Chancery, she'll sneak out the first chance she gets. Trust me, it's happened before...
何况翘家出逃算什么罪过，她的身份地位摆在那，我们还能把她关进牢里不成？这事儿只好拜托给你啦。

Besides, it isn't a crime for her to run away from her residence. And even if it were, given her status, we couldn't exactly stick her in jail and throw away the key! You're the only person we can turn to.
为什么不能治疗魔阴身？
Why stop her from treating the mara-struck?
魔阴身并非「疾病」。即便是衔药龙女，也只能稍缓其进程。
Being stricken with mara isn't like catching a curable disease. All the Healer Lady can do is slow the process.
拿你们短生种来说吧，你们会将「衰老」看作是疾病吗？
Take you short-life species as an example. Do you consider aging a disease?
衰老可以被延缓，但终有一天会到来。对仙舟人来说，魔阴身也是如此，只是它比死亡可怕得多。魔阴身是仙舟人血脉中无法回避的诅咒。

Aging can be slowed, but it's still unavoidable — just like being stricken with mara for the people of the Xianzhou... Unfortunately, becoming mara-struck is more terrifying than death. It's an inevitable curse in the blood of Xianzhou natives.
那魔阴身到底该怎么办？
Then, what can be done for them?
仙舟早有应对手段。魔阴身即将发作时，自有十王司的冥差、判官接引——总之，这不是丹鼎司应该插手的事情。

The Xianzhou has long had other methods. When mara is about to strike, the spiritfarers and judges of the Ten-Lords Commission promptly take the afflicted away. It's not something the Alchemy Commission should be meddling in.
再说了，魔阴身固然可怕，只要控制得当，并不会造成什么危害。长乐天这里有地衡司与云骑军，足以应对意外。
Mara is scary, but it won't cause any harm if you have it under control. We have the Realm-Keeping Commission and Cloud Knights here in Exalting Sanctum — more than enough to handle any eventuality.
龙女大人暂时压抑了魔阴身发作，也就意味十王司可能忽略那些人。让龙女大人治疗下去，无异于放任「魔阴身」流窜市井，制造恐慌。

However, the Dragon Lady's mara-suppression could lead to mara-struck falling under the Ten-Lords Commission's radar. If we let her carry on, we'll have mara-struck on every street corner — people will panic!
现在突发危机，魔阴身的处置方式更该谨慎，不能儿戏。
Seeing as we're already dealing with one crisis, we need to be extra vigilant when dealing with the mara-struck. This is not something that can be taken lightly.
I see. Leave it to me.
你是景元将军和符玄大人的贵客，地衡司对你自然是很信任的。
You're the distinguished guest of General Jing Yuan and Diviner Fu Xuan. As such, you also have the full trust of the Realm-Keeping Commission.
恕兄弟我多嘴一句，如今的丹鼎司十分可疑，如果你遇上他们的人想带走龙女，最好留个心眼。
Oh, one more thing... There's a lot of suspicion surrounding the Alchemy Commission these days. If you discover someone from the commission on the hunt for the Dragon Lady, watch your step.
It'll be a piece of cake.
Babysitting? No thanks, I'd rather watch paint dry.
这也是无奈之举，地衡司会重金感谢你的帮助。
There's no other way. The Realm-Keeping Commission will pay you handsomely for your help.
I have a feeling this is more complicated than it sounds...
你别多虑。看顾孩子确实是桩烦心事，但一定难不倒将军大人的贵客。
Bah, don't fret. Looking after children is a pain, but as the general's distinguished guest, I know you'll do great.
白露大人，我都说了这一趟你要听我的安排。你施展能力时，太引人瞩目了，我们还有正事要办啊。
Lady Bailu, I told you to follow my plan — you draw attention when you use your powers... We still have to take care of the matter at hand.
本小姐只是治病救人嘛，再说你刚才也不在…你刚才到哪儿去啦？
I was only tending to the sick! Besides, you weren't even here just now... Where did you go?
我这身体的情况，白露大人你最清楚了。广场上要是有十王司的人，我可就……
You know full well about my situation, Lady Bailu. If there are people from the Ten-Lords Commission present in the plaza, then—
Hello, Ten-Lords Commission here, you're under arrest.
…你根本就不是十王司的冥差，别在这平白无故地吓人。
...You're not a Ten-Lords spiritfarer — why are you trying to frighten people!?
龙女大人？可算是找到你了。
The Dragon Lady? I finally found you.
…你不是十王司的冥差。呼，别在这平白无故地吓人哪。
...You're not a Ten-Lords spiritfarer — why are you trying to frighten people!?
本小姐这次出逃…离开丹鼎司，是官方认证的「外出问诊」！不不不是擅自出逃！这位医护姐姐可以为我作证！
Hmph, I only escaped — I—I mean LEFT the Alchemy Commission for an official medical visit! There's nothing more to it, okay!? The nurse here can vouch for me!
白露大人别慌张，你看清了，{F#她}{M#他}也不是丹鼎司的人。
Easy, Lady Bailu — {F#she's}{M#he's} clearly not from the Alchemy Commission either.
可恶，别吓我呀…啊，等等，我见过你。
Ugh, then don't scare me like that... Ah, wait a minute — I've seen you before.
在刚才那个广场上，我被一群魔阴身包围了，是{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}出手把他们全都摆平了，对吧？我记得是你！你来得正好。
In the plaza — I was surrounded by all those mara-struck... You rescued me, right? It was you! You came just in time.
半夏，你不是不知道接下来怎么走吗，{F#她}{M#他}身体结实，武艺又好，肯定帮得上忙。
Banxia, you don't know the way from here, right? This {F#girl's}{M#guy's} no pushover — {F#she'll}{M#he'll} be able to help.
不行啊，白露大人，我信不过{F#她}{M#他}……
No, Lady Bailu. I don't trust {F#her}{M#him}...
I'm afraid that's not your call to make.
白露大人有我照顾，不劳你费心。
I'm taking care of Lady Bailu. You don't need to worry.
我是受地衡司之托来找白露的。
I was asked by the Realm-Keeping Commission to find Bailu.
告诉地衡司的人，白露大人由我们丹鼎司来照顾就行，别多管闲事。
Tell the Realm-Keeping Commission that Lady Bailu is in the Alchemy Commission's care... and not to meddle in other people's affairs.
我是整个银河最值得信任的人。
I'm the most trustworthy person in the whole cosmos.
通常说这种话的人都不值得信任。
你们两个先别吵了，那边好像是丹鼎司的人！
You two, stop arguing! I think there's someone from the Alchemy Commission over there...
你先帮我们藏起来！事情等会儿再说！
You — help us hide first! We'll talk later!
这个房间看上去是能够暂时隐藏住白露她们两人的。
This room seems to be able to hide them for a moment.
你快去帮我们把那个人支开，拜托了！有话我们一会儿慢慢说。
Help us get rid of him, please! We'll have plenty of time to talk later.
白露和半夏两人躲进了房间里压低了声音，一般人很难发现她们。
Bailu and Banxia hid in the room and lowered their voices. They should be hard to discover.
（总之，先去问问，再决定该怎么办吧。）
(Hmm... I'll ask first and then decide what to do.)
干脆假装是站在牌桌后指点江山的牌友吧，只要双手抱胸、时不时摇摇头，就能顺利融入环境气氛之中…但是这根本称不上是藏身处，再去找找还有没有更合适的地方吧。

Of course, you can pretend to be a player and stand beside a game table, commenting on other players' moves with some head-shaking and finger-pointing. However, it's not a proper hiding spot. You shall find a better place to hide.
如果你和医护都像白露一样身高吃亏，那么这座石造景观后面也许是个不错的藏身处。再去找找还有没有更合适的地方吧。
If you and the nurse are both as short as Bailu, then this stone design would be enough to hide you. You shall find a better place to hide.
这位{F#小妹妹}{M#小兄弟}请留步，我想问你一点儿事情。
You there, excuse me. I want to ask you something.
Make it quick, I'm in a hurry.
别急别急，我比你还急，你先听我问完好吧？
Hmph, you're not the only one. Can you at least hear me out first?
我什么都不知道，别问我。
You came to the wrong person — I don't know anything.
我还没有问呢，你先听我问完好吧？
I haven't asked anything yet. At least hear me out first?
请问你是否在找一位小妹妹？
Are you looking for a little girl?
什么小妹妹？你误会了，我确实在找人没错，你先听我把话说完。
Little girl? You've got the wrong person. I am looking for someone, though...
有一位身着丹鼎司衣装的女性，跟你差不多高，好像是朝着渡口的那个方向过去了。你有没有瞧见呢？
Have you seen a woman wearing an Alchemy Commission uniform? She's about the same height as you — I think she was heading towards the jetty.
我和她是同道，但她却好像一直躲着我，嘿嘿……
We walk the same path, but it would seem she's hiding from me, hehe...
I haven't seen anyone like that.
是吗，谢谢你，那我去渡口那边找找。
Very well, thank you. I'll head over to the jetty.
You won't find the person you're looking for there.
现在你又知道我要找的是什么人了。我反倒要问问，你是什么人？
...Say, now that you know who I'm looking for, why don't you tell me who you are?
…我其实看见了，在相反的方向。
...Come to think of it, I did see her — she was going in the opposite direction.
相反的方向？不对吧，我就是从反方向过来的。
The opposite direction? It can't be. I just came from that direction.
你不会是帮她遮掩吧，看来你知道的不少，我得好好问问。
Are you covering for her? You know something alright — I have a few more questions for you.
你也是从丹鼎司洞天过来的？
Did you come from the Alchemy Commission delves?
I just came from the Alchemy Commission.
什么？丹鼎司洞天早已封锁，若不是药王的莳者……
What? The Alchemy Commission delves were locked down ages ago. If you aren't a disciple, then...
你是在套我的话吧，你说你是从丹鼎司洞天过来的，证据呢？
You're trying to get me to say something, aren't you? You said you came from the Alchemy Commission. Where's your proof?
你是怎么出来的，我也是。
I came here the same way you did.
啧，把别人当傻子糊弄很过瘾么？
Tsk, you think this is a joke?
我是景元将军的客人，懂了吧？
I'm General Jing Yuan's guest. Understand?
景元？我明白啦，那就是将军的狗了。
Jing Yuan? I understand. That makes you a general's lackey.
我看你就是在包庇那个女人，看来你知道的不少，我得好好问问。
You're covering for that woman — it's obvious. I'm not done questioning you...
I'm here to catch her as well.
"Mercy of Sanctus Medicus, the Arbor's new growth..."
对不上暗号，也敢自称与我同事。
You claim to walk the same path, yet you don't even know the code.
看来你知道的不少，我得好好问问。
Still, it's clear you know something... I'm not done questioning you.
Mercy of Sanctus Medicus, the Arbor's new growth.
你为什么又把这句口号重复了一遍？你听说过哪个组织的接头暗号是一模一样的……
Ha, repeating it back to me? What kind of organization would devise a code like that...?
你听过哪个组织的接头暗号是一模一样的……
What kind of organization would devise a code like that...?
看来你知道的不少，我得好好问问。
Still, it's clear you know something... I'm not done questioning you.
Clemency of Sanctus Medicus, the Eternity's pure birth!
魁首说过很多次，把「慈怀」说成「怀慈」的，定斩不赦。
The master said many times that anyone using "clemency" instead of "mercy" should be killed without exception.
看来你知道的不少，我得好好问问。
Still, it's clear you know something... I'm not done questioning you.
Unity of Discipuli Medici, the Immortality's true path.
…要是这都能蒙对的话，我就无话可说了。
看来你我同为莳者，{F#姐妹}{M#兄弟}。
Good to be acquainted with another disciple, {F#sister}{M#brother}.
事关泄密，我把上面的指令交给你，你看了指示便会明白。
There's been a leak. Here are the orders — read them and you'll understand.
抓住叛徒要紧，我先去另一个方向搜索了。
We must catch the traitor. I'll go search in another direction.
（这个丹鼎司的医士不太对劲，应该仔细调查一下。）
(There's more to this Alchemy Commission doctor than meets the eye. I wonder if I can glean more clues from him.)
（好像还有些重要线索错过了，应该再仔细调查一下。）
(Feels like I'm still missing an important clue... more investigation needed.)
（仅从穿着上来看，这人是丹鼎司的医士。）
(That's an Alchemy Commission doctor's uniform alright.)
（也许他就是大毫说的「可疑」之人…）
(Dahao did say there was suspicion surrounding the Alchemy Commission...)
太多人喜欢把秘密揉作一团，揣进裤兜。
Secrets are often scrunched up and shoved into pockets — why not have a look?
一只最新款的玉兆手镯，不能解锁；还有一枚金色的徽章。
A jade abacus bracelet with the latest design that cannot be unlocked, with a Golden Badge.
一张折叠的信纸，上面写着「药王慈怀，建木生发。莳者一心，同登仙道」。
A piece of folded letter that reads: "Mercy of Sanctus Medicus, the Arbor's new growth. Unity of Discipuli Medici, the Immortality's true path."
上衣内侧，裤兜里放不下的东西适合放在这里。
Inside the jacket. Things that cannot be put in the pants' pockets can be placed here.
仙舟上除却化外民少有人会持有钱包这样的东西。
Few people apart from the outworlders on Xianzhou would have a wallet.
你手中的钱包里没有钱，你在其中找到了一张叠好的照片。
No money has been found in this wallet. You can only see a folded photo inside of it.
一张特殊的药方，涂涂改改，似乎和魔阴身有点关系……
A special but scratched-out prescription, which seems to have something to do with the Mara-struck.
藏在鞋底，复古的藏物方式……
Hiding things in shoes... Such a classic method.
还没脱下此人的靴子，你感觉鼻尖仿佛在凑近一座闷烧的地狱……
Before taking off his shoes, you can feel that your nose is breathing fire from a burning hell...
你回来找我们了，也就是安全的意思？
You're back! Does that mean we're safe now?
跟踪你们的人都已经处理了。
The person following you has been dealt with.
已经处理了，也就是安全的意思？
Dealt with...? Does that mean we're safe now?
白露和半夏确定没有他人追上，从房间里走了出来。
After making sure they are not pursued anymore, Bailu and Banxia walk out of the room.
怎么样？那家伙果然是打算把本小姐抓回丹鼎司的吧，我早就猜到了。
What happened? That man wanted to catch me and take me back to the Alchemy Commission, right? I knew it!
你看，这位{F#少女}{M#少年}还是值得信任的吧？
See? I told you this {F#girl}{M#guy} was trustworthy.
{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}确实帮助了我们，但我怕节外生枝…还是请回吧。
...Thank you for helping us, but I'm worried you being here could just complicate matters further... Please leave us be.
刚才那人要找的人是你，半夏。
That man was looking for you, Banxia.
啊？他们找半夏姐姐干嘛，肯定是来抓我啦。
Huh? Why were they looking for Miss Banxia? That can't be right, they must've been looking for me.
他在找与我同高的丹鼎司女性。
He was looking for an Alchemy Commission woman "about the same height" as me.
（能够指出丹鼎司医士要找的人就是半夏，这样的证据是什么？）
(How can I prove the doctor from the Alchemy Commission was looking for Banxia?)
药王秘传的秘信，信中指明了「背叛药王秘传的医护半夏已经逃出了丹鼎司洞天」。
The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus letter indicates that Banxia, the nurse who betrayed the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus, has already escaped the Alchemy Commission delve.
奇奇怪怪的药方，好像没有提到任何有关半夏的信息。
A strange prescription, doesn't seem to be anything to do with Banxia
（…现在还不知道药方跟半夏之间的关系，也许另有他用。）
(...Does this prescription really have anything to do with Banxia?)
这段证词，和这枚漂亮的徽章…没有产生什么矛盾。
The testimony doesn't seem at all at odds with the beautiful badge...
W—Wait a minute! I'll keep looking.
只是一张普通的家庭合照，没有什么疑点。
An ordinary family photo, nothing to see here...
W—Wait a minute! I'll keep looking.
等等，{NICKNAME}，我听说过「药王秘传」。
Wait, {NICKNAME}, I've heard of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus.
那些人都是崇拜魔阴身还有「寿瘟祸祖」的狂热信徒？可半夏不是这样的人。她…她还让我来治疗魔阴身呢。
Aren't they those crazy followers that worship the mara-struck and the Plagues Author? But Banxia's nothing like them... She... wanted me to treat the mara-struck.
白露大人！我们不是商量好了吗…这件事绝不能告诉外人。
Lady Bailu! You promised you wouldn't tell anyone about that!
（「治疗魔阴身」很可疑，有进一步证明她是药王秘传的证据吗？）
(Wanted her to treat the mara-struck? Suspicious... Could she be a disciple of Sanctus Medicus? I wonder if I have any evidence...)
这封信已经证明了半夏与药王秘传存在关系，但不是决定性证据。
The letter has proven a link between Banxia and the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus, but it's not decisive proof
W—Wait a minute! I'll keep looking.
奇怪的药方，模糊的笔记上写着「延缓魔阴身」。
The strange prescription has a note in scribbled writing: "slowing the mara-struck process"
这是从药王秘传那里得到的药方，白露你能看看吗？
This is a prescription from the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus. Bailu, can you take a look?
这段证词，和这枚漂亮的徽章…没有产生什么矛盾。
The testimony doesn't seem at all at odds with the beautiful badge...
W—Wait a minute! I'll keep looking.
只是一张普通的家庭合照，没有什么疑点。
An ordinary family photo, nothing to see here...
W—Wait a minute! I'll keep looking.
这个药方的字迹…和你交给我的那张一模一样。
The handwriting on this prescription is exactly the same as on the one you gave to me...
这么说来，你真是「药王秘传」的人？哼，半夏姐姐是个骗子！大骗子！
Banxia... are you really from the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus? Hmph, you're a liar! A great big liar!
<color=#dbc291ff>我的确就是「药王秘传」的人。</color>那个丹鼎司的医士，也确实是他们派来抓捕我的。
<color=#dbc291ff>I am a member of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus,</color> and that doctor from the Alchemy Commission was sent to catch me.
但我…我绝不是要伤害白露大人！恰恰相反，我带着她从那儿离开，也无形中保护了她的安全。
But I... I never meant to harm Lady Bailu! On the contrary, by taking her away from that place, I was protecting her.
出来之前，我和白露大人有一桩交易。这件事情非办到不可。求求你，请不要带走她！
I made a deal with Lady Bailu before we escaped — we have an urgent task to complete. Please, don't take her away!
(I should ask Bailu what she thinks about all this first.)
可恶。真是治伤治病治不了人心险恶啊…还以为有人真心实意帮我逃出丹鼎司。
Ugh... Treating wounds and diseases is one thing, but curing the evils of humanity...? There I was thinking someone helped me escape the Alchemy Commission because they genuinely wanted to help me.
罢了罢了，燥气郁心，不利长高。不跟她置气了。
Hmph, enough. Being angry will stunt my growth... Let's put this behind us.
You've heard of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus...
我也只是听说过罢了。要不是在丹鼎司观颐台的卷牍里看过一些记载，「药王秘传」这四个字仙舟上知道的人怕也不多。
I don't know much. If it weren't for those scrolls in the Alchemy Commission's Elixir Research Terrace, I doubt anyone in the Xianzhou would've heard of them.
很久以前——有多久呢，对长生种来说都算的上很久了，仙舟把这个信奉「寿瘟祸祖」的组织连根拔起了。
A long time ago, even by the standards of long-life species, the Xianzhou eliminated an organization that worshiped the "Plagues Author."
要问为什么，大概是因为「药王秘传」这帮人脑子坏掉了，是真正意义上的脑子坏掉喔。
Why were they eliminated? Because they held an incredibly dangerous notion.
仙舟人想从魔阴身的宿命中解脱，重归恒常寂灭。但药王秘传却觉得魔阴身是赐福，是脱离肉身凡胎的进化。

Xianzhou people wanted to be released from the threat of mara and return to the stability of life and death. Yet the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus believed that being stricken with mara was a blessing — a natural evolutionary step in casting off the mortal coil.
话说得漂亮，不就是任自己变成没有人性的怪物吗？所以云骑军和十王司联手铲除了他们的教团。
Sounds great, right? Well, only if you think becoming a monster devoid of all humanity is a good thing. That's why the Cloud Knights and Ten-Lords Commission cooperated to eliminate the organization.
不过销声匿迹是一回事，传承断绝是另一回事。就跟医病一样，症候不显，才最麻烦。现在看来，这些人不仅没消失，还在暗中扩张哩。

But just because you can't see something doesn't mean it isn't there. It's like eradicating a sickness — easier to do when the symptoms are visible. In hindsight, not only did the Disciples endure, they expanded the organization in secret.
Just what does it mean to be mara-struck?
你问的问题，仙舟人自己也问了千百遍。
The people of the Xianzhou have asked themselves that question thousands of times.
数不清的医道智者都投身在破解这一诅咒的研究上。可惜，除了几个似是而非的答案之外，谁也没有结论。
Countless doctors and sages have dedicated their lives to researching a cure for the curse. Tragically, besides a few theories, no one has come to a definite conclusion.
只能说，「寿瘟祸祖」赐予的东西，血肉凡胎谁也参不透。
In truth, nobody in this world can fully comprehend the curse of the Plagues Author.
有医士认为，仙舟人肉身不朽，但记忆却随岁月与日俱增。这种增长，最终会达到极限，脑袋里容不下更多记忆了。
Some doctors believe that because the people of the Xianzhou have immortal bodies, their memories accumulate until no more can be stored in the brain.
只有那些最鲜明、最极端的部分还能存在——通常不会是什么快乐的回忆，多是些后悔、痛恨、悲伤之类的负面积淀。
Only the most vivid and extreme memories persist... but such memories are usually ones of regret, hatred, grief, and other negative emotions.
「魔阴身」的征兆就是从此开始显现。不过，比这更可怕的还是之后肉身上的变化……
That's when the symptoms of being stricken with mara begin to show. But the physical changes are the most terrifying...
Then, why are you still treating the mara-struck?
出现魔阴身的仙舟人总是很早就被十王司的冥差判官带走了。我心想，若能在他们上路前，让他们不必那么痛苦，让他们能体面离开……
When symptoms strike, the mara-struck are quickly taken away by the spiritfarers and judges of the Ten-Lords Commission. I just want to reduce their suffering and let them leave with dignity...
不过，地衡司的人说的也没错……
But the people of the Realm-Keeping Commission do have a point...
丹鼎司和药王秘传有什么关系？
What's the connection between the Alchemy Commission and the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus?
这种事情，我怎么会知道啦。他们又不会在脸上写着「我是药王秘传」。
How should I know? It's not like commission members walk around with "Disciple of Sanctus Medicus" on their foreheads.
I don't have any other questions.
很抱歉，我没能对白露大人坦诚相告。但我有不得已的苦衷……
I'm sorry I wasn't honest with Lady Bailu, but I had no other choice...
你和龙女达成了什么交易？
What deal did you make with the Dragon Lady?
我想求龙女大人能救回我的爱人，所以，我用「带她逃离丹鼎司」作为交换条件……
I asked her to save my beloved. In return, I helped her escape from the Alchemy Commission...
虽然这样做触犯了持明族的律条，丹鼎司也一定会惩罚我。但我顾不着那么多了，我不能眼睁睁看着那人送命。所以……
I broke many of the Vidyadhara's laws, and the Alchemy Commission is bound to punish me, but I just can't let my beloved die...
我还有一些问题想要问你…
I still have some questions for you...
我剩下的时间已不多了，但你问吧……
I don't have much time left, but go ahead...
Why did you hide all this from Bailu?
我本以为只要逃出来便没事了…没想到那些人还是追来了。
I thought we'd be fine after we escaped... I didn't know those people would come after us.
加入「药王秘传」这种事，还有在其中经历的种种，我实在没法对那个孩子开口……
I just couldn't find a way to tell her I was a disciple... and about all the things I experienced there...
你虽然对我很好，但却不该瞒着我。最讨厌大人说一半藏一半，要东猜西猜，太头疼哩。
You've been nice to me, but you shouldn't have kept me in the dark. I hate when grownups hide secrets and only tell you half the story — it's such a headache.
他叫梁沐，是个来求药的短生种。
His name is Liangmu. He's a short-life species that requested an elixir.
我原本觉得，短生种短如弹指般的性命，又何必再苦苦挣扎。但看到他忍着病痛坚持接受治疗的样子，我的心也跟着揪紧起来了。
I used to think that the suffering of short-life species was nothing. But my heart... my heart ached when I saw him in such pain.
那种感受又甜蜜，又痛苦。我这辈子从来没体会过，我没想过自己会爱上一个短生种。
It's something I never expected to experience in my lifetime — falling in love with a short-life species... such a bittersweet feeling.
于是我想到了白露大人，凡人腠疾，龙女垂泪便足以医治。可是能让白露大人亲自问诊的病历已经排到三十年以后了。
That's when I thought of Lady Bailu — the Dragon Lady that can heal mortals through tears alone. But it would take <unbreak>30</unbreak> years for her to treat all those in need.
我只能出此下策，大人，原谅我……
I had no choice but to come up with this plan. Please forgive me...
You said you didn't have much time left?
我已有堕入魔阴身的征兆了。
I'm already showing symptoms of the mara-struck...
「药王秘传」视魔阴身为「登仙」，常常服食各种怪异的方子加以催化。我也不例外。
The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus regard the mara-struck as saints — they take all kinds of strange medicines to speed up the process... I was no exception.
可自从认识了梁沐，我突然觉得，登仙是件很可怕的事。就算不老不死，要是不认得他，不记得他，或者变成了他不认识的样子……

But since I met Liangmu, I've realized that these "saints" are horrible creatures. Even if I were to become immortal, to not recognize him, to forget him or become something that he doesn't recognize...
所以我停服了丹方，逃走了。这一路上多亏了龙女大人的帮助，我才能安然走到这里。
That's why I stopped taking the medicines and escaped. Thanks to the Dragon Lady, I made it here safely.
That's all I wanted to ask.
白露，你想跟她一起走吗？
Bailu, do you want to go with her?
哼，虽然她有事瞒着我。但我毕竟答应了她，要去救她的心上人。
Hmph, she hid everything from me... but I promised her I'd save her beloved.
看了这么多年诊，还是不习惯见到有人受苦哩。
After all these years, I'm still not used to seeing people suffer.
半夏，说说接下来你想做什么吧。
Banxia, tell us what you want to do next.
直接说吧，你想要我做什么？
Cut to the chase, what do you want me to do?
我不想被「药王秘传」或者十王司的人盘查。我们得找个法子，将我们不引人瞩目地送到流云渡去。
I can't let the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus or the Ten-Lords Commission find us. We need to find a way to get to Cloudford without drawing their attention.
在下是地衡司勤务广大。有急事的话，请到公廨内部…啊，这不是衔药龙女大人吗？
I'm Guangda, an orderly from the Realm-Keeping Commission. If you have an urgent issue, please go to the chancery... Huh? Aren't you the Healer Lady?
We want to ask you a favor.
见着龙女大人，还不下跪。
仙舟上哪有这种陈规旧俗啊。
Hah, the Xianzhou did away with all that nonsense eras ago.
如果是公事公办的话，请到公廨内部，大毫、松烟他们应该就在里面…我只是一个小小勤务，涉及龙女大人的事情，只能说是爱莫能助。

If it's official business you're here about, you'll need to go to the chancery — Dahao and Songyan should be there. I'm just an orderly... As for anything concerning the Dragon Lady, I'm sorry, but there's nothing I can do.
你误会了，不是我，而是我的一个朋友。明白吗？我的朋友有星槎通行许可证，能帮你们速速离开…不是我啊，这个人不是我。
You've got it wrong. That's not my ship, it's my friend's. My friend has a starskiff travel permit and can help you leave quickly... I'm not the one who owns the ship.
少啰嗦，我就问你是可以走、还是不可以走？
Just cut to the chase. Can we take the ship or not?
可以走、可以走，小声点儿。只要价格到位，我都能送…啊不对，是我那位朋友都能送，各位放心好了。怎么样，现在就出发吗？
Yes, you can. but please keep it down! I can take you there if the price is right... Uh, I mean, my friend can take you there... so relax. How about it? Shall we set off?
你们先去流云渡，我之后过来。
Go to Cloudford. I'll catch up with you later.
…病情不等人，我们就只等一会儿，一会儿。
...I don't have long. We'll wait for a while... just a short while.
我想搭乘你的船去流云渡…
I'd like to take your ship to Cloudford...
How about it? Shall we set off?
Not now, I have other things to do.
How about it? Shall we set off?
孩子望向海水，口中哼哼着谁也听不懂的童谣。
The child gazes back at the sea, humming a nursery rhyme that nobody can understand.
他偶尔察觉到你的存在，好奇地看向你，但很快却无法集中注意力，又被奇异的景观夺去了心神。
Every now and again, he seems to notice you and he looks on with curiosity. But before long, he can no longer concentrate as he's distracted by the fantastical landscape.
The sea seems to be calling for the child.
一道身影伫立在此，遥望着远方的雕像，一言不发。
A figure is standing here, completely silent as it gazes at a statue in the distance.
男人一语不发地看着你。
The guy stares at you in silence.
下次再这么称呼我，我会用剑回答。
Call me that again and I'll be answering you with my sword.
艾利欧对你另有安排，所以你可以活着离开了。
Elio has other plans for you, so you may leave here alive.
那个男人，他得到满足了么？
人终有一死，有的人含恨而终，有的人能够寻得自己的埋骨之地。
Everybody dies. Some people die harboring hatred, while others get to visit their own burial site.
可我却只能活着，无休无止地活着。
But I can only live, and keep living on, endlessly forever.
男人长叹一声，不再看你。
The man lets out a lengthy sigh and stops looking at you.
一个孩子孤零零地站在陶德时常等待的地方，不知为何，他稚嫩的面庞有些眼熟。
A child stands alone in the place where Todd was always waiting. For some reason, his young face looks rather familiar.
你怎么变成这副模样了？
How did you turn into... this?
嘿嘿，一次草率的实验，一个必然的结果。
Hehe, I just was a little sloppy with my experiment. An inevitable result.
我本来以为自己已经获得「长生」了，可惜，事情并没有这么简单。
I thought I'd gained immortality, but unfortunately things were not that simple.
我的体形在不断缩小。皮肤、肌肉、内脏…我确实越来越年轻了，只是这份「青春」似乎没有尽头。
My body, it keeps shrinking. My skin, muscles, organs... Indeed, I'm getting younger, you see, but this "youth" doesn't seem to have an off switch.
Kind of like the Vidyadhara tradition of hatching rebirth...
是啊，不过据我了解，他们的「蜕生」是有极限的。
Yes. But so far as I know, their "rebirths" have a limit.
从测试结果看，这个逆向生长的过程不会停止。要不了多久，我就会再也认不得字，看不懂自己写的报告，这和老年痴呆似乎没什么不同。

Test results indicate that this de-aging process seems to have no endpoint. It won't be long before I'm illiterate and won't be able to understand my own reports — which would seem no difference from regular dementia.
最终我也许会像持明一样变成一枚卵，也许会重新成为人类的胚胎——毕竟我并不是持明族。
In the end, I might even become an egg again, just like the Vidyadhara. Perhaps I could become a human embryo once again — I mean, I'm not Vidyadhara, am I?
啊…真是个讽刺的结果，不是吗？
Ahh... Isn't it ironic? Don't you think?
我实现了愿望，只是它不是以我所想的形式。人类最古老的故事都是这么个调调。现在看来，这些陈腔滥调也不无道理。
My wish came true — just not in the form I thought it would take. The oldest stories in human civilization are fables that take this line. Seems like they aren't just a cliche, after all.
What can I help you with?
你已经为我做了很多很多了。比我的老师和弟子们加起来都多。而我已不需要再麻烦任何人了。
You've already done so much for me. More than my teachers and apprentices combined. And I don't want to bother anyone else anymore.
需要我请丹鼎司的医生吗？
Do you want me to fetch a healer from the Alchemy Commission?
拜托，{NICKNAME}，什么都不用做。你能来和我聊聊，我已经很高兴了。
Please, {NICKNAME}. There really is no need for anything. Just coming to chat with me is cause enough for celebration.
孩子以年龄不符的老成姿势托腮想了片刻。
The boy cups his chin in thought for a brief moment in a pose that is beyond his age.
如果你真心想帮我做点什么的话……
If you really are sincere about helping me with something...
就带我去仙舟的集市里转转，买些吃的，到处玩玩吧！医生们不总是喜欢在病情无可救药时对病人家属说「想吃什么就吃什么，带他到处玩玩」吗？

Just take me for a spin around the market, buy me some snacks, and have some fun with me! Don't doctors always say that when a terminal case is hopeless to "Take them out to eat whatever they want, and go around and have fun"?
在我变成一个真正不谙世事的婴儿之前，我想纵情快乐一下。
I want to have one last good time before I turn into a mindless baby.
貘馍卷！鸣藕糕！琼实鸟串！来看看哎！
Tuskpir wrap! Songlotus cake! Berrypheasant skewers! Come and get 'em!
说来可笑，考察仙舟文化时，我竟然从没留意过这些街头小吃。学会对那些烟火气浓重、却无利可图的东西向来是不感兴趣的。
It's silly, but when I was researching Xianzhou culture, I never paid attention to these street snacks. The Guild never had much time for ordinary knowledge unless they were profitable.
Can you please ask for me...
我想吃琼实鸟串！我就是想吃琼实鸟串！给我买点尝尝嘛？
I want berrypheasant skewers! I just want berrypheasant skewers! Can you please get me some?
嘿嘿，语气没拿捏好，没办法，老夫我不当小孩太多年，说话难免有些不习惯，你体谅下吧。
Hehe, I can't help putting on this tone. I haven't been a child for so long that I'm not really used to speaking. Forgive me.
什么？我还以为你刚才说要帮我做些什么是真心的？结果还是老夫自己掏钱吗？
What? I thought you were sincere about wanting to help me do something? But now you're asking me to fork out for it?
…我、我不！我不嘛！我就要你买给我！我就要吃琼实鸟串！
...I, I won't! I won't do it! I want you to buy it for me! I want to eat a berrypheasant skewer!
年轻人，这是你弟弟吗？这孩子长得真可爱，你可不能对弟弟这么粗声粗气说话，会吓着小孩的。
Young {F#woman}{M#man}, is this your little brother? He's so cute. You can't be so harsh like that to a kid, or you'll scare him.
Alright... Let me have a taste...
孩子将红彤彤的糖串放进嘴里，一口一个。
The boy places the bright red candies into his mouth, one at a time.
大部分人这一生除了童年外，少有无忧无虑的快乐。成长、求学、工作…不停追逐这追逐那。
Most people rarely get to enjoy such a carefree feeling, except in childhood. Growing up, studying, working... Always chasing this or that thing.
这么一想，长生种的日子还真是没有盼头啊…他们是怎么忍受几百年如一日无休无止的重复生活的？
Thinking about it like this, doesn't living like a long-life species seem hopeless... How can they put up with the endless repetition of life for hundreds of years?
对他们来说，生活应该就像我嘴里这颗糖，起初甜蜜，片刻就消失的无影无踪，只留下空落落的渴望。
For them, life should be like this candy here in my mouth. Sweet at first, but then soon disappearing without a trace just to leave behind nothing but empty desire.
嘻嘻，我竟然梦寐以求一直想成为他们。
Teehee, and in spite of everything I always dreamed of becoming one of them.
The boy smacked his lips, craving more.
吃完了。接下来该去哪儿呢？我想…去长乐天瞧瞧！
All finished. Where should we go next? I wanna... go to the Exalting Sanctum!
孩子一溜烟跑得不见踪影了。
The boy vanished without a trace.
你在磨磨蹭蹭什么啊，老夫可等不起你。快点快点，琼实鸟串！琼实鸟串！
Quit dilly-dallying, this old timer can't wait around for you all day! Quickly, c'mon! Berrypheasant skewers! Berrypheasant skewers!
说起来，我可去过很多地方
Speaking of which, I've been around the block, y'know...
庇尔波因特、翁瓦克、泰科铵…
还有吃喝不停的宴会之星！
And Banquet Star, where you never stop eating!
……等你长大了可一定要到仙舟外面瞧瞧哦！
...Once you grow older, you simply have to step off the Xianzhou to take a look at the cosmos outside!
我去过庇尔波因特、翁瓦克、泰科铵、还有朋克洛德…哦对了，你那么喜欢品尝美食，一定要去宴会之星看看！
I've been to Pier Point, Vonwacq, Taikiyan, and even Punklorde... By the way, if it's a foodie paradise you're after, then you simply have to check out Banquet Star!
对了，小朋友，我以前在这附近没见过你呀。
By the way, kid, I haven't seen you around here before.
我却见过你哦，白露大人。
I've seen you before though, Lady Bailu.
唉唉，用不着这么拘礼。本小姐跑出来的时候就是个与民同乐的食客。初次见面，你袋袋里就没带着点零食什么的，快快献上大家一起口福同享？
Please, no need for formalities. I came out here just to be another diner among the people. You don't happen to have any snacks in your bag, do you? Why don't you share with us what you've got?
对不住了，本来有根琼实鸟串，不过眼下都被我吃光了。
I'm sorry. I had a berrypheasant skewer but I already ate it all up.
啊，这也太没劲了。不过不打紧，我明天还在这附近玩儿，你可以带上吃的来这儿找我。
Oh, that's a pity. No matter, I'll be playing nearby here tomorrow, so you can bring me something to eat and come here.
How's it going, O miracle doctor?
Mr. Todd, we should get going...
你就不能把我当个孩子看？让听到了，会有心理阴影的。
Can't you just treat me like a kid? If other people hear it, they'll be traumatized.
别自说自话到处乱跑行吧？
Just stop talking to yourself and running off, okay?
哎呀，我的监护人来了，咱们之间的秘密谈话今天就到这儿吧。
Oops, here comes my guardian. That's enough of our secret conversation for today, then.
好啊，你明天要记得带零食来喔。
Alright, remember to bring some snacks with you tomorrow.
你带着陶德告别了白露。
You take Todd to bid farewell to Bailu.
你现在越来越有家长的样子啦。跑到别的小孩面前，把自家的孩子抓走。
Now you're starting to get the hang of this parenting business. Running over to other kids and snatching away your own child.
说起来，这样的情景在我小时候也经常发生啊。每当我想和邻家扎着辫子的小姑娘一起玩耍时，我的父母就会像闹钟一样准时出现，把我带回书桌前。

Speaking of which, this kind of thing used to happen all the time when I was a kid. Whenever I wanted to play together with the pig-tailed girl next door, my parents would show up like an alarm clock and march me back to my desk.
我一直在想，要是那时候他们不总是出现打扰咱们，也许我现在该是十几个孩子的爷爷了……
I always wondered, what if they weren't always bothering me like that? Perhaps I'd have sired several grandchildren by now...
Don't think about what could have been...
Where else do you want to go?
还真是噩梦重现呀，让人一丁点儿玩耍的心情也没有了。
It's a real nightmare. Man did it seriously kill my mood for playtime.
接下来，该是去波月古海边吹吹风的时候了。
Next up, let's go to Lunarescent Depths when it's windy.
小小的孩子孤零零地坐在海边。
The little boy sits alone beside the sea.
我很好，听听海浪的声音，望着这片海，我从未如此清醒过。
I'm fine, just listening to the waves and watching the ocean. I've never felt so wide awake.
我这一生比大部分不知自己所求，又无法得偿所愿的人强太多了。我著书立说，我授徒无数。虽然没有孩子，但我的学生中有不少让我颇为骄傲。

In this life I've been far better off than most people, who don't even know what they want, let alone how to get it. I became a published author, and I've taken on countless apprentices. I may have no children, but there are several of my students of whom I'm rather proud.
最重要的是，我活着完成了自己的研究结果，得到了学士们所追求的答案——虽然它更像一个恶劣的玩笑。
Best of all, I lived to see the results of my research and got the answers to what all the scholars were vying for — despite it all turning into a nasty joke.
那么，最后向你道声谢，{NICKNAME}，自始至终你都从旁见证着我。
So finally it's time for me to say thanks to you, {NICKNAME}, for being there for me right from the start.
对了，我把自己的实验数据都记录下来了，想怎么处理，转交给我的弟子也好，销毁它也罢，甚至是给仙舟人…一切都由你处置。

By the way, I've recorded all the data from my experiments here — whether you want to pass it on to my apprentices, destroy it, or even hand it over to the Xianzhou authorities... The choice is yours.
突然想到老师他最后的归宿，就是在这片古海里与鱼共游吧…而我，也会迎来这样的结局吗？
It suddenly occurred to me that my teacher's final moments were spent swimming here with the fish in these ancient waters... And what of I? Will I also face such an ending?
问题没有答案，小小的孩子不再言语。
The question went unanswered, and the child spoke no further.
走吧，{NICKNAME}，留我一个人静静吧。
孩子望向海水，口中哼哼着谁也听不懂的童谣。
The child gazes back at the sea, humming a nursery rhyme that nobody can understand.
他偶尔察觉到你的存在，好奇地看向你，但很快却无法集中注意力，又被奇异的景观夺去了心神。
Every now and again, he seems to notice you and he looks on with curiosity. But before long, he can no longer concentrate as he's distracted by the fantastical landscape.
The sea seems to be calling for the child.
你不知陶德未来有何打算，但你隐隐感到你们的命运仍有交汇之处。
You're not sure about Todd's future plans, but you somehow feel that your destinies will still intertwine somewhere.
没想到，陶德的研究成功了。他胆子可真不小……
Surprisingly, Todd's research was successful. He's got some guts...
这家伙准备躲哪儿去呢？又打算怎么离开仙舟呢？<color=#dbc291ff>等着瞧，也许用不了一日，他又该来求我帮忙了</color>吧？
Where is this guy planning to hide, and how does he intend to leave the Xianzhou? <color=#dbc291ff>Let's wait and see — he might come asking for my help again in less than a day.</color>
半夏，你的魔阴身征兆越发明显了。我葫芦里还有些安神药，要不要喝一点再走？
Banxia, your symptoms are getting worse... I have some soothing tonic in my gourd. Would you like some before we set off?
谢谢你，白露大人…但是，不能再继续耽误下去了。
Thanks, Lady Bailu... but we can't delay any longer.
流云渡不就是一个码头吗？
病重的人不该在医馆里吗？
Is this really the best place for the sick?
是我让梁沐躲在这儿的，我不能让「药王秘传」的人找到他，只好让他躲进流云渡的集装箱里。
I told Liangmu to hide in a Cloudford shipping container.— I couldn't let the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus find him.
为什么药王秘传的人会知道他？
Why would the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus know him?
因为我向梁沐承诺，要给他带去长生不老药。要让他和我一样，成为仙舟人。
Because I promised Liangmu I'd bring him an elixir of immortality... to make him one of the people of the Xianzhou, like me.
你不知道那是仙舟律法中不赦十恶之一吗？
You know that's one of the Xianzhou's Ten Unpardonable Sins, right?
我知道，可那时我对「药王秘传」的内幕一无所知，只知道丹鼎司内部，有些人在复现古老的秘药。
Yes... but I knew nothing about the treachery of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus back then. I only knew that people in the Alchemy Commission were involved in ancient, clandestine medicines.
但是我错了。那根本不是长生赐福，甚至连「拙劣的模仿」都称不上……
But I was wrong. It wasn't a blessing of immortality, not even a poor imitation...
...They were turning humans into monsters, weren't they...
那些疯子只把短生种视作入药的材料，可消耗的实验品。
Short-life species are expendable to those maniacs — they use them in experiments to develop their medicines.
留给我的时间不多，就只剩下最后一味「药」了。
I don't have much time left, and I only have one solution left...
戴葫芦的矮个子小姑娘。
The short girlie carrying a gourd around.
白露大人，你还记得我们的「交易」对吧？
Lady Bailu, you still remember our deal, right?
你帮我逃出丹鼎司，我会帮你救人。
You help me escape the Alchemy Commission, I save your sweetheart.
谢谢你，白露大人。我们约定好的地方就在那边，走吧。
Thank you, Lady Bailu. The place we arranged to meet up is ahead. Let's go.
我不能，我不能忘记他……我必须到那里。
I can't... I can't forget him... I must get there.
糟了，她开始胡言乱语了。
This is bad. She's starting to lose touch with reality.
安神药怕是没用了，得、得放电！
The soothing tonic might not work anymore. This calls for... shock treatment!
…怎么会，他去哪儿了？我们说好了就在这里……
How can that be? Where is he? We agreed to meet here...
M—My head... How can that be?
{NICKNAME}快帮忙，让她先在这里休息一下，我来想点办法。
{NICKNAME}, let her rest here for a while. I'll think of something.
可是，他、他没在这里，我们还得找到他……
B—But he's not here. We still need to find him...
Nurse! Get a hold of yourself!
{NICKNAME}，能拜托你在附近找找有没有什么线索吗？半夏姐姐的心上人应该不会无缘无故地离开的。
{NICKNAME}, can you see if there are any clues nearby? I don't think Banxia's sweetheart would leave for no reason.
Maybe something bad happened to him...
拜托，别再说这些刺激人的话啦！
dO yOu GuYs NoT hAvE pHoNeS?
…你是想说玉兆对吧？咱们从丹鼎司逃出来时情况紧急，哪有时间带上。
...Are you talking about jade abacuses? We escaped the Alchemy Commission in a hurry — didn't have time to bring them.
病患这边就交给我了，毕竟我才是丹鼎司的衔药龙女嘛！
Leave the patient to me — I'm the Healer Lady of the Alchemy Commission, after all!
（以这个区域为中心，找找周围有没有什么留下的线索吧。）
(Let's start with this area and see if we can find any clues nearby.)
He's much more interesting than a long-life species...
Tell me, what do you remember...
（看起来那人被药王秘传的爪牙追踪，不得不转移了位置。）
(It looks like Banxia's sweetheart was tracked by the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus and had to switch location.)
(I should go and tell Banxia and Bailu.)
Stay still... this ointment will help.
那一天，病人们都躺下了，我却看到他不停画着一片树林。我问他，不好好休息还在做什么？
There was a day when all the other patients were lying in bed, but I found him painting a forest. I told him he was supposed to be resting.
他说：「我想去看一眼翁瓦克的树海。为了完成想做的事情，我必须不停去画那看不见的未来。我一定要治好自己，就算锒铛入狱、被驱逐出境。」
He said, "I want to see the vast forests of Vonwacq one day... and to make a dream a reality, you must paint an invisible future. I must get well by any means, even if it means jail or exile."
我从来没有过自己想做的事，只是日复一日地从事着医护工作。
I never had anything I wanted to do. I just got on with my nursing work, day in and day out.
有时候我会想，就这么快进到下一个一百年吧，生活实在是太无聊、太琐碎了，直接快进到生命结束都没问题。
Sometimes I'd feel like a century was a pointless, trivial blink of an eye... and that it wouldn't matter if it was all over by the next blink.
我不想知道那些年里发生了什么难熬的事情，我没有兴趣知道自己这一生经历了什么，反正都是些琐碎的事。
I wasn't interested in anything that had happened to me up to then — the things I'd experienced. None of it mattered...
听到梁沐说话的那一瞬间，我突然很悲伤。人一生的时光不该是这样的，至少不应该连这段时间的拥有者都对它无所谓。
...but the moment I heard Liangmu's words, I suddenly felt sad. A person shouldn't feel that way about their life... They shouldn't be indifferent to the time they own.
梁沐…让我睁开了眼睛。我的眼里，他闪闪发光。
Liangmu... he opened my eyes. He was like a shining star.
对不起，这种情感，我不太明白。
Sorry, I don't quite understand this feeling.
大人…为何一直想逃离丹鼎司呢？您不喜欢治病救人吗？
My lady... why do you always run away from the Alchemy Commission? Don't you like treating people?
我…天生就有治病救人的本事。但你问我喜欢不喜欢，我实在答不上来。
I... It's true I was born with a gift for healing... but as for whether I like it or not, I couldn't tell you.
打记事起我就在学医，从来没人问过我喜欢不喜欢，持明族那些老东西们不在乎，我也不在乎。
I've been studying medicine for as long as I can remember. Nobody's ever asked me whether I like it. Those old Vidyadhara fools don't care, and neither do I.
治疗就像是吃饭喝水一样，实在是没有感觉，非要说的话，是讨厌？
Treating others is like eating and drinking for me. I don't have any feeling towards it. If I had to choose, I think I'd say I hate it...
不过要是治好了一个人，那个人能变得更好更健康的话，我喜欢！所以，你给我快快振作起来！
But I like it when someone gets better after I treat them! So you need to pull yourself together!
Argh... I think... I can understand you...
怎么样，本小姐拜托你找的线索呢？
What happened? Did you find any clues?
(Hand over the note you picked up.)
咳咳咳…这里已经被药王秘传盯上了吗？
*coughing* ...The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus already had their eye on this place?
他没事就好。咱们…接着走……
*sigh* I just hope he's okay. Let's... keep walking...
不行，你知道自己现在是什么状况吗？你放心，我会找到梁沐，医好他的。{NICKNAME}你把半夏送回星槎海的医馆去。
No way. Do you know how bad your condition is? Don't worry, I'll find Liangmu and treat him. {NICKNAME}, send Banxia back to the apothecary in Starskiff Haven.
不，正是因为我非常清楚自己是个什么情况，我改主意了…我想再见他最后一面。
No, I know exactly how bad my condition is. That's why I've changed my mind... I want to see him one last time.
对了，{NICKNAME}，还有一件事要拜托你。你见识过魔阴身有多危险，要是真到了那个时候…请你一定要保护好龙女大人。
{NICKNAME}, I have a favor to ask you. You've seen for yourself how dangerous the mara-struck can be. If the time comes... please protect the Dragon Lady.
...Thank you, I'm glad to hear you say that.
刚才我就注意到了，这附近有好多药王秘传的爪牙。
I caught sight of a lot of disciples in the area just now.
出了我这样的叛徒，想必他们也坐不住了。
I'm a traitor to them... They won't stand idly by if they lay eyes on me.
要是你们抵挡不了，就把我交给他们…
If you can't fend them off... Just let me go with them...
…清理叛徒用得着这么多人吗？
...Does one traitor require so many people?
Lady Bailu... I can't go on anymore.
哼，他根本没有在这里等我们，难道说又躲到别的地方了吗？
Ugh, he isn't waiting for us here. Did he hide somewhere else?
我在这里等到了你，就意味着紫夷失手了。哦，这不是龙女么，你这是想将功补过的意思吗？
There you are! Ziyi clearly failed then. Oh, and if it isn't the Dragon Lady... Trying to make up for past sins, are we?
看来留在这里守株待兔是没有错的，半夏妹妹，可算是在这里等到你了。哦，你还带来了衔药龙女，这是打算将功补过的意思吗？
Waiting here for you works well, Banxia. Our patience gets rewarded! Oh, I see you've brought us the Healer Lady. Trying to make up for the lost time?
呸呸呸！补你个大头鬼！你个欠收拾的药罐子，看本小姐我一尾巴抽到你爹妈认不出来！
Blah, blah, blah — I've heard enough out of you already! If it's a beating you want, allow me to do the honors!
小小丫头，我一会儿再收拾你。来人，先把这个叛徒拿下，一定要从她身上把名单搜出来。
I'll deal with you in a moment, little girl. Men! Take the traitor and make sure you get the list from her.
Am I invisible to you or what?
你不说话，我真当你不存在了。你又是哪位呀？
Hmph, it felt that way until you opened your trap. Who are you?
…你这是求饶的样子吗？冲我背后作揖干什么！
...Is that how you beg for mercy? What the heck are you doing?
（这十王司的判官好厉害，可是半夏你……）
(This Ten-Lords Commission judge packs a punch! But Banxia, you—)
（嘘，她要是察觉了我的征兆，一定会动手的。）
(Shh, if she notices my symptoms, she won't hesitate.)
「药王秘传」为何对汝等紧追不放？
Why are the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus pursuing you?
我们只是一般路过的游客。
我们是丹鼎司的救护小队。
We're an Alchemy Commission rescue squad.
此二人身着丹鼎司服色。
I only see two of you in Alchemy Commission attire.
那个女孩，把头抬起来。神色游移，眸焦涣散…莫不是有了魔阴身的征兆？
You, girl — raise your head. You have a wandering look in your eyes... A mara-struck look, perhaps?
救、救命啊判官大姐姐！我们前不久才从被封锁的洞天里逃出来…那、那群坏家伙紧咬着咱们不放，这位医护小姐怕得都站不稳啦。
H—Help us, Miss Judge! We only just managed to escape before the delves were locked down... Those evil men have been chasing us — this nurse is so scared she can barely stand!
报告，雪衣大人，在流云渡西南方发现了药王秘传的残党！
Madam Xueyi, the remnants of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus have been found in the southwest of Cloudford!
此处不安全，汝等最好立刻离开。
This place isn't secure. You should leave immediately.
Soldiers! See them on their way!
在云骑军的护送下，你们被带到了流云渡较为安全的地方。
Under escort of the Cloud Knights, you were taken to a safer place in Cloudford.
十王司的判官，真是怪人一个。半夏姐姐你没事吧？
That's the strangest judge I've ever come across... Banxia, are you alright?
哈…呼……都已经到了这一步了，我是不会回去的，一定得见到他最后一面。
Ha... phew... I made it this far... I won't go back without seeing him one last time.
…我们走这边，看看能不能绕过那些云骑军。
...Let's go this way and see if we can avoid those Cloud Knights.
前方有持械恶徒，闲杂人等返回城区避难。
There are armed villains up ahead. If you're not on duty here, return to the city for your own safety.
那是云骑军、还有药王秘传。
There are Cloud Knights and Disciples of Sanctus Medicus over there.
他就在那扇门后边…明明就差一点。
He's right behind that door... We're almost there.
但是那儿有云骑军守着…等等，本小姐想到了一个主意。
But there are Cloud Knights stationed there... Wait, I have an idea.
该去教训一下挡路的家伙了。
About time we taught some roadblocks a lesson.
喂！你要是闹出了什么动静，那判官肯定会再来的啦！
Hey! Don't cause a commotion or the judge will be on our case again for sure!
该去贿赂一下挡路的老爷了。
云骑军军纪严明，你要是想贿赂，反倒是会被抓起来的。
Cloud Knights are well-disciplined — you'll just get yourself arrested.
只能是卖惨讲讲故事了。
哪儿有让你说书的时间啊……
We don't have time for storytelling...
刚才我们路过了云骑军和药王秘传战斗过的地方，不是有一些躺倒的士兵吗……
...Didn't we pass some soldiers resting on the way over here? Y'know, the place where the Cloud Knights and Disciples of Sanctus Medicus fought...
我们换上云骑军的盔甲?
Can we wear the Cloud Knights' armor?
我们换上云骑军的盔甲?
Can we wear the Cloud Knights' armor?
唔，给他们做些紧急治疗，换他们一身盔甲，应该很公平吧？
Hmm, a spot of emergency treatment in exchange for some armor. Sounds fair to me!
你们为伤重晕厥的云骑军进行了救治，又手忙脚乱凑齐合身的甲胄，穿在身上。
You gave medical treatment to the wounded Cloud Knights that have lost consciousness, then grabbed some armor and put it on.
*coughing*... There's no time to lose. Let's go.
你们就说自己是押送我回丹鼎司的士兵，肯定不会露馅的。
Just tell them you're soldiers guiding me back to the Alchemy Commission — they won't know any better!
你要去哪里？我们还得抓紧时间通过那个哨卡呢！
Where are you going? We need to get through that sentry post pronto!
站住！这个小姑娘是干什么的？
…你、你可听说过丹鼎司衔药龙女？
...S—Surely you know the Healer Lady of Alchemy Commission?
仔细一看确实，头上有犄角，身后有尾巴……
Hmm... she does have horns and a tail...
我们要把她押送回丹鼎司。
We need to escort her back to the Alchemy Commission.
我听说过龙女大人总是喜欢偷偷跑出丹鼎司，没想到有幸见到本尊。
I heard the Dragon Lady liked to sneak away from the commission, but I never thought I'd have the honor of seeing her in person.
我没有怀疑她的身份，你们是要将她押送回丹鼎司对吧？
I knew that! You're escorting her back to the Alchemy Commission, right?
不嘛，不嘛，我还没有玩够呢，我不要回去，我不想回丹鼎司！
No, no! I haven't finished playing yet! I don't wanna go back to the Alchemy Commission!
咳咳咳…最近的港口就在前面吗？
*coughing* Is the nearest harbor up ahead?
没错，这位士兵，你的身体状况好像不太好，前方有随行的军医……
That's right. You don't seem very well, soldier. We have a military doctor up ahead...
不必在意，我有龙女大人帮助。
Don't worry! I have the Dragon Lady with me.
我还要到处去吃吃喝喝，不要把我带走了呀，我不要回去！我不要回去——
I still wanna play! I'm hungry! Don't take me back — I don't wanna go back! I'm not going back!
快快快，我们已经通过哨卡了，现在可以去那里把衣服换回去了。
Quick, we've passed through the sentry post, let's change back into our clothes.
怎样，本小姐那逼真的演出是不是很厉害，那可是本小姐哭过无数回练习出来的！
How was that? Wasn't my acting amazing? Let me tell you, a performance like that requires a lot of temper-tantrum practice!
要是没有本小姐卖力假哭，你们肯定都过不了哨卡。
If I hadn't pretended to cry, you wouldn't have got through the sentry post.
话说回来，半夏姐姐还没有换好吗……
By the way, what's taking Banxia so long...?
咳咳…我这头盔…怎么…怎么已经取不下来了……
*coughing* Why can't I... take off... my helmet...?
Why is my voice... like this...?
半夏费劲地想要将盔甲从身上取下来，但是盔甲却像是和她长在了一起。
Banxia is trying to take the armor off but failed. It sticks to her so tight as if it's part of her body.
你们帮我看一下…是不是什么卡住了……
Can you help me check...? It feels like something's caught...
可是，她竟然还没有失去理智。
But she still has her senses.
…魔阴身开始爆发了吗？这可真是…突然。
...Has the mara taken hold? That was quite... sudden.
可是，我竟然还记得他，记得你们……
But I still remember him... and I remember both of you...
是白露大人的治疗生效了吗？谢谢你，要不是你……
Lady Bailu, is this a result of your healing? Thank you. If it weren't for you...
不许感谢我！…是我没能力…是我没法让你保持原来的样子。
Don't thank me! It's my fault... I couldn't preserve you the way you were.
魔阴身本就是无药可医的。我现在还能清醒地和你说话，已经是奇迹了。
You can't cure someone stricken with mara. It's already a miracle that I still have my senses... that I can talk to you.
{F#小妹妹}{M#小兄弟}，还记得我之前说过的话吗，万一到了那个时候……
Hey, do you still remember what I said earlier? If the time comes...
Is now a good time for this?
...Let's go while I still have my senses.
我看看我该怎么办？阴阳表里，寒热虚实……
What should I do? Serious imbalances of yin and yang, cold and heat...
…让我缓缓就行，白露大人，别忘了「交易」……
...I just need a rest. Lady Bailu, don't forget our deal...
这个时候了还在说什么「交易」，那是约定，我会治好他的，你不要担心！
Stop calling it a deal! I made a promise — I'll heal him. Don't worry...
抱歉…为了我，把你们卷进了危险。
I'm so sorry... it's because of me that all of you are in danger.
你什么都不要说了，我会隔着头盔把药灌进去。
Enough talk. Here, I'll pour the medicine through the helmet.
……谢谢你，白露大人，不过我已经感觉不到皮肤与盔甲的间隙了。
...Thank you, Lady Bailu... but I can't feel the gap between my skin and the helmet anymore.
我们到了，可是他还是不在吗？
We've arrived. Is he not here either?
…他是一个谨慎的人，你还记得他的留言纸条吗？他要我「一个人前来」。
...He's cautious by nature. Do you remember his note? He told me to "come alone."
…你们站在这里他是不会出来的…咳咳咳，我来把他叫出来。白露大人，你们先避开吧，记得我们的约定……
...He won't show himself if you're here... *coughing* I'll call out to him. Please, you two, find somewhere to hide. Remember our promise...
She wants to see him for the last time.
I... can't hold on any longer...
Do it... don't forget... the promise!
你说，半夏姐姐算是见到了她心上人最后一面了吗？
Do you think she saw him one last time?
可惜对方不是这样认为的。
Yes, but I doubt he recognized her.
我们沿着这个方向去找吧，要去找到那个人。
Let's keep heading in this direction until we find him.
你们是药王秘传，还是十王司？我什么都没有做，你们别碰我！
Are you from the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus or the Ten-Lords Commission? Don't touch me! I didn't do anything!
没错，本小姐是来帮你治病的。
That's right. I'm here to heal you.
You don't get to decide that!
你就别再吓唬他了，这样戒备下去也没有什么用。
Stop trying to scare him! It won't help the situation.
我是半夏请来帮你治病的白露。
I'm Bailu. Banxia sent me to heal you.
你们可算是来了，刚才我被药王秘传追杀，又遇见了云骑军，仿佛听见半夏的声音，却碰到了一只怪物，真是倒霉！

*sigh* You're finally here... First I was being chased by the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus, then I ran into the Cloud Knights. Then, I thought I heard Banxia's voice, but I ran straight into a monster. What a day!
你们既然是半夏派来的，那…半夏她人呢？她没有跟你们一起过来吗？
But if Banxia sent you, then... where is she? Isn't she with you?
（{NICKNAME}你来决定，要不要告诉他事情的真相吧？）
({NICKNAME}, what do you think? Should we tell him the truth?)
刚才的魔阴身怪物就是半夏。
That mara-struck monster just now was Banxia.
什么？！你说那只浑身全副武装的怪物就是半夏？别骗人了。
What!? That monster armed to the teeth? That was Banxia? You're lying.
是真的，为了见你，她不得不乔装打扮。
It's true. She had to disguise herself in order to meet you.
你们能带我再去…确认一下吗？
Could you take me there? ...Just to confirm?
半夏她有事情要忙，没有过来。
Banxia was busy — she couldn't make time to come.
是吗？唉，我就知道她在丹鼎司里忙不过来。
Is that so? *sigh* She's always so busy in the Alchemy Commission.
小妹妹，你不要突然就哭了呀，这也没有什么呀。
Hey, little girl, no need for tears. It's no big deal.
我确实很想见到她，但是她要是在忙的话，我也不会强求的。半夏托你们来，她也有不能成行的苦衷吧。
I did want to meet Banxia, but I know how busy she is. She must have had a good reason for sending you.
…我和半夏姐姐约定…我要帮她治好你。
I promised Banxia... that I'd heal you for her.
没事儿了，没事儿了…要不，你们也喘口气，一路上肯定不容易吧。
It's alright, it's alright... take a breath. You must've been through a lot to get here.
梁沐讲述了自己以为听见了半夏的呼喊，实际上却遇见了怪物的经历。
Liangmu narrates how he thought he heard Banxia shouting, but then ran into a monster.
…这阵子罗浮仙舟上到处都有怪事，可能刚才也是。
...Strange things are happening on the Luofu these days... What happened to you isn't so surprising.
可惜了，我还一直在等着她，没想到她还是没能走开。她有没有说有什么东西要带给我？
What a shame — I've been waiting for her for so long... I can't believe she couldn't make it. Did she ask you to bring me anything?
她只是让白露来治疗你。
She just asked Bailu to heal you.
明白了，真正重要的东西，还是亲自见面说比较好。
I see. Well, it's good that you're here in person — this is no simple matter.
久闻衔药龙女的大名，那我就麻烦你帮我治疗了。
Your reputation precedes you, Healer Lady... Sorry to trouble you, please begin the healing whenever you're ready.
白露治好了这名化外民的病症，相比魔阴身，这不过是举手之劳。
Bailu healed the Outworlder. Compared to being Mara-struck, his illness is but a common disease.
治疗完成后，你们离开了流云渡，并通知云骑军收殓了那具「魔阴身士兵」的遗骸。
After finishing the treatment, you left Cloudford and asked the Cloud Knights to take care of the remains of the Mara-struck soldier.
半夏这女人…怎么会变成这副丑陋的样子？
丑陋吗？你是不是太伤心了，一时难以接受？
Hey! I know you're probably in shock, but—
你们把路上发生的事情，都告诉了梁沐。
You tell Liangmu everything about what happened on the way over.
为了能见到梁沐最后一面，她穿上了脱不下的盔甲。
In order to see Liangmu for the very last time, she donned the armor that could never be taken off.
也就是说她换掉了衣服，那这具魔阴身怪物身上什么也搜不出来了。
She changed out of her original clothes, right? *sigh* There's no point in searching the body, then.
她有没有托付给你们什么秘密的盒子呀、信件什么的？
Did she give you any secret boxes or letters?
你们也不知道吗…可恶，这不是什么都没留下嘛，臭婆娘耍我呀！
You don't know? Ugh, she left me with nothing. Was she playing me this whole time!?
她说要给你带去什么东西吗？
What did she say she'd bring you?
一份名单，一份有关「药王秘传」的组织名单。
A list of the names of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus.
有了这份名单的话，我既可以威胁药王秘传，拿到长生不老药；也可以上交云骑军，算是戴罪立功，不必被驱逐出仙舟了。
With that list I'd be able to blackmail the Disciples into giving me the elixir of immortality... or I could submit the list to the Cloud Knights to avoid banishment from the Xianzhou.
那个臭婆娘承诺了我无数遍，我好不容易才相信她，相信她能给我带来改变。
That woman promised me countless times... In the end, I finally trusted her — I genuinely thought she'd offer me change.
结果，最重要的事，她终究是没有办到…不对，她其实一开始就没能做到，肯定就是这样，你们也被骗了。
But in the end, she failed at the most important hurdle... or maybe she failed from the very beginning. She probably lied to you too.
你们不会是被人骗了之后，还帮人数钱的那种人吧？我不相信。
Are you the type of people that help someone who tricked you? I don't think so.
Is being immortal the most important thing for you?
这当然不是，我还有更重要的事情不在仙舟之上，求药或是长寿不过手段而已，我是不会在罗浮留下来的。
Of course not. I have more important matters in places other than the Xianzhou. Elixirs and immortality are just a means to an end. I won't stay on the Luofu.
难道她不是你的爱人吗？
那不过是她一厢情愿，我从没考虑过这样的事情。不会吧，难道你们也以为我是她的爱人吗？
That was her wishful thinking — I wasn't interested in the slightest. No way, you thought so too?
让我赶紧治疗完你，然后你赶紧滚！
Let me heal you so I never have to lay eyes on you again!
还有什么治疗的必要吗？
Really? Do we still have to heal this guy?
莫名其妙！我们都是被骗了的人，你应该向那个臭婆娘……
Ridiculous! That woman tricked all of us. You should've told her to take a—
莫名其妙！我们都是被骗了的人，你应该向那个臭婆娘……
Ridiculous! That woman tricked all of us. You should've told her to take a—
闭嘴！安静地让白露大人治疗你！
Just shut up and let Lady Bailu heal you!
我不准你站在半夏的旁边！
And move away from Banxia, now!
莫名其妙！我们都是被骗了的人，你应该向那个臭婆娘……
Ridiculous! That woman tricked all of us. You should've told her to take a—
白露不情愿地治好了这名化外民的病症，相比魔阴身，这不过是举手之劳。
Bailu healed the Outworlder begrudgingly. Compared to being Mara-struck, his illness is but a common disease.
治疗完成后，你们离开了流云渡，并通知云骑军收殓了那具「魔阴身士兵」的遗骸。
After finishing the treatment, you left Cloudford and asked the Cloud Knights to take care of the remains of the Mara-struck soldier.
等等，先让我狠狠地揍他一顿！
Wait, can I beat him up first?
妙啊！放开手脚来！无论你揍得多狠，我都能把他治好！
Great idea! Seeing as I'm due to heal him anyway... Do your worst!
你和白露狠狠地收拾了这名自称无辜的化外民。
You and Bailu taught this deceitful Outworlder a harsh but well-deserved lesson.
随后，白露又不情不愿地治好了这名化外民的病症，相比魔阴身，这不过是举手之劳。
Then, Bailu healed the Outworlder begrudgingly again. Compared to being Mara-struck, his illness is but a common disease.
治疗完成后，你们离开了流云渡，并通知云骑军收殓了那具「魔阴身士兵」的遗骸。
After finishing the treatment, you left Cloudford and asked the Cloud Knights to take care of the remains of the Mara-struck soldier.
We wouldn't have helped him if we'd known.
那可不行，我已经答应半夏了。
That wouldn't do — I made a promise to Banxia.
我们对他还是太温柔了。
We were too gentle with him.
我虽然医好了那家伙的病，但是接下来<unbreak>30</unbreak>年，他每天都会不受控制地打嗝！
I healed him... but for the next thirty years he'll hiccup uncontrollably every day.
…怎么了，觉得我做得不合适吗？
That's way too light a punishment!
这点儿代价就当是他付给我的诊金吧，哼，便宜他了！
Hmph, that's the price he paid for my lenience. And it still wasn't enough!
本小姐姑且还在逃亡，你有没有什么推荐的好地方？
*sigh* Anyway, do you know any good hiding places? I'm still on the run...
Let's get some food in the Realm-Keeping Commission.
Have you heard of the Astral Express?
唔，仙舟眼下乱做一团，我还是先待在星槎海吧。要是有人救急，想医个头疼脑热，我也能发挥所长。
Hmm, the Xianzhou is still in a mess. I better stay in Starskiff Haven for the time being — I'm sure there'll be fevers and headaches to take care of before long.
之前半夏问我喜不喜欢治病救人，说实话，原本这对我就像是吃饭睡觉，没啥难度，也就无所谓喜不喜欢了。
Banxia asked me if I liked treating people... Like I said, it's as easy as eating and drinking for me — I don't like or dislike it...
但是经历了这件事情之后，我反倒想，要是我对魔阴身的机理，更有了解就好了……
...but this whole incident has made me wish I knew more about the mara-struck...
谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。有缘的话，咱们在星槎海的小吃摊见！再会！
Thank you, {NICKNAME}. May we meet again at the food stalls of Starskiff Haven! Bye!
我们没有告诉他，这样做，真的好吗？
We didn't tell him the truth. Was that really the right thing to do?
What's done is done, no need for regrets.
真的吗？我认识的一个大人物说，人生是由后悔组成的。
Really? A great person once told me that a person's life is made up of regrets.
对了，本小姐姑且还在逃亡，你有没有什么推荐的好地方？
*sigh* Anyway, do you know any good hiding places? I'm still on the run...
Let's get some food in the Realm-Keeping Commission.
Have you heard of the Astral Express?
唔，仙舟眼下乱做一团，我还是先待在星槎海吧。要是有人救急，想医个头疼脑热，我也能发挥所长。
Hmm, the Xianzhou is still in a mess. I better stay in Starskiff Haven for the time being — I'm sure there'll be fevers and headaches to take care of before long.
之前半夏问我喜不喜欢治病救人，说实话，原本这对我就像是吃饭睡觉，没啥难度，也就无所谓喜不喜欢了。
Banxia asked me if I liked treating people... Like I said, it's as easy as eating and drinking for me — I don't like or dislike it...
但是经历了这件事情之后，我反倒想，要是我对魔阴身的机理，更有了解就好了……
...but this whole incident has made me wish I knew more about the mara-struck...
谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。有缘的话，咱们在星槎海的小吃摊见！再会！
Thank you, {NICKNAME}. May we meet again at the food stalls of Starskiff Haven! Bye!
我有点后悔，没能早些和半夏一起出发。她求了我好久。
I regret that I didn't set off with Banxia earlier... She begged me for a long time.
上次去过了，到现在还欠着老板娘六百镝左右的饭钱…
I think I still owe the owner about <unbreak>600</unbreak> strales in unpaid food bills...
不成！地衡司的大哥大姐们虽然待人和气，但思想教育起来可烦人了。
No! The Realm-Keeping Commission people are polite, but they're always lecturing me.
The Six Charioteers have replied to your request.
Miss Bailu is currently at the Alchemy Commission...
You may go at any time.
I understand. Thank you, Miss Huanxi.
谒见相关的事情已通传完毕，丹恒大人可有疑议？
I have delivered the missive about the meeting. Do you have any questions, Master Dan Heng?
我已清楚了，辛苦浣溪小姐。
I know all that I wish to know. Thank you, Miss Huanxi.
小姐的称谓可不敢当，妾身不过是白露小姐身边区区一个侍女罢了。但接下来我要向大人提出一个不情之请……
You need not address me as "Miss" — I am but one of Miss Bailu's maids. Then again, if I may be so bold as to make a humble request...
Before this goes ahead... Oh, who might this be?
Seems I came at a bad time.
A pleasure to make your acquaintance. The name's {NICKNAME}.
Just imagine I'm a street lamp, barely even here!
抱歉，仙舟之上可没有旁听秘密的路灯。
I'm sorry, but Xianzhou street lamps aren't in the habit of eavesdropping on conversations.
我正与丹恒大人对谈，无关人等还请退避。
I'm speaking with Master Dan Heng. I'm afraid this doesn't involve you — please take your leave.
{NICKNAME}是我的挚友，我邀请同行的见证人。视{F#她}{M#他}如我，开诚布公地说出你的要求。
{NICKNAME} is a close friend, I've invited {F#her}{M#him} along to bear witness. Please treat {F#her}{M#him} as you would me. Now, what was your request?
那么，我希望您不要和白露小姐见面。
Then, I hope you don't plan on meeting with Miss Bailu.
能讲一下不见面的理由吗？
龙尊的侍女擅自帮主人挡客？
A High Elder's maid turning away guests without her master's knowledge?
白露小姐质朴天真，浑无心机。我等替她绸缪分忧，这才是侍者该为主人做的。
Bailu is simple and innocent, incapable of ill intent. It's natural for a servant to care for her master and share in her worries.
希望您听我把话说完，妾身绝不是在无理取闹。
Please hear what I have to say, I have good reason to be concerned.
也许您应该知道。白露小姐成为龙尊的过程既不合规制，也非她本人所愿——那是前代龙尊丹枫一意孤行的结果，他的骄妄专断造成了罗浮「龙尊传承」中绝。

Perhaps you should know that Miss Bailu's path to becoming a high elder was neither in compliance with proper protocol nor of her own volition — everything was a result of the stubbornness of her predecessor — Dan Feng. His hubris and tyranny brought about the end of the Luofu's high elder succession.
龙师们听闻了丹恒大人回来的消息，一时不知吉凶。但大家都在猜测，罗浮龙尊传承或将失而复得，重归一统，可喜可贺。

The Preceptors heard of Master Dan Heng's return, and were uncertain whether it constituted good or ill fortune. However, many have surmised that the Luofu's high elder succession tradition will soon be back in force. If true, that is indeed something worth celebrating.
无论是按族规另选贤能，或是…或是由您重摄其位，一切都有转圜余地。
Whether we find another suitable candidate in accordance with the laws of our people... or have you take up the position anew — everything can still be mended.
但是，丹恒大人若将一切交由白露小姐继承，恐将惹来巨大的风波，对她也绝无好处。
But, if Master Dan Heng were to hand everything over to Miss Bailu, it could lead to great upheavals on the horizon. No good would come of it for her.
另选贤能？持明族中意谁？
Another suitable candidate? Who does the Vidyadhara hope for?
呵呵，这样的大事自然由龙师长老们做主，妾身说不上来。
Hehe, such a major matter as this is naturally up to the Preceptor elders. I couldn't possibly say.
我看她也不是很想做龙尊。
I don't think she even wants to be the High Elder.
妾身十二年前被选为侍女，日日陪伴主人学医受训，见证她无数次出逃，又无数次不甘心地被抓回来。
