I've been a maid here for twelve years now, and was with my mistress every day as she studied medicine and received tutelage. I've witnessed her countless escapes, and the inevitable unwilling returns.
以仙舟常情而论，她这样的孩子都过着快乐自在的童年。但身为空负虚衔的龙尊，白露小姐深受管束，进退全无自由可言。

As far as the Xianzhou is concerned, children like her enjoy a charmed and happy childhood. But as a high elder in nothing but name alone, Miss Bailu is highly restricted in her actions and has no freedom or say about her own life.
妾身深感不忍，斗胆请大人为这个孩子着想。
I can't bear it! Your Highness, please, think about this poor child!
这事不问问白露自己吗？
Shouldn't you ask Bailu herself about this?
白露小姐年轻识浅，易受他人摆布。只怕会在有心人的压力下，认为自己能肩负起这份责任。
Miss Bailu is young, naive, and easily manipulated by others. I worry that under the pressure of others, she would be convinced into taking up too great a burden.
你的意思，我听得很明白了。但眼下我无法答复。
I understand your concern... but I have nothing more to say on the matter at present.
Then I will bid my farewell.
丹恒大人，无论您是要会见白露小姐，还是同妾身一道去参见龙师长老，我都会在去往鳞渊境的渡口等您到来。
Master Dan Heng, whether you choose to meet Miss Bailu or go with me to see the Preceptor elders, I will be waiting for you by the ferry leading to Scalegorge Waterscape.
还没见上白露一面，就有人来劝我打退堂鼓。
I haven't even set eyes on Bailu, and people are already urging me not to meet her...
终于能知道丹恒的过去了！
Finally, we can learn about Dan Heng's past!
...You've been spending too much time with March.
需要我向其他人保密吗？
Should I keep this a secret from the others?
不必。有三月在，什么也瞒不住啊。
No need. March will find out sooner or later.
你知道我是罗浮持明的后裔，也曾在鳞渊境里见过我…「隐藏的力量」。
You know that I'm a descendant of the Luofu Vidyadhara. In Scalegorge Waterscape, you witnessed my... "secret strength," as March would call it...
但这份力量本不属于我，而是来自我的前世之身，丹枫。他擅自改变了龙尊传承，酿成大祸，也最终遭受蜕鳞轮回之刑。

...yet that power stems from Dan Feng — my previous incarnation. He altered the process of high elder succession, plunging everything into catastrophe... ultimately, he suffered the punishment of molting rebirth.
按照持明轮回再世的生理，我该成为全新的个体。而以法度论，前世罪业应一笔勾销。

Based on the physiological principles of Vidyadhara reincarnation, I ought to have been an entirely new entity... and in view of the law, all crimes from my previous incarnation should have been wiped clean...
现实却是：自诞生起我就被羁押在幽囚狱中。就算获释离开仙舟，龙尊的过去与丹枫的{RUBY_B#刃}仇敌{RUBY_E#}仍如影随形。

...but in reality, I was locked up in The Shackling Prison at birth. Even after I was released and left the Xianzhou, my high elder past and Dan Feng's {RUBY_B#Blade}enemies{RUBY_E#} pursued me like a haunting shadow.
如今我打算重拾旧事。我想以修复「建木」封印为交换，顺道谒见龙尊，看看能做些什么。
Now, I plan to face that shadow. In order to make amends, I want to repair the Ambrosial Arbor's seal... and visit the high elder, to see what more I can do.
传言没错，你果然回来了…
The rumors are true — you really are back...
我是丹鼎司医士陆英，如你所见，也是个持明族人。我听闻大罪人的转世之身重返罗浮，想来见上一面，给个忠告。
I'm healer Luying of the Alchemy Commission — I'm a Vidyadhara too, as you can see. I'd heard the reincarnation of the great sinner has returned to the Luofu... and wanted to offer some advice.
立刻离开这个是非之地。
看来持明族人很不喜欢你。
Looks like the Vidyadhara aren't big fans of yours.
我一点也不意外。那么，丹鼎司的要求是？
...I'm not surprised in the slightest. What does the Alchemy Commission want, then?
做回你的无名客，别再搅动龙尊传承这潭浑水。
Return to being a Nameless — stay out of the high elder succession.
罗浮持明好不容易自丹枫的罪孽中恢复过来，也有了白露这样慈悲好生的龙尊。而今你回来，不但于事无补，反而激起龙师们权争的野心。

The Luofu Vidyadhara have finally recovered from Dan Feng's grievous sins, and were blessed with a compassionate and caring high elder in Bailu... none of this was easy. Your return has stirred up resentment and ambition among the Preceptors, and threatens our situation.
你也是来关心龙尊传承的？
Are you here about the high elder succession, too?
当然！自从白露小姐继任，非议之声不绝。但丹鼎司深信那孩子是块了不得的璞玉，慈悲好生，远胜丹枫百倍。

Certainly! Miss Bailu has weathered nothing but criticism since she was granted the title, but the Alchemy Commission firmly believes that girl to be a precious diamond in the rough. She is compassionate, kind, and a hundred times better than Dan Feng.
何况丹枫选了她成为龙尊，那她便是罗浮持明的领袖。命运使然，奉其为尊，我等心甘情愿。
Moreover, Dan Feng selected her as high elder, making her the leader of the Luofu Vidyadhara. Fate chose her as our sovereign, and we bowed down before that destiny.
但如今你回到罗浮，事情却不同了。龙师们又兴起更易人选的念头，只会为白露小姐带来麻烦。
Now that you're back, everything has changed. The Preceptors are starting to think of finding other candidates, which means nothing but trouble for Miss Bailu.
我无意动摇白露的地位。
I have no intention of threatening Bailu's position.
就算你自问无愧，只要你还在罗浮，便会受种种看不见的力量裹挟。离开，才是对所有人好的选择。
You may have a clear conscience, but even so... As long as you remain on the Luofu, invisible forces will try to coerce you. Leave now. It's the best outcome for everyone involved.
前生之过，今世切莫重蹈。告辞了。
Do not repeat the mistakes of a past life in this one. Farewell.
请问两位是要前往丹鼎司洞天吗？
Excuse me, are you two on your way to the Alchemy Commission delve?
两位好啊。波月古海今日风高浪急，两位怎么有雅兴到此一游？
Hello, what brings you two here? The wind and waves are restless around Lunarescent Depths today.
将军也是来劝我放弃谒见龙尊的吗？
Even you came to dissuade me from visiting the high elder, General?
哈哈，那与我何干？我是受龙女照拂，在丹鼎司疗伤养病，赶巧撞上两位。
Haha, this encounter was not of my making. I've been recuperating in the Alchemy Commission under the Dragon Lady's care — our paths have merely crossed...
你既有此一问，看来成行前已有人来打过照面了？
...but your question would suggest that there are others interested in dissuading you from such a venture.
那是，不止一波，各怀目的。
Yes — many. Each with their own agenda in mind.
见个面而已，有这么复杂吗？
It's just a quick meeting. What's the big deal?
事关持明一族的兴衰去向，有心人自然要生起左右它的念头。丹枫如此，龙师们如此，培养龙女的丹鼎司，亦不外如是。

Matters that concern the rise and fall of the Vidyadhara will inevitably attract certain parties — those that would work circumstances to their advantage. Be it Dan Feng, the Preceptors, or the Alchemy Commission that trained the Dragon Lady...
将军在此养病，倒是对谁见了我们一清二楚。
Your injury hasn't dulled your instincts, general — the Preceptors and the Commission seem deeply concerned.
相请不如偶遇，我替各位参详参详这些人的来意，如何？
A chance meeting is a gift from fate. Why don't I help you to fathom their intent, then?
持明长老希望另选龙尊。
The Vidyadhara elders want to choose a new High Elder.
呵呵，龙师与龙尊的权争，自古至今相持不休。而到丹枫这一任，强势如他，完全摆脱了长老们的掣肘，令其敢怒不敢言。

Haha, the power struggle between the Preceptors and their High Elder is a tale as old as time. And someone as powerful as Dan Feng, who was completely beyond their control, was enough for them to harbor a hidden rage.
原本长老们在继任龙尊一事上还有扳回一城的发言权。孰料丹枫自定人选。事实既成，他们只能接受这样的结果。

The elders used to have a small say in appointing the new High Elder. Who could have imagined that Dan Feng would pick his own successor? And yet, that is precisely what happened, and all they could do was accept the result.
而今丹恒回归，长老又看到了一个机会，岂能放过？
Now that Dan Heng has arrived, the elders see yet another chance — how could they let it go?
哈哈哈，持明族的规制，我们外人无从评判。
Haha! Us outsiders should not judge the laws of the Vidyadhara.
龙女没有力量，丹枫一介罪人，另选龙尊合情合理。
The Dragon Lady has no power and Dan Feng is a criminal. One can understand their desire for a new high elder.
龙师被弹压已久，难免会做些小动作。
The Preceptors have been suppressed for some time now — they will inevitably try to overturn the situation.
丹鼎司希望龙尊仍旧是白露。
The Alchemy Commission hopes that Bailu can stay on as High Elder.
这些人自诩「正统」。他们认为白露是由上一任龙尊亲自选定的继承者，若不犯大错，龙师们无权另选。

These people speak of "legitimacy." They believe that Bailu was chosen as heir apparent by the previous High Elder, and that unless she were to commit a terrible sin, the Preceptors should have no right whatsoever to choose again.
「衔药龙女」兼有龙相形貌和不可思议的疗愈之能。有人将这视为龙尊的证明。不过，信奉力量的龙师长老们却不愿接受……

The Healer Lady has draconic features and scarcely believable therapeutic abilities. Some regard this as evidence that she is the High Elder. But the Preceptors are fixated on strength, and are unwilling to accept her...
而在你眼前这位「丹枫转世」敕令了波月古海的万顷海水之后，那些捍卫「龙尊正统」的人就更加不安了。
Now that Dan Feng's reincarnation has shown a command over the vast marine expanse of Lunarescent Depths, those longing to keep the traditional bequeathal of the High Elder feel increasingly uneasy.
继丹枫逊位后，他们抗衡龙师，维持白露的体面，也算是苦心孤诣了。
After Dan Feng's abdication, they fought against the Preceptors and saved Bailu's dignity. They demonstrated a true devotion.
在丹恒到来前，一切风平浪静。他们想赶走丹恒，倒也确实合理。
Before Dan Heng arrived, everything was quiet as a windless lake. In that regard, it is understandable that they want to get rid of him.
这些人多半不会善罢甘休吧。
These folks aren't the type to just let it go.
General, what do you think about this?
这是持明内务，只要无损于罗浮的太平，云骑将军能有什么看法？
It is an internal affair of the Vidyadharas. As long as it does not disturb the peace aboard the Luofu, it does not involve the general of the Cloud Knights.
但作为朋友，我仍要提醒一句。只要身负「龙尊之力」的丹恒与身负「龙尊头衔」的白露一日并立于罗浮上，持明的内部对立就不会停止…尽管这并非你们二位的错。

Nevertheless, as a friend, let me remind you of one thing. So long as Dan Heng and Bailu, with their respective High Elder powers and titles, both remain on the Luofu, the Vidyadhara will never cease their internal strife. This is not to say that either of you are to blame.
时候不早了，你不是打算去鳞渊境修复「建木」封印，顺道谒见那位龙尊吗？快些走吧。我也得老实养病了……

It's getting late. You are headed to repair the Arbor's seal at Scalegorge Waterscape, and visit the High Elder, no? Farewell, for now. I should start taking this business of rest and recuperation a little more seriously.
丹恒大人，您来了。您是否做出决定了？
Master Dan Heng, you're back. Have you made your decision?
是先随我同长老们会面？还是…去见白露小姐？
Will you come with me to meet with the elders first? Or... are you set on seeing Miss Bailu?
白露小姐已在鳞渊境等候了。
Miss Bailu is already waiting at Scalegorge Waterscape.
您的固执确有几分丹枫的影子。
Your stubbornness is redolent of your previous incarnation.
抱歉，你们哪里也去不了。
Sorry, but you're not going anywhere.
中绝传承的罪人，不配踏入持明族的圣地。
A criminal who destroyed our succession is unworthy of setting foot in the sacred places of the Vidyadhara.
诸位，丹恒先生踏入鳞渊境一事已得到六御和龙师长老们首肯。何况他早已不是当年的罪人……
Wait. Master Dan Heng's presence at Scalegorge Waterscape has been approved by the Six Charioteers and the Preceptors. He is no longer the criminal he once was...
巧舌如簧。他究竟是不是那个罪人，试试便知！
Empty rhetoric, there are ways of unearthing his true identity...
即便不是，持明族也容不得他这样的怪物！
...and even his reincarnation should answer for the monstrous crimes of the past. The Vidyadhara will never accept him!
You say Dan Feng was merely your previous incarnation...
依然保有那罪人的龙尊之力，谈何新生？
...how then do you still possess the power of the high elder?
果然是你，丹枫。你回来了，哈哈哈哈…
As I expected... Dan Feng... you have returned... hahahaha...
Thank you for rescuing me, Master Dan Heng.
他们本就是冲着我来的，反倒是我害你受了牵连。
They came for me — I'm sorry you got dragged into it.
久留此地只是徒增风险，我们立刻起行吧？不知丹恒大人谒见完毕后，是否有意随妾身会见长老？
It's risky to remain here — we should leave. Master Dan Heng, after your meeting, will you go with me to see the elders?
要是我有面见龙师的意思，我会托浣溪小姐传达的。
Should I ever want to meet the Preceptors, Miss Huanxi, I'll ask you to pass on the message.
明白了，大人请随我登船，白露小姐在显龙大雩殿等候。
I understand. Please alight, Your Highness. Miss Bailu awaits you at Dragonvista Rain Hall.
前方风波未定，此行切要小心应对。
It could be dangerous ahead... we should proceed carefully.
事情办妥了吗？大人们请随我登船，白露小姐在显龙大雩殿等候。
Please alight, Your Highness. Miss Bailu awaits you at Dragonvista Rain Hall.
前方风波未定，此行切要小心应对。
It could be dangerous ahead... we should proceed carefully.
我只是趁着主治医士不在，溜出来放松身体…你们快些去吧，我也该回去了。
I must return to my quarters, now — I merely took advantage of the healer's absence to slip out and relax a little... Be on your way.
封印既成，我在仙舟上的事就暂告一段落了。
Now that the seal is repaired, my affairs on the Xianzhou have drawn to an end... for the time being.
你打算留在罗浮上吗？流放令已解除，短时间内龙师们也不敢再轻举妄动。这正是你重返故土的好机会。
Are you planning on staying on the Luofu? The banishment decree has been revoked, and the Preceptors have regained an awareness of the situation. This is your chance to return to your homeland.
丹恒可是星穹列车的不动产。
Dan Heng belongs to the Astral Express...
哈哈哈哈，我可没有要抢走丹恒的意思。
Hahahaha, I do not seek to take Dan Heng away from you.
你走吧，记得常给我们写信。
You should stay... but remember to write to us.
You're... asking him to stay here?
作为无名客，列车还在等着我。
As a Nameless, the Express still needs me.
违背医嘱，擅动筋骨，真是浑身不自在。我也是时候该躺下歇息了。
I think I should refrain from violating the healers' orders any further — the weariness is creeping up on me once again. Time to lie down.
唉，太慢了。本小姐在这边可是等了你们很久很久啊。
*sigh* So slow. I've been waiting for you here for aaaages.
路上所有人都想和丹恒聊天。
Everyone on the way here wanted to chat with Dan Heng.
你好哇，{NICKNAME}，好久不见，怎么你也来啦。
Hello there, {NICKNAME}. Long time no see — what are you doing here?
小姐，我们在路上遇到了刺客。
We were met by an assassin on the way over, Miss.
我们在路上遇到了刺客。
We met an assassin on the way over.
刺客！没伤着吧？要是有什么跌打损伤可就不妙了。
An assassin!? Are you okay? Are you injured?
幸好二位身手高强，一切平安无事。这些人试图谋刺丹恒大人…想来是为了保护小姐的龙尊正统。

Fortunately, the skills of Master Dan Heng and his friend were too much for them. There are those that wish to assassinate Master Dan Heng, Miss... presumably to preserve your legitimacy as High Elder.
哼，跟我有什么关系？我一早说过了，谁想当这龙尊，谁就当去。这名号又不是我非要选的。
Hmph, I don't care about my legitimacy — why do they? I told you, whoever wants to be the High Elder is welcome. I never wanted the title.
在下丹恒，见过白露小姐。
I am Dan Heng. It is an honor to meet you, Miss Bailu.
你就是丹恒呀？我听说你在鳞渊境分开古海的事了。你这么厉害，那些刺客想必拿不下你。
You're Dan Heng? I heard about how you parted the ancient sea in Scalegorge Waterscape. These assassins have got their work cut out for them.
Miss Bailu, please don't say things like that!
让我仔细瞧瞧…唔，你的脑袋上也生了龙角，他们说你是那个丹枫的转生，看来是真的了？哎呀，你和我不同，怎么没有尾巴？
Let me take a look at you... Dragon horns. Well, they say you're Dan Feng's reincarnation. I suppose it must be true, then? But you're different from me — where's your tail?
我要是让你当龙尊，你会生出尾巴来吗？
If I let you be High Elder, will you grow a tail?
对龙尊传承的问题，我无意涉入其中。
About the high elder succession — I have no intention of getting entangled in that.
我来此处是为了修复「建木」封印，这是罗浮持明的职责所在。
I'm here to repair the Ambrosial Arbor's seal — this is the duty of the Luofu Vidyadhara.
哦？那你来见我也没用呀。我打从蜕生起只在丹鼎司里学了些医术。修复封印、分开海水，我可一样不会喔？
Oh, really? Then why did you come to see me? All I've learned since my hatching rebirth are some medical skills at the Alchemy Commission — I can't repair seals or part the sea like you can.
我想借这个机会，同白露小姐聊一聊当年的旧事。我听过您的处境，虽然眼下无法承诺解决的办法，但我会试试做些什么。
I should take this opportunity to talk with you about the past, Miss Bailu. I've heard about your situation, and while I can't guarantee a solution, I will do my best to improve things for you.
不错不错。你不像别的大人，说话老实，还算可信。你要我跟你去鳞渊境里走一遭？
Hmm, interesting... You're not like other grown-ups. You say what you think, and you seem trustworthy. So, you want me to go with you to Scalegorge Waterscape?
浣溪，就劳你在这儿等一会儿。我去去就回，有他们俩保护我，放心吧。
Huanxi, please wait here for me. I'll come back as soon as I can. I've got these two to look after me — don't worry.
你们穿过空无一人的龙宫废墟，来到建木玄根处。
The group walks through the empty ruins of the Dragon Palace and arrives at the roots of Ambrosial Arbor.
哇哦！真够壮观的！这就是「建木」？
...Wowwww, what a magnificent sight! Is that the Ambrosial Arbor?
嗯，结成封印，以龙力遏制根须蔓延，这就是罗浮龙尊被授予的重任。
Yes. Forming a seal and using their power to curb the spread of the Arbor's roots is an important task entrusted to the Luofu's high elder.
你说的这些，可从来没人告诉过我。看来长老们早就心知肚明，我胜任不了这个位置。
News to me. The elders must be well aware that I'm not qualified for this position.
既然本小姐毫无资质，为什么丹枫当年选择了我？
Which begs the question... why did Dan Feng choose me all those years ago?
这也是我来鳞渊境寻求的答案。
That's exactly what I've come to Scalegorge Waterscape to find out.
龙尊是持明族中最接近「不朽」的存在。
Among the Vidyadhara, the high elder is the existence closest to the Permanence.
按照记载，实现龙尊传承需要执行名为「化龙妙法」的秘仪，还有被视为「龙心」的重器。一旦传承完毕，前任龙尊结卵蜕生，新任龙尊将会展露龙相。

According to historical records, the high elder succession involves a secret ritual known as the Transmutation Arcanum, as well as a treasure known as dragon heart. Once succession is complete, the former high elder undergoes a hatching rebirth, while the new high elder begins to display draconic features.
然而丹枫的仪式失败了，他的力量留在了我的身上…却不知为何，也造就了你。
However, Dan Feng's ritual failed, and his powers remained within me... And yet for some reason, it also created you.
看起来，这家伙就像擅自变更医方的庸医，这下可好，害苦了自己，也害苦了别人。
So in medical terms — he messed up the prescription... and brought suffering down on himself and just about everyone else in the process.
我想借修复「建木」的封印的机会，看看能否唤起你我的回忆——
I want to use this opportunity to repair the Ambrosial Arbor's seal and see if I can help recall our memories...
"Shun the tree's growth, the residual plague."
「古海之水，奉龙尊号令，在此镇伏玄根。」
"Water of the ancient sea, upon High Elder's command, subdue the eternal roots."
奇怪，这和解除封印时不同，为什么没有反应？
Strange... This is different from the breaking of the seal. Why's there no reaction?
你怎么啦？一副为难的样子。
What's going on? You look terrible.
"Shun the tree's growth, the residual plague."
"Shun the tree's growth, the residual plague..."
「古海之水，奉龙尊号令，在此镇伏玄根。」
"Water of the ancient sea, upon High Elder's command, subdue the eternal roots."
「古海之水，奉龙尊号令，在此镇伏玄根。」
"Water of the ancient sea, upon High Elder's command, subdue the eternal roots."
你…做到了！无需外人认可，光只是这一点，便足以证明你是货真价实的龙尊。
...Th—That's it — you did it! This alone should prove to everyone that you are the true High Elder.
重建封印时，有想起些什么吗？
When the seal was re-established, did you recall anything?
唔…像是有潮水涌过脑海一般，自己好像变得特别特别巨大，整座鳞渊境都在回应我的声音，和我共鸣。
Umm... it was like a tide surging through my mind. I became really, really, huge, and the whole of Scalegorge Waterscape was responding to my voice — resonating with me.
哎嘿，好玩。丹恒，你再教教我别的法子。看看我能不能再想起些什么。
Whew, that's fun. Dan Heng, teach me another trick. Let's see if I can remember anything else.
等等，{NICKNAME}，你感觉到了吗？有人在靠近！
Wait, {NICKNAME}. Can you feel it? There's someone coming!
是我来保护你们，有我在，一点小伤都不会让你们受的！
Hey, I'm doing the protecting here! Nobody's getting hurt with me around!
他们是怎么毫无声息地出现在我们身边的？
How did they manage to appear right next to us without a sound?
也许是用云吟操纵水雾，欺骗视觉的把戏。和我们来时一样，这里恐怕早已埋伏好了刺客……
They may have used a cloudhymn to create mist and provide a smokescreen. I'm afraid this ambush was probably lying in wait for us...
看来有人对我的出现已忍无可忍了。
Seems like some people have had enough of my presence.
Is it an assassin from the Alchemy Commission?
...If so, why would they want to harm Bailu?
也可能是龙师派出的刺客？
Was the assassin sent by the Preceptors?
如果他们的目标是我，又为何要对白露出手……
If I'm their target, why would they come after Bailu?
刺客的数量未知，为了安全起见，我们必须赶紧离开，走吧！
We don't know how many there are — let's get out of here. Go!
快看，那边飘动的影子…该不会是刺客吧？
Look — look at that shadow... Could it be an assassin?
不必害怕，那些东西并没有敌意。
Don't worry — those things aren't hostile.
当心，他们在等待着我们的靠近露出破绽。
Careful, they're waiting for us to get close enough to reveal our weak spots.
这股力量…就像鳞渊境的潮动般充满力量。是你，丹枫…你回来了？
This power... it rivals the tidal forces in Scalegorge Waterscape. Is that you, Dan Feng... Have you returned?
I'm afraid you have the wrong person.
这些飘动的影子被称为蜃影，是持明族在古海中结卵蜕生所褪去的前世记忆，旧日的回响。
These floating shadows are called Mirage Echoes. They are memories of past lives and echoes from the past that the Vidyadhara shed during their rebirth.
我听说过，按照书上的记载，这些影子只对它们能认出的人开口说话，身上的水还能入药呢！
The books say that these mirages only speak to people they can recognize, and the water on their bodies can be used as medicine!
看这影子，它是把我错认成了丹枫。
Seems this mirage mistook me for Dan Feng.
不会有错的…老夫认得你的声音。哼哼。你是来圣地忏悔的么？
There's no mistake... This old man would recognize your voice anywhere. Hehe... Have you come to this sacred place to repent?
持明的天之骄子，「云上五骁」的大英雄，嘿嘿…你同咱们相斗一辈子，最终却沦落到了何等可怜的地步？
The proud son of the Vidyadhara, hero of the High-Cloud Quintet, hehe... You fought with us your whole life — how far you have fallen...
你擅用「化龙妙法」，造出的那头孽龙，几乎毁了鳞渊境！
You availed yourself of the Transmutation Arcanum to summon that draconic abomination... and almost laid waste to Scalegorge Waterscape in the process!
若不是你那些好友齐力将它斩杀，恐怕「建木」的封印也会毁于一旦。看着它殒落，你是不是倍感心痛呀？
If your allies hadn't united to slay it, then the abomination would have destroyed the Ambrosial Arbor's seal. Tell me, did it sadden you to watch the abomination perish?
身为龙尊，你本应带我们脱离轮回的困境，踏上全新的道路。可你却被虚名所困…自甘堕落，与那些仙舟人，甚至短生种为伍……

As the high elder, you should have freed us from the plight of rebirth and set foot on a brand-new path... but instead you were seduced by your reputation and abandoned yourself... You counted Xianzhou natives and even short-life species among your friends...
这次「族内审判」是你最后的机会了，趁现在交出「化龙妙法」，龙师们还可以帮你把秘密悄悄地留下。
The upcoming trial is your final chance. Hand over the secrets of the Transmutation Arcanum now, and the Preceptors can help you keep your secret.
你造出的那头孽龙不正是「化龙妙法」成功的证明吗？
Isn't that draconic abomination you created proof of the Transmutation Arcanum's success?
嗯，据说丹枫对龙祖「不朽」的力量贪妄执着，造出了一头龙形巨物。他说的应该便是这件事了。
Hmm... I heard that Dan Feng craved the powers of our dragon ancestor, Long the Permanence, and created a monstrous dragon-like creature. That must be what he's referring to.
仙舟的英雄也就此沦为了大罪人。
And so the hero of the Xianzhou became its arch-villain.
按律本该让你永久入灭。可惜你实在太重要了，龙尊传承绝不能断在你的手上。
Our laws could have seen you executed — pity that the high elder succession could not be allowed to die with you.
曜青的天风君为你一力陈词，让十王司免去了你的死罪。但蜕鳞轮回之刑可避不过去了。
Caelorum Venti of the Yaoqing put forward a strong case for you, and the Ten-Lords Commission spared you from capital punishment. But the punishment of molting rebirth could not be avoided.
长老，看看四周，你已往生多时了。留在这里的不过是古海之水的幻影罢了。
Elder, look around you. You've long since reincarnated. What remains here are just the mirages of the waters of the ancient sea.
不可能，我…我还活着！龙尊传承绝不能在这一代中断……
Impossible, I—I still live! The high elder succession will not be severed in this generation...
他以为持明族高人一等，还以为自己在持明族中又高人一等——好像没了他们的谋划，持明族就完全不能发展了一样。
He thought that the Vidyadhara was superior to other races and that he was superior to other Vidyadhara... As if the Vidyadhara would never progress without their plans.
我想，丹枫应该没有告诉他们有关「化龙妙法」的秘密吧……
I guess Dan Feng probably never told them the secret of the Transmutation Arcanum...
那些刺客用训练后的云吟法术隐藏身形，但那不过是欺骗视觉的把戏。
The assassins are using skilled cloudhymn magic to make themselves invisible... but their presence is all too real.
这些蜃影是过去留下的回响，<color=#dbc291ff>只要将它们收集起来，并驱使回响扩散，回响就能帮我们探查到隐藏在「水面之下」的刺客。</color>

These Mirage Echoes, on the other hand, are vestiges of the past. <color=#dbc291ff>If we can center and transmit the echoes, we should be able to detect any assassins hidden beneath the surface of the water.</color>
一边寻找蜃影、一边释放回响，就这样谨慎前进吧。
Let's look for Mirage Echoes and send out pulses. Move carefully.
白露小姐，你又逃出丹鼎司了！我都说了多少次了，丹鼎司的规矩是……
Miss Bailu, you fled the Alchemy Commission yet again! How many times have I told you, our rules state that—
对不起，对不起，下次不敢了！
Sorry, I'm sorry! I won't do it again!
…不对，这个声音我记得，是上一任丹士长，原来她…也已经蜕生了吗？
...Wait, I remember that voice. That's the old chief alchemist. So she's... been reborn?
蜕生？你又编出什么新理由。我倒要看看这次把你带出去的是…丹枫大人？
Reborn? More excuses. Who brought you out this time. Is that... Master Dan Feng?
我不会认错的。虽然历代罗浮龙尊庶几相似，但唯有丹枫大人拥有那般神情……
I don't think so. The appearance of the Luofu's High Elders have been similar through the ages, but there's no mistaking Master Dan Feng...
为什么您一语不发？大人。您还是像过去一样清冷孤独，就像是方壶仙舟上万载不化的玄冰。
Why do you remain silent? Your Highness, you're still as cold and lonely as you ever were, like the eternal ice on the Fanghu.
白露，你先回到禁邸里不许出来，我有事和丹枫大人谈谈。
Bailu, return to the Forbidden Residence. I must speak with Master Dan Feng.
…不对，你只是个蜃影唉，又上当了。
...W—Wait, no! You're just a Mirage Echo. Ugh, I got tricked again!
丹枫大人，我终于明白您的良苦用心了，那个小姑娘才是「化龙妙法」的关键！我的研究取得了重大进展！
Master Dan Feng, I finally understand your plan. That little girl is the key to the Transmutation Arcanum! This is a breakthrough for my research!
持明族轮回自足，可却无法生育繁衍，遭遇天灾人祸，难免会折去人口。
The Vidyadhara perform self-reincarnation, but we are unable to reproduce. Natural and artificial disasters inevitably reduce our population.
如此下去，终有一天，我们高贵的龙脉种族将会灭亡，这根本不符合「不朽」的命途天旨。为此，我这一世全都在研究如何让持明族脱离轮回、重新繁衍。

If this continues, one day our noble draconic bloodline will perish, and the fated decree of The Permanence will be violated. For this very reason, I have spent my entire life researching ways to free the Vidyadhara from the cycle of reincarnation.
长久以来，我不得其法，以为自己虚度了此世轮回，直到您启迪了我！
I have been without success for a long, long time, thinking that this reincarnation had been nought but a waste. But now you have enlightened me!
Dan Feng... What did he do?
丹枫大人您对化龙妙法的更动，固然造就了大肆破坏的孽龙，但同时也创造了一个全新的生命！这正是持明族再度繁衍的希望！

Master Dan Feng, your changes to the Transmutation Arcanum created a draconic abomination that wreaked great destruction... but it also created a new life! This is the hope that will one day allow the Vidyadhara to reproduce!
Allow the Vidyadhara to reproduce once again?
过去我对于「繁衍」的认知，受限于凡夫俗子的想象，那是多么狭隘啊！持明族的繁衍，未必非要本族血脉传承相续……
My understanding of reproduction was limited by ordinary notions — how constrained I was! Why should Vidyadhara reproduction remain trapped within the confines of our race...
挖掘龙血的潜力，将异族纳入龙祖血脉之中，这不正是「化龙妙法」的意义所在吗？
To unearth the potential might of Long's blood... and incorporate other races into the flesh of the dragon — isn't that the real meaning behind the Transmutation Arcanum?
龙师们目光浅薄，看不见您的天纵英才，还想另设龙尊，真是愚蠢至极。
The Preceptors are too narrow-minded to see your talent. They want to install another High Elder. Foolish!
「化龙妙法」里似乎潜藏着让持明族摆脱轮回，继续繁衍的秘密。但具体的细节，我也不明白。
The Transmutation Arcanum seems to contain a secret that allows the Vidyadhara to escape the cycle of reincarnation and return to normal reproduction... but the mechanism eludes me.
是你，丹枫大人！你为什么要那样做！
It's you, Master Dan Feng! Why did you disgrace yourself!
你曾经是我的英雄，我从小就梦想像你一样，能成为云骑军的大英雄，可是你、可是你为什么要背叛长老们的期许！
You were my hero — I dreamed of being just like you — of joining the Cloud Knights... But you betrayed the hopes and dreams of the elders!
这个蜃影…应该是曾经和丹枫并肩战斗的云骑战士。
This Mirage Echo... he must be a Cloud Knight who fought alongside Dan Feng all those years ago.
多少族人在那场灾难中入灭，再也无法进入轮回。而我…我也被那孽物撕去了一条腿…好疼……
How many of us perished in that disaster and could not be reincarnated? And I... My leg was torn off by that abomination... Oh, the pain...
丹鼎司的医士说我只能尽快蜕生，不然会有性命之虞……可怜那些同袍兄弟，却不能重归古海。
The doctors at the Alchemy Commission said I have to reincarnate as soon as possible to avoid affecting my immortal life... But my poor comrades have no chance of returning to the ancient sea.
你曾经告诉咱们应当好好珍惜每一世的生命，休战时您也会用云吟法术治好咱们的伤口，可是你为什么最终却背叛了我们！
You once told us that we should cherish every life cycle, and that you would use cloudhymn magic to heal our wounds... But in the end, all you did was betray us!
丹恒，你不用听他说完的。
Dan Heng, you don't have to listen to him.
我必须听完他说的每一句话。也许里面会有重要的信息。
I must listen to him very carefully — we cannot afford to miss any information.
我是不会原谅你的。你不配持有龙尊之力，这是罗浮持明族人的力量，不是你的。持明族不能因为你一人中断了龙尊传承。
I will never forgive you. The High Elder's power belongs to the Vidyadhara of the Luofu — you are unworthy. The Vidyadhara must not sever the High Elder succession tradition just because of you.
丹恒，这就是承受龙尊之力的代价吗？背负他人的期待，然后是憎恨？
Dan Heng, is this the price we pay for bearing the power of the High Elder? Carrying the weight of all these expectations, all this hatred...
在这一切发生之前，你有足够的时间做好准备。
Before any of this transpires, you have enough time to prepare.
白露小姐？您没事吧，我等了好久都没见你们出现……
Miss Bailu? Are you okay? You were in there for such a long time...
多亏了丹恒和{NICKNAME}一路护送…你可要多多感谢他们。
Luckily, I had Dan Heng and {NICKNAME} to protect me all the way. If anyone's owed a thanks, it's them.
This has been a very dangerous journey...
所幸我们还是逃出来了…
It's a good thing we managed to escape.
没想到那些刺客竟如此胆大妄为，闯进圣地鳞渊境，对各位穷追不舍…小姐放心，我一定禀报长老，将他们一网打尽。

I didn't expect those assassins to be so brazen and reckless, storming a sacred place like Scalegorge Waterscape and pursuing you... Rest assured, Miss Bailu. I'll report them to the elders and round them all up.
幸好，三位吉人天佑，要是出了什么状况，妾身可就失职了。
Fortunately, the three of you were blessed by the gods. If anything had happened to you, it would've been a dereliction of duty on my part.
刺客？我们三人并未提过「凶险」是刺客，浣溪小姐又是如何得知的？
Assassins? None of us mentioned that the danger involved assassins... How did you know that?
这当然是因为…我们已在渡口处遭到过一次袭击了呀？我、我心中慌乱，怕这些家伙再对各位下毒手？
Oh, it's because... We were already attacked at the ferry, no? I—I was just worried that those people would try and attack you again...
可是，按浣溪的说法，之前那些刺客只是冲着丹恒先生而来的…但我们在废墟里遇到的，却是对我动手的。
You said those assassins only came for Mr. Dan Heng... But the ones we met in the ruins were coming for me instead.
唉，你们三位从头到尾都没出什么状况，那我这当侍女的可就失职啦。
Hmph, perhaps the real dereliction of duty was that not enough happened to you.
所以，是长老们派你们来清除不合格的龙尊？
So, did the elders send you to take out the "unworthy" high elder?
哼哼，这件事不过是妾身一人的主张，又怎么会是龙师们的意思呢？
Hmph, that was my idea alone. How could the Preceptors have come up with that?
以妾身看来，持明族只需要一位龙尊。孱弱无用、窃据大位的那一个，除去便是。
From my perspective, the Vidyadhara requires only one High Elder. A second High Elder — one who is weak and useless must be removed.
白露小姐，主仆情分缘尽于此，再见了。
Miss Bailu, our relationship as mistress and maid ends here. Farewell.
将军！你是给咱们搬救兵来了吗？
龙师们当真以为他们那点小心思没人知道吗？
Did the Preceptors truly believe that nobody knew of their scheme?
清醒些吧。对龙女下手，只是在摧毁他们所剩不多的威望罢了。
They should return to their senses. Attacking the Dragon Lady only destroys what little prestige they have remaining.
整件事都是我一人谋划，请将军不要随意构陷……
The whole thing was planned by me and me alone. Beware of false charges, General...
省省力气吧。等云骑将你送入十王司，请判官一审，便知真假。
Save your breath. We'll know the truth once the Cloud Knights send you to the Ten-Lords Commission's Judges.
不。我宁可入灭，也绝不去那里……
Too late, Jing Yuan. I go no further...
浣溪吐出最后一口气，跌倒在地。
Huanxi exhales her last breath and collapses to the ground.
唉，我知道在长老心目中我始终是个多余的存在，是没能继承龙尊力量的伪龙。
I always felt useless in the eyes of the elders — a false dragon who failed to inherit the power of the High Elder...
不过直到今天我才确认，他们为了摈除我，竟然不惜使用这样的手段。
...and today I realized — they'll use any means of removing me.
持明族中未必尽是心怀鬼胎的人。如果龙女大人不安心，神策府这厢可以安排住处。
Not all of the Vidyadhara harbor evil intentions. If you feel uneasy, Dragon Lady, the Seat of Divine Foresight can arrange for you to stay elsewhere.
谢谢将军费心了，我还想和丹恒再聊聊。
Thank you, general. I'd like to talk more with Dan Heng first.
好啊，我会在渡口附近等着你们。
Very well. I will await all of you at the ferry.
持明族人没有父母家人，诞生后，会有一位导师教导着幼年的持明掌握云吟法术、以及各种各样的生活知识。
The Vidyadhara have neither parents nor family members. Once born, a teacher is assigned to instruct the young Vidyadhara in the art of cloudhymn, as well as various life skills.
...Dan Heng, did you have a teacher like that?
如果你问的是持明族传统，我是没有这样的经历的，我早就是无法回到故乡的流浪者了。
If you're asking about Vidyadhara tradition, I'm afraid that's something I never had any experience of. I've always been a wanderer... I can never return to my homeland.
碎片一样的梦境中，总有些兵戎相见的故人；而在旅途中，我也总是能遇见一些能被称为「导师」的人。
In my fragmented dreams, I meet enemies on the battlefield... but in my travels, I meet many people who I can describe with the word "teacher."
从我记事起，只有龙师们要我做这做那儿，只有丹鼎司的医士要我治病救人。我根本不知道那算不算是导师。
As far back as I can remember, I've had the Preceptors and Alchemy Commission healers telling me what to do. "Cure diseases, save lives..." I don't know if that counts as "teaching..."
你知道吗？你特别像是我等待了很久的导师。「前世贤契，来世蒙师」…说不定我们的前世也是朋友或者师徒呢。
You know something? It feels like you're the teacher I've been waiting for. "Virtuous in the past life, master in the next life..." Perhaps we were friends or disciples in our previous incarnations.
丹枫的朋友或者爱徒吗？也许吧。
A friend or disciple of Dan Feng? Maybe.
我原本担心白露小姐空有名衔，却没有龙尊之力，迟早会遭遇麻烦。但，这是我多虑了，你拥有真正的力量。

Miss Bailu... at first I was worried that your title of high elder was in name only, and that an absence of true power would eventually put you in grave danger... It seems I was overthinking things — you have no shortage of true power.
是你教给我用来修复封印的那股力量吗？
You mean the power to repair the seal? The power you taught me?
鳞渊境的蜃影提到过丹枫既是骁勇绝伦的战士，也能以云吟治疗他人。
The Mirage Echoes of Scalegorge Waterscape mentioned that not only was Dan Feng a brave warrior — he could heal others with cloudhymn magic.
你拥有的是属于你的龙尊之力，是重新编织封印，结成玄根的生命力。与我这边只擅长破坏摧毁的力量截然不同。

What you have is the power of the high elder that belongs to you — the power of life that can reforge the Arbor's seal and the vitality of the eternal roots... It is a world away from my power of destruction.
这样一看，丹枫应该也是个内心有一半温柔的家伙吧？
In that case, Dan Feng probably had a gentle side to him too, right?
走吧，差不多该回到行医市集了，我今天还有别的事要忙呢。
Hmm... We should head back to the Healer's Market, I have other things to do today. Let's go.
白露小姐，你们怎么在我的药房里？难道你们已经知道了「药王」之事…来拿我问罪么？
Miss Bailu, what are you doing in my pharmacy? Don't tell me you've already heard about Sanctus Medicus... Have you come here to condemn me?
看来所有的蜃影都没法察觉到自己已经蜕生的事实啊……
Seems like none of the Mirage Echoes realize that they've already been reborn...
它们只是从持明族生命中剥离下的片段。
They are mere fragments stripped from the lives of the Vidyadhara.
我从一开始就不信什么龙尊！你们不配来问我的罪！
I have never believed in the High Elder! You are unworthy of the condemnation you spout!
尤其是你，白露小姐，你根本就没有呼风唤雨的龙尊之力，我凭什么相信你能做得比丹枫大人更好？
Especially you, Miss Bailu. You simply do not have the power of the High Elder — the power to summon the forces of nature... Why should I believe you are superior in any way to Master Dan Feng?
龙师们也好，族人们也好，都以为龙尊才是持明族唯一的救赎，那只是高谈阔论罢了，根本不切实际！你们见识过「慈怀药王」能做到什么吗？
The Preceptors, our people... they think that the High Elder is the Vidyadhara's only savior. Arrogant, illogical! Have you seen what Merciful Medicus can do?
持明已有长生不灭的身躯了，持明祈求的应当是如同仙舟人那般生息繁衍的能力。
The Vidyadhara already have immortal bodies. What they should pray for is the ability to reproduce like the Xianzhou natives.
「慈怀药王」一定能帮助我们开枝散叶，龙尊做不到的，药王可以做到。
Merciful Medicus will help us to grow our population and bear descendants. They can do what the High Elder cannot.
总有一天你们就会知道，我才是正确的。
One day you will come to know that I was right.
没想到持明里也有信奉寿瘟祸祖的人……
I never knew the Vidyadhara had believers in the Plagues Author among their ranks...
白露小姐，您没有事吧？您没事就好。
Miss Bailu, are you okay? I was so worried.
芫梨？是你吗？我还以为你遭遇什么意外了。
Yuanli? Is that you? I thought something must have happened to you.
是我，抱歉，白露小姐。芫梨再也做不了您的侍女了，不过，我听说有名精明能干的侍女会来接替我。
It's me, Miss Bailu. I'm so sorry that I can't be your maid anymore, but I heard that a smart and talented replacement would be coming soon.
我拒绝了龙师们的要求，他们要我离开。
I refused a request from the Preceptors, so they asked me to leave.
Is the new maid named Huanxi?
没错，看来已经打过招呼了呀，希望她比我更加称职。
Yes, I suppose you must have met her already? I hope she is more competent than I was.
龙师们对白露小姐忌惮深重。他们要求每一位伺候大人的侍女都必须记录您的梦境和日常行为，一开始我也照做了。
The Preceptors are very fearful of you, Miss Bailu. They asked every maid to record your dreams and daily activities. And I did so, at first.
可是后来，我觉得龙师们并非是出自关心，而是另有所图，就再也无法坚持下去。
After a while, I felt that the Preceptors were asking this not out of concern for you, but for some malevolent purpose... so I stopped.
…芫梨，你放心，我从未告诉过任何人梦境的事。
...Yuanli, don't worry. I never told anyone about my dreams.
那就好，那我就放心了，我应该会被派去其他的工作吧，希望有一天能和您再见。
Good, good, then I needn't worry. They'll be assigning me to a different job soon — I hope we have another chance to see each other one day.
There's a draconic abomination! Help me...!
你得救了，我是丹鼎司的医士，我会救你。
It's okay, I'm a healer from the Alchemy Commission — I'm here to save you.
谢谢你医士大人，那孽龙真的是丹枫大人所为吗？我不相信。
Thank you, healer. Was master Dan Feng really behind that abomination? I don't believe it.
龙女大人，龙女大人，这件事我已经疑惑了很久了。
Dragon Lady, Dragon Lady, I've been wondering about this for a long time.
您的尾巴与龙角是什么化形术的作用吗？
Are your tail and horns the result of some shape-shifting magic?
化形术？可是我的尾巴能动，能放电，还会疼。
Shape-shifting? But my tail can move, discharge electricity, feel pain...
全是你的错觉，那都是假的，这一切都是阴谋。
It's all just an illusion. It's all fake — just a conspiracy.
「靡靡赤龙、森森青松～六百余年凡尘中～如梦尽是空～」
"When the dragon turns red, then the green pines shall shed. Pass like a dream out of sight and mind, six hundred years in this mortal bind~"
我们当务之急是退回安全区域，切勿逗留。
Our priority is to return to safety. Let's keep moving.
{NICKNAME}, do you have time to chat now?
Is there anything I can do for you?
根据地衡司目前的调查工作来看，少数居民在丹鼎司、鳞渊境区域内发现近似「云吟术」的异象，并且在异象中遭遇了隐身怪物。

Based on the investigation of the Realm-Keeping Commission, a few citizens have found a strange phenomenon similar to cloudhymn magic in the Alchemy Commission and Scalegorge Waterscape, and even encountered invisible monsters inside these mirages.
根据报案人的说法，我们找到几个特点——「异象与怪物都是突然出现的，异象结束之后，随星槎带来的食物却不见了。」

According to the statements of the witnesses, we have come to several conclusions regarding the incident: "The phenomenon and the monsters appeared simultaneously. When the mirage was gone, so did the food brought by the starskiff."
由于异象与持明族的「云吟术」相近，勤务们利用「回响」便可探明区域内隐身怪物位置，具体发生原理目前尚未知晓。

As the phenomenon is similar to Vidyadhara cloudhymn magic, the orderlies can use echoes to detect the location of the invisible monsters in the area. The exact principles behind this are not yet known.
The part about food is really concerning...
确实，很难想象异象的出现似乎是为了食物。
Indeed. It's hard to imagine that food is the reason of the phenomenon's appearance.
出现「云吟术」异象的地方总有怪物，具体原因我们也不清楚。
There are always monsters around where cloudhymn magic appears. We have no clue about the reason.
请跟紧我，我会带你到发现隐形怪物的事发地点。
Please come with me. I'll take you to the scene where the invisible monsters were found.
{NICKNAME}, do you have time to chat now?
Is there anything I can do for you?
自从上次调查结束之后，在行医市集附近偶尔也会发生隐身怪物出没的情报。
Since the last investigation ended, there have been occasional sightings of the invisible monsters near the Healer's Market.
既然已经判明「模拟云吟术」是次元扑满所为，接下来我们决定展开「追猎行动」——简单来说，就是捕获流浪扑满。

Now that we've determined the imitated cloudhymn magic to be the work of a Warp Trotter, we have decided to carry out a "Hunting Operation" next - In other words, we're going to capture the stray Trotter.
这次我们得到了丹鼎司的协助，备好了能够吸引扑满的「特制饵食」。接下来，我们将以行医市集为中心布置陷阱，吸引扑满上钩。
This time, with the help of the Alchemy Commission, we've prepared a special bait for the Trotter. We'll lay traps with the Healer's Market as the center to attract the Trotter.
为了避免居民被怪物攻击，我们会提前疏散丹鼎司附近的居民。这样的话，扑满也能放下戒心前来进食。怎么样，这个想法是不是很大胆？

We'll evacuate the residents living near the Alchemy Commission in advance to protect them from the monster's attacks. This way, the Trotter will let down its guard and take the bait. How does this sound? Isn't it a bold plan?
很大胆，你可不许半途而废啊。
Yes, it is. Don't you dare give up halfway.
整个行医市集，疏散居民，我们就在这里捕获扑满。
We'll evacuate the residents throughout the entire Healer's Market and capture the Trotter there.
听说了行动计划之后，所有的地衡司执事都很兴奋。
All the Realm-Keeping Commission officers are super excited after hearing about the plans for this operation.
太过理想了，很担心这次行动。
I'm very worried about this operation. It's too idealistic.
放心，我研究了大量捕获扑满的案例，仙舟内外的我都看过。
There's no cause for concern. I've studied many cases of capturing Trotters, both within and beyond Xianzhou.
明白。地衡司会立刻疏散群众，「追猎行动」即将开始。
Got it. The Realm-Keeping Commission will evacuate the residents, and the "Hunting Operation" will commence.
给我介绍下这「追猎行动」。
我们会在行医市集里放置「特制饵食」吸引次元扑满。
We will place the special bait in the Healer's Market to attract the Warp Trotter.
您需要穿过「模拟云吟术」影响的隐形怪物找到扑满，并且将它捕获。
You need to make it past the invisible monsters affected by the imitated cloudhymn magic to find the Trotter and capture it.
这里四面是高墙，扑满肯定跑不了的。
This place is surrounded by high walls. I'm sure the Trotter has nowhere to escape.
明白。这个行动少不了像您这样身手矫健的人，我会等您的。
Got it. This operation needs agile people like you. I'll wait for you.
{NICKNAME}, do you have time to chat now?
Is there anything I can do for you?
您记得咱们上次捕获的次元扑满吗？经过仔细检查，这只次元扑满并没有过人之处——它应该无法独力模拟云吟术。

Do you remember the Warp Trotter we caught last time? After a thorough examination, the Warp Trotter did not exhibit any extraordinary characteristics. It shouldn't have been capable of imitating the cloudhymn magic by itself.
我曾经阅读过一些银河生态学的研究——「寰宇蝗灾」的灾难程度与种群密度有着密切关系，一旦繁殖致使密度超过某个阈值，生物种群会发生「相变」。

However, based on the cosmic ecology studies that I have read, there is a close relationship between the severity of the Swarm Disaster to the population density of these cosmic bugs. Once reproduction causes a species' density to exceed a certain threshold, a phase transition will occur in the population.
以「蝗灾」为例，实现「相变」之后，蝗群会进一步加剧群集行为和游牧行为，并且使个体体内某种激素水平增高，变得更加异化疯狂……

Taking the Swarm as an example - they will intensify their collective hivemind behaviors and migrate more after the phase transition occurs. The level of certain hormones in their bodies will also increase, making them more mutated and frenzied...
Are you saying that the same has happened to the Warp Trotters...
倒没有那么危险，我只是想有一种推测——一只次元扑满做不到的事，也许很多只扑满就能做到。
Certainly not to the same extent, but I've thought of a possibility - What a single Warp Trotter cannot accomplish can probably be done through the joint effort of multiple Warp Trotters.
直接说吧，我听不懂你的设定。
Just tell me your conclusion. I don't get what you're trying to say.
不、不好意思，谈到自己感兴趣的内容就有些控制不住……
M—My bad. I tend to get carried away when talking about things I'm interested in...
简而言之，生物集群有可能做到个体无法做到的事。
In short, a group of organisms has the potential to achieve things that an individual creature cannot.
我们已经锁定了多只次元扑满，这次抓捕行动就叫做「牧场行动」，如何？
We've locked down the suspects to several Warp Trotters. How about we call this a "Herding Operation"?
明白。地衡司会立刻封锁流云渡，「牧场行动」即将开始。
Got it. The Realm-Keeping Commission will immediately lock down Cloudford, and commence the Herding Operation.
给我介绍下这「牧场行动」。
Tell me about this Herding Operation.
很简单，有很多只次元扑满，我们去将它们全部抓捕。
It's very simple. There are multiple Warp Trotters, and we need to catch them all.
不过您知道的，这些小生灵胆小怯懦，想要全部抓捕也并不容易……
But as you know, these little creatures are timid, so it's pretty challenging to catch them all...
明白。这个行动少不了像您这样身手矫健的人，我会等您的。
Got it. This operation needs agile people like you. I'll wait for you.
我已经将之前抓捕扑满的行动记录在案了，可以随时调阅。
I've documented the previous operations to capture the Trotters. The report can be accessed and reviewed at any time.
你有兴趣再重温一下吗？
Would you like to re-visit them?
让我重温一下之前的行动。
Let me re-visit the previous operations.
当然可以，请稍等，我申请一下资料权限。顺带一提，这毕竟是历史资料，不会产生任何行动报酬哦。
No problem. Please wait while I apply for access permission. By the way, this is historical information, which does not generate any operation payment.
你确定要重温之前的行动吗，{NICKNAME}？
Are you sure you want to re-visit the previous operations, {NICKNAME}?
好嘞，资料非常完整，保证让您感觉身临其境。
Sure. As the info is complete, you'll be guaranteed an immersive experience.
嗯，您帮了地衡司很多，随时欢迎您调阅行动档案。
Alright. Since you've helped the Realm-Keeping Commission on many occasions, you are welcome to access our operation archives any time.
嗯，您帮了地衡司很多，随时欢迎您调阅行动档案。
Alright. Since you've helped the Realm-Keeping Commission on many occasions, you are welcome to access our operation archives any time.
我来帮忙调查嫌疑人了。
I'm here to help with the investigation.
哦哦，您来了啊。这几位是…三月七小姐和瓦尔特先生？
Oh, so you are. And these would be... Miss March 7th and Mr. Yang, I presume?
没错！我是三月七，他是瓦尔特！我们是来帮忙哒！
That's right, I'm the first one, he's the second! We're here to help!
小三月，不要那么激动…我们来办正事，不是来玩的。
March, try not to sound too excited...? We're here for work, remember.
杨叔你不也跃跃欲试的嘛…旅行这么久，还没查过案呢！我的聪明才智终于有用武之地啦！
Hmph, you're the one getting excited... My first detective case! Finally, my intelligence and wisdom have a chance to shine!
原来是三月姑娘和瓦尔特先生，久仰久仰。辛苦各位先歇会儿啊，稍微等我一下。净砚！把那几张相片给我拿来！
Miss March, Mr. Yang, I've been looking forward to meeting you. Make yourselves comfortable. One moment, please... Jingyan! Get me the photos!
还有那谁，你叫啥来着…给几位贵客看茶。
And you, whatshisname... Get our guests some tea.
半晌，净砚拿着一个卷轴匆匆走来。
After a while, Jingyan hurries over with a scroll.
各位久等了，这就是在建木生发前日，在将军和太卜指定的位置出现过的几位化外…异邦人。

Thanks for waiting. These are the outworld— ...uh — travelers who were sighted in the location specified by the general and the master diviner. This was two days before the Ambrosial Arbor came back to life.
麻烦各位看看，这里是否有我们仙舟没认出来的危险人物呢？
We'd like you to take a look — do you recognize any of them as a threat?
我看看我看看，这些就是本案的嫌疑人吗…唔唔…嗯嗯…原来如此……
Let me take a look... Mm, so these are the suspects. Ahem, hmm, I see...
老大，就是这个人…拿着您需要的货物。
Boss, this is the one... He brought the delivery.
I'll be the judge of that.
（说到「杨叔的老大」，就只能想到帕姆了……）
(I couldn't think of anyone else to be Mr. Yang's boss...)
这是我们的老大「星芋啵啵」，快把货拿出来给他老人家掌掌眼。
This is our boss — Startaro Bubble! Let's see this delivery, and make it snappy.
（奶茶也是茶！「饮茶会」里有奶茶很正常。）
(So what! This is the Tea Society, remember?)
一手交钱，一手交货。这么简单的规矩，您不会不懂吧？
Not before I see the money. I'm sure you understand the rules of such a transaction?
废什么话，让您交货您就交货！
Save it! Show us the goods first!
没关系帕。这件货物格外危险，他会谨慎，也是理所当然的帕。
Easy now. The item in question is extremely dangerous. It's understandable that our friend here wants to take extra precautions...
（帕姆说话时真的会带那么多「帕」吗？）
(I'm not sure Pom-Pom is the best casting choice for a gang boss...)
（感觉会的帕？不是不是…感觉会的吧？）
普洱，把钱给他帕。怎么样，这下愿意把货给我了帕？
Pu'er, give him the money. Happy now? Ready to hand it over?
小心点，这东西很危险。告辞。
Be careful, dangerous is an understatement with this item. I'll take my leave.
的确，我们不会再见面了帕。普洱，干掉他帕。
Yes, you will... permanently. Pu'er, get rid of him.
Oh? This was all going so swimmingly.
你卖给我这么危险的东西，我们就算共犯了帕。为了保守秘密，只能委屈你永远闭上嘴了帕。
Selling a dangerous item to me makes you my accomplice, and I've got too many of those. To keep our little secret safe, I'm afraid I need to take special measures.
Quite sensible when you think about it...
（小三月对这些小细节的处理总是特别符合逻辑，但是其他部分就……）
(When it comes to minor details, March can be very logical. As for the rest of the story...)
本地帮派的格局，也未免太低了些。
And there I was thinking you gangsters still had some decorum.
（还有，我为什么突然变成了金人？）
(Speaking of which, when did I turn into an aurumaton?)
（这是普洱的隐藏设定，他会在危急时刻变身成金人。）
(That's Pu'er's little secret — he transforms into an aurumaton in dire situations.)
我们那天想找个安静的地方练习一下新段子，没想到找的那个地方，总也没人去，有点年久失修…地上有个大坑。
There we were, looking for a spot to practice our new routine. We found a place eventually — a little dilapidated but nice and quiet... *sigh* Shame about the giant ditch.
我脚下一滑，就掉沟里了。我的好搭档，喊了一句「别慌！阿往前来支援！」就跟着我一起掉下去了。
I lost my footing and slipped right in. My associate here, Forth, yelled after me: "Don't panic! Forth's got your back!" Two seconds later, he landed on my back.
那个大坑直通臭水沟，我们俩一身污泥，让您几位看了笑话，还以为是「黑衣人」呢。
Unfortunately, the ditch was connected to a sewer outlet — we were covered head to toe in... Anyway, I assume that's why you thought we had dark clothing on. A dignified story, I'm sure you'll agree.
怪不得隐书说有一股臭味……
No wonder Yinshu said she had to cover her nose...
总而言之，幸亏这位罗刹先生途经此地，费了好大的力气，才把我们救了上来。
Anyway, thankfully Mr. Luocha was passing by and dragged us back to dry land. It took all his strength, I'll wager.
要不是有您出手相救，我们哥俩恐怕就要交代在这里了。
Without your bravery, we'd never have gotten out of that ditch alive!
恩公，您有什么需要，尽管开口。只要我们哥俩能办到的，一定给您办。
Know, sir, that if you ever need anything and it's within our power to help, you can count on us.
Even it's beyond our power to help!
二位言重了，不过是举手之劳。
That's too kind of you. It was nothing, really.
何止举手之劳啊，您为了我们，耗费了那么多的时间和体力……
Nonsense! You went out of your way to—
谢礼就不必了。二位早些回家，路上小心。
Don't worry about it. You should head back home now, take care.
二位稍等。这污水多少有些毒害，在下略通医术，二位按我的方子抓些药，服下后好好休息。
Ah, one moment, both of you. That sewage could well contain harmful compounds. I'm something of a doctor — let me give you a prescription. Make sure to use the medicine and get some good rest.
谢谢您！对不住，耽误您时间了，我们先走了。
I don't know what to say! Sorry to trouble you — we'll take our leave now.
路上一定要当心啊，不要再掉进沟里了。
Watch your step — wouldn't want to find ourselves in another ditch now, would we?
...What's wrong, Mr. Yang? See anything fishy?
这位先生是谁？…我想看看他的资料。
Who's he? ...I'd like to see more information on him.
您说的是哪位？我瞅一眼……
杨叔，咋啦，这人不对劲吗？
...What's wrong, Mr. Yang? See anything fishy?
...I thought we talked about copying people.
Is one of them a threat?
Let's kick some butt so we can get back to resting.
什么叫「也」困了，我可精神着呢！
没有实质证据…只是，我觉得值得查一查。
I don't have any concrete evidence... but I think he's worth checking out.
哦？他啊。这人我有印象，他是个宇宙行商，做买卖的，还懂点医术。他在联盟的注册名…叫什么来着……
Oh, him? I remember him. He's a traveling merchant. He trades throughout the universe, knows a thing or two about remedial arts too. He registered himself on the Xianzhou as... what was it again...
没错，罗刹。他这次来背着个大箱子，说是殡葬用具，叫什么…「观火」。因为这个「观火」很显眼，我还忍不住多问了他几句。

That's right, Luocha. He came to the Xianzhou with a huge box this time — some sort of funerary contraption. It had a funny name... something to do with coughing? It was pretty conspicuous — I had to ask him about it.
那个叫做「棺椁」。是异邦人的丧葬用品…我猜这几位贵客应当是认得的。
"Coffin." It's a tool that certain non-Xianzhou travelers seem to use in death rites... I'm guessing our guests here might recognize it.
嗐，我也分不太清。总之，我们查过，他在联盟的记录很干净。背后那个大箱子…那个观什么……
Hmph, I swear he said "coughing"... Anyway, we checked him out — his record on the Xianzhou is squeaky-clean. As for this "caffeine" thing...
嗯，那玩意儿也正如他所说，就是殡葬用具。我估计他在做这类生意。罗浮上的异邦人很多，各个星系都有自己的丧葬风俗，干这行的人也不少。怎么，他有问题吗？

Yeah, yeah. Either way, it definitely had something to do with funerals. There are lots of travelers on the Luofu, each with their own star system and death rites — I guess that must be Luocha's line of work... Is there something up with him?
那倒不是…只是出于个人理由，我觉得有必要查一查这个人。请问他在建木生发那几日都做了什么事呢？
Not necessarily... but I have my reasons for wanting to investigate. What was he doing in the days leading up to the Ambrosial Arbor's resurrection?
嗯…这个问题解释起来有些复杂，各位先随我移步到那边的四方览镜吧。一边看一边解释比较方便。
Hmm... that's complicated. Come with me to the Foursquare Mirror — it'll be easier to explain.
咱们长乐天算是罗浮上一个很重要的中心城区，上面对这里的治安问题也很上心。所以，上上下下安装了不少机巧鸟。
Exalting Sanctum is one of the Luofu's crucial central cities — the higher-ups are very concerned about security issues here. That's why there are so many cycranes stationed in the area.
罗刹在建木生发的前几日来到了罗浮，之后也没什么特别可疑的动向…直到事发前一天……
Luocha arrived on the Luofu a few days prior to the Ambrosial Arbor's resurrection. Up until the day before the resurrection, there was nothing suspicious about his behavior...
我知道了。事发前一天他突然带着星核出现在了建木附近。
I figured it out! The day before the resurrection, he appeared near the Ambrosial Arbor with a Stellaron!
The Realm-Keeping Commission would have arrested him by now...
哦…对哦，确实是这个道理。还是你聪明！
Oh yeah, I guess. You're pretty smart... sometimes.
要是这样的话，地衡司早就直接去抓人了，何必找我们呢。
If that were the case, the Realm-Keeping Commission would have arrested him by now — why look to us for help?
哦…对哦，确实是这个道理。这案子有点蹊跷，刚开始就叫我神探三月七跌了个跟头……
Oh, yeah... Ah Geez, this is gonna be a tough case to crack if even my instincts are off...
哈哈哈哈，您几位真有活力。会查罗刹这批人也是有原因的：唯独在建木生发前一天，他究竟做了什么…我们确实不知道。
Hahahaha, you lot are enthusiastic, I'll give you that. The reason I mention the day before the resurrection is because... we have no idea what he did that day.
建木生发引起了不正常的阴阳相感现象，导致整个机巧鸟系统出现了故障。事发当日的影像资料抢救不回来了，连事发前日的也损坏了不少。

The resurrection brought about unusual yinyang phenomena that caused the entire cycrane system to malfunction. The image data from the day of the incident is beyond restoration, and data from the day before was badly affected.
为什么不直接问当事人？
Why don't you just ask him?
问当然是要问的。但不能大海捞针地问，而要有的放矢地问。况且，如果没有明确的疑点，我们也不好三番五次去叨扰人家啊。
We will, in due course. But we can't be too general — specific questions are key. Not to mention, without a clear suspicion, it would involve multiple interrogations...
所以…这位罗刹如果有什么特别可疑的地方，还请您明示，我也好着手安排对他的扣押审讯和调查。
So... if you feel this Luocha is suspicious in some way, make it known. Then I can arrange for his detention and interrogation.
该怎么解释呢…因为他的长相……
How should I put this... He just looks kind of...
杨叔！我还以为你要说什么惊天秘密呢，结果就是在以貌取人。杨叔啊，以貌取人可不好啊。
Mr. Yang! You were going off his appearance this whole time? I thought you had some super secret thing up your sleeve! Didn't your mom ever tell you not to judge a book by its—
杨叔啊，以貌取人可不好啊！
His appearance? He looks pretty handsome to me...
没错没错…嗯？不是，这不是重点吧？
Exactly! ...Huh? W—Wait! That's not the point!
Yup, he just rubs me the wrong way!
抱歉，我的意思是…嗯，很难解释，只能说「直觉」告诉我：这位罗刹先生很可能有问题……
Sorry, what I mean is... hmm. It's difficult to explain, but my instinct tells me this Luocha is involved somehow.
对不起，这只是我的臆测罢了。
Apologies, I realize this is personal speculation.
没关系，「直觉」也是地衡司查案的重要伙伴。直觉上认为一个人有问题，我也有过很多次，结果往往是对的。所以我愿意相信您。

That's alright — instinct is an important part of any Realm-Keeping Commission investigation. There are times when my gut tells me something's not right, and there's usually a reason for it. I'm with you on this one.
您说长着他这张脸的就一定是坏人，没问题，我可以接受。但…我毕竟是个执事官，总不能拿这种理由去叨扰当事人……
Be that as it may, as an official, I can't go bringing someone in based on a villainous appearance...
如果因为投诉被司部清退，履历上会留下污点，往后几百年就很难东山再起。
...Because if a complaint led to his dismissal, it would leave a blemish on his resume, making it difficult for him to advance his career for the next few centuries.
对，就是这个道理…不是！你说什么呢…总之，几位要是想查，我可以破例给您四方览镜的权限…然后…净砚，你去帮几位贵客查案。

Precise— No! What are you talking about... Anyway, if you do want to investigate, I can grant you access to the Foursquare Mirror... Jingyan, you'll be assisting our esteemed guests in their investigation.
我是地衡司的执事，以官方身份下场帮民间人士调查别人，是不是不合规矩。
Isn't it inappropriate for an officer of the Realm-Keeping Commission to assist the public in investigating someone?
没事，这真没事。你别离开地衡司去现场，帮他们查查机巧鸟的影像就够了。
Bah, not at all... Make sure you don't leave the Commission — just help them check the cycrane footage.
找到什么线索的话，随时联系我，如果有「以貌取人」之外的证据，我立刻就来支援。只有一条：请不要直接去找罗刹本人，有任何发现，先找我。
Keep me updated on progress — if you find hard evidence, I'll be there in a flash. One thing though — don't approach him. If you make a discovery, contact me first.
您肯相信我们，我们已经很感激了。绝不会给您添麻烦。
We're thankful that you're entrusting this to us — we'll keep it by the book.
放心吧，我们列车组最讲义气了，从不恩将仇报。
Don't worry, the Express Crew keeps its promises. We won't disappoint you.
净砚，教教他们吧。我先去忙了。
*sigh* Jingyan, over to you. I need to get going.
几位，这个事情还挺花时间的。如果准备好了就来找我吧。
This might take you some time. Come and find me when you're ready.
抱歉，用毫无根据的臆测让你和小三月陪我一起胡闹…之后在仙舟上请你俩吃点好吃的吧。
I owe you two an apology — my speculations have gotten us into a delicate situation... I'll treat you to some Xianzhou delicacies later.
I want a full Garden of Gourmet feast!
当然没问题。不过，等这些事情都解决了再说吧。
No problem. Let's get this settled first, though.
No big deal, we're all on the same team after all.
嗯。你能这么想，我也很高兴。
Mm, I'm glad to hear you say that.
本来就要陪三月一起胡闹。
With March here, it's always a delicate situation.
怎么能叫胡闹呢！我们这是查案耶！
Yeah right... Anyway, since when did investigators shy away from delicate situations?
其实有个问题，刚才我没问出口…怎么说呢，我总觉得杨叔不是那种凭「直觉」下判断的人……
...I did wanna say something, though. Umm, I don't think Mr. Yang is the kind of person to make a judgment based only on instinct...
嗯…也没什么不能跟你们说的。
Mm... It's not something I need to conceal from you.
你们知道，在宇宙中有无数相似却又相异的世界。而在这些世界中，也有无数相似却又迥然相异的人。
As you know, there are infinite worlds in this universe that can be similar yet different from each other in various ways. The same is true of the people on those worlds.
所以我们在不同的世界里常常会遇见容貌相似的人。这些人么，可能有完全不同的性格…比方说，也许在某个世界里，和小三月一样可爱的女孩却是个星际大盗。

That's why it's possible for us to run into individuals on multiple worlds who share an appearance, but not a personality... For all we know, in some faraway world, March's adorable face might belong to an intergalactic pirate.
喂！人家杨叔就是举个例子！我可是银河第一好姑娘。
Hey! He was just giving an example! I'm the nicest girl in the galaxy.
但…更多的情况下，他们的命运有着类似的轨迹。而和这位罗刹长相肖似的人，我见过两个，他们可…并非善类。
However... in most cases, their fates will walk a similar course. I've seen two people who looked almost identical to this Luocha... They were not of the virtuous persuasion.
所以一看见他，我本能地脊背生寒。虽然小三月是对的——我们都不该以貌取人，但我个人没法视而不见……
That's why the moment I laid eyes on him, a chill ran down my spine. March is right — we shouldn't judge a book by its cover... but I can't overlook this.
哎…不好意思，我不强求你们相信我的判断，只是……
*sigh* I don't want to force you into trusting my judgment, but...
杨叔，说什么呢？我们当然相信你的判断啦！对吧，{NICKNAME}！
What are you talking about? Of course we trust your judgment, Mr. Yang! Right, {NICKNAME}?
That's right, we believe in you!
你们愿意相信我，我很欣慰。但主要问题还是，地衡司的几位，能否相信我这种妄想般的判断呢？
I'm glad you believe in me, truly. But the problem remains: Will the Realm-Keeping Commission trust a judgment based on this logic?
我觉得关键不是我们相不相信…
It isn't our trust you need...
嗯…{NICKNAME}说得对。关键还是，地衡司的几位，能否相信我这种妄想般的判断呢？
You're right, {NICKNAME}. The key is whether the Realm-Keeping Commission will trust a judgment based on this logic.
咱列车的宗旨就是帮亲不帮理。
On the Express, we always trust our own.
那当然了。自己人永远都是对的。
Of course, crew members are always right.
你们愿意相信我，我当然很欣慰。但主要问题还是，地衡司的几位，能否相信我这种妄想般的判断呢？
I'm glad you believe in me, truly. But the problem remains: Will the Realm-Keeping Commission trust a judgment based on this logic?
从仙舟律法的角度来讲，地衡司不相信。
From a Xianzhou legal standpoint, the Realm-Keeping Commission is unable to accept a judgment like this.
倒不是不相信瓦尔特先生，而是不相信没有证据的指控。希望各位理解。
It's not that we distrust you, Mr. Yang, but we cannot act on groundless accusations. I hope you understand.
当然。既然指控是我们提出的，那我们会担负起举证的责任。
Of course. We raised the accusation, we will carry the burden of proof.
哎呀，没想到这么快就遇到了神秘的「罗刹消失之谜」……
Hoo-wee! We may be new to the Xianzhou, but we're already investigating the mysterious disappearance of Luocha...
You're acting a little weird today...
有吗？我一直都这样啊。不过嘛，这个事情确实燃起了我三月七的神探之魂，忍不住想要一探究竟……
Am I? I feel pretty normal. Anyway, this case has really got my detective blood pumping. I need to get to the bottom of it...
是呀。我一直盼着能遇到一个难解之谜，好好发挥一下我三月七的神探天赋。
Yup! I always dreamed of a head-scratcher like this — a chance to showcase my detective genius.
因为我最近熟读《渔公案》，已经可以说是咱们列车上响当当的推理大师了！
I've been familiarizing myself with The Angler Mystery lately. — I think it's safe to say I have the best investigative mind on the Express at this point...
三月姑娘真是好品味啊。《渔公案》是仙舟上很经典的一套侦探小说…我小时候看完这本书，就立志要在司部当差了……
You have good taste, Miss March. The Angler Mystery is a classic detective novel on the Xianzhou... I read it when I was young and dreamed about working in the Commission ever since.
真没想到过了二百多年，还有新读者被这本书的魅力吸引。
I didn't think it would be attracting new readers more than <unbreak>200</unbreak> years later.
诶，原来净砚小姐是书友！…不过，作者苏芳好像是医馆的医助长，主角渔公也是个医士…你怎么不去丹鼎司呀？

*gasp* A fellow reader! But Miss Jingyan, the author — Su Fang — was the lead medical assistant in an apothecary, and the main character — the Angler — is a healer... Why didn't you want to join the Alchemy Commission instead?
哎…有各种各样的原因吧。就算这份工作再琐碎，我也有不得不在这里的理由…况且，丹鼎司的门槛…呵呵，对我来说太高啦。
*sigh* A number of reasons. This job may be trivial, but I have my reasons for being here... Plus, hehe, the threshold for the Alchemy Commission was too difficult for me to reach.
这样啊…不过你们的寿命那么长，转行也不是难事吧。
I see... But your lives are so long — shouldn't career change be easy?
我曾经想过…但现在已经没有那个念头了。我越来越体会到了执事这项工作的意义。打击犯罪、帮扶弱者、处理别人不想处理的麻烦事…每天都过得很充实。

I considered it once... That was a long time ago. The longer I stay in this job, the more I understand its purpose. Fighting crime, helping the weak, solving the problems no one wants to touch... It's a satisfying feeling.
哇，净砚小姐突然变得好耀眼。
Wow, good for you Miss Jingyan.
我这里现在随时可以调用资料。您准备好了吗？
I can bring up the data anytime from here. Are you ready?
正如大毫执事官所说：因为建木造成的阴阳相感现象，整个机巧鸟系统都不灵光了。
As Official Dahao mentioned, the Arbor caused unusual yinyang phenomena which affected the entire cycrane system.
一是丢失了很多视频资料，二是影像的时间戳也完全混乱了…您看，这是事发前日，关于罗刹先生的影像纪录。
We lost a lot of video footage, and for the image data we recovered, the timestamps are all jumbled up... Look, this is Mr. Luocha on the day prior to the resurrection.
所以，我们需要自行理清他们的顺序？
So we have to clean up and reorder the footage ourselves?
Exactly. Thank you again for your help.
{NICKNAME}, this is your forte — over to you.
I knew we could rely on you!
哎哎哎，不许打退堂鼓！交给你了！
Hey, I said over to you! You can't back out now!
对呀，你就是神探旁边的能干小助手！
That's right, and you're the sidekick!
罗刹穿过街道，走进了一个奇怪的角落。那里看起来很危险，但他似乎满不在乎，只拿着一把剑就踱步走了进去。
Luocha crossed the street and turned into a strange corner. It looks dangerous there, but he didn't seem to care at all. He paced in with nothing but a sword in hand.
罗刹从一家小客栈中走出来。身上没有携带什么繁重的行李。
Luocha walked out of a small inn without any heavy luggage.
罗刹进入了三余书肆，不久后走了出来。他两手空空，大概什么也没有买。
Luocha walked into Spare Time Book Shop and stepped out after a while. He left with nothing in hand — perhaps he didn't buy anything.
罗刹在长乐天的码头上眺望着风景，旁边立着一口棺材。可能是刚下星槎，也可能是在等星槎。走了一会儿，他将行李放在一边，靠在栏杆上观看码头下往来的星槎。

Luocha is looking into the distance at the dock of Exalting Sanctum with his coffin at his side. Maybe he just left a starskiff, maybe he is waiting for a new starskiff. He walked along the dock for a while and put aside his luggage, leaning on the railing and watching starskiffs passing by the dock.
怎么样？有什么头绪吗？正确的顺序是什么？
What do you think? Any idea what the correct order is?
这个顺序…真能对得上吗？我看看……
Is this order really correct? Lemme see...
罗刹走进了一个角落，但那个角落直通一家客栈…罗刹从客栈中出来，走进了三余书肆，什么都没买。
Luocha turns a corner, but the corner leads straight to an inn... Then he exits the inn and goes into Spare Time Book Shop without buying anything.
然后他跑到码头上，捡了一堆行李？
And then he runs to the dock and picks up some luggage?
我感觉这好像有点不太对…要不你再想想？
This doesn't seem right to me. Wanna try again?
嗯？怎么感觉乱七八糟的？
Really? That feels like a messy order to me.
罗刹先进了三余书肆，然后去了客栈，不久后空着手离开了。然后他走进了一个黑暗的角落…再之后就拎着大大小小的行李去了码头？
So Luocha enters Spare Time Book Shop and then the inn, but leaves moments after empty-handed. Then he turns a corner into a dark alley... and then goes to the dock with all that luggage?
他该不会是把谁给装到棺材里偷偷抓走了吧？
Do you think he captured someone and put them in the coffin?
小三月的想象力太丰富了。仙舟出入境都要扫描行李，做不到这种事的。况且，进入那个角落时，罗刹身上似乎也没带着那口棺材。

That's quite a conjecture, March. The Xianzhou scans all luggage moving into and out of their territory — it'd be nearly impossible to pull off. Not to mention, when Luocha turns the corner, he doesn't have the coffin with him.
还好还好，吓我一跳。那看来{NICKNAME}的排序还是有一点小问题的，你再想想看吧！
Phew, thank goodness. Looks like this order is still a little problematic. Try again?
我看看这个顺序能不能对得上…嗯…罗刹从星槎上下来，进入长乐天，走进一间小客栈放下行李，甚至放下了他的宝贝棺材。
Lemme see if this order works... Hmm, Luocha exits the starskiff, enters Exalting Sanctum, goes into an inn, and puts down his luggage — including the coffin.
然后他去了三余书肆，没有买书。离开书肆之后，就钻进了一个小角落。
Then he goes to Spare Time Book Shop, but doesn't buy anything. Finally, he leaves and turns a corner into a dark alley.
逻辑很顺畅，看起来这就是正确的顺序了。{NICKNAME}确实很聪明。
The logic in this is sound — looks like the correct order. Nice work, {NICKNAME}.
不错不错，不愧是我神探三月七精挑细选的小助手！
Nice work indeed — you're sidekick to a genius detective after all!
嗯…二三一四…罗刹从客栈中出来，去了三余书肆，然后钻进了一个小角落。再之后…拎着行李出现在码头上……
Hmm... 2, 3, 1, 4... Luocha emerges from the inn, goes to Spare Time Book Shop, turns into an alley, then appears at the dock with his luggage...
我懂了！他在三余书肆搞到了一张藏宝图，去那个小角落寻宝，获得了巨额财富以后，拎着行李衣锦还乡！
I know! He must have found a treasure map at Spare Time Book Shop. He went into the alley to dig it up and then went home with his newfound riches!
才怪啦…这个顺序感觉不太对，{NICKNAME}，你再试试别的顺序吧。
On second thought, nah... {NICKNAME}, this order feels awkward, try arranging it again.
I wanna see the videos again.
Sure, which one do you want to watch?
罗刹穿过街道，走进了一个奇怪的角落。那里看起来很危险，但他似乎满不在乎，只拿着一把剑就踱步走了进去。
Luocha crossed the street and turned into a strange corner. It looks dangerous there, but he didn't seem to care at all. He paced in with nothing but a sword in hand.
罗刹从一家小客栈中走出来。身上没有携带什么繁重的行李。
Luocha walked out of a small inn without any heavy luggage.
罗刹进入了三余书肆，不久后走了出来。他两手空空，大概什么也没有买。
Luocha walked into Spare Time Book Shop and stepped out after a while. He left with nothing in hand — perhaps he didn't buy anything.
罗刹在长乐天的码头上眺望着风景，旁边立着一口棺材。可能是刚下星槎，也可能是在等星槎。走了一会儿，他将行李放在一边，靠在栏杆上观看码头下往来的星槎。

Luocha is looking into the distance at the dock of Exalting Sanctum with his coffin at his side. Maybe he just left a starskiff, maybe he is waiting for a new starskiff. He walked along the dock for a while and put aside his luggage, leaning on the railing and watching starskiffs passing by the dock.
影像中的这个小角落是什么地方啊？
Where does this corner lead to?
我看了一下地图，这片空地似乎有一扇门…你们看，穿过这扇门，后面有一个码头。他可能搭乘星槎离开了。
I checked the map and found a gate in this open area... Look, there's a small dock on the other side. He may have left on a starskiff.
为什么要从这么偏僻的小码头离开长乐天？这也太可疑了吧？
Why would he leave Exalting Sanctum via a secluded dock? That's so suspicious!
我想，罗刹先生应该不是这么离开的。瓦尔特先生说的那是鸢首戊字九百九十九号码头——神策府的码头，仅在外敌入侵时启用。
I don't think Mr. Luocha could've departed from there. The dock you're referring to is Yuanshou-Crag CMXCIX — it belongs to the Seat of Divine Foresight. It's only used during invasions.
因此，那扇门也是常年上锁的。据我所知，已经锁了几百年了，只在偶尔检查时才打开。
That's why that gate is almost always locked. As far as I know, it's been locked for centuries and only gets opened for occasional inspections.
关键问题大概是…他是何时出去的。至少从地图上看，这片空地只有一个出入口…净砚小姐，从留存的影像里看，那天这里还有其他人出入吗？
The key question is... when did he leave? There's only one gate in this area, at least on the map... Miss Jingyan, does the remaining footage show anyone else entering or leaving this place?
这应该能查到，不过要稍等一下，虽然大部分影像都丢失了，但终究是一整天的录像，要查看的东西很多，我需要确认一下……
I can find out, but you'll have to wait awhile. Most of the footage was lost, but at least there was a whole day of recording. There's a lot that needs checking and confirming first...
辛苦你啦！我们会耐心等待的。
Thanks so much! We'll be waiting — patiently.
诸位特地赶来帮忙，才是最辛苦的。我会尽快处理。
Your assistance in this matter is what requires gratitude. I'll get you what you need as soon as possible.
喂，不要催人家嘛！不好意思啦净砚小姐，这家伙有点急性子。不必急，我们会耐心等待的。
Hey, don't rush her! So sorry, Miss Jingyan, they can be a little impatient. Take your time, we can wait.
没关系，我理解。毕竟诸位也是百忙之中抽时间来帮忙的。我会尽快处理。
Not to worry, I understand. After all, you're taking time away from your own affairs to lend a helping hand. I'll get everything to you as soon as possible.
久等了。我已经查阅了那片空地前的全部影像…不过，说是「全部」，其实丢失了非常多。
Thanks for waiting. I checked all the footage we have of the open area... I say "all" — a lot of it was lost.
那丢失的部分还能修复吗？就像我们刚才做的那样。
Are the corrupted parts recoverable? Can we use the same methods again?
也许有一部分可以修复…未必能行，我得试试。当然了，这需要一段时间，我没办法立刻给您变出来。
For some of them, maybe... but I can't guarantee anything. I'll do my best, of course. It'll take more time — I can't hand them over just now.
辛苦你了。那么残存的影像中是否有值得关注的内容呢？
Thank you. Did you find anything in the remaining footage worth paying attention to?
嗯…只有这段影像里，有人从那扇拱门中出去，时间在罗刹进入空地的大约一个时辰后，但是并没有拍到罗刹……
Hmm... Only that someone left the area through that exit around two hours after Luocha's appearance here. Luocha's nowhere to be seen, though.
啊？这？这不是《渔公案》里面出现过的剧情吗？
Huh? I... Isn't this a scene from The Angler Mystery?
That novel's gone to your head...
哎呀，讨厌你！我说真的，《渔公案》里出现过一模一样的场景。
Shh — you're being annoying! I'm not kidding — this is straight out of the book.
《渔公案》啊，就那本侦探小说。里面有一幕和这段影像一模一样。
The Angler Mystery — the novel! There's a scene that's identical to this footage.
我没太听懂你们在说什么。
就是渔公的起源故事。他本来是丹鼎司的医士，后来惹上了神秘的「饮茶会」。「饮茶会」的两个黑衣人，就趁着他独自一人落单，给他灌下了毒药。

The Angler's origin story, of course. He's a healer from the Alchemy Commission who gets on the wrong side of a mysterious organization called the Tea Society. Two agents in dark clothing wait for him to be alone and then poison him.
这毒药有持明「蜕生」一般的功效，竟让渔公返老还童，变成了小孩子。从此以后，幼儿渔公，就一边追查「饮茶会」，一边破解各种奇案。

The drug has the same de-aging effect as the Vidyadhara's hatching rebirth — the Angler gets younger and turns back into a child. From there on out, the Angler pursues the Tea Society while solving all kinds of strange cases.
为什么一个茶话会这么凶狠…
Why would a "tea society" be so vicious...?
的确，感觉他们的茶可能和姬子的咖啡差不多……
Their tea must be stronger than Himeko's coffee...
「饮茶会」只是代号罢了，难道坏蛋会管自己叫「坏蛋会」吗？总要起个没那么恐怖的名字掩人耳目吧！
The Tea Society is just a code name, did you think they'd call themselves the Evil Society? They have to have a nice-sounding name to conceal themselves!
这个药听起来能治疗魔阴身…
A drug like that sounds like it would help people stricken with mara...
不能哦。按照书里的设定，这种药只能让人的身体返老还童，却不能处理人灵魂的损耗。换句话说，就是只「蜕」，没「生」。
It wouldn't. In the book, the drug only de-ages the body — it can't repair damage to the soul. In other words, it's like molting, not a true rebirth.
「蜕生」是持明的特性…人类也可以返老还童吗？
Hatching rebirths are specific to the Vidyadhara... Can humans also experience de-aging?
哎呀，小说！艺术创作嘛，谁知道是不是真的！反正写得很像那么回事。
Eh, it's just a novel — who knows if something like that could happen in reality. I thought of it as soon as I saw this footage, though.
写这本书的苏芳老师本身就是丹鼎司医助，在医学原理的设定上还是很严谨的。
Su Fang, the author, was a medical assistant in the Alchemy Commission. The medical principles in the novel are strictly grounded in reality.
瞧，丹鼎司的人都这么写，没准就是可能的。
True... If someone from the Alchemy Commission was suggesting it could be done, then there's always a possibility.
所以小三月的意思是，那两个黑衣人是「饮茶会」的成员，而那个小孩就是…返老还童的罗刹？
So, March, what you mean is, the two people in dark clothing are Tea Society agents, and the child is... a de-aged Luocha?
搞不好就是某一位《渔公案》的狂热书友做出了模仿犯罪啊。罗刹被缩小以后就跟着这两个人走了…案情越来越可怕了，没准还是宗绑架案！
*gasp* What if a crazy Angler Mystery fan decided to commit a copycat crime? Luocha gets turned into a child, then follows a mysterious duo in black... The plot thickens — this could be a kidnapping!
首先，这个孩子是黑发。罗刹是金发。
*sigh* The child in the footage has black hair. Luocha's hair is blonde.
Adult Luocha might look blonde, but maybe he's just going gray with age...
True, their hair color is completely different.
Hmm... Maybe he dyed his hair!
几位稍等…我才看出来，这孩子是三余书肆的小店长隐书啊。
Hold your horses, everyone... I recognize this child now. That's Yinshu — the young shopkeeper at Spare Time Book Shop.
很遗憾，小三月，没有「返老还童」，也没有「渔公」。
Too bad, March. No de-aging, no Angler.
而且那小孩子还是个女孩。
And the child is a girl.
…呃，神探的前几次推理，肯定是错的，这符合预期！
...Uh, a d—detective's initial conjectures are bound to be wrong! Totally expected!
还记得贝洛伯格的尤利安…
不不，这和他绝对不是一回事。
No, no, this is completely different.
机巧鸟没拍到那两个黑衣人的清晰长相…我们先找隐书问问吧。也许她看到了什么。
The cycranes weren't able to get a clear look at the two people in dark clothing... Let's ask Yinshu, maybe she saw something.
我继续尝试修复丢失的影像，如果有什么新进展，会联系各位的。
I'll keep trying to recover the lost footage. I'll contact you if there's a breakthrough.
好嘞，出发！开始寻访证人！
Alright, let's go! Time to interview the witness!
那个小店长好像不在。我们去附近找找看吧。
I don't see the shopkeeper. Let's look for her in the area.
现在还没到闭店时间，她应该不会去太远的地方才对。你们两个去吧，我在这里等等，也许她一会儿就回来了。
Business hours aren't over yet, she should be nearby. You two go ahead, I'll wait here in case she comes back.
净砚带几人走到了四方览镜前，开始调取影像资料。
Jingyan takes everyone to the Foursquare Mirror and begins to retrieve the footage.
店长临时有事不在，请稍后再来。
Away on temporary business, please come back later
看来隐书不在啊…她现在会在哪里呢？
Looks like Yinshu isn't here after all... Where could she be?
芸慎大哥，我有点急事。你先帮我看一下店，我马上回来。隐书
Hi Yunshen! I have an errand to run, please watch the store for me while I'm gone. Back soon — Yinshu
原来她请了人替她看店啊…但是这个看店的人在哪里？怎么像是也不在店里的样子？
So she asked someone to look after the shop for her... but where are they? Looks like they must have left too.
妖异！神秘！诡谲！仙舟志怪集大成之作《述异幽明录》震撼发售！
Demonic! Mysterious! Treacherous! The Xianzhou masterpiece, Records of the Supernatural, on sale now!
嗯？是志怪小说短篇集诶，感觉很适合睡前看…虽然看完可能会不敢上卫生间。
Huh? A supernatural tales anthology! Sounds like a good bedtime read... Might stop me daring to run to the bathroom at night though...
《渔公案》系列时隔四十年的最新作——《蜕生迷局》，火热发售中！
After <unbreak>40</unbreak> years, the latest edition to The Angler Mystery series — The Hatching Rebirth Conundrum! Selling out everywhere!
原来这个系列隔了这么多年又出新作了！这罗浮我真是来对了！等查完这个案子，我一定要马上买来读。苏芳老师太强了。
*gasp* A new addition after so many years! Looks like I made the right choice coming to the Luofu! As soon as we've cracked this case, I'm getting myself a copy — Su Fang is the greatest.
你们去找人吧，我留在这里等等看。仙舟上很多书籍似乎挺有意思的，我也趁此机会了解一下。
You two go ahead, I'll wait here. The Xianzhou has some interesting literature — I'd like to get better acquainted.
我们快去快回，不会让杨叔久等的。
We'll be back soon, don't get too comfortable!
这位小哥，你是不是在帮三余书肆的那个小店长看店啊？
Hey mister, are you manning the counter for the young shopkeeper of Spare Time Book Shop?
啊？小店长？你说隐书啊？是啊，怎么了？有事？
Huh? Young shopkeeper? You mean Yinshu? Yeah, I am. Something wrong?
呃…能不能告诉我们，那个小店长在哪里呀？
Um... Can you please tell us where she is?
嘿，你这人，我们和和气气来问路，你这是什么态度啊？
Because we're asking nicely? What's with the attitude?
要告诉你们也行，付我五百镝。
I can tell you... if you pay me <unbreak>500</unbreak> strales.
凭啥给你巡镝啊？什么跟什么啊？怎么就开始要钱了？
Pay you? What is this? You want payment for a simple favor?
呵呵。情报和信息是最值钱的，你懂不懂啊？
Hehe, come on. No one ever tell you that information and intelligence are the most valuable commodities?
这家伙看起来不太讲道理，咱们怎么办？
This guy doesn't seem like the negotiable type. What should we do?
我们没钱，可以付你一顿毒打。
We have no money, but we can pay you with a beatdown?
你知不知道我是什么来路？竟然还敢威胁我？
Oh, you dare threaten me? Do you know who I am?
那你知不知道我们是什么来路？
The question is, do you know who we are?
你糊弄谁呢？这不是小说里的组织吗？
Oh, you mean like the one in that work of fiction? Who are you trying to kid?
呵呵，就是因为有我们这种现实原型，《渔公案》里面才会这么写啊。
Hah — and who do you think were the inspiration for the Tea Society? Us, that's who.
听着像在诓我，但这两个人确实不像善茬儿……
Sounds like a pack of lies... Still, they don't seem like pushovers...
列车组…我怎么没听说过，该不会是其他仙舟上的大佬吧……
The Express Crew...? Never heard of you. I mean, they couldn't be higher-ups from one of the other Xianzhou ships... could they?
完了，不会真遇到硬茬子了吧？嗯…好汉不吃眼前亏。
Dang it, am I in trouble? Ugh... Better to live and fight another day.
算了，不跟你们一般见识。隐书说，长乐天那边有家小吃摊的优惠券要到期了，赶着去用掉…她走了没多久，现在可能刚吃完吧。

*sigh* Forget it, I'm not stooping to your level. Yinshu said she had a voucher for a food stall over in Exalting Sanctum — she wanted to use it before it expired... You know, she's not been gone long — probably finishing up her food right now.
Hmph, about time you saw the light. Come on {NICKNAME}, let's go.
I'll pay you, but don't even think about lying.
你别掏钱。这是我神探三月七的案子，当然应该是我来掏钱了！
In your dreams! This is genius detective March 7th's case — I should be the one paying...
Yeah, yeah, yeah – same difference, pay up.
要是骗我们，我们会回来找你算账的！
If you lie to us, we'll be back!
呵呵，我可不是这种人。隐书说，长乐天那边有家小吃摊的优惠券要到期了，赶着去用掉…她走了没多久，现在可能刚吃完吧。

Hehe, I'm not that kind of person. Come on! Yinshu said she had a voucher for a food stall over in Exalting Sanctum — she wanted to use it before it expired... You know, she's not been gone long — probably finishing up her food right now.
我的巡镝啊！整整五百镝啊！本姑娘的心在滴血！{NICKNAME}，我们走。
<unbreak>500</unbreak> strales! <unbreak>500</unbreak>! Ugh, my purse is crying. Come on {NICKNAME}, let's go.
你就是三余书肆的小店长隐书吧？我们有些事要找你。
Are you Yinshu, the shopkeeper at Spare Time Book Shop? There's something we want to talk to you about.
嗯…我就是隐书。请问有什么事吗？

你现在正好要回书肆吧？那我们一起走吧，路上给你讲。
You're heading back to the store, right? Let's walk and talk. I'll tell you all about it on the way.
你们一起回到三余书肆。在路上，你们给隐书讲述了前因后果。
You return to Spare Time Book Shop. On the way over, you get Yinshu up to speed.
你们的那段录像，我有些印象。那天书肆打烊之后，我想找个地方去安安静静地读书，就在街上转了几圈。
That footage... I remember that day. After I closed up the store, I walked around for a while. I was looking for a place to read.
然后我就发现了那个空地…不过我一看，那里面有两个黑衣人和一个金发化外民，觉得实在不是看书的地方，就走了。那两个黑衣人正好跟着我，也离开了。

I found that empty area — it seems like a good reading spot at first... but then I noticed two people dressed in dark clothing and a blonde outworlder hanging around. Something didn't feel right, so I left. Those two people left the same way I did.
原来只是恰好同路…那你有没有注意到那个金头发的化外民在做什么？
So you just happened to be going the same way... Did you see what the outworlder was doing?
实在不好意思，我当时只想找个地方踏踏实实读书，没去太仔细观察他，也没太仔细观察那两个黑衣人。
Sorry, I was only trying to find a place to read, I didn't pay much attention to him... or the two in dark clothing.
只记得…那两个黑衣人闻起来臭臭的。但这可能算不上什么线索啦。不好意思，你们专程跑一趟，但我没提供什么有价值的信息。
All I remember is... the two people in dark clothing — they smelled pretty bad. I guess that's not much of a clue. Sorry I can't give you any useful information.
不，这些都很有价值。非常感谢你。
On the contrary, any information you can give is valuable. Thank you very much.
不过，根据机巧鸟的影像，当天罗刹去那片空地前的最后一站，就是你们店里。

我们店里…在三余书肆？他来过吗…哦，对了！我想起来了，他来过，我见过他的，怎么给忘了呢？
My store... Spare Time Book Shop? You're sure he came to... Oh, that's right! I remember now, he did pay a visit — how could I forget?
那天，他来到店里，翻了几本书之后，将一本书拿给我…那是一本纸书，很老派。
He came in, looked at a few titles, and then handed one to me... an old paperback.
我还以为他是要买书，没想到，他付了钱，然后撕掉了书的扉页。我吓了一跳，但看他满脸笑容，也没敢多问。
Everything seemed normal, but after paying for it he immediately tore off the title page. I was shocked, but he was grinning ear to ear, so I didn't dare ask him about it.
撕掉扉页以后，书他也没带走，放在柜台上人就离开了。
After that, he just left the book on the counter and went on his way.
这么奇怪的事情，我竟然忘得一干二净…可能是隔天建木生发，出现了太多惊人的事，让这件事都显得微不足道了吧……
I can't believe I'd forget something like that... I guess the Ambrosial Arbor's resurrection the day after pushed everything else to the back of my mind...
那么，他拿走的是哪本书呢？
是这本《渔公案》。书被撕掉了扉页，也不能放在店里卖了，我一直在想该怎么处理…既然你们问起来了，就送给你们吧。
The Angler Mystery. I was wondering what to do about it — I can't sell a book without a title page... But, since you asked about it, here — you can have it.
杨叔，你果然神机妙算啊。罗刹这家伙是真的坏，怎么会有这么坏的人…《渔公案》这么好的书，他说撕就撕。太气人了。
Mr. Yang's instinct was right all along — Luocha is a villain! How could he do this? Tearing up a book as well-written as The Angler Mystery... Unacceptable!
Why did Luocha tear out the title page?
我要是懂坏家伙怎么想的，岂不跟他一样坏了吗。
If I knew the answer to that, wouldn't that make me as evil as him?
你们两个先冷静一下，我觉得罗刹…不像这么幼稚的人。
Calm down a moment, you two. I don't think Luocha has anything against the book.
小三月可能有点激动，忘记了地衡司最早关注的疑点——是否有人将「危险品」带入了罗浮。
Let's not get ahead of ourselves. We're forgetting that the Realm-Keeping Commission was initially investigating whether someone brought a "dangerous object" onto the Luofu.
大毫他们可能并不清楚这个「危险品」是什么，但我们都清楚，那就是「星核」。
Dahao and the others are probably not aware of what that "dangerous object" might be. But we know for a fact that it's the Stellaron.
所以，「撕书」这个行为，也许的确是问题的关键。
I think that by removing the page, Luocha may have provided us with a key piece of the puzzle.
我有点没跟上，撕书还和星核有关系？{NICKNAME}，你听明白了吗？
I don't understand. What does tearing out a page have to do with the Stellaron? Are you following Mr. Yang, {NICKNAME}?
罗刹撕书没有来由，必有深意。

罗刹撕书是给同伙的接头暗号。
Maybe the page will mean something to his accomplices.
正是如此。也许罗刹在罗浮上有内应，而他和内应之间就通过书的扉页来相互联系。
Exactly. I think Luocha may have friends on the Luofu, and they're using the title page to communicate.
没关系，是我的思路有点跳跃。
That's alright, this is a bit of a conjectural leap.
我的意思是，也许罗刹在罗浮上有内应，而他和内应之间就通过书的扉页来相互联系。
What I'm trying to say is — I think Luocha may have friends on the Luofu, and they're using the title page to communicate.
那岂不是更坏了？竟然用《渔公案》这种歌颂正义的小说作为邪恶计划的接头暗号。
That makes him even worse! How dare he use a book that praises justice for his evil plans!
这只是猜测。我们目前没办法知道他做了什么…因为机巧鸟上的影像资料都丢失了。
I'm afraid "evil plans" are still within the realm of speculation at this stage. We have no way of knowing exactly what he did because the cycrane data was lost.
哎，那线索岂不是断掉了？

瞧，这真是天助我也！神探刚遇到死胡同，立刻就出现了新的线索。

芸慎…那家伙果然不见了…我急着去用掉优惠券，才找来他看店。他平时在附近游手好闲，但是为人还不错…但果然还是不值得信任。
Where did Yunshen get to, I asked him to watch the shop while I used my voucher... He's often hanging around here — always seemed nice enough. *sigh* Not trustworthy after all.

是呀，犯错就是成长的一部分呢。

收下这个吧，就当做我的赔礼了，可好吃了。

It'd be best if Mr. Xiyan didn't find out about this... He doesn't show up very often, but he's the manager here. I'll be in big trouble if he finds out what happened.
放心好啦，我们嘴巴可严了。但是下次还是不要这么做了哦。

芸慎…那家伙果然不见了…我急着去用掉优惠券，才找来他看店。他平时在附近游手好闲，但是为人还不错…但果然还是不值得信任。
Where did Yunshen get to, I asked him to watch the shop while I used my voucher... He's often hanging around here — always seemed nice enough. *sigh* Not trustworthy after all.

不过，请不要把这件事告诉西衍先生…虽然平时不怎么出现，但他算是我们店的掌柜。要是被他知道了，我一定会挨骂的。

放心好啦，我们嘴巴可严了。但是下次还是不要这么做了哦。

{NICKNAME}, I know Mr. Yang never wears his heart on his sleeve, but do you get the feeling he's a little... restless?

Thanks for the help, Miss Jingyan!

Yay! Mr. Yang is the best!
我要开始还原真相咯，你准备好了吗？

好，那咱们开始吧…第一次当众推理，还真有点紧张。

（就…生计所迫嘛！罗刹他也不想的。）
(He, uh... had no choice? Times are tough.)
不行。如果人人都能通融，规矩还有什么意义？
I can't do that. Why bother making rules if everyone can just ask for a favor?
(Didn't take Pu'er for a man of rules.)
（那毕竟是以杨叔为原型塑造的角色。）
