So, one of my answers will be true, the other will be false. As for which is which, that's up to the asker to make the call...
我们的时间不多，所以…就2轮好了。你一共拥有两个问题，也要给我两个答案。但记住：要「一真一假」喔。
We don't have much time — let's do two rounds to start. You ask me two questions, and you'll also have to answer two of mine. But remember: One truth, one lie.
What if both my answers are true?
啊，那是犯规呀！…唔，游戏就得双方自觉遵守规则才行，但就算你犯规，我也不会知道，只有让道德来审判你了。
Ah, that's not allowed! *sigh* The game only works when both sides follow the rules, but I'll be none the wiser if you break them. Let morality be your guide.
但我可以发誓：{NICKNAME}。我一定会遵守规则，「一真一假」。
But I give you my word, {NICKNAME}: I will abide by the rule of one truth, one lie.
我怎么知道你会不会骗我？
How do I know you won't cheat?
我可以发誓：{NICKNAME}。我一定会遵守规则，「一真一假」。
I give you my word, {NICKNAME}: I will abide by the rule of one truth, one lie.
是吗？我还挺喜欢这个游戏的。但我玩得不好，银狼总能猜中。
You think? I really like it. I'm not good at it though — Silver Wolf always manages to guess right.
I'll go first to give you a demo.
别紧张呀，{NICKNAME}。第一个问题是无关紧要的，回答真话假话都可以。这个游戏的趣味呢，在第二个问题时才会浮现……
Don't be nervous, {NICKNAME}, the first question is quite trivial — you can tell the truth or tell a lie. It's the second question where the game gets interesting...
我的第一个问题：你是怎么看待我的呢？
My first question is: What do you think about me?
(Huh? What do I... think about Kafka?)
（这个问题该怎么回答呢？如果说了真话，下一次就必须说谎，反之亦然；不过，我也可以作弊…真的可以吗？）
(How should I answer? If I tell the truth, I have to lie the next time, and vice versa. Or I could just cheat... Is that really an option?)
(Better to tell it like it is...)
（在这里试试说谎吧，下一次，就必须说真话了…）
(If I tell a lie this time, I'll have to tell the truth next time...)
And there you have it. It's a pretty simple game, don't you think, {NICKNAME}?
你真的把自己的想法隐藏得很好呢。
Haha, you're hiding your feelings well.
...I'm afraid we'll have to put our game of truth and lies on pause, {NICKNAME}.
云骑军来了，我需要你帮我打发他们。
The Cloud Knights are here — I need you to help me get rid of them.
嗯，不用担心后果，我会处理。
Uh-huh. Don't worry, I'll take care of any repercussions.
How about I try persuading them to leave...
That won't work, {NICKNAME}, no matter how hard you try...
这场冲突都是无可避免的…这就是命运。
This conflict is inevitable... it's destiny.
瞧，这就是未来，看似有无限可能，但注定发生的事情一定会发生；这场冲突无可避免，因为其它可能性并不存在。
See, the future always seems like infinite possibilities, but what is destined to happen will always happen. This conflict is inevitable because the other possibilities don't exist.
我的言灵术还没完成，不过，在继续之前，我们还有一场游戏呢。想好你的问题了吗？带着你的问题来找我，在那之前，我可以等。
I need to use the Spirit Whisper on Blade again, but let's play another round first. Have you thought of your question? Come to me when you're ready. I can wait.
（只有两个问题，其中一个卡芙卡会如实回答，另一个则会说谎；可是，我不知道她会选择在哪个问题上说谎…）
(So I get two questions, only one of which Kafka will answer truthfully... but I won't know which answer is which...)
（当我在空间站苏醒时，我记得卡芙卡…但别的事情都很模糊，是不是该问问我自己的事呢？）
(When I came to on the space station, I remember seeing Kafka... but everything before that is a blur. Shouldn't I ask about my past?)
你吗？…你是一位星神意外创造的生命，徒具肉体却没有灵魂。艾利欧指引我找到你，让你得到了灵魂。
You? ...At first, you were a being accidentally created by an Aeon, with a body but no soul. Elio guided me to you, and you were given a soul.
关于你的过去没什么可说的。你记得我，是因为你只见过我。在你诞生灵魂的时候，是我陪在你身旁。
There's nothing to say about your past. You only remember me because I was the one with you when your soul was born.
That's all there is to it.
你是为了容纳星核而诞生的人造体，从诞生起，你的命运就是在黑塔空间站接收星核，我负责在那之前保护你，教你基本的常识、认知以及战斗技巧。

You are an artificial body created for the purpose of hosting a Stellaron. From the moment of your birth, it was your destiny to receive the Stellaron at Herta Space Station. Before that task was complete, I was responsible for protecting you, as well as teaching you general knowledge, common sense, and combat skills.
你之所以不记得，是因为执行黑塔计划前，我让你忘了。
The reason you don't remember is that I wiped your memory before the operation at Herta Space Station.
How am I able to host a Stellaron?
因为那颗星核是被修改过的，黑塔捕获了它之后，对它做了许多研究，那是多宇宙里唯一一颗不会污染人类的星核。
The Stellaron in question was modified. After seizing it, Herta conducted a lot of research — it's the only Stellaron in the universe that doesn't contaminate humans.
黑塔失去兴趣后，这件事就被她忘了，但它记载在螺丝咕姆的数据库里，银狼尝试骇入螺丝星的时候，把它找了出来。
As soon as Herta got bored, she forgot about the whole thing, but all her research was recorded in Screwllum's database. Silver Wolf retrieved it when she hacked into Planet Screwllum...
于是，艾利欧就看见了新的未来可能性。
...and so Elio saw a new future possibility.
因为你是为了容纳星核这件事而被制造出来的，你的身体经过星神力量的改造，即使接触星核也不会遭到污染。
Because you were created for that purpose — your body has been transformed by the power of an Aeon. You are immune to Stellaron contamination.
所以，可以说你就是独一无二的星核「容器」。
Therefore, you could say that you are a one-of-a-kind Stellaron vessel.
What is my connection to you?
基因上来说，你是我的孩子。构成你身体的数据有四分之一来自于我。不过，银狼、阿刃和萨姆都不适合带孩子。
Genetically speaking, you are my child. A quarter of the data that makes up your body comes from me. Of course, neither Silver Wolf, Bladie, nor Sam are well-suited for looking after a child...
所以教导你的重任就落在我的头上，把我整得焦头烂额，一逮到机会就立刻把你甩给列车啦。
...so the burden of mentoring you fell on me. It was a stressful job, and I dumped you on the train as soon as I got the chance.
有一天，艾利欧把你交给我。他说，如果按照他洞见的可能性继续下去，你最终会改变我，我也会改变你。
One day, Elio handed you over to me. He said that if things continued to transpire according to the future possibility he foresaw, you would eventually change me, and I would change you.
换句话说，我和你就是彼此的命运。
In other words, you and I are each other's destiny.
（刃…他似乎认识丹恒，两人之间的关系很奇怪，也许我可以乘机从卡芙卡口中得知真相……）
(Blade... he seems to know Dan Heng. I don't understand the connection between them. Maybe I can learn the truth from Kafka...)
他是一个长生种，据说以前是仙舟的剑首。
He's a long-life species, apparently he was Sword Champion of the Xianzhou at some point.
十王司要处死他的时候，他逃出了幽囚狱，但受了重伤，很多事情都忘记了。
The Ten-Lords Commission planned to execute him, but he managed to escape from The Shackling Prison. He was severely injured — he forgot nearly everything.
我和萨姆按照艾利欧的指示找到了他，把他带回去。按艾利欧的说法，他的剑术和不死身有重要的用途，我知道的就这么多了。
Elio ordered Sam and me to find Bladie and return with him. According to Elio, Bladie's swordplay and immortality have important uses. That's all I know.
我不知道，阿刃没有告诉我，他说自己也不知道。
I don't know. Bladie didn't tell me — he said he doesn't know either.
他醒来的时候什么也不记得，后来有个女人找到了他，教他剑术，然后杀死他，一次又一次，直到他不堪忍受。
When he woke up, he didn't remember anything. Sometime later, a woman found him. She taught him swordplay, and then killed him, over and over again, until it was too much for him to bear.
我和萨姆按照艾利欧的指示找到了他，把他带回去。按艾利欧的说法，他的剑术和不死身有重要的用途，我知道的就这么多了。
Elio ordered Sam and me to find Bladie and return with him. According to Elio, Bladie's swordplay and immortality have important uses. That's all I know.
What is the connection between Blade and Dan Heng?
师徒。阿刃说，丹恒的前世是他的徒弟。很久以前，刃的几个徒弟联手杀死了他。
Master and disciple. Bladie said that in Dan Heng's previous life, Dan Heng was his apprentice. A long time ago, several of Blade's apprentices joined forces to kill him.
阿刃复活后，忘记了很多事情，但还记得徒弟们杀死他的那一晚。因此他在全宇宙寻找凶手。
After his revival, Bladie had forgotten nearly everything, but he remembered the night his apprentices killed him. He's been searching the whole universe for those who took his life...
据说他们曾经是很好的朋友——不对，损友。阿刃忘了很多事情，这些他也记不太清楚了。
Apparently, they used to be good friends... Well, good friends who were bad for each other. Bladie forgot nearly everything, so he doesn't remember it well.
他们一起做了件很坏、非常坏的事情，招致了极其恐怖的结果。
Together, they did something bad — something terrible. It led to horrific consequences.
这是我拼凑出来的情报，具体的阿刃不肯说。
That's the information I managed to piece together. Bladie refused to tell me the details.
（卡芙卡…她将我送进星穹列车。关于她的一切都笼罩在迷雾里，我想知道更多她的事情……）
(Kafka... She's the one who put me on the Astral Express. Everything about her is shrouded in mystery and I want to know more...)
以前的我？…曾经是个「纯美骑士」。
The old me? I used to be a Knight of Beauty.
我们崇拜纯美的星神伊德莉拉，发誓用手中刀剑守护祂的美貌。可是，某一天祂突然消失了，谁也不知道下落。
We worshiped Idrila, the Aeon of Beauty. We vowed to guard THEIR beauty with the sword, but one day THEY suddenly disappeared.
失去了信仰的我，被艾利欧招揽，就这么加入了「星核猎手」。
I lost my faith and was recruited by Elio... that's how I joined the Stellaron Hunters.
以前的我？…曾经是个「恶魔猎人」。
The old me? I used to be a Devil Hunter.
我成长在一个被星核污染的星球：天衣五——「新巴比伦」，在那里生长的人类不知道什么是恐惧，这种概念根本不存在。
I grew up on a planet contaminated by a Stellaron: Pteruges-V — "New Babylon." Humans there don't know what fear is — the concept itself simply doesn't exist.
人感受不到恐惧，就会被欲望和快感支配，变成「恶魔」。艾利欧找到我的时候，我正在执行任务…而他开的条件，我很感兴趣。

When people don't feel fear they are dominated by desire and pleasure — they become "devils." When Elio found me, I was in the middle of a mission... and the conditions he offered me caught my interest.
你为什么加入星核猎手？
Why did you join the Stellaron Hunters?
因为我有一个想要的未来。
Because I have a future that I want.
艾利欧可以窥见可能性，只要我按照他的指示行事，他就答应告诉我走向那个未来所需的条件。
As I told you, Elio is able to glimpse through possibilities. As long as I followed his instructions, he promised to tell me what it would take to move towards the future I wanted.
Because I wanted to change myself.
我没有「恐惧」这种机制。我的头脑和内心里存在着一个空洞，虽然连我自己都意识不到。所以这种改变，我自己是做不到的。
I have no mechanism for "fear." There's an empty space in my mind and my heart, but I'm unable to perceive it. Changing that part of myself isn't something I can do alone.
而艾利欧可以帮助我，只要我按照他的指示行事。
Elio can help me, if I follow his instructions.
（她不论说什么都是一副胸有成竹的样子…分不出真假啊。）
(No matter what she says, she looks like she's got something up her sleeve... I can't tell what's true and what isn't.)
我看见你的表情了——别问。我不能告诉你答案真实与否。尽情猜测，并且带着答案选择下一个问题：这就是「真心话游戏」的妙处。希望你的下一个问题足够有趣～

I see the look on your face... Don't bother asking — I can't tell you if an answer is true or not. Make your best guess and choose your next question based on my answer — that's the beauty of the game. I hope your next question proves interesting~
（也许关闭这扇大门，这条路就无人能通行了？）
(Maybe if this door is closed, this path would be closed as well?)
（云骑把守着这里，也许我可以偷偷破坏那具金人？）
(There are Cloud Knights guarding this place. Maybe I can destroy the aurumaton in secret?)
（瘫痪一台金人并没有想象中那么难嘛。）
(Dismantling an aurumaton is not as hard as I think.)
（云骑似乎都被那台金人吸引了，就别上去凑热闹了。）
(The Cloud Knights are all distracted by the aurumaton. I should just stay away from the commotion.)
这个游戏的规则就像现实：我们都觉得自己有无限的可能，但细细想来，真正的可能性寥寥无几，而每个问题和答案都被之前的选择深深束缚……

The rules of this game are like reality: We all think we have infinite possibilities, but when you really analyze it, you could count them on your fingers. Every question and answer is constrained by previous choices...
未来好似一座迷宫，许许多多的分岔不过是诱导，真正的道路有且只有一条。
The future is like a labyrinth: Every divergence is merely an inducement. There is only one real path.
不，注定的是「有价值」的未来。
No, but what is predetermined is the future that has value.
你们的星神难道是虚无？
Are you sure you don't follow the Aeon of Nihility?
我的话有那么消极吗？不，我们相信存在是有意义的，但意义由我们自身赋予，而非选择。
Do I sound that negative? No. We believe that existence has meaning, but that meaning is bestowed by ourselves, not by choices.
如果不信的话，你就试试看吧。很快「还会发生一场战斗」。你能改变这个可能性吗？
If you don't believe me, try it for yourself: Soon we will face another battle. Can you change that possibility?
你是真的很想改变我的「预言」呢，两次战斗的可能性都被你避开了啊。
That's the second time you've evaded the possibility of a battle... You really do want to change my prediction, don't you...
但是，未来会发生的事情依然清晰：真正的考验还在后面：年轻的云骑剑士，那可不是个好对付的敌手。
But the future is still clear — the real test lies ahead... The young swordmaster of the Cloud Knights. He will not be an easy foe.
想要改变「预言」，还要付出更多的努力才行呢，{NICKNAME}。
If you want to change my prediction, you'll have to put in more effort, {NICKNAME}.
未来会发生的事情依然清晰：真正的考验还在后面：年轻的云骑剑士，那可不是个好对付的敌手。
The future is still clear — the real test lies ahead... The young swordmaster of the Cloud Knights. He will not be an easy foe.
Well, you're doing a great job, {NICKNAME}.
未来会发生的事情依然清晰：真正的考验还在后面：年轻的云骑剑士，那可不是个好对付的敌手。
The future is still clear — the real test lies ahead... The young swordmaster of the Cloud Knights. He will not be an easy foe.
不过在那之前，继续我们的「真心话游戏」吧。又该我了。
Until then, let's continue our game. It's my turn again.
第二个问题：你还想再见到我吗？
Hehe, second question: Do you want to see me again?
（会不会再见？…这是什么问题，她自己心里很清楚答案吧。）
(What kind of question is that? ...Will we see each other again? She'd know the answer to that one...)
(As for whether I'd want to, it seems obvious to me...)
(...I guess I do want to see her again.)
(Obey the rules of the game) I don't want to see you again.
(Ignore the rules of the game) I want to see you again.
(I don't want to see Kafka again)
（…不，别再和这个女人打交道了。）
(...No, I don't want to deal with this lady again.)
(Obey the rules of the game) I want to see you again.
(Disobey the rules of the game) I don't want to see you again.
真令我吃惊，{NICKNAME}，居然看不透你呢。
What a surprise, {NICKNAME}, I can't see through you.
Are you satisfied with my answers?
这个游戏对我而言，真假并不重要……
For me, the truth or lack thereof is not what matters in this game...
不知道呢，我猜不透哪个答案才是你的真心话。
After all, how can I know which answer is which?
你变得很厉害了，{NICKNAME}…也很陌生。
You've become very impressive, {NICKNAME}... and unfamiliar.
该你提问了，等你准备好了，就来找我。
It's your turn to ask a question. Come see me when you're ready.
这是你的最后一个问题，{NICKNAME}，给我点惊喜吧。
This is your last question, {NICKNAME}. Surprise me.
（不知道之前的问题卡芙卡说的是真话还是假话，但有一点是确定的：面对这个问题，她没有选择，只能按照规则回答。）
(I don't know if Kafka was telling the truth in the previous question, but one thing's certain: For this question, she'll have to answer according to the rules.)
（是否要大胆尝试一下全新的问题呢？）
(Should I venture into a whole new topic?)
（当我在空间站苏醒时，我记得卡芙卡…但别的事情都很模糊，是不是该问问我自己的事呢？）
(When I came to on the space station, I remember seeing Kafka... but everything before that is a blur. Shouldn't I ask about my past?)
你吗？…你是一位星神意外创造的生命，徒具肉体却没有灵魂。艾利欧指引我找到你，让你得到了灵魂。
You? ...At first, you were a being accidentally created by an Aeon, with a body but no soul. Elio guided me to you, and you were given a soul.
关于你的过去没什么可说的。你记得我，是因为你只见过我。在你诞生灵魂的时候，是我陪在你身旁。
There's nothing to say about your past. You only remember me because I was the one with you when your soul was born.
That's all there is to it.
你是为了容纳星核而诞生的人造体，从诞生起，你的命运就是在黑塔空间站接收星核，我负责在那之前保护你，教你基本的常识、认知以及战斗技巧。

You are an artificial body created for the purpose of hosting a Stellaron. From the moment of your birth, it was your destiny to receive the Stellaron at Herta Space Station. Before that task was complete, I was responsible for protecting you, as well as teaching you general knowledge, common sense, and combat skills.
你之所以不记得，是因为执行黑塔计划前，我让你忘了。
The reason you don't remember is that I wiped your memory before the operation at Herta Space Station.
How am I able to host a Stellaron?
因为那颗星核是被修改过的，黑塔捕获了它之后，对它做了许多研究，那是多宇宙里唯一一颗不会污染人类的星核。
The Stellaron in question was modified. After seizing it, Herta conducted a lot of research — it's the only Stellaron in the universe that doesn't contaminate humans.
黑塔失去兴趣后，这件事就被她忘了，但它记载在螺丝咕姆的数据库里，银狼尝试骇入螺丝星的时候，把它找了出来。
As soon as Herta got bored, she forgot about the whole thing, but all her research was recorded in Screwllum's database. Silver Wolf retrieved it when she hacked into Planet Screwllum...
于是，艾利欧就看见了新的未来可能性。
...and so Elio saw a new future possibility.
因为你是为了容纳星核这件事而被制造出来的，你的身体经过星神力量的改造，即使接触星核也不会遭到污染。
Because you were created for that purpose — your body has been transformed by the power of an Aeon. You are immune to Stellaron contamination.
所以，可以说你就是独一无二的星核「容器」。
Therefore, you could say that you are a one-of-a-kind Stellaron vessel.
What is my connection to you?
基因上来说，你是我的孩子。构成你身体的数据有四分之一来自于我。不过，银狼、阿刃和萨姆都不适合带孩子。
Genetically speaking, you are my child. A quarter of the data that makes up your body comes from me. Of course, neither Silver Wolf, Bladie, nor Sam are well-suited for looking after a child...
所以教导你的重任就落在我的头上，把我整得焦头烂额，一逮到机会就立刻把你甩给列车啦。
...so the burden of mentoring you fell on me. It was a stressful job, and I dumped you on the train as soon as I got the chance.
有一天，艾利欧把你交给我。他说，如果按照他洞见的可能性继续下去，你最终会改变我，我也会改变你。
One day, Elio handed you over to me. He said that if things continued to transpire according to the future possibility he foresaw, you would eventually change me, and I would change you.
换句话说，我和你就是彼此的命运。
In other words, you and I are each other's destiny.
（刃…他似乎认识丹恒，两人之间的关系很奇怪，也许我可以乘机从卡芙卡口中得知真相……）
(Blade... he seems to know Dan Heng. I don't understand the connection between them. Maybe I can learn the truth from Kafka...)
他是一个长生种，据说以前是仙舟的剑首。
He's a long-life species, apparently he was Sword Champion of the Xianzhou at some point.
十王司要处死他的时候，他逃出了幽囚狱，但受了重伤，很多事情都忘记了。
The Ten-Lords Commission planned to execute him, but he managed to escape from The Shackling Prison. He was severely injured — he forgot nearly everything.
我和萨姆按照艾利欧的指示找到了他，把他带回去。按艾利欧的说法，他的剑术和不死身有重要的用途，我知道的就这么多了。
Elio ordered Sam and me to find Bladie and return with him. According to Elio, Bladie's swordplay and immortality have important uses. That's all I know.
我不知道，阿刃没有告诉我，他说自己也不知道。
I don't know. Bladie didn't tell me — he said he doesn't know either.
他醒来的时候什么也不记得，后来有个女人找到了他，教他剑术，然后杀死他，一次又一次，直到他不堪忍受。
When he woke up, he didn't remember anything. Sometime later, a woman found him. She taught him swordplay, and then killed him, over and over again, until it was too much for him to bear.
我和萨姆按照艾利欧的指示找到了他，把他带回去。按艾利欧的说法，他的剑术和不死身有重要的用途，我知道的就这么多了。
Elio ordered Sam and I to find Bladie and return with him. According to Elio, Bladie's swordplay and immortality have important uses. That's all I know.
What is the connection between Blade and Dan Heng?
师徒。阿刃说，丹恒的前世是他的徒弟。很久以前，刃的几个徒弟联手杀死了他。
Master and disciple. Bladie said that in Dan Heng's previous life, Dan Heng was his apprentice. A long time ago, several of Blade's apprentices joined forces to kill him.
阿刃复活后，忘记了很多事情，但还记得徒弟们杀死他的那一晚。因此他在全宇宙寻找凶手。
After his revival, Bladie had forgotten nearly everything, but he remembered the night his apprentices killed him. He's been searching the whole universe for those who took his life...
据说他们曾经是很好的朋友——不对，损友。阿刃忘了很多事情，这些他也记不太清楚了。
Apparently, they used to be good friends... Well, good friends who were bad for each other. Bladie forgot nearly everything, so he doesn't remember it well.
他们一起做了件很坏、非常坏的事情，招致了极其恐怖的结果。
Together, they did something bad — something terrible. It led to horrific consequences.
这是我拼凑出来的情报，具体的阿刃不肯说。
That's the information I managed to piece together. Bladie refused to tell me the details.
（卡芙卡…她将我送进星穹列车。关于她的一切都笼罩在迷雾里，我想知道更多她的事情……）
(Kafka... She's the one who put me on the Astral Express. Everything about her is shrouded in mystery and I want to know more...)
以前的我？…曾经是个「纯美骑士」。
The old me? I used to be a Knight of Beauty.
我们崇拜纯美的星神伊德莉拉，发誓用手中刀剑守护祂的美貌。可是，某一天祂突然消失了，谁也不知道下落。
We worshiped Idrila, the Aeon of Beauty. We vowed to guard THEIR beauty with the sword, but one day THEY suddenly disappeared.
失去了信仰的我，被艾利欧招揽，就这么加入了「星核猎手」。
I lost my faith and was recruited by Elio... that's how I joined the Stellaron Hunters.
以前的我？…曾经是个「恶魔猎人」。
The old me? I used to be a Devil Hunter.
我成长在一个被星核污染的星球：天衣五——「新巴比伦」，在那里生长的人类不知道什么是恐惧，这种概念根本不存在。
I grew up on a planet contaminated by a Stellaron: Pteruges-V — "New Babylon." Humans there don't know what fear is — the concept itself simply doesn't exist.
人感受不到恐惧，就会被欲望和快感支配，变成「恶魔」。艾利欧找到我的时候，我正在执行任务…而他开的条件，我很感兴趣。

When people don't feel fear they are dominated by desire and pleasure — they become "devils." When Elio found me, I was in the middle of a mission... and the conditions he offered me caught my interest.
你为什么加入星核猎手？
Why did you join the Stellaron Hunters?
因为我有一个想要的未来。
Because I have a future that I want.
艾利欧可以窥见可能性，只要我按照他的指示行事，他就答应告诉我走向那个未来所需的条件。
As I told you, Elio is able to glimpse through possibilities. As long as I followed his instructions, he promised to tell me what it would take to move towards the future I wanted.
Because I wanted to change myself.
我没有「恐惧」这种机制。我的头脑和内心里存在着一个空洞，虽然连我自己都意识不到。所以这种改变，我自己是做不到的。
I have no mechanism for "fear." There's an empty space in my mind and my heart, but I'm unable to perceive it. Changing that part of myself isn't something I can do alone.
而艾利欧可以帮助我，只要我按照他的指示行事。
Elio can help me, if I follow his instructions.
（卡芙卡希望我给她点惊喜，那么，试试提出这个问题吧……）
(Kafka wants me to surprise her... Let's try this on for size...)
One plus one equals two, right?
很聪明，{NICKNAME}。不过，牺牲一个问题来证明上一个答案是真是假，值得吗？…我不好说。
Very clever, {NICKNAME}. But was it worth sacrificing a question to determine whether the last answer was true or false? ...Tough to say.
很聪明，{NICKNAME}。不过，牺牲一个问题来证明上一个答案是真是假，值得吗？…我不好说。
Very clever, {NICKNAME}. But was it worth sacrificing a question to determine whether the last answer was true or false? ...Tough to say.
星核猎手…将军大发慈悲放你们一条生路，你们倒是一点都不领情啊。
Stellaron Hunters... The general was merciful enough to let you live, but you haven't shown the slightest bit of gratitude.
因为{M#他}{F#她}中了我的「言灵」。
Because {M#he}{F#she} was struck by my Spirit Whisper.
我的暗示能让人心甘情愿地接受指令，甚至自己都察觉不到异样。
My powers of suggestion are capable of convincing people to accept my orders... all without a second thought.
{NICKNAME}，打败这个小弟弟，你的任务就结束了。
{NICKNAME}, defeat this little boy and your mission is over.
做好准备，{NICKNAME}，这个小孩子可不好对付呢。
You better be ready, {NICKNAME} — this kid packs a punch.
哎呀，面对被星核猎手迷惑的敌人，我也不能下死手……
Ugh, I can't use deadly force — they've been bewitched by the Stellaron Hunters...
不过，就跟对付魔阴身一样，只要让你们没法动弹就好了。
...But I can deal with you like the mara-struck — I just need to immobilize you.
卡芙卡对彦卿施展了「言灵」，让他走开，这才长舒一口气。
Kafka used Spirit Whisper on Yanqing and told him to leave, then breathed a sigh of relief.
如果你不在的话，{NICKNAME}。我和刃会在这时被那个小弟弟抓住，关入幽囚狱。
{NICKNAME}, if it weren't for you, that kid would've had me and Blade in The Shackling Prison in no time.
虽说萨姆和银狼会把我们救出来，但阿刃会受到很严重的伤害，我们和仙舟的关系也会闹得很僵……
Of course, Sam and Silver Wolf would have broken us out, but Bladie would've been gravely injured, and our relationship with the Xianzhou would've been damaged beyond repair.
可能的话，还是想尽量避免那样的未来呵。
If possible, I'd like to avoid that kind of future at all costs.
嗯，「魔阴身」暂时压制住了，别受太大的刺激，别见熟悉的人，应该没什么问题。
Yes, the mara in you is temporarily suppressed. So long as you avoid over-stimulation and familiar faces, you shouldn't have a problem.
抱歉，卡芙卡，有一个人…一个我亏欠了许多的人，要去见一下。
I am sorry, Kafka. There is a person... a person to whom I am greatly indebted. I must see them.
那就随便你了，反正往后的事情，艾利欧也没说过。
...Then it's in your hands. Elio didn't say anything about what happens next.
谢谢你来帮助我，{NICKNAME}。我很感激…后会有期了。
Thank you for coming to my aid, {NICKNAME} — I appreciate it... Our paths will cross again.
你以前跟着卡芙卡，对吗？有阵子她在执行某个任务，你就在她身边。我还记得。
You once followed Kafka, didn't you? There was a time when she was on a mission — you were next to her. I remember.
跟着她那么久还活着的，你是第一个。
I've yet to see anyone follow her for as long as you did... and live to tell the tale.
What exactly are you getting at...?
Guess I owe her my thanks, then.
星核猎手的每个人都和艾利欧做了「交易」。我不知道别人的交易内容。但，既然卡芙卡和我一样同意被艾利欧驱使，她想要得到的东西一定非比寻常，她所做的每一件事都付出了巨大的代价。

Every Stellaron Hunter has a deal with Elio. I do not know the nature of those deals, but I do know that Kafka and I agreed to take orders from Elio. She must have sought something extraordinary. Everything she does comes at a great cost.
她一定做了很多事情才让你活到现在，{F#小姑娘}{M#小子}。
She will have done many things to keep you alive until now, young one.
我等接到密信，前来捉拿通缉要犯！乖乖放下武器，束手就擒！
We've received an order to capture the wanted criminal! Put down your weapons and come with us!
我是景元将军请来的贵客！
I am General Jing Yuan's esteemed guest!
军令在此，便是将军本人，此刻也非得罪不可。众兄弟，将这人拿下！
The law is the law, even if we must offend the general. Everyone, take them down!
你是何人，也敢大呼小叫？
Who do you think you are, yelling like this?
胡言乱语。众兄弟，将这人拿下！
They're talking nonsense. Everyone, take them down!
罗浮兵卒竟敢对元帅无礼！
A Cloud Knight pawn dares to speak like this to the Marshal!?
你这贼子，也敢冒充元帅大人！众兄弟，将这人拿下！
You dare to pretend to be the Marshal? Scoundrel! Everyone, take them down!
本座素不好斗，唯好解斗…
I, Diviner Fu, do not like conflict...
胡言乱语。众兄弟，将这人拿下！
胡言乱语。众兄弟，将这人拿下！
Utter nonsense. Everyone, take them down!
（也许可以欺骗云骑，转移他们的注意力……）
(Maybe you can lie to the Cloud Knights and distract them...)
密信是假的，你们被骗了。
The order was faked. You've been fooled.
…你休想骗我。众兄弟，将这人拿下！
...Don't you think of fooling me. Everyone, take them down!
你们来晚了，通缉犯逃去那边了。
You're here too late. The criminal ran thataway.
通缉犯明明在你身后，说谎多少打个草稿……
The criminal is right behind you! At least look around when you lie...
快醒醒！忆庭正在偷窃你的记忆！
Wake up! The Garden of Recollection is stealing your memories!
你看不见我，你看不见我，你看…
You can't see me, you can't see me, you can't...
胡言乱语。众兄弟，将这人拿下！
我想骗你，但真编不出来…
I want to lie to you, but I really can't do it...
（转念一想，卡芙卡本就是恶人，云骑抓她天经地义啊……）
(Thinking about it, Kafka is a villain, and the Cloud Knights are justified in trying to capture her...)
卡芙卡就在后面，小心她的言灵！
Kafka is right here. Be careful of her Spirit Whisper ability!
喝！你们一个也休想逃走。众兄弟，将这人拿下！
Hah! None of you will get away. Everyone, take them down!
刃就在后面，提防他的自愈能力！
Blade is right here. Be careful of his regenerative ability!
喝！你们一个也休想逃走。众兄弟，将这人拿下！
Hah! None of you will get away. Everyone, take them down!
I'm willing to become a prosecution witness...
说的什么胡话，众兄弟，将这人拿下！
What are you talking about? Everyone, take them down!
实不相瞒，我是地衡司的卧底。
Truth is, I work undercover for the Realm-Keeping Commission.
地衡司的卧底我都识得，哪里有你？众兄弟，将这人拿下！
I know all the undercover agents from the Realm-Keeping Commission, and you're not one of them. Everyone, take them down!
(Why waste my breath on them? Time to fight!)
好家伙，全是密密麻麻的集装箱，一眼都望不到边。
Ugh, Look, it's just containers as far as the eye can see.
这哪是让旅客登陆的地方呀，这是卸货的码头吧！谁给咱们指引来的？
This area isn't for receiving guests, it's for unloading cargo! Who decided to send us this way?
吞吐量这么大的港口，连个人影也见不着，真瘆人……
Such a huge port and not a soul in sight. It gives me the creeps...
At this point, I think it'd be creepier if we did see someone...
Yet someone opened the gate for us...
噫，别再说了！在恐怖片里，出现的这人肯定是幕后黑手。
Ah! Stop talking! If there is someone here, they're in my bad books already.
Mr. Yang, what should we do?
从找到开启玉界门的人入手。如果此人别有用心，正好替我们省点麻烦；如果是工作人员，就从对方那里问出发生了什么。

We should start with the person who opened the Jade Gate. If it turns out they're not friendly, then at least they've already made things easier for us. If it turns out they were just doing their job, then we can ask them what happened here.
那可不，杨叔什么大风大浪没见过，这都小场面。
That's Mr. Yang — this is child's play for him. He's dealt with all kinds of dangers before.
What if they're not friendly and we can't defeat them...?
说这种傻话我也不怪你，你现在还不了解杨叔的本事……
Are you forgetting we've got Mr. Yang with us? Oh, right, you haven't seen what he can do yet...
Let's move. Keep your wits about you.
这个大家伙就是「玉界门」吧。
Is that the Jade Gate? It's huge!
穿过它的一瞬间，有种身子突然变轻了的感觉。
Whoa... I felt like I suddenly lost weight when we passed through.
是重力发生了变化，这和跃迁的一瞬间身体感到沉重是一回事。
There was a gravitational shift. The same thing happens when we warp jump, only we feel heavier.
可恶，害我白高兴了。咱还以为自己一直坚持运动卓有成效呢。
Do you even have weight to lose?
是重力发生了变化，这和跃迁的一瞬间身体感到沉重是一回事。
There was a gravitational shift. The same thing happens when we warp jump, only we feel heavier.
{NICKNAME}这话咱爱听，杨叔…也谢谢你的解释。
Y'know, you're talking my language. B—But I liked your explanation too, Mr. Yang, hehe...
是重力发生了变化，这和跃迁的一瞬间身体感到沉重是一回事。
There was a gravitational shift. The same thing happens when we warp jump, only we feel heavier.
可恶，你俩就不能骗骗我。咱还以为自己坚持运动卓有成效呢。
Ugh, can't you two humor me once in a while? I thought all that working out was finally paying off...
仙舟拥有非常发达的科技。如果我猜的没错，从进入空港开始，我们已经身在人造的空间球中。
The Xianzhou possesses extremely advanced technology. If I'm not mistaken, we've been in an artificial ecosphere since we arrived at the skyport.
这么大一颗星星挂在天上，你的关注点居然是云？
There's a huge star in the sky and you're only interested in the clouds?
行星的位置也太近了吧。
The planets look way too close to each other.
怪了，在列车上没看到仙舟附近有这么大的行星啊。
Strange. I don't remember seeing a big planet near the Xianzhou when we were on the Express.
没错。仙舟这般质量巨大的星舰，航行时应该格外注意，避免靠近行星被引力捕获。
You're right. Something with a mass as huge as a Xianzhou ship should keep clear of any planets on its course... otherwise, it risks being caught up in the gravitational pull.
这里的天空，应该是人为制造的边界。或许是为了避免住在里面的人始终望向漆黑的外层空间，产生忧郁和恐惧之类的负面情绪…真有意思。
The sky here is an artificial boundary. I imagine it was created to shield residents from the pitch dark of outer space, and the negative emotions that it can generate... fascinating.
我听说仙舟居民普遍拥有极长的寿命，那么，心理层面的健康管控一定非常严格…所以……
I heard that residents of the Xianzhou have extremely long life spans, which would require them to make great efforts to preserve their mental health... meaning...
You sure know a lot, Mr. Yang.
You sure zone out a lot, Mr.Yang.
Focus, Mr. Yang. We've got work to do...
跟杨叔一起旅行呢，只要有耐心听，他能把上上下下所有东西给你分析个遍。
When you travel with Mr. Yang, he'll give you a thesis on everything he sees — if you have the patience to let him go on and on.
Right, okay, let's get back to work.
不必担心，从四周留下的痕迹来看，并没有平民遇害……
The silver lining is that based on what we can see, no civilians were caught up in the battle...
仙舟应该及时对港口进行了疏散，只留下士兵对抗危机。但这些受到「侵蚀」的怪物究竟是……
I'm guessing the Xianzhou must have evacuated the port immediately, leaving the soldiers to deal with the crisis. But as for these corroded monsters...
是「星核」。侵蚀现象已经产生了…现在还不严重，但这个征兆…不好。
It must be the Stellaron — the corrosion has already started to spread... It doesn't look serious yet, but this is a bad sign.
以往接触到的世界都被星核侵蚀了很长时间，空间站和这里是为数不多刚刚遭受侵蚀的地点，侵蚀初期的信息还很不足够……

The Stellaron-affected worlds we've come into contact with so far were all subjected to prolonged corrosion. In contrast, much like here, the space station had only just begun to be affected when we arrived. It's still the case that not much is known about early-stage corrosion...
哇，咱们好像给病人进行诊断的大夫哎。
Whoa, so we're like doctors diagnosing a patient right now!
{NICKNAME}，你我杨叔可以凑个组合，叫「星核医生」。
{NICKNAME}, you, me, and Mr. Yang can make up our own team: The Stellaron Medics!
You're hurt, son. Try not to talk.
三月，用六相冰给伤口紧急止血，掌握好尺度，别冻伤他。
March, use your six-phased ice to stop the bleeding. Go easy, we don't wanna add frostbite to his list of complaints.
{NICKNAME}，三月，这附近刚发生过一场激烈的战斗。
{NICKNAME}, March, this area saw fierce fighting only recently.
沿路找找，也许还有其他的幸存者。
Let's keep searching, there might be other survivors.
这名顶盔贯甲的战士已毫无生气，奇怪的是，僵硬的身躯上却不见任何伤口。
This armored soldier had already passed away. Surprisingly, there are no visible wounds on the body.
破碎未消融的冰并不鲜见。但眼前这些闪烁奇异光泽的「碎冰」，毫无疑问只可能来自某位你所认识的少女。
Ice is no rare material on its own. However, the ice shards glittering with strange colors before you must have come from none other than a specific girl you know.
喂，你们几个！快来帮忙呀～
Hey, you there! We need your help~!
Thanks for saving beauty from the beast~
下次这种话让我们来讲！你自己说很奇怪耶！
Pleasure! But are you thanking us or giving yourself a compliment?
停云小姐，魔阴身已除，但不知附近还有几多凶险。
Miss Tingyun, the mara-struck have been repelled, b—but there could be other dangers nearby.
情况不容乐观，请尽快随我们返回天舶司吧。
The situation is serious. Allow us to escort you back to the Sky-Faring Commission, immediately.
知道知道，急什么。这几位恩公还没谢过，一走了之也太失礼了吧。
Calm down, I heard you. It'd be rude of me to depart without thanking our benefactors.
小女子是罗浮天舶司商团接渡使「停云」。敢请教恩公尊姓大名？
My name is Tingyun. I'm the Amicassador for the Luofu Sky-Faring Commission merchant guild. May I venture to know the illustrious names of my heroes?
「尊姓大名」…太客气了吧，我叫三月七，这位是杨叔，不对，瓦尔特•杨先生。还有这位——
Illustrious names? ...Uhh, sure. I'm March 7th, this is Mr. Yang — oh — Mr. Welt Yang, and this is—
这是{NICKNAME}。你别理{F#她}{M#他}，这家伙每次自我介绍都要玩点花样。
Don't mind {F#her}{M#him}. {F#She}{M#He} likes to get a little creative with {F#her}{M#his} introductions.
Trying to avoid ending up on another wanted list...
Best not to reveal our true names...
你早说啊，名字我都报出去了。
Next time, why not remind me before I give up my name?
喔…球棒侠。很豪迈的名字。
这是{NICKNAME}。你别理{F#她}{M#他}，这家伙每次自我介绍都要玩点花样。
Don't mind {F#her}{M#him}. {F#She}{M#He} likes to get a little creative with {F#her}{M#his} introductions.
I'm just trying to avoid ending up on another wanted list.
Best to use a fake name...
你早说啊，名字我都报出去了。
Next time, why not remind me before I give up my name?
原来如此，感谢各位仗义相助。但小女子有一事不明：星槎海已全面封锁，恩公们并非仙舟人士，在此何干呢？

I see, well, thank you for coming to our aid. Although, there is one thing I don't understand: Starskiff Haven is under lockdown. Since none of you are Xianzhou residents, may I ask how you came to be here?
若是没个合理的解释，一旁这几位云骑大哥怕是不得不押各位一程啦。
If you can't offer an explanation, I'm afraid these Cloud Knights will have to escort you out.
我们呼叫港口接驳，起初没有回应，突然有人替我们打开了玉界门。进入仙舟后，我们见不到人影，只好一路寻找过来。
We called for port transfer and got no response, but then someone opened the Jade Gate for us. When we arrived there was no one to be found, so we started to make our own way through.
怎么可能？我的舰船最后入港，玉界门随后关闭，天舶司已将星槎海彻底封锁——
How can that be? My ship was the last one into port before the Jade Gate was shut. The Sky-Faring Commission has already locked down Starskiff Haven entirely...
我没有说谎，仙舟一查玉界门的开启记录就知真伪。
We're telling the truth. You could verify it yourself by checking the access history of the Jade Gate.
开门的人一言不发，我也怀疑其中有鬼。
W—We found it strange ourselves when the gate opened but no one came to greet us.
早有耳闻，唉…恩公们来得不巧，仙舟出了意外，本不适合待客。无论几位是来观光、求医还是经商，怕是什么事情都做不了啦。

Indeed I have. *sigh* ...You've arrived at a bad time — the Xianzhou has suffered an incident. Whether you're here for leisure, treatment, or trade, I'm afraid you won't be able to go through with it.
出于安全考虑，你们还是尽快前往星槎海的中枢避难吧。我带各位觐见执掌天舶司的驭空大人，交予她来定夺。
For your safety, you should hurry to Central Starskiff Haven and take refuge. I'll take you to Madam Yukong of the Sky-Faring Commission and let her decide how to proceed.
仙舟的意外我们也略知一二。停云小姐，我们此行，正是为帮助仙舟封印「星核」而来。
We caught wind of the incident you mention. That's why we're here Miss Tingyun — to help the Xianzhou seal the Stellaron.
呵呵，各位仗义相助时，小女子就知道恩公们是大大的善人！可惜…停云也无能为力呀！你们毕竟是外人，未经司舵驭空大人的授权，谁敢擅作主张。
Hehe, your actions have already revealed your kind hearts to me! Sadly... I can't make you any promises. You're outsiders, and only Madam Yukong has the authority to consider your offer.
别怕，驭空大人为人和善，跟我来吧！
Don't worry! Madam Yukong is kind-hearted too. Come on now, I'll lead the way.
他们曾经在这里和谁战斗过。
和云骑军起了冲突？有瓦尔特先生在，应该不至于……
A conflict with the Cloud Knights? Hm... Not likely, Mr. Yang wouldn't let that happen...

怎么会变异得如此严重…是星核的影响吗？
How could the mutations get this bad... is the Stellaron exerting an effect?
Stay where you are — I can handle this.
救人所急的事情，交给专业的人来办——
Emergencies should be dealt with by professionals...
不妨事！这家伙，好大的怪力！
It's okay! Phew, this one's strong alright!
两位为救我而战，罗刹又岂能事不关己，「好好呆着」呢？

没事就好。我是云骑素裳，刚从「曜青」仙舟调来这儿的！
Good. I'm Sushang of the Cloud Knights — I was just transferred here from the Yaoqing!
都跟你说别插手了，刀剑无眼，伤着你怎么办？
I did tell you to let me handle it. I don't have eyes in the back of my head — what if I accidentally hit you?
我不出手，你就要受伤了呀。
Forgive me miss, but you were too busy being hit yourself. It's a good thing I joined the fray.
哈，我们云骑军就是要保护你们的嘛。这一片都戒严了，我正在疏散群众呢，你跟着我走，我带你去安全的地方。
Ha, I was protecting you more like — it's a Cloud Knight's job to protect others. This area is under martial law, I'm escorting all civilians to safety. Follow me.
你的云骑枪法不赖啊，哪个伍的？
That was some impressive Cloud Knight spearmanship. Which unit are you from?
噢，好吧。那你也是平民，也跟我走。
Huh, okay... You're a civilian then. Come with me!
素裳姑娘，仙舟出什么事了？我往来行商多次，从未见星槎海如此模样。
Miss Sushang, what exactly has transpired here? In all my trade visits, I've never seen Starskiff Haven in such a state.
这个，呃，我不方便透露，我只是接到命令过来救援平民的…说实话，我也不知道。总之你俩跟我走就是啦。
I, uh... I can't comment on that. I was just ordered to rescue the civilians... Actually, I have no idea either. Anyway, you two just need to come with me.
喂，那个…「闷葫芦」？你叫什么名字？我要登记的，总不能给你填空吧？
Hey, you're pretty quiet. What's your name? I've got forms to fill out — can't put your name down as blank.
我叫丹恒，旅行到此，正要和朋友会合。不劳姑娘费心，我自己出港就好。
My name is Dan Heng. I'm a traveler. I'm on my way to meet up with my friends. I appreciate the help, but I can leave the port on my own.
不行。这什么时候啦，星槎海根本没人。你的朋友如果没出事的话，肯定也在安全区呢。别担心，你跟我走，到地方就能见到他们啦。

No can do, mister — it's way too late. You won't find anyone at Starskiff Haven. If your friends made it out, then they'll already be in the safe zone. No need to worry, you'll see them when we get there.
姑娘不问问我的名字吗？
Aren't you going to take my name too, miss?
刚才打架时你不是自己报了吗？叫罗——罗什么…罗刹！对吧？本姑娘记着呢。
You already said it when we were busy fighting. Luo... something... Luocha! Is that right? I remember it.
出发！二位跟紧我，云骑军素裳一定保护好你们的安全！
Let's go! Stay close, you two. Cloud Knight Sushang will guarantee your safety!
哦对了，一会儿你们帮我签下名字…我认的字不是太多，怕写错……
Ah, one more thing — I need you to write your names down later. I don't know too many characters, I might make a mistake...
Careful, we've never seen this kind of life form before...
他们已经堕入{RUBY_B#「长生病」}魔阴身{RUBY_E#}，不再是我们的战友了……
They're {RUBY_B#Long-Life Curse}mara-struck{RUBY_E#} — we've already lost them...
你是仙舟天舶司的人，应该知道「星核」的威胁。
You work for the Sky-Faring Commission, so I assume you're aware of its destructive power.
啊，是呀，我作为接渡使去过不少星球呢，被「星核」侵蚀的惨状也见过不少…唉。
Yes, I am. As an Amicassador, I've been to many planets, and seen my fair share of Stellaron corrosion... *sigh*
你呀，说话挺讨喜，做事却恩将仇报。我们救了你耶，你却想让士兵抓我们！还好杨叔会说话……
Y'know, you sound sweet enough, but you were talking about getting us escorted away by your Cloud Knights. If it weren't for Mr. Yang...
恩公误会，小女子也没有办法呀。易地而处，你也总会提防一下吧～
