我是长乐天卫戍区的云骑，见到那个「绿芙蓉」一直鬼鬼祟祟的，还宣传一些离经叛道的思想，这才跟过来，准备卧底。
I'm a Cloud Knight from the Exalting Sanctum garrison. That Green Hibiscus has been sneaking around spreading heretical lies for a while now. That's why I'm here — to spy on him!
没想到啊，一来就被他们怀疑了…费了好大的力气才勉强让他们相信我是真心想加入药王秘传的……
They were suspicious of me as soon as I arrived... It took a lot of effort to make them believe I wanted to become a disciple...
你怎么穿着军装就来了…
Why did you come here in your uniform...?
你穿成这样那必然会被怀疑啊…
Of course, they're bound to have their doubts when you're dressed like that...
嗐，我寻摸着像这样的邪恶组织发展下线时，多半希望成员能在执法者队伍里渗透影响力，所以我穿着盔甲就来了。这叫充分洞察用户需求。
Hmph, I have my reasoning. Cults like this want to recruit people with influence in law and order — I wanted them to know I was a Cloud Knight! Always know your enemy...
嘘，说话小声些…这帮家伙可不是吃素的，要是让他们发觉咱俩是卧底，那一个也跑不了。
Shh, keep your voice down — these disciples don't miss much. If they discover us, we won't make it out of here.
先说好了，我帮你抄完经，你可要帮我打掩护，我得去神策府通风报信……
Listen carefully — I help you copy the text, you cover for me, and I get word out to the Seat of Divine Foresight...
来，我来替你抄经。当云骑之前，我在神策府干了一百五十多年的文职工作，抄写对我而言简直是小菜一碟。
You can trust me with the transcription. I spent over <unbreak>150</unbreak> years pen-pushing in the Seat of Divine Foresight before I became a Cloud Knight — I could do this in my sleep.
趁着那些看守你们的莳者不注意，这位云骑奋笔疾书，很快就将经文抄好了。
The Cloud Knight swiftly scribbles away and finishes copying the sacred text while the disciples watching over you aren't looking.
你开始抄写这册《千手慈怀药王救世品》。
You start copying the Thousand-Handed Merciful Medicus' Salvation.
「一时千手慈怀药王游化诸界，与莳者九万九千九百九十九人俱，住罗睺下，而为说法。」
"Once upon a time, the thousand-hand Sanctus Medicus traveled the world with their <unbreak>99,999</unbreak> disciples, living under Rahu and teaching their Way."
你的食指有些疼，肩膀也有些酸…可这才是第一遍。还有四百九十九遍在等待着你。
Your index finger has a slight cramp, and your shoulders feel a bit sore... But you've only made the first copy. There are still <unbreak>499</unbreak> copies waiting to be written.
「说是语时，莳者九万九千九百九十九人俱，皆断生老病苦。」
"As they spoke the words, the <unbreak>99,999</unbreak> disciples were liberated from youth, old age, sickness, and suffering."
在落下最后一笔时，你眼角的余光瞥到那个云骑正在向你打手势。
After making the final stroke, you catch the Cloud Knight in your peripheral vision as he gestures at you.
过来，过来，别抄了，快过来。
Psst, hey, stop writing — get over here!
你低下头，对周围的一切充耳不闻，静静地抄写着。
You lower your head. You become closed off to the world around you as you quietly copy the text.
你的手臂越来越疼，但终究还是抄完了第二遍。
Your hand and shoulder are experiencing more pain, but you've only produced two copies.
「药王慈怀，建木生发。莳者一心，同登极乐。」
"Mercy of Sanctus Medicus, the Arbor's new growth. Unity of Discipuli Medici, the Enlightenment's true path."
抄写第三遍时，这句话开始在你的心中回响。
You finish the third copy. This sentence has started to reverberate within your being.
你的手臂和手指已经不疼了。可能是习惯了，也可能是麻木了。
Your hand and shoulder no longer hurt. Maybe you've gotten used to the work, or perhaps they have grown numb.
你顺利地抄完了第四遍。
在抄写第五遍时，旁边的那位云骑终于按捺不住，悄悄蹭到了你的身边。
As you write out the fifth copy, the Cloud Knight near you no longer can wait in silence. He quietly comes up next to you.
别抄了！别抄了！你还抄上瘾了是吧！我来替你抄完吧，你来帮我望风！
Stop writing — you wanna fall under their spell? I'll finish it for you — go keep a lookout!
趁着那些看守你们的莳者不注意，这位云骑奋笔疾书，很快就将经文抄好了。
The Cloud Knight swiftly scribbles away and finishes copying the sacred text while the disciples watching over you aren't looking.
行了行了，终于抄完了…我认得你，你是{NICKNAME}！景元将军的贵客！
Alright, finally... I know you — you're {NICKNAME}, General Jing Yuan's honored guest!
I think you've got the wrong person...
你相信我好不好！我知道，你肯定是来卧底的。我其实也是！
You're here undercover, right? So am I! You've got to believe me!
Jim Yan? Never heard of him...
哎呀，都这个时候了，就别说冷笑话了…我知道，你肯定是来卧底的。我其实也是！
*sigh* Is this really the time for jokes of that quality... You're here undercover, right? Well, so am I!
Looks like I'll have to make sure no one finds out...
别别别…我知道，你肯定是来卧底的。我其实也是！
W—Wait a second! You're here undercover, right? So am I!
我是长乐天卫戍区的云骑，见到那个「绿芙蓉」一直鬼鬼祟祟的，还宣传一些离经叛道的思想，这才跟过来，准备卧底。
I'm a Cloud Knight from the Exalting Sanctum garrison. That Green Hibiscus has been sneaking around spreading heretical lies for a while now. That's why I'm here — to spy on him!
没想到啊，一来就被他们怀疑了…费了好大的力气才勉强让他们相信我是真心想加入药王秘传的……
They were suspicious of me as soon as I arrived... It took a lot of effort to make them believe I wanted to become a disciple...
你怎么穿着军装就来了…
Why did you come here in your uniform...?
你穿成这样那必然会被怀疑啊…
Of course, they're bound to have their doubts when you're dressed like that...
嗐，我寻摸着像这样的邪恶组织发展下线时，多半希望成员能在执法者队伍里渗透影响力，所以我穿着盔甲就来了。这叫充分洞察用户需求。
Hmph, I have my reasoning. Cults like this want to recruit people with influence in law and order — I wanted them to know I was a Cloud Knight! Always know your enemy...
嘘，说话小声些…这帮家伙可不是吃素的，要是让他们发觉咱俩是卧底，那一个也跑不了。
Shh, keep your voice down — these disciples don't miss much. If they discover us, we won't make it out of here.
先说好了，我帮你抄完经，你可要帮我打掩护，我得去神策府通风报信……
Listen carefully — I help you copy the text, you cover for me, and I get word out to the Seat of Divine Foresight...
请静下心来，慢慢抄写，慢慢体悟《千手慈怀药王救世品》至善至美的启迪。
Take your time, still your mind, and transcribe the text. Allow the beautiful enlightenment of Thousand-Handed Merciful Medicus' Salvation to permeate your being.
已经抄完了？这么快？我检查一下…嗯…嗯…嗯…还真是都抄完了，还抄得又快又好。看来你是颇有仙缘的。
You're finished? So soon? Let me see... Hmm... Hmm... Yes, it would appear you are finished — a fast and accurate transcription. It seems you are destined for immortality.
我现在能加入药王秘传了？
So, can I join the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus now?
稍安勿躁，稍安勿躁…入门试炼分为两步，你和那位云骑已经完成了第一步。现在…还剩下最后一步。
Calm yourself... The initiation is divided into two steps — you and the Cloud Knight have completed the first. Now... only the second remains.
好啊，那这下一步等我们明天再来吧？我现在是勤务时间，偷偷跑出来的，再不回去他们会起疑心的。
Sure... but can it wait till tomorrow? I'm supposed to be on duty right now — they'll get suspicious if I don't head back soon.
不必担心。第二步非常简单啊，很快就可以结束了。
No need to worry, the second step is extraordinarily simple. It'll all be over soon enough.
咱们药王秘传的用人原则是，疑人不用、用人不疑。所以……
The Disciples' initiation is governed by the following principle — never accept who you suspect, and never suspect who you accept. So...
请二位在此处决斗，活下来的人，就可以正式成为一名莳者。
...it's time for you two to battle it out. Whoever survives will officially become a disciple.
抄经可以判断出二位的虔敬之心，但是否对组织忠诚，还需要一些更有力的保障啊…没办法，规矩也不是我定的。

Transcribing scripture allows us to ascertain your devotion, but determining whether or not you'll be loyal to the organization requires a stronger guarantee... Sorry, there's nothing I can do about it, I didn't write the rules.
没办法，规矩也不是我定的。如果不肯完成试炼，那我们也只能委屈二位永远保守秘密了……
There is nothing that can be done. I didn't write the rules. If you are unwilling to complete the initiation process, then we will have to ask that you keep our secrets hidden... permanently...
好啊！药王秘传就喜欢你这种有干劲的新鲜血液！来吧，让我们看看你的本事吧！
Excellent! The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus loves enthusiastic new blood! Well then, show us what you're made of!
等一下，先等一下…别啊，我们是为求长生才来的，又不是为寻死才来的，这样突然让我们决斗，我们很难办啊！
Wh—Whoa, whoa — you're kidding, right? We came here to lengthen our lifespans, not shorten them! You can't just make us fight like this!
倒也不是强制你们决斗，不肯斗也可以，但那样就不可能放你们任何人离开了。
We aren't forcing you to fight — by all means refuse if you wish... but we won't possibly be able to let either of you leave.
好的…好的…那让我先做一下心理准备，这总可以吧？我以前也没干过这种事啊……
I... Fine, fine — but at least let me prepare. I've never done anything like this before...
我倒是无所谓，这要问你的对手……
Very well, but you'll need to ask your opponent, too...
好的，那你们准备一下吧。时间宝贵，别准备太久。
Good. Then prepare yourselves. Time is precious — make it quick.
这样吧…我想到一个好办法，可以让你加入药王秘传，也能让我全身而退……
Listen... I have an idea that will let you join the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus, and let me get the heck out of here in one piece.
你和我决斗，然后我会败给你，假装自己已经被你干掉了。你假托帮他们处理尸体，把我带离现场……
You and I fight, and I lose to you — I pretend that you finished me off. Then, you pretend to help them remove my body by dragging me out of here...
这样一来，咱们双方的目标都能完成。
That way we both accomplish our objectives.
呃…我见识过你的手腕…可千万别失手真把我给打死了……
Oh, uh... I've seen your skills... Please don't mess up and actually kill me...
好，就知道信得过你…那我可就把这条命托付给你了啊！
Good. I know I could trust you... My life is in your hands!
别啊…你下手轻点…唉，算了，这本来也是我自己捅的篓子，生死由命吧。你尽量别打死我啊！
Just... Ugh, whatever, I got myself into this — let fate decide. Just try and hold back a little, okay!?
你们准备得怎么样了？可以决斗了吗？
So, have you prepared yourselves? Are you ready to fight?
真是好身手啊，刚才还生龙活虎的一个云骑，就这么被你撂倒了。
What magnificent skill! He was fierce, but no match for you.
你赢了是好事。这家伙穿着云骑制服就跑来说要入教，说话没头没脑的，真要是他赢了，我还有点担心他是不是真的可信呢。
I'm glad you prevailed — that Cloud Knight waltzed straight up to us in uniform and asked if he could join — hardly a convincing spectacle. I doubt I ever could've trusted him.
紫菊、蓝桃，找地方处理了这个云骑。
Purple Chrysanthemum, Blue Peach, find somewhere to dispose of the body.
你来？你知道怎么处理吗？
Oh, you've dealt with this kind of thing before?
I have a long-term associate that handles problems like this.
长期合作的伙伴…没看出来，你还是个道上兄弟。
A long-time associate, eh? You're well-connected, I see...
呃…收集？无妨、无妨，人无癖不可交嘛。
Side... hustle? Ahem, very well — these are hard times, I suppose.
怎么会呢！咱们药王秘传绝对是用人不疑的。
Not at all! As I said earlier — disciples never suspect who we accept.
嗯…也好。我们兄弟姐妹几人在长乐天传教数日，可能已经引起了猎狗们的注意…你去处理还安全些。

Hmm... this does have its advantages. Our brothers and sisters have been proselytizing in Exalting Sanctum over the last few days — we may have attracted the attention of the devils... Having you dispose of the Cloud Knight will be safer.
那么，这就当做是你为组织完成的第一件任务吧。你做事这么积极，我也会和上面如实汇报的。
As such, this can be your first mission as a disciple. You take an active approach to getting things done — I'll be sure to pass that on to my superiors.
无论如何…恭喜你成为了一名莳者。你的代号就叫做…「灰牡丹」吧！
In any case... my hearty congratulations on your admission to the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus. From now on, you will be known by the code name... Gray Peony!
灰牡丹，为避人耳目，我们分散离开，稍后在别处汇合吧。再会。
Well, Gray Peony, let's depart separately to avoid attracting attention — we'll rendezvous at a different location later. Until then.
你将云骑带回了安全的地方。
You take the Cloud Knight to a safe place.
呼，我装死的本事还行吧？
Whew. I did a good job playing dead, didn't I?
那帮人根本就是一群疯子，你之后和他们接触可要小心啊……
Those people are out of their minds — watch your step next time you're around them...
How... How are you still alive?
你刚才还真打算对我下死手吗？
他盯着你的脸瞧了半天，意识到这不过是个玩笑。
He stares at your face for a long time before he realizes that you're joking.
吓死我了，咱们可是一条绳上的蚂蚱。
Gah, enough with the jokes already — it's a miracle either of us is alive.
的确，以你的能力还轮不上我担心。
With your skills, you've got a better chance than most.
They can't take me in a fight.
的确，以你的能力还轮不上我担心。
With your skills, you've got a better chance than most.
那我先回神策府报告了，你一定要注意安全啊。
I should report back to the Seat of Divine Foresight. Stay safe, friend!
云骑警惕地看了看四周，在确认没人跟踪后，迅速离去。
The Cloud Knight vigilantly monitors his surroundings. After he's certain no one is tracking them, he makes a swift getaway.
（之前明明和绿芙蓉说好在这里汇合，可这人似乎不在？）
(Green Hibiscus agreed to meet me here, but there's no sight of him. What gives?)
（这里有一封信，信封上写着…「灰牡丹」？这是绿芙蓉给我的信吧。）
(There's a letter here... What's this on the envelope? "Gray Peony..." This must be from Green Hibiscus.)
（药王秘传还真是谨慎…看来只能先去帮他们完成任务了。）
(The Disciples sure know how to keep a low profile... Looks like I'll need to help them complete this mission.)
（要截获信件的话，应该去长乐天的物流鸟架上找找看吧。）
(If they're looking to intercept a letter, then I should probably search around the Exalting Sanctum's Cycrane Stand.)
你翻遍了这个物流鸟架上的每一个包裹，可惜并没有你要找的那封信。
You rummage through the packages on this Cycrane Stand, but you don't find the letter you are looking for.
（似乎不在这个物流鸟架上，找找其他的吧。）
(It doesn't seem to be on this Cycrane Stand. Let's check out another one.)
（这个邮包上面写着，「神策府收，加急」…找到了，这就是药王秘传想要截获的信件。）
(What's written on this package? "Seat of Divine Foresight, Urgent..." This is it — the mail the Disciples want to intercept.)
（不过，这个邮包似乎被加密了。这也没办法，毕竟是重要情报。试试看能不能解开吧。）
(Hmm, seems like it's encrypted somehow... Makes sense, this is critical intelligence after all... Let's see if I can crack the code.)
（打开了…这确实是药王秘传的内部命令。）
(Code cracked... Huh, it's an internal order from the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus.)
（从这份「紧急指示」上来看，药王秘传似乎注意到了神策府近期的渗透行动…怪不得绿芙蓉这么急着截获它。）
(Judging from these "Urgent Instructions," the Disciples are aware of a Seat of Divine Foresight operation to infiltrate their ranks... No wonder Green Hibiscus was so eager to intercept this.)
（先用手机留下一份副本，然后拿去交给绿芙蓉吧。）
(I'll use my phone to make a copy and then hand it over to Green Hibiscus.)
这不是{NICKNAME}吗？没想到会在长乐天见面。
Is that the general's honored guest? I didn't expect to see you around Exalting Sanctum.
这边物流机巧鸟的负责人和我一样是个持明。她到日子了，要去鳞渊境重入轮回了。
The person in charge of the courier cycranes here is a Vidyadhara — just like me. Her day has arrived — she's already headed to Scalegorge Waterscape to self-reincarnate.
在新人过来之前，我暂时来这边代班。
I'll be handling her duties until her replacement arrives.
What do you mean by "her day"?
持明一世能有个六七百年，日子到了就要去鳞渊境重入轮回。对我们来说只是生命的又一个新阶段罢了。

As a Vidyadhara, one's lifespan typically spans six or seven hundred years. At the end of that span, there comes a day when we journey to Scalegorge Waterscape and embark on a new phase through self-reincarnation. It marks a significant moment in our eternal life cycle.
哈哈，这没什么。持明一世能有个六七百年，日子到了就要去鳞渊境重入轮回。对我们来说只是生命的又一个新阶段罢了。

Haha, don't be. The lifespan of a Vidyadhara typically spans six or seven hundred years. At the end of that span, there comes a day when we journey to Scalegorge Waterscape and embark on a new phase through self-reincarnation. It marks a significant moment in our eternal life cycle.
所以，你在这边是要办什么事吗？
So, what can I help you with?
你隐去敏感信息，向梓桥简单叙述了自己正在执行的任务。
You hide the sensitive message and give Ziqiao a quick rundown on your mission.
梓桥听完，打了几个电话。在确认情况后，她帮你找到了那个上面写着「神策府收，加急」的邮包。
Ziqiao listens to your explanation. After making a few calls and confirming the situation, she helps you find a parcel that has "For the Seat of Divine Foresight. Urgent," written on it.
那么，事关神策府机密，我也不多问了。这个邮包就交给你吧。
When it comes to classified matters concerning the Seat of Divine Foresight, it's best I keep my questions to myself. Here's the package.
你忙你的吧，我也该去干活了。下次见，注意安全。
Well, I'll let you get back to your business — I've got things I need to do attend to. See you, and take care.
（这确实是药王秘传的内部命令。）
(It's an internal order from the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus.)
（从这份「紧急指示」上来看，药王秘传似乎注意到了神策府近期的渗透行动…怪不得绿芙蓉这么急着截获它。）
(Judging from these "Urgent Instructions," the Disciples are aware of a Seat of Divine Foresight operation to infiltrate their ranks... No wonder Green Hibiscus was so eager to intercept this.)
（先用手机留下一份副本，然后拿去交给绿芙蓉吧。）
(I'll use my phone to make a copy and then hand it over to Green Hibiscus.)
灰牡丹，你截获密信了吗？
Gray Peony, did you intercept the secret letter?
你看到密信内容了？唉…这项工作进展还有些困难，神策府的猎狗都太狡诈了。
You read the contents? Ugh... this job is proving to be somewhat difficult. Those devils at the Seat of Divine Foresight are too cunning.
辛苦了。可惜，那个叛徒已经被保护起来了…看起来即使截获密信，这些相关消息也是瞒不住的。
Good work. Unfortunately, the traitor has already found refuge under their wing... It appears that even our interception couldn't prevent the intel on our mission from slipping through the cracks.
不过这些事就让我们来操心吧。暂时还不需要你处理这些事…当然，你早晚也要负责处理这些问题，这是莳者的义务。

*sigh* Your work here is done — we'll take it from here... Of course, as a fellow disciple, there will come a time when you too will be tasked with resolving such issues — one among many duties of the Disciples.
无论如何，你已经证明了自己是一名称职的莳者。组织在长乐天的负责人会来见你。
You have already proven yourself to be a competent disciple. The head of our operations in Exalting Sanctum is coming to pay you a visit.
请你稍等一下，他马上就到。
Just a moment. He will be here shortly.
紫月季大人，这就是我跟你提到过的灰牡丹。是一位很可靠的莳者。
Mauve Moon, this is the reliable disciple I mentioned to you — Gray Peony.
灰牡丹，这位是紫月季大人。长乐天地区的负责人。
Gray Peony, this is Mauve Moon — the head of our operations in Exalting Sanctum.
看得出来，你的确身手不凡。
It seems you have some impressive skills in your arsenal.
不必谦虚。我习武多年，你有几斤几两，我一看便知。
No need for modesty. I've studied martial arts for years — I can tell how strong you are with just a glance.
哈哈哈哈，我喜欢你的性格。
Easy, Hibiscus... I like this kid.
那么，像你这样的强者，为什么想成为药王秘传呢？
You seem like you've got it all figured out... What brings you to the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus?
可以理解。妖弓祸祖所谓的拯救与破坏毫无差别。
I can appreciate that. The Devilish Archer Author's so-called salvation is no different from destruction.
祂用谎言和力量蒙蔽了仙舟人，让他们对慈怀药王的恩惠产生了恐惧……
THEY used deceit and power to mislead the people of the Xianzhou, instilling fear in THEM about the blessings of Merciful Medicus.
而药王秘传的职责，就是斩断这种无端的恐惧，让仙舟人重新回到慈怀药王温柔的怀抱之中。
The mission of the Disciples is to strike down this groundless fear, so that the people of the Xianzhou can return to the warm embrace of Merciful Medicus.
I want to become even stronger.
很好，我也是。我曾以为只要努力训练，就能够成为强者…但事实并非如此。
Good, so do I. I used to think determination and hard work were enough to achieve that... But I've come to realize it's not that simple.
在漫长的云骑生涯中，我领悟到一件事——人的力量是有极限的。
During my many years as a Cloud Knight, I realized something... An individual's strength is limited.
所以我放弃了凡人之躯，成为了慈怀药王的眷属。
So, I abandoned my mortal body and became a faithful servant of Merciful Medicus.
这很好。生命是奇迹和恩典，任何妄图弃绝这种奇迹和恩典的行为，都是可耻的背叛。
Good. Life is a miracle and a blessing. Any futile attempt to forsake it is a disgraceful betrayal.
你领悟到了长生的意义，这已经使你超越了那些可耻的凡人。
You have been enlightened to the significance of immortality. You have already surpassed those shameful mortals.
无妨。无论是追求力量还是追求长生，都是镌刻在人类基因中的本能。
Don't worry about it. The pursuit of power and immortality is ingrained in the fabric of human nature.
任何妄图忤逆本能的行为，都是可笑可耻可悲的…虽然你仍未找到自己应走的道路，但你已经选择了正确的方向。这很好。
Any act that runs counter to that instinct is lamentable, shameful, and futile... You may not have found the path yet, but you've already chosen the right direction. Very good.
给你这张药方，只要服下这副药，就能够像我一样，斩断妖弓祸祖施加在你灵魂上的枷锁，获得极致的力量与自由。

Here, take this prescription. Through this medicine, you will become like me. You will be able to break the shackles that the Devilish Archer Author has used to chain your soul. You will gain unbridled power and freedom.
组织中负责丹药的莳者，听说你是个出色的战士，于是给你开了这个方子。
The disciple responsible for creating medicinal pellets heard of your exploits — they prepared the prescription for you personally.
这里面有些药材可以在医馆买到，有些药材则需要你自己想办法…但凭你的能力，这应该是小事一桩。
Some of the ingredients can be purchased at an apothecary, but others will require you to come up with your own solution... Given your strength, that shouldn't pose a problem.
How many people are in our organization?
我不知道。据说有几万人之巨。
I don't know. I've heard our members are in the tens of thousands.
药王秘传的组织结构奉行扁平化原则，每个地区的负责人都直接向魁首负责。其他地区的情况，我是一概不知的。
The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus has a flat organizational structure — the head of each area reports directly to the master. I know nothing about what goes on elsewhere.
这样做的好处就是，即使长乐天的组织被猎狗们一锅端了，其他地区的兄弟姐妹也不会受到波及。
The benefit is that even if our enemies were to wipe out the Exalting Sanctum branch, it wouldn't affect our brothers and sisters in other areas.
负责开药方的人，身份大都比较敏感…虽然我知道他们的身份，但为了他们的安全，我不能告知任何人……
That's sensitive information... I know who they are, but for their security, I can't reveal their identities...
并不是不信任你啊，灰牡丹。这是为了大家的安全着想。
It's not that I doubt your loyalty, Gray Peony. It's like I said — security.
老大？你是说「魁首」对吧？会见到的，现在还不急。
The boss? You mean the master... You'll meet them, but for now there's no rush. All in good time.
相信以你的能力，只要继续这样尽职尽责，很快就能见到魁首了。
Keep fulfilling your duties — as you have been. With your strength, you'll have an audience with the master in no time.
Why did you join the organization?
说来惭愧，我曾是猎狗中的一员…我修习了近百年的枪术，还差点就能当上云骑的教习。
I'm ashamed to admit it, but I once worked alongside those devils... I trained in spear techniques for almost a century — I nearly became a Cloud Knight instructor.
可囿于凡人脆弱的躯壳，我永远无法突破自己与那些「武学天才」之间的最后一丝障壁。
But I was trapped in a weak, mortal shell. I was never able to surpass the final barrier that separated me from the martial arts geniuses.
你能理解吗？我的枪术越是精进，就越是觉得自己可悲。越接近顶峰，就越是能清楚地看到那层无法击碎的玻璃天花板！
You understand, right? The more I devoted myself to the spear, the more I lamented my condition. The closer I came to the peak, the clearer my limits became.
好在你手里的这一副「龙蟠虬跃」拯救了我。服下了这副药，我终于成为了凡人无法企及的强者。
Fortunately, the Draught of Draconic Surge — the prescription you hold in your hand — rescued me. Once I took that medicine, I became more powerful than any mortal could ever dream of.
现在，一切都好起来了…过去那个可悲的「神枪执信」已经不复存在了，只剩下了慈怀药王忠诚的莳者。
Now, everything has changed... Zhixin and his pitiful spearmanship are no more... All that remains is a loyal disciple of Merciful Medicus.
What did you say your old name was?
Were you an undercover agent for the Seat of Divine Foresight?
是啊…很惭愧，我以前叫做「执信」，是神策府派来的卧底。但那群蠢猎狗不会知道，我早就被慈怀药王的力量所感化了。

...Even the thought of that past fills me with shame. I was once Zhixin, a rat for the Seat of Divine Foresight... But those ignorant devils never realized — I had already been redeemed by the power of Merciful Medicus.
等等…你认得我？你从哪里认识我的？为什么听到「执信」这个名字，你的表情就变得不对劲了？
Wait... you recognize me? Where do you know me from? Your face changed when you heard my name...
紫月季大人，出问题了…这家伙怕不是来找你的卧底……
M—Mauve Moon, sir, we have a problem... I suspect this person may be the agent who's been looking for you...
混账！你考验半天，考验了个什么东西？这样明晃晃的一个卧底就让你放进来了！
...Idiot! What kind of trials are you running? You let an agent infiltrate our ranks!?
我冤枉啊！这人可是当着我的面杀了一个云骑啊！
I—I couldn't have known, sir! I witnessed this person slay a Cloud Knight before my very eyes!
可恨啊…妖弓祸祖让这群可悲的凡人变得视死如归，为了潜入药王秘传，甚至不惜用性命来一出苦肉计……
Detestable... The Devilish Archer Author allows these pitiful mortals to face death without fear — self-sacrifice is their way of fooling us into opening our doors.
You've really got an active imagination...
慈怀药王赐予了我敏锐的感官，任何事都逃不过我的眼睛。你这种可笑可耻可悲的凡人是不会懂的。
Merciful Medicus has sharpened my senses — nothing gets past me. A pathetic mortal like you could never understand.
我寻思我也没说会暴露的话啊…
I don't think I said anything that revealed my identity...
慈怀药王赐予了我敏锐的感官，任何事都逃不过我的眼睛。你这种可笑可耻可悲的凡人是不会懂的。
Merciful Medicus has sharpened my senses — nothing gets past me. A pathetic mortal like you could never understand.
I'm done. Let's do this. You can come at me together.
那么，灰牡丹…不，神策府的猎狗，请你去死吧！
In that case, Divine Foresight devil, it's time for you to meet your demise!
看到你平安无事，我就放心了。
I'm glad to see you've returned in one piece.
出什么事了？是发生什么意外状况了吗？
So, what happened? Did everything go as planned?
你向青镞汇报了这段时间的卧底工作。
You tell Qingzu about what happened as you worked undercover.
别担心，你的卧底行动很成功。虽然暴露了身份，但已获得了很多有价值的情报，最后还能全身而退。这样王牌间谍般的素质，真是令人惊讶。
Don't worry, your operation was a success — although your identity was ultimately exposed, you gained a wealth of invaluable intelligence. On top of that, you managed to get out without a scratch.
唉，只是没想到…执信竟然走上了那条邪路……
*sigh* ...I never imagined that Zhixin would choose the path of evil.
刚刚云骑报告说在现场发现了执信的时候，我还抱有一线幻想……也许是他和你合力抗敌，他力战不支之类的情况……

The Cloud Knight you encountered only just finished reporting back to me — he mentioned discovering Zhixin at the scene. I was hoping that maybe — just maybe Zhixin had attempted to join forces with you against the enemy — that he'd fought with all his might...
{NICKNAME}，你做得对。寿瘟祸祖就是这样，用「力量」和「生命」做诱饵，让无数像执信这样原本前途光明的人走上一条不归路。

{NICKNAME}, you did the right thing. I'm afraid this is how the Plagues Author operates — using notions of power and life to draw countless people like Zhixin away from bright futures... down a path of no return.
你的一手消息非常有用。敌暗我明，有了这些情报，神策府的决策也会更加精准。
You've managed to shine a light on the darkness of the enemy. With this intelligence, the Seat of Divine Foresight will be able to improve its strategy...
这是给你准备的酬劳，请收下。
...and for all your efforts, please accept this reward.
Is there anything else you'd like to know about?
Tell me about the current state of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus...
对这个组织的现状…我们几乎一无所知。虽然派去了一些卧底，但大都无法像你一样深入敌营，只能在外围徘徊。

The current state... I'm afraid we know next to nothing. We dispatched agents, but they were only able to linger on the edges of the organization. Your operation is the furthest anyone's managed to infiltrate.
神策府还在试图搞清楚一件事：他们到底是沉寂千年后死灰复燃，还是在这千年间一直秘密延续着呢？

The Seat of Divine Foresight is still striving to answer one question: Is this but the resurgent shadow of an organization silenced a thousand years ago... or have they been lurking in the darkness all along?
但无论是蛰伏至今，还是死灰复燃…他们这次突然堂而皇之地冒出头来，那定然是在酝酿着什么阴谋……
Whatever the case, this sudden re-emergence hints at a hidden conspiracy...
这几个月我一直都很担心，不知道接下来会发生什么。
It's troubled me deeply over recent few months... it's hard to tell what all of this is building towards.
Did you send a lot of people undercover?
并没有。虽然药王秘传的密信中写得好像我们无孔不入一样…现在成功潜入药王秘传的卧底也就寥寥数人。

Not at all. The Disciples' secret letter makes it sound as if we infiltrated their ranks in great numbers... The reality is that only a handful of agents have successfully slipped into the organization...
而且他们中大部分，并没有像你这样暴露身份后还能全身而退的实力，也没有迅速获得信任的智慧和好运……

...and the majority of them lacked the strength you had to make it back unscathed after their identity was exposed. They didn't have the wisdom and good fortune to gain the organization's trust quickly...
况且，卧底也不能真的服下那些药王秘传的丹药，吃了那东西，这辈子可就全完了。
An agent can't actually consume those pellets of the Disciples... doing so would mean the end of their life as they knew it.
总而言之，目前还没有人能像你一样深入核心，拿到这么多一手资料。
The point is, there hasn't been anyone like you who managed to delve into the group's core and obtain so much firsthand information.
Tell me about the beliefs of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus...
这篇《千手慈怀药王救世品》是药王秘传不知从何抄来的经文，多半是「神降时代」禁书的残篇。

Thousand-Handed Merciful Medicus' Salvation is a manuscript transcribed from a sacred text — I don't know where the Disciples obtained it. It likely consists of fragments of banned works from the {RUBY_B#Theophany Era}befall era{RUBY_E#}.
但依我看，这玩意儿其实没什么大不了的，只不过是用一种扭曲的视角，重新叙述了寿瘟祸祖扭曲造物的行为……
As I see it, there isn't anything particularly alarming about the text. It recalls the acts of the Plagues Author's warped creatures from an equally warped perspective...
经文并没有什么蛊惑人心的力量，人们从来只是自己蛊惑自己，而经文给了他们谎言和虚假的希望。
The scripture doesn't have the power to lead people astray — they do that to themselves... but it does feed lies and false hope.
About the prescription that Zhixin gave me...
至于你所获得的这张药方…这就在我的知识盲区之内了。
The prescription you acquired is... beyond my knowledge.
眼下有几位可靠的丹士正驻留长乐天，要请你跑一趟，向他们咨询这方子的细节关窍。这样神策府也好有的放矢，备制解药……

There are a few reliable alchemists that reside in Exalting Sanctum. I'd like to ask you to consult with them on the particulars of the prescription. This will allow the Seat of Divine Foresight to have a clear target for creating an antidote...
{NICKNAME}，鉴于药王秘传已经对我们的卧底行动有所察觉，神策府这边也是时候收网了。
{NICKNAME}, given that the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus has become aware of our operation, it's about time the Seat of Divine Foresight reeled in its net.
若问出了药方的细节，欢迎随时来找我。
If you turn up any details about the prescription, feel free to come back and find me any time.
怎么了？还有什么事要问吗？
What's on your mind? Did you want to ask about something else?
有些关于药王秘传的问题…
I have some questions about the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus...
Ask away, I'll tell you everything I know.
I don't have any more questions.
好的，下次再见。有空的时候记得帮我找那几位丹士问问药方的事，我现在脱不开身。
Very well, see you soon. Remember to look for those alchemists when you have time — ask them about the prescription. I can't leave my post right now.
那个…请问您有什么事吗……
Uh... C—Can I help you with anything...?
Qingzu asked me to find you...
You explain what's transpired to the alchemist.
好的…我了解了，给我看看这方子吧…但我才疏学浅，很可能看不出什么所以然……
Right... I see. Let me take a look at the prescription. I'm afraid I'm not the most talented alchemist — I probably won't be able to make much sense of it...
啊？这这这…「持明髓」？写这药方的家伙是疯子吧……
Huh? Th—This calls for... Vidyadhara bone marrow? Whoever wrote this prescription must be out of their mind...
对不起…这个方子我看不明白，用的材料实在是太…太诡异了……
Sorry... I can't make heads or tails of it. The ingredients listed are just too... strange.
而且，凭我浅薄的学识来看，这东西其他丹士应该也看不太明白…能搞清楚这玩意儿药理的人，只有一个……
Based on what little I do know, I doubt the other alchemists will be able to understand it either... I think there's only one person who could grasp this kind of pharmacology...
我们的丹士长，丹枢大人。
丹枢大人是罗浮上…甚至是整个仙舟联盟最有能力的丹士…她是一位盲眼的天缺者，却远比我这样的明眼人更敏锐……
Lady Dan Shu is the Luofu's — no, the Xianzhou Alliance's most knowledgeable alchemist... She may be sightless, but she has sharper senses than most...
即使是这样诡异的药方，丹枢大人也一定能搞清楚的……
I'll wager she can wrap her head around this prescription.
她休息时都会在若木亭吹风，您还是直接去问她吧……
When she's not working, she's usually enjoying the breeze over in Synwood Pavilion. Why don't you go and ask her about it?
你好，是有什么事需要我帮忙吗？
Ah, why hello there. Anything I can help you with?
Qingzu asked me to find you...
You explain what's transpired to the alchemist.
原来是神策府的公事，那我一定全力以赴啊，哈哈。药方拿来我看看。
So this is official Seat of Divine Foresight business, eh? Then I'll do everything I can to assist you, haha. Let's take a look at this prescription you mentioned.
这玩意儿如果是从别处来的，我一定会斥为胡言乱语…但毕竟是神策府的公事，那就不会那么简单了……
If this request had come from anywhere else, it would've seemed like a joke... but the Seat of Divine Foresight only deals in the serious...
这个药方我理解不了。我想其他丹士也理解不了吧。我建议你直接去问问我们的丹士长，丹枢大人。
I can't understand this prescription, and I imagine that other alchemists won't be able to make sense of it either. I recommend you go directly to the chief alchemist, Lady Dan Shu.
丹枢大人向来以思路奇诡而著称。她配出来的有些方子啊，她自己不解释，连我们都看不懂药理。
Lady Dan Shu is renowned for her unique line of reasoning. She's proposed several prescriptions that would have been incomprehensible to us if she hadn't explained the pharmacology...
但那些诡异的配方，往往都能产生极为神奇的效果。丹枢大人就是这样一位天才丹士。
...still, those same prescriptions have always been able to produce miraculous effects. Lady Dan Shu is a truly gifted alchemist.
我甚至都很难想象，她竟然是一位目不能见的天缺者……
All the more amazing given her sightlessness, wouldn't you say?
丹枢大人喜欢在若木亭休息，你去那里应该就能找到她。
Lady Dan Shu likes to pass the time over at Synwood Pavilion — I'm sure you'll run into her if you head that way.
Qingzu asked me to find you...
You explain what's transpired to the alchemist.
The Seat of Divine Foresight? Let me see the prescription.
It's a horrifying prescription... and I can't make any sense of it.
去问问丹枢大人吧，我们的丹士长。
Go and ask Lady Dan Shu. She's our chief alchemist.
她是盲眼的天缺者，却比我们都厉害。
She may be sightless, but she's more qualified than all of us.
而且，她喜欢帮助别人。经常免费为穷苦人配药。
She's no stranger to helping others, either — always prescribing medicine to those in need — and free of charge.
她一定愿意帮助神策府。
She'll certainly be willing to help the Seat of Divine Foresight.
丹枢大人现在在若木亭，去找她吧。
You can find her at Synwood Pavilion.
I've been looking forward to meeting you... {NICKNAME}.
How do you know it's me?
你的气味很明显。失去一种感官，会让其它的感觉被迫变得敏锐。
You have a very distinct scent. Losing one sense forces the other senses to become sharper.
谁会不认得你呢？我听闻长乐天有位英雄救下了持明族的「衔药龙女」。
Everyone does — you're the hero who rescued the Vidyadhara Healer Lady in Exalting Sanctum.
在下听其他丹士说了，你有药方要我鉴定？读给在下听听吧。
I heard from other alchemists you have a prescription you wish me to assess... can you read it to me?
Will you be able to remember it all?
不必担心，在下早就练出了过耳不忘的本领。
Don't worry, I've trained myself to remember everything I hear.
你为丹枢朗读了药方的内容。
You read the prescription to Dan Shu.
嗯…真是一个险怪的药方。这方子的药理在下大概懂了，是要汲取龙裔之力，使自己获得…扬升。
Hmm... A strange and dangerous prescription, but I believe I understand the pharmacology... It involves drawing upon the strength of Long's Scions to attain the power of... ascension.
不过，具体的药理还是要等在下验证一下…这可能需要点时间。
The specifics, however, will require further investigation. This will take some time...
毕竟，在下也不能真的去取「持明髓」来测试，对吧？
...I could hardly happen upon Vidyadhara bone marrow and test the prescription myself, could I?
留个联系方式吧。药理鉴定结束后，在下会联系你的。
Leave your contact details with me. When I've completed my assessment of the pharmacology, I'll get in touch with you.
（原来紫月季就是青镞要找的那位失踪的卧底。这人竟然加入了药王秘传。）
(So Mauve Moon was the agent that Qingzu lost contact with... he joined the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus.)
（去神策府和青镞说说这件事吧…也不知道这次任务算是成功还是失败。）
(I should go to the Seat of Divine Foresight and tell Qingzu... I don't know if this mission was a success or a failure.)
Would you like to learn the truth about the Arbiter?
Would you like to learn about the true nature of immortality?
Is the Reignbow Arbiter truly just?
Is the Plagues Author truly evil?
Ah! I... I want to die!
药王慈怀，赐我刀枪不入之躯、千军难敌之勇、万夫莫开之力！
O, mercy of Sanctus Medicus. Grant me a body impervious to steel, the courage of a thousand armies, a strength that ten thousand foes cannot suppress!
彼等猎狗，窜伏皆鼠辈，安能与我匹敌！还不速速引颈受戮！
You think you're a match for me, devil!? Your death is inevitable — surrender and I'll make it quick!
与这些妖人接触，难免会有危险，与他们接触时，请一定不要疏忽大意。
Danger is practically an inevitability, take care and try to stay out of harm's way.
唉…这么大的事，我也帮不上什么大忙。实在是辛苦你了，一定要注意安全啊。
*sigh* Such a serious matter — I'm sorry I can't be of much help to you. The assistance is appreciated — stay safe.
这「龙蟠虬跃」的药理实在险怪，在下需要一些时间来研究。等有了结论，在下会第一时间联系你的。
The pharmacology of this Draught of Draconic Surge is peculiar. I'll need time to run a thorough analysis. When I have a conclusive answer, I'll contact you immediately.
这就是罗浮的「建木」啊？我还是第一次见。
So this is the Luofu's Ambrosial Arbor? It's my first time seeing it.
云骑也不会特意去看「建木」啊，再说我刚来不久……
Clouds Knights don't visit the Ambrosial Arbor without a reason, plus I'm new here...
我们曜青的寿瘟祸迹是轮月亮，啧啧，感觉比罗浮的好看。
The Luofu's plaguemark is a tree, while the Yaoqing's is a moon. Ha, I think we got the better one.
…我听闻「建木」早已枯朽…怎会突然生长蔓延？
...I heard that the Ambrosial Arbor shriveled and died a long time ago... How could it suddenly spring back to life and start growing again?
是「星核」邪物作祟，别无解释，须得尽快返回十王司！吾有伤在身，行动不便，征用几位一程。只消找到星槎渡口，诸位即可自由行动。

The influence of the Stellaron... There's no time for explanations — we must return to the Ten-Lords Commission! I'm wounded — I need your assistance in getting there. Once we get to Starskiff Jetty, you can go your separate ways.
…呃，没办法，罗浮上的每个人都有帮助十王司办案的义务……
...Well, there's nothing else for it, we're duty-bound to help the Ten-Lords Commission...
呵呵，没想到简简单单几步路，横生这么多波折。
Hehe, I did not expect such a short journey to be filled with so many twists and turns.
这下我们又是十王司的人了，丹恒兄作何感想？
How does it feel, Master Dan Heng, to be a subject of the Ten-Lords Commission?
好，快人快语。我嘛，唉，大约是没法置身事外了……
A good answer, short and to the point. It would seem I've been unsuccessful in de-tangling myself of matters thus far...
咱们尽快找到星槎渡口，把这位十王司判官送走，好接着赶咱们的路。
I suggest we hasten to Starskiff Jetty and send this Judge of the Ten-Lords Commission on her way — we must continue our own journeys as soon as possible.
呃，实在抱歉…十王司征用云骑，按规矩我是必须得听……
Uh, sorry... All Cloud Knights answer to the Ten-Lords Commission. Duty calls...
又耽搁你时间了，等把你们送回去，我请你们吃饭吧。
Apologies for asking you to stick with me a bit longer. I'll treat you guys when I get you back to safety.
Let's go our separate ways now.
呃…那要不你找机会偷偷溜了，随便找个地方蹲着。我把她送走就回来找你。
Um... I guess you could slip away and find a safe spot to hide. I'll come back and get you once I've sent her on her way.
别啊，现在罗浮这么危险，放你一个人乱跑我哪儿放心呀。
Not a smart way to operate. The Luofu is more dangerous than ever — I can't let you put yourself in harm's way.
吾已对照了幽囚狱的绘影图形名册，并无匹配。
I ran your facial profile against the records in The Shackling Prison just now. Indeed, there were no matches to be found.
不必紧张。吾已对照了幽囚狱的绘影图形名册，并无匹配。
Don't be nervous. I ran your facial profile against the records in The Shackling Prison just now. Indeed, there were no matches to be found.
说实话，我是第一次见到十王司的判官…你们都负责什么呀？
You're the first Ten-Lords Commission judge I've met. What do you guys do, exactly?
管辖长生种寿数与魔阴身之事。
Our work concerns the mara-struck and the lifespans of long-life species.
噢，那确实，可能见不到是最好的……
Oh, hehe... Hopefully you'll be the last one I meet for a while then...
判官大人行动时，没有人接应吗？
So are judges all loners? You don't seem to have any backup.
十王司判官独来独往，各奉使命。不过……
Judges of the Ten-Lords Commission have always acted independently, each carrying out their duty in solitude. However...
吾有个妹妹，汝让吾想起了她。
I have a younger sister. You remind me of her.
Why are you two always so quiet?
该问的，素裳姑娘都问了。
You asked all the questions for us.
我公输梁又岂是贪生怕死之辈，工造司的安危如今全指着我一人啦。
I fear not death, for the fate of the Artisanship Commission now rests entirely on my shoulders.
不成！阿财，你自个儿逃命去吧。云骑久久不来，为今之计，也只有老夫力~挽~狂~澜~！
Not a chance! Acai, escape while you still can — there's no hope of the Cloud Knights arriving now. As darkness falleth think not what is just, to this old man entrust your hopes... you must!
Don't try to be a hero!
阿财，你、你怎么开口说起话来了？
Acai!? S—Since when were you able to speak?
Hey! Do I sound like a dog to you?
对不住，姑娘。我也寻思没给小家伙安装人声……
Oh! M—My apologies, miss. No wonder I was confused, I never installed a human speech module in the little guy... No.
嚯？怎么又来人了？学徒们都逃了，工造司只有老夫一人。你们几个，也快快逃命吧！
But what is the meaning of this? I'm the only one left here — the apprentices all fled... You should probably do the same!
你刚刚说「云骑久久不来」。本姑娘身为云骑，这不就赶来了嘛。
You just said "there's no hope of the Cloud Knights arriving." I happen to be a Cloud Knight — wouldn't you call this a timely arrival?
这里的事情就交给我来操心，你先跟咱们一块儿走吧！
Come with us for now. I'll take care of things here later.
不成！老夫身为工正，有责任留守司部。
That won't do! As a senior artisan, I can't just abandon my post.
看来得使些不得已的手段了。你是准备自己动起来，还是我让身后那个穿白大褂的小伙儿把你塞进他的白箱子里运走？
*sigh* Looks like we're gonna to have to resort to unconventional methods. Are you gonna come with us willingly, or do I have to ask the guy behind me to carry you in his white death-box?
我、我…你给我一炷香的时间考虑？
I—I... can you give me a moment to consider those options?
咦，怎么还有个没疏散的平民？
Huh? Why is there still a civilian out here?
The Creation Furnace is utterly entangled...
当心，这么大动静，工造司里的警戒装置都动起来了，要是踩上去可麻烦了。
Careful — our movement could trigger the Artisanship Commission's alarm system. That would spell trouble for us.
让阿财在前面给咱探探路吧？
Why don't we let Acai scout out the way ahead of us?
不是让你们把阿财用起来吗？怎么还招惹了警报？
Didn't I say to let Acai do the heavy-lifting? Now the alarm's going off!
云骑的小姑娘，将军怎么只派了你一个人来？
Miss Cloud Knight, why did the general send you out here all alone?
这次受灾波及太广，云骑就算有再多人也分不过来啊。
The extent of the disaster means the Cloud Knights are short on manpower...
放心吧大叔！我会保你周全的！
But don't worry! I'll keep you safe!
你不明白，我的安危倒在其次，唉……
You misunderstand, it's not my safety I'm concerned about...
再走几步都快到大门口了。谢谢你们护送，咱们就在这儿暂别吧。
A few more steps and we're at the main gate. Thank you for escorting me — we must go our separate ways.
就差几步路了，您不跟我们一起离开吗？
It's just a few steps away — you're not leaving with us?
大家各有职责在身，打从进工造司那天起，我照料司部中仪器运转，无一日懈怠，今天也不能。

Everyone has their duties and obligations. From the day I joined the Artisanship Commission, I've been taking care of the ins and outs of its operations without a day's rest. And today is no exception.
学生们退到门口，那是应该的。我却不能教他们瞧见老师傅贪生怕死。跟你们到这儿就够了，接下来我得看看，自己还能为工造司做些什么。
The apprentices fled, as they should have... but I cannot let them see their master flee from peril. This is as far as I go with you — I must see what more I can do for the Artisanship Commission.
小丫头不必再劝了，老夫惜命得很，绝不会乱来的，快走吧。
No use in trying to talk me out of it, young miss. This old man cherishes his life — he won't do anything rash. On your way, now.
公输师傅带着谛听转身背向你们，倔强地看向工造司内。
Master Gongshu turns around with his back against you alongside Diting, staring into the Artisanship Commission adamantly.
Everyone has their duties. Let's go.
你看到了吧？司里面到处长的是什么东西？！
You saw it, right? What happened to the Artisanship Commission?
是谁养的盆栽失控了吗？
Did someone overfeed their houseplant or something?
工造司有了大麻烦，哪有逃跑的道理？
How could I desert the Artisanship Commission in its time of need?
公输师傅欸！怎么你就想不开留在里面了？
Master Gongshu! How could you stay inside?
我、我这一走，毕业的事儿恐怕就没辙了。
I—I'm afraid that if I leave, I won't be able to graduate.
哎，师姐，你说如果将金人的材质替换成里头那个疯长的植物，是不是不用担心机巧部件损坏了？
Hey, Yunche... If we switched the material for the aurumatons with whatever that crazy plant's made of, would that eliminate maintenance?
好师弟，想想今天之后咱能不能有命活下去吧。
Y'know, Ziming, I say we focus on surviving today for now.
走？这可是个没见过的工程材料啊…这么走了以后哪有机会能再研究研究？
How could I leave? This is a novel engineering material... If I leave now I may never get another chance to conduct research on it.
别理我这傻子师弟。他…他不走的话，咱也不能一个人跑不是？
Don't pay attention to my silly fellow apprentice... I—If he's set on staying here, I can't exactly leave him here alone, can I?
建木重生，势必引来众多祸患。云骑军定在毗邻「建木」的丹鼎司，向那边去即可。
The rebirth of the Ambrosial Arbor was bound to bring calamity... The Cloud Knights must be at the Alchemy Commission next to the Arbor. You should head the same way.
感谢诸位一路保护。此行善业，吾会上禀十王，若有机缘，定当回报。
Thank you for ensuring my safety on this journey. I will report this good deed to the Ten Lords, and if the opportunity arises, I will return the favor.
雪衣登上了星槎，你们目送她离去。
Xueyi boards the starskiff, and you watch as she leaves.
好啦，这一路总算是又做了一件好事。
她说「云骑军在丹鼎司」，我打算找一艘船，这就归队。你们怎么说？
She mentioned the Cloud Knights were at the Alchemy Commission — I should find a ship and regroup with my unit. What about you?
The Alchemy Commission... Let's go together.
走了这一路，舍不得和我们分开了吧。那咱们走。
Aww, you just can't bear to see me go, huh? Come on then, let's go together.
So is this where we go our separate ways?
你要留在这儿？不成不成，工造司也不够安全了。这样吧，我就再辛苦一阵，护送你和罗刹先生一段路。
You want to stay here? No, no, the Artisanship Commission isn't safe enough. How about this — I'll escort you and Mr. Luocha a little further.
We are most grateful, Miss Sushang.
那东西…看样子不想让咱们过去啊。我看看，我上去吼两声，应该能让它退下吧？
...Doesn't look like it wants to let us through. Do you think if I yell at it I could scare it off?
恐怕素裳姑娘吼再凶也没办法打发它。眼下这工造司里除了阿财之外，怕是没有一个机巧能听人命令的。
...I doubt that. I think Acai is the only one here still taking orders from people.
好办，不听话，打倒就是了。
I've got one. Bring it down.
闷葫芦…我印象中你不是这么鲁莽的性子啊。咱一块儿上吧！
Y'know, you're getting less silent and more deadly by the minute! Sounds good, let's get it!
呵呵，仙舟真有趣，设计蓝图就这么露天呈放，没关系吗？
Hm, interesting practice... Do people on the Xianzhou have no problem leaving blueprints out in the open?
方便匠人们随时查阅吧。有什么关系，工造司又不会有别人进来。
It makes things easier for the craftsmen. It's not like outsiders can just walk in here.
素裳姑娘，咱们就是「外人」啊。
...Are we not outsiders here, Miss Sushang?
"Authorized personnel only. This chamber is sac..." How do you pronounce it?
Sacrosanct. It means this place is important.
罗刹先生，你知道的可真不少啊。
You sure know a lot, Mr. Luocha.
过奖过奖，这画像上的东西我便不知道是什么。
You are too kind, miss. For one, I don't recognize that thing in the painting.
哈，我知道，那是金人，仙舟的服务机巧。
Ha, that's something I do know. It's an aurumaton — they're service robots on the Xianzhou.
通缉令上的，应该就是星核猎手了。雪衣小姐，莫非…
This man on the wanted list... he's a Stellaron Hunter, right? Is that...?
哼…正是此人。若你们见到他，尽力避开便是。
Hmph... You guessed right. If you see him, don't engage.
…通往渡口的路，应该不是这条吧？
I don't think this is the way.
这后面的路应该不会有警报啦。
It should be smooth sailing from here on.
This is as far as I go...
怎么啦？你们不是还有任务在身，要继续前进吗？
Hmm? You still have more to do, no? Onward!
老夫可不能这么走了，我得找个机会解决司里的麻烦……
I can't just abandon the Commission. I must think of a way to solve all this...
太卜大人，早哇，今天的工作还顺利吗？
Good morning! Is work going well today, master diviner?
本座这阵子都忙得很，有事相求的话便直说吧？
I am extremely busy of late. If you have something to ask of me, do not delay.
你的下一句话多半是「你是怎么猜到的？」但转念又想到本座身份，所以突然闭口不言，对吧？
You were about to say something along the lines of: "How did you know I wanted to ask something?" — but then you remembered who you were talking to and decided not to bother, correct?
You really do live up to your title.
小意思，我每天起床办公前都会一口气就日常问题卜个十几卦，结果往往灵验无差。
Of course — I run a dozen hexagrams before I even get around to breakfast. The results are never far wrong.
Well, the look on her face says it all, doesn't it?
本座从不看人脸色行事。按规矩，我每天起床办公前都会一口气就日常问题卜个十几卦，结果往往灵验无差。
A face is not a reliable instrument of divination. On the contrary, I run a dozen hexagrams before I even get around to breakfast. The results are never far wrong.
在今日预卜中，我占算有什么「横生枝节的事情」，得卦象涨落在坎、乾之间。穷观阵输出了解读，判词曰：「有不速之客三人来，敬之终吉」。

Today's divinations threw up some unexpected complications — the hexagrammatic position was vacillating between the water and heaven trigrams. The Matrix of Prescience gave the following interpretation: "You will have three uninvited guests. This is ultimately auspicious."
「敬之终吉」…乖乖，穷观阵都体贴地算到这份上了，看来咱们真是缘分不浅。
"Ultimately auspicious..." Wow, sounds pretty good to me — seems like we really were destined to meet today, then.
是这样的，我瞧太卜用穷观阵推算卡芙卡的过去，我嘛，也有类似的需求……
Y'know... I see you've been using the Matrix of Prescience to divine into Kafka's past. Well, I have a similar request...
你们向符玄讲述了三月七丢失记忆的情况。
You tell Fu Xuan about March 7th's memory loss.
穷观阵已经回溯重构出了你的过去。眼前这片空间便是以你提供的记忆和物品为素材，构建出的情境。
The Matrix of Prescience has reconstructed your past. Before you is a space generated from the memories and items you've provided as raw materials.
身体素质不错。大部分人受穷观阵影响时，多半会因为过量的信息冲刷而感到晕眩。
You have a strong constitution. Most individuals feel nauseous after being presented with the dizzying excess of information provided by the Matrix.
不必担心。受穷观阵影响时，大部分人会因为过量的信息冲刷而感到晕眩。
As expected. Most individuals feel nauseous after being presented with the dizzying excess of information provided by the Matrix.
我一定是产生幻觉了，这里为什么站着两个符玄小姐？
I must be seeing things. Why are there two Fu Xuans here?
那可不是什么幻觉。其中之一是本座的投射，方便咱们随时交流。另一个符玄的出现，说明本座存在于你的这段经历中。

Your eyes are working just fine. One of the Fu Xuans is a projection of me which allows us to communicate with each other at all times. The other Fu Xuan indicates that I existed during this part of your experience.
这是我的哪段经历啊？这里似乎是行医集市……
What experience is this? It looks like the Healer's Market...
如果所料无差，应该就是咱们攻入丹鼎司的时候了。
Unless I'm mistaken, this must be the time we broke into the Alchemy Commission.
真的吗？我不信。我记得当时广场上到处都是云骑……
Really? That can't be right. I remember there were lots of Cloud Knights in the Plaza...
唔，毕竟这是穷观阵的「推演」，有失真的可能…但扰动怎会如此之大？这不合理。
Well, this is just a Matrix inference, remember? Distortions are possible... although the scale of this distortion is surprising...?
可以试着和那边的「符玄」对话一下，看看那位太卜有什么话说？
Try communicating with the Fu Xuan you see over there, we should hear what the master diviner has to say.
还好还好，没什么大问题……
这个人的坐标不是由空间站发出的……
Weren't their coordinates sent out from the space station...?
…心跳和脉搏很微弱，三月，准备做人工呼吸。
Weak heartbeat and pulse... March, you better do CPR.
这是…我们第一次遇到{NICKNAME}的时候…但这里没有{NICKNAME}……
This is... the first time we met {NICKNAME}... But {NICKNAME} isn't here...
你是谁？我的记忆中没有你。
Who are you? I don't remember you.
我是流光忆庭的「信使」。三月小姐，请不要继续回溯过往。
I am a messenger of the Garden of Recollection. Miss March, please refrain from looking back upon your past.
离开穷观阵，回到现实中去吧。过去不值得你探索，结果只会让你受到伤害。
Leave the Matrix of Prescience and return to reality. The past is not worth exploring — it will only hurt you.
该离开的是你，我是不会放手的。
You're the one who needs to leave. I'm not letting this go.
「流光忆庭」？你是{RUBY_B#浮黎}流光天君{RUBY_E#}的人？就是你在隔绝我的观察？
The Garden of Recollection? Did the {RUBY_B#Fuli}Glowswather{RUBY_E#} send you? Are you the one meddling with my observations?
你对这个女孩有何企图？不管你存着什么样的心思…这般夺走他人回忆，如叶障目，愚弄他人——
What do you want with this girl? No matter the nature of your intentions... stealing others' memories like this, deceiving them, blinding them...
I cannot allow that to happen!
唉…只能动用非常手段了。
*sigh* You leave me no choice but to resort to unconventional means.
三月小姐，接下来可能会有些不舒服。本座会介入你的记忆世界，帮助你清除阻碍。
Miss March, this might feel uncomfortable, but I'm going to enter your memory world and help you clear out any obstacles.
呃…这怎么是我的房间呀…我都还没来得及收拾，让你看笑话了……
Uh... is this my room? I didn't get a chance to tidy up. Don't judge...!
这是你的房间？房间中间的那块…冰？也是你房间原本就有的摆设吗？
This is your room? That block of ice in the centre... has it always been there?
这大概就是「异物」了…看起来，我们的探索之旅终于走到了最后一步。本座最后再确认一遍——你确定要探索自己失去的过去吗？
This must be the foreign object... Looks like our exploration has reached its final stage. I will confirm one last time — are you sure you wish to keep exploring your past?
这就是你的起点。自那开始，你展开了自己仅此一次的人生，开始经历那些独一无二的冒险。
There it is — your origin. Your life unfolds from this point on, full of unique experiences and adventure.
更早以前的事，于你而言没有任何意义。你生命的价值并不在于过去发生过的一切，而在于当下，在于未来。
What happened prior is meaningless to you. The value of your life does not lie in what happened in the past, but in the present — and the future.
展翅的鹰不曾眷恋它曾坠落的山崖，扬帆的船不曾怀恋她曾搁浅的海峡。
The eagle returns from an unsuccessful hunt, the sailor avoids the course they know to be dangerous.
而你，我的孩子，也应知晓过去虚幻如烟霞。
And you, my child, should come to learn that the past is just an illusion...
但你此刻经历的一切也必将被人以金石刻下。
...but your experiences now will be remembered forever.
该告别了…送给你一件临别赠礼。期待我们下次再会。
It is time to say goodbye... Here — a parting gift for you. I look forward to our next encounter.
嗯嗯，原来如此。想用阵法复现过去，唤醒自己的记忆？虽然原理上行得通，但我怕穷观阵未必能做到？
Mm, I see. You wish to use the Matrix to relive the past and awaken parts of your memory? Viable in principle, but whether the Matrix is truly capable of achieving this result remains to be seen.
唉…我就知道，事情哪有这么容易。
*sigh* I knew it. Things are never simple are they...
连神通广大的太卜也办不到？
Not even the omniscient master diviner can make it happen?
谁、谁说的？咳，我可没说做不到。做不到与「未必」之间，有百万光年的差距。
Wh—Who said that? I didn't say it was impossible, I said it was "viable in principle." There is a gap of a million light-years between impossibility and viability.
为了防止各位对太卜司重器有什么误会，我得详细说说它的原理——
I feel like I must explain in detail the principles behind the Divination Commission's ultimate weapon to avoid any misunderstandings...
穷观阵并不会让人回忆起任何东西，它只是收集情报，然后像推演「未来会发生什么」一样，去推演「过去发生过什么」。
The Matrix of Prescience does not allow one to remember anything. It merely collects data in order to infer "past events" — in the same way that "future events" are inferred.
就像地衡司的刑捕们办案时搜集证据，还原案发经过一样。推演过去需要的「材料」，既可以是与这段经历有关的「东西」，也可以是当事人的「记忆」。

Just as Realm-Keeping Commission officers collect forensic evidence to recreate the scene of a crime, there are materials from which we can infer the past. These may be items related to the experience, or memories of the people involved.
三月小姐与卡芙卡的情况大不相同，她不记得过去发生的事情。
Miss March's predicament is very different from Kafka's situation, because she doesn't remember what happened in her past.
本座是医学外行…但所幸读书甚多！知道失忆的情况无外乎两种：要么是记忆沉睡在识海深处，无法被唤起；要么，是被某种手段直接自大脑中抹去了……

I am no medical professional... but fortunately I'm very fond of reading! We understand that there are two types of memory loss: One where the memories remain dormant, floating around in the unconsciousness unable to be awakened, and another that involves direct erasure of memories from the brain...
因为某种原因无法唤起回忆…
大概是一开始在那块冰里被冻坏了吧。记忆们都被冻得瑟瑟发抖，就跑不出来了。
Something must have happened when I was frozen in the ice. I bet the memories were freezing and decided to hibernate.
有人抹去了三月的回忆…
谁啊，怎么忍心对我下这样的毒手啊！
Ah!? Who would do such a horrible mean thing!?
三月小姐的情况属于哪一种，用穷观阵试试便知。
Why don't we try using the Matrix of Prescience to determine which situation pertains to Miss March?
那么我们先从准备演算所需的「材料」开始。三月小姐的「记忆」这条是靠不住啦。为了能让穷观阵更精确，你得提供些与过去经历有关的东西…什么都行。

Let's begin then by preparing the requisite inference materials. Miss March, your memory is unreliable. To guarantee the Matrix's accuracy, you'll have to provide something related to your past experience... anything will do.
准备好了，就来穷观阵的阵心找我吧。
When you're ready, come and find me in the Matrix core.
太卜说，要提供与过去经历有关的东西？
The diviner said I need to provide something from my past experiences...
给什么呢？在仙舟上买的伴手礼？
Hmm, what should it be? How about a Xianzhou souvenir?
我是说——那，个，符，玄。这几个字你哪个没听懂。
I said "THAT" Fu Xuan. Is that so difficult to understand?
往者不可谏，来者犹可追。三月七，不要回望。
The past cannot be blamed, while the future can still be pursued. March 7th, do not look back.
我…我也不知道啊？语气好吓人啊……
I... I dunno. She's being a little creepy...
等一下！怎么突然就打起来了啊！我都没做好心理准备！
Whoa, whoa! What's with the sudden aggression!? I'm not ready!
别说话，集中注意力，冷静应对！你是这段经历的主人，它们斗不过你的。
Enough talk — focus and stay calm! You're the master of this experience — you cannot be beaten.
究竟是谁呢？「不应在场，但却在场」的人…
"The person present who shouldn't be..." Who could that be?
非得排除掉所有错误选项吗？你有强迫症吗？
Must we clear ALL the wrong options...?
这段经历，应该是我们初到贝洛伯格的那天吧。第二天我们就成了通缉犯…
This memory should be from the first day we arrived in Belobog. By the second day, we were wanted criminals already...
「不应在场，但却在场」的人，会是谁呢？
"The person present, who shouldn't be"... Who could it be?
呼…真不容易，现在终于只剩下一个选项了！
Phew, finally... After all that, there's just one option left!
你是故意清除了每个错误答案吗？
Did you clear every wrong option on purpose?
艾丝妲站长说，前面那个房间里存放着星核…我猜军团对它也有很大的兴趣吧。
Asta said that the Stellaron is stored in that room up ahead... and I'm guessing the Legion might also be interested in its whereabouts.
这段经历…我有头绪了！是在我们遇到{NICKNAME}之前啊。
...I know this memory! This is before we met {NICKNAME}.
那又是谁？三月，你今天怎么一直在说些奇怪的话…跟上我的脚步。
Who? March, you're being really weird today... Follow me.
终于都清除干净了…继续回溯记忆，去和符玄小姐汇合吧。
*sigh* Finally, all done... I better meet up with Fu Xuan if I wanna keep going through my memories.
丹恒，我们一起把这块冰打开…里面的人说不定还有救。
Dan Heng, let's crack open this ice block. Perhaps we can still save the girl inside.
你们小心一点，不要弄伤她……
Be careful not to harm her...
我手里有分寸。帕姆，去把急救箱拿过来。
I've got this. Pom-Pom, go and get the first aid kit.
这是…我被列车组找到时的记忆？可我自己都不记得了啊？
This must be... when the crew first found me? I don't remember a thing.
你记得很多东西，只是你自己不知道罢了。
Some memories are buried deep within you. It takes time for them to resurface.
Don't look back. Keep going forward.
Don't look back. Keep going forward.
Don't look back. Keep going forward.
大衍穷观阵开始演算了，她抽不开身。
She is busy running the Matrix of Prescience Ultima.
怎么又是你？我回忆过去关你什么事，为啥要阻挠我！
You again? What I do with my past is none of your business! Why do you have to make things difficult!?
请你相信「流光忆庭」，我所做的一切，都是为了保护你。
*sigh* Please trust the Garden of Recollection. Everything I'm doing is for your protection.
那也不能用禁锢的方式来「保护」一个人啊。
You don't "protect" people by imprisoning them.
我将会为你展示你的起点。
I'll show you the origin that you seek.
希望你不要再探索更远的事物了，相信我，请你相信我…那不会有任何好处。
I hope that you will refrain from exploring any further than this. Trust me when I say: Nothing good can come of it.
你要去哪里？本座还没教完你呢。你要是不熟悉记忆空间的相关机制就擅自到处跑，是很容易出现危险的。
Where do you think you're going? I haven't finished instructing you. Running around in the memory space without understanding its basic functions can cause permanent damage.
Today there is wine, so let us drink...
...Tomorrow comes worry, let it come tomorrow.
Don't let off now. Get ready for combat.
Are you looking for food or accommodation today?
Security is in position. Defense increased.
The Goethe Hotel is already history...
现在是桑博旅馆的时代。
Now is the age of the Sampo Hotel.
Drink some tea. It's good for what ails you.
She used to be a Galaxy Ranger.
She lost her authority as a goddess.
I know what to do, but...
做你认为对的事就好帕！
Just do what you think is right!
This Six-Phased Ice is really weird...
关于过去的东西，准备好了吧？身为无名客，你的旅程里也该有不少足以唤起回忆的纪念品？
So, have you acquired something from your past? As a Nameless, surely you must have souvenirs from your journeys that could evoke memories?
一路上带回的东西我兜里倒是有一堆，只是不知该选什么？
I've got lots! It's just, I don't know what to choose.
A ticket stub from the Express...
啊，这可是我登上列车的证明。列车长亲手递给我的车票。
Ah, proof that I boarded the Express. The conductor gave me this.
对星穹列车的记忆？应该可以。
Memories from the Astral Express? That should do the trick.
Your work permit for the space station...
这张空间站工牌上，赫然显示着三月七的个人肖像，下面备注着「三月七，Ⅰ级科员」。
March's unapologetic smile is displayed on the permit. The note below reads "March 7th, Lv. 1 Researcher".
你依稀记得所有黑塔空间站的员工，最低的行政等级是Ⅱ级。这样的工牌除了打开厕所外不知有什么作用。
You vaguely recall that researcher levels start with two. The only career path this permit opens is one that leads to the bathroom.
工作经历相关的物件。没问题。
Something related to your work. Good.
很遗憾，她没在那里工作过哪怕一天。
Actually, this won't do. She never really worked there.
啊，这是我在贝洛伯格地底下拣到的小小战利品。发着光，还蛮漂亮的。
*sigh* So shiny and pretty. I picked up this little guy in Belobog's Underworld.
你确定这东西安全无辐射吗？
Are you sure it's not radioactive?
这么漂亮，怎么会不安全？
How could something so beautiful be unsafe?
路不拾遗啊…去还给地火吧？
We can't just keep lost items... Should we return it to Wildfire?
地底下那么大一块，我只是带走一小颗唉。
They've got loads of it down there. I just chipped off a tiny piece.
我能理解少女对发光宝石的热爱……
I can understand a young girl's fondness for glittering gemstones...
这是我对仙舟的美好回忆啦！
One of my fondest memories on the Xianzhou!
我什么也没说啊。哼…我还是比较喜欢星芋啵啵。
Hmph, no comment... I happen to prefer startaro bubble tea.
只有这些吗？三月小姐能不能拿出失去记忆之前就拥有的东西。
Is that it? Miss March, are you not able to provide possessions from before you lost your memory?
等等，既然记不得，又怎么知道这件东西是不是在失去记忆前获得的？
Before I lost my memory... So, something I don't remember getting? Even then, I couldn't be sure it was from before I lost my memory, right?
我知道这句话听起来也许有些怪。但推演过去，正需要那时相关的材料，三月小姐不妨再回忆回忆？
It may be strange to you, but to infer the past, I need materials that were pertinent at that time. Could you try recalling some memories again?
失忆之前，也就是登上列车以前吗……
From before the memory loss, before the Express...
对不住啦太卜，姬子姐说，拣到我的时候我被赤条条地封在了一块冰里——就像刚出生的婴儿一样，身边没有任何东西。
I'm sorry, Master Diviner! When Himeko found me in the ice, I was stark naked — like a newborn baby. I didn't have any items with me...
你下一句一定会问，「那块冰还留着吗？」
...and before you ask, no, I don't have any of that ice lying around.
很遗憾，在我被打捞上来不久，那块冰就化得不见踪影了。
It melted away not long after I was rescued.
你不是还能凝结六相冰吗？
对呀！{NICKNAME}，你脑袋可真灵光呀。 说到我失忆前就拥有的，应该就是凝出「六相冰」的能力吧？太卜，我随手变出的这块冰，应该能符合要求吧？
Oh yeah! {NICKNAME}, you sure are a smart cookie. My Six-Phased Ice ability must date from before the memory loss. Master Diviner, any ice I create should do, right?
这样也好。我着人将东西送往穷观阵的阵基处。三月小姐，准备好了就站到阵心去。推演随时可以开始。
It should indeed, I'll have someone place the material in the base terminal of the Matrix. Miss March, please position yourself in the Matrix core — we may begin our inference whenever you are ready.
片刻之后，阵基开合，符箓生光，穷观阵已准备完毕。
Moments later, the apparatuses of the Matrix come to life with clicks and whirrs. It is time.
阵法已经准备就绪了。三月小姐，你准备好了吗？
The Matrix has cleared diagnostics. Miss March, are you ready yet?
呃，我大概应该可能已经准备好了……
Uhh, I'm pretty sure I should be, almost k—kinda ready to go...
务必请坚定信心。不是所有的回忆都适合被唤醒的。一路走来，人们也承受了许多痛苦和负担。
Please be prepared. Not all memories are suitable for reawakening. People carry with them much pain and suffering.
如果你没有做好准备，我们可以暂停推演。本座万万不希望自己好心办了坏事，反而使你受到伤害。
If you're not ready, we can pause the inference process. I would never wish for good intentions to result in harm.
没、没关系的！来都来了。是骡子是马，都得当活的医！
I—I'm okay! Let's do it! Only way to find out is to give it a go!
那么，接下来，本座会将你连接到大衍穷观阵上，而穷观阵会读取你的记忆，引导你回溯自己的过往。
Very well. I will soon connect you to the Matrix of Prescience Ultima, where the Matrix will read your memories and guide you back into your past.
如果回溯到了那个阻塞你回忆的关隘，穷观阵就会利用已经获得的信息进行推演，构建出你可能存在的过去。
If you reach a block in your memory, the Matrix will use the data gathered to derive a scenario, and construct a possible past for you.
我了解了…{NICKNAME}也会跟咱一起吗？
Got it... Oh, uh, can {NICKNAME} join me, too?
抱歉，你没办法带上{F#她}{M#他}。你是穷观阵所观测演算的中枢，{NICKNAME}的加入只会带来冗余的情报。
I'm sorry, that would be highly inadvisable. You form the nexus of the Matrix's inference — {NICKNAME} would only introduce redundant data to the system.
换句话说，在穷观阵推演所构筑的记忆宫殿里，能依靠的只有你自己。
In other words, inside the memory palace that the Matrix constructs, the only person you'll be able to count on is yourself.
没事啦，不用那么担心！我已经不是小孩子啦！
It's cool, I'll be fine! I'm not a little kid anymore!
别太担心，本座在穷观阵外有能力与你随时沟通，可以有限度地干涉回溯进程。
Don't worry. I can communicate with you from outside the Matrix and manipulate the recollection process to a certain extent.
Miss Fu Xuan? Is that you?
你找错人了，去和另一位聊聊。
Wrong Fu Xuan! Talk to the other one.
Miss Fu Xuan? Is that you?
若要解决星核灾变，首先便要厘清一个问题：问题的关键究竟为何? 我们一般认为，抓住了问题的关键，其他一切就能迎刃而解。

If we want to resolve the Stellaron crisis, we must refine the question: What is the crux of the problem? Generally, it is believed that when one seizes on the crux of a problem, the problem will split open like bamboo on the edge of a knife.
星核催生建木带来的后果将是所有人无法预料的。古人云福兮祸所伏，祸兮福所倚。天道有常，在福祸无可占卜的当下，唯有神通广大的本座才能救罗浮于水火！

Nobody could have foreseen the catalyzing effect of the Stellaron on the Ambrosial Arbor. As the ancients said, blessings bring about misfortune, and vice versa. Nature has its own algorithm, and it is precisely when fate wends betwixt blessing and misfortune that I, a master diviner of masterful proportions, am called on to save the people of the Luofu!
她这长篇大论的都在说个什么劲啊？太卜你当时说过这些话吗，我怎么不记得了？
What the heck is she talking about? Master Diviner, did you actually say that at the time? I can't remember.
看来在你的心目中，本座是个只会长篇大论，净说些废话的人。
It would appear that in Miss March's estimation, I'm somewhat of a... blabbermouth.
怎、怎么会呢！我心目中的太卜，那可是神通广大啊！嘿嘿。
N—No! Uh — I've always seen you as a... m—masterful master diviner! Hehe...
虽然这段经历已明显失真了，但构成它的素材却是取自于你的记忆，不会骗人的。也就是说，在你的潜意识中，认为本座说的那些话…和绕口令差不多。

Despite the obvious distortions in this experience, the base materials from which it is composed are taken from your actual memory — there is no falsehood here. In other words, your subconscious mind thinks that I... talk in tongue-twisters.
哈哈哈…主要是，平时听太卜的高论，确实听不太懂嘛……
Hahaha... Uh, — it's mainly just that I, uh... can't always comprehend the... lofty ideals and, uh... principles you discuss...
罢了，眼下不是置气的时候。
Forget it, now is not the time for losing one's temper.
推演的经历失真，咱们就集中注意力把「失真」的因素一个个挑出来，加以清除纠正，不然也没法进一步回溯你的过去。
If the inferred experience is distorted, we should focus on filtering out each distortion one by one — otherwise we won't be able to trace your memories back any further.
好复杂，听得我都要长脑子了…有没有更简单的解释？
Umm, this is getting a little complicated... Is there a... simpler explanation?
来，张弓搭箭，射向那个符玄。
*sigh* Draw your bow and fire an arrow at that Fu Xuan.
真是吓死了，突然就开始打架了…我看看，这里有停云小姐、杨叔、景元将军…还有{NICKNAME}……
That freaked me out — I don't like people suddenly deciding to fight me... Now, let's see who's here. Tingyun, Welt, General Jing Yuan... and also {NICKNAME}...
我不会要挨个和他们打一架吧…太卜大人倒是还好，景元将军我大概真的打不过……
I don't have to fight all of them... right? The Master Diviner was easy-peasy, but I don't think I could take General Jing Yuan...
什么叫「太卜大人倒是还好」？
令此处失真的「干涉因素」应该只有一个源头。也就是那个「此刻不应在场但却在场」的人。
Hmph... The interference factor creating the distortion here should only have one source. That is, the person present who shouldn't be.
所以，我要从这些人里挑一个出来，清除它的「干涉」？
So, I have to pick someone and clear them of "interference"?
为了防止干扰你的判断…本座暂时先撤去投影。你能听到我的声音，就代表我在看护着你。
My projection will disappear for the moment so as not to cloud your judgment... If you can hear my voice, then it means I'm watching over you.
哼哼，希望这份可靠能取代我在你心里那个著名废话表演艺术家的光辉形象～
Hmph, I hope the "best" version of me can overwrite the gloriously absurd version that lives in your subconsciousness.
三月小姐，要不要抽一发最新推出的「仙舟美人图鉴」呢？这段时间抽到限定卡「罗浮俏郎君」的概率会大大提升哦～
Roll up, roll up! Miss March, would you like to take a look at the latest edition of the Xianzhou Beauty Index? The chance of drawing a Luofu Playboy card is suuuuper high right now~
看到这么有精神的停云小姐，忽然觉得有些伤感。
Miss Tingyun... It's great to see you so happy... but I can't help feeling a little sad.
过去的事情都过去了，伤感什么！今朝有酒今朝醉，明日愁来明日愁嘛。不许伤感了～
The past is in the past! What is there to feel sad about? Live every day as if it were your last. Don't be sad~
哟！{NICKNAME}！这么巧，你也在我记忆里呀。
你平时不爱说话也就算了，这可是我的记忆，我的地盘！你好歹得给我说句话！
Hey, it's fine if you don't want to talk in real life, but this is MY memory, so it's MY rules! Come on, say something!
咱们两个印象中的{NICKNAME}倒是差不多。
Leave your memories in the past — they have no place in the present.
太卜大人听见了吗，{F#她}{M#他}怎么也突然开始说些奇怪的话……
Did you hear that, Master Diviner? Now {F#she's}{M#he's} talking weird...
小三月，做好准备，接下来的战斗会非常危险。
March, get ready. The next fight is going to be very dangerous.
清醒点，别发梦了。幻胧朝着建木的方向去了，如果不去阻止绝灭大君，必将会有一场浩劫。
Stay focused. Phantylia is headed for the Ambrosial Arbor — if we don't stop the Lord Ravager, it'll be a catastrophe.
此外…小三月，未来对我们来说才是最重要的，不是吗？
Another thing... The future is what's most important for us. Don't you agree, March?
沉湎于回忆，会麻痹你对当下的感受，也会阻止你对未来的希望。
Dwelling on memories can numb your sense of the present, and inhibit future ambitions.
符玄小姐，记忆里的人都会说这种莫名其妙的话吗？
Miss Fu Xuan, do people in memories always say weird stuff like this?
这失真的情况有些古怪……
The distortions we're experiencing are... unorthodox.
好生气啊！竟然站在这里睡着了！天底下怎么会有这种人啊！
Ugh, what's his deal? Who falls asleep standing up anyway!?
这分明就是你潜意识里对将军的偏见……
This is clearly your subconscious projecting onto the general...
我清楚记得，咱们攻入丹鼎司时，将军是不在现场的。看起来，他就是本段经历中失真干扰的源头。
Ah! I remember now! The general wasn't there when we broke into the Alchemy Commission. Looks like we've found the source of our distortion.
吓我一跳…你怎么突然醒了？
Ah!!! You scared me... Why'd you wake up so suddenly?
你不满足于自己当下的生活吗？
Are you not satisfied with your life as it is?
那又何必执着于回望过去呢？
Then why are you obsessing over the past?
嗯？这个突然出现的东西是什么？
这个我知道，这个是贝洛伯格的加热器！嗯…等一下，贝洛伯格的加热器为什么会出现在行医集市？
I know what this is! It's a Belobog heater! Umm... Wait a minute, what's a Belobog heater doing at the Healer's Market?
看来是一段经历中混进了另一段经历的某个组成部分。就像是侵入的「异物」？
Looks like part of one experience has infiltrated another. A foreign object, so to speak.
「异物」…听起来是个很糟糕的东西。该不会需要手术摘除吧？
"Foreign object"? ...That sounds like a medical issue. Will it require surgery?
那倒不必。恰恰相反，我觉得「异物」应该是穷观阵摒除干扰的征兆。它成功回溯了你的另一场经历。
No. I believe the object is a sign of the Matrix purging distortion. It has managed to trace back to another one of your experiences.
敲打敲打它，看看咱们能不能跳进那段经历。
Make contact with the object — let's see if we can jump over into that experience.
贝洛伯格…我似乎在星图档案中翻到过这个名字。
Belobog... I've seen that name somewhere in the astral charts.
仙舟的贸易航路上有许多类似的星球…可惜，反物质军团出现后，它们都失去了联系。
There are many similar star systems on the Xianzhou trade routes... Unfortunately, all of them lost contact after the appearance of the Antimatter Legion.
是啊，贝洛伯格是一个白雪皑皑的末日孤城…所以到处都是这样的加热器，不然人根本生活不下去。
Yeah, Belobog is a kind of snowy doomsday city... There are heaters like this all over the place, otherwise people wouldn't survive.
来吧太卜，本小姐带你足不出户见识见识贝洛伯格的风景。
Come on, Master Diviner — I'll give you a whirlwind tour of Belobog.
…话说，我还从没摸过加热器呢…这玩意儿烧得通红，要是把手放上去，我这细皮嫩肉怕不是会变得金黄酥脆……
...Uhh, is touching a heater a good idea? This thing is red-hot — what if my hand turns extra crispy...
没事啦，这是记忆空间。只要你在现实中没被它烫伤过，那在记忆中也自然不会为它所伤……
It's okay, this is a memory space. If something hasn't injured you in reality, then it cannot injure you in memory...
我在现实中也没挨过景元的打啊……
Well, I was never beaten up by Jing Yuan in reality, either...
诶诶诶你别拽我手…烫烫烫烫烫烫！
Hey! Don't pull on my hand, I — ow, ow, ow, hot, hot, hot!
我的妈呀，可烫死我了！说好的现实中没发生过的事就不会烫到我呢！
What the actual — that thing was flaming hot! You said things that never happened to me in reality couldn't happen here!
本座说你不会被烫伤，又没说你不会被烫到。只要你能理解「烫」，记忆就会自行补足你的感受。
I said that if something hasn't injured you in reality, then it cannot injure you in memory..... I didn't say anything about the sensation of injury.
这就是贝洛伯格吗？这地方一点儿也不冷啊？
So this is Belobog? I was expecting it to be cold.
好冷…唉？太卜你没感觉到吗，我忍不住打哆嗦了。
It's freezing... Huh? Master Diviner, aren't you cold? I can't stop shivering.
多半是因为本座从没去过真正的苦寒之地。得了，你就自个体会自己经历中的寒冷吧。
Hmm, most likely a result of me never having experienced true cold. I'm afraid you'll have to do the shivering by yourself.
罗浮那段过去，本座和你一同亲历，也许能帮上忙。但到了贝洛伯格，就只能靠你自己来分辨出「干扰源头」，让「异物」现身了。

On the Luofu, you and I have shared experiences, and so I was able to provide more active assistance... but in Belobog, you'll have to rely on your own judgment to ascertain the source of distortion and get the foreign object to appear.
别担心，本姑娘已经完全明白这一切了。
对了，三月小姐，还有一件事我得问个明白…你是否有可能经历过什么巨大的痛苦？
Oh, Miss March, I have one more thing to ask... Have you ever experienced great suffering?
嗯？应该没有吧？为什么突然问这个？
Huh? I don't think so. Why are you suddenly asking me that?
有时候人为了逃避痛苦，会刻意忘却某些极端的记忆……
Sometimes people forget extreme memories to protect themselves from suffering...
不知道你注意到没有，在关于罗浮的记忆中，你遇到的每个人都在明里暗里地劝你「不要继续回忆」。
Perhaps you didn't notice, but in your memories of the Luofu, everyone you met was either hinting or explicitly stating that you should stop trying to remember.
这更像是你的潜意识在对自己说的话。当然也不排除，你的记忆遭到过外力的干涉，谁人在你大脑留下了暗示，避免你回想起什么事。

I believe this is most likely your subconscious communicating with you directly... though of course, we cannot rule out that external forces may have interfered with your memory. In the latter case, it is possible that someone decided to leave warnings in your subconscious to prevent you from recalling the truth.
我倒是不觉得自己有那么重要啦…还有人会这么大费周章封印我的记忆……
Am I really that important to someone...? I don't think there's anyone who'd go to all the trouble of locking up my memories...
但你什么都不记得了，不是吗？
...And yet, memories are precisely what you seek, no?
所以本座要在这里再向你确认一次——你是否还要继续探索自己的记忆？
I say this to say one thing — are you certain you wish to continue exploring your memories?
既然你说，可能有外力干扰了我的记忆…那不就更应该探索了嘛！总不能让封印我记忆的坏人逍遥法外吧！走吧，本姑娘带你逛逛这歌德宾馆！
You said external forces might be messing with my head, right? That just makes me more curious. Hmph, no one gets away with locking up MY memories! Let's go. I'll show you the way to Goethe Hotel!
我对这件事也越来越有兴趣了。
Hehe, very well. I must admit that I'm finding the whole matter more interesting by the minute.
好久不见啊，三月姐，欢迎来到桑博宾馆！
Miss March, long time no see! Welcome to the Sampo Hotel!
桑…桑博宾馆？这不是歌德宾馆吗？
...Th—The Sampo Hotel? This is Goethe Hotel!
以前是歌德宾馆，现在是桑博宾馆了啊！老歌德年老体衰，无力经营这么大的产业，就把它托付给了自己最信任的年轻人——桑博！
WAS Goethe Hotel, hehe — now it's the Sampo Hotel! In the autumn of his years, Old Goethe got too old to run this place — so he handed it down to his most trusted young confidant — Sampo Koski!
你可别误会啊，这里面绝不存在任何巧取豪夺，完全是两位绅士之间梦想的承继。
And before you get the wrong idea, there was ZERO trickery involved — this was a cherished agreement between gentlemen.
你看，我和老歌德都选择了面向未来，而不是死守过去的回忆。你也该这么做的，三月姐。
You see, Old Goethe and I chose to face the future instead of clinging to memories of the past... you should do the same, March.
这个蓝头发的家伙开口就透出坑蒙拐骗的气息。
This blue-haired fellow has an air of deceit about him every time he opens his mouth.
哈哈，你真是慧眼识英才。
Haha, you don't need a jade abacus to get a feel for Sampo...
三月小姐，欢迎光临桑博宾馆，我是这里的保安杰帕德。
Miss March 7th, welcome to the Sampo Hotel. I'm Gepard, the security here.
这宾馆保安怎么这么全副武装…贝洛伯格的治安很差吗？
Why would hotel security need to be armed to the teeth? Is there great lawlessness in Belobog?
不不不…杰帕德是银鬃铁卫的戍卫官，就类似罗浮上的云骑队长吧。我也不知道他怎么就成了宾馆的保安了。
No, no, no... Gepard is a captain of the Silvermane Guards, just like how the Luofu has its own Cloud Knights captains. I have no idea what he's doing running security at a hotel like this though.
不意外。人心总是追求合理，拼拼凑凑便把不相干的东西组成了一出看起来有意义的幻戏故事，取名人生。
It isn't so surprising. In attempting to pursue the rational, we piece together the unrelated. The result is a seemingly meaningful fantasy — a fantasy called life.
请问三月小姐有什么事吗？没事的话，请不要打扰保安执勤。
Excuse me, Miss March. Do you need anything? If there's nothing else, please let me get back to my duty.
另外，请允许我提醒您——过去的已经过去了，回想过去毫无意义，您能把握的只有未来。
Also, allow me to remind you — you cannot change the past. The future is all that's left for you.
怎么说呢，竟然还有点像他会说的话……
Hmm, that actually does feels like something he would say...
欢迎来到桑博宾馆，三月小姐。
Welcome to the Sampo Hotel, Miss March.
桑博宾馆曾名为歌德宾馆。后来老歌德年老体衰，桑博利用巧取豪夺的方式霸占了这里，并更名为桑博宾馆。
The Sampo Hotel used to be called the Goethe Hotel. After Old Goethe retired, Sampo managed to trick his way into acquiring this place, and renamed it after himself.
好在宾馆优质的服务并未受到影响，依然是行政区最好的宾馆。
Luckily, the high-quality service of the hotel remains undiminished. It's still the best place to stay in the Administrative District.
顺便一提，桑博宾馆的广告词是：「不应回望过去，只应憧憬未来。」我觉得这条广告词也很适合三月小姐。
I should mention — the Sampo Hotel's new slogan is: "Don't think about the past, strive for your future." Sounds like the kind of ad copy that Miss March would like.
这个女孩子说的话很可信啊。
那是我潜意识里编的吧……
That's just the work of my subconscious mind...
这歌德宾馆的茶点可是一绝啊…尤其是这鳞渊春…据说有一年，一位筑城者用存护的力量让雪原上开出了山茶花，而这就是用它泡的茶。

The tea service at Goethe Hotel is first-class... especially this Whale-Tide Spring... They say that an Architect once used the Preservation's power to make camellias bloom on the snow plains, and that this tea is made from those leaves.
"Whale-Tide Spring" — isn't that a variety of Xianzhou tea?
这大概是我脑补出来的…主要是我也不记得在贝洛伯格喝过什么有名的好茶了。
My brain must be filling in the blanks... Probably because I never drank any famous tea in Belobog.
Bitter tea is good for your health!
可是苦的就是苦的啊！骗自己吃苦有好处，这不过是一种自我催眠罢了！
...Bitter is bitter! If it tastes like that, it doesn't really matter how good for you it is.
贝洛伯格有一句古话，叫做「吃得苦中苦，方为人上人。」
There's an old saying in Belobog: "Blessed is he who can eat the bitterest of the bitter."
这些经历扭曲得越来越离谱了……
These experiences are becoming increasingly distorted...
看来我的潜意识没什么编剧天赋啊。
Seems like my subconscious mind has no talent for screenwriting.
I'm not sure your conscious mind does either.
真是一杯好茶啊…可惜不是每个人都能体会到它的美好。
What an excellent cup of tea! It's a pity not everyone can appreciate its beauty...
三月小姐，「遗忘」这种恩赐恰如这杯苦茶一样，入口苦涩，却有轻松的余味，可惜品尝它的人总是无法体会它的美好。
...much like the gift of forgetting, Miss March. It's bitter at first, but with a gentle aftertaste.
说实话，这个布洛妮娅和我印象中的布洛妮娅…差得很远。
Hmm, this Bronya is... really different from the Bronya I remember.
扭曲这段经历的力量…很靠近了。
The force that's distorting this experience... is nearby.
Do you have to make it sound all scary...?
安心吧，只要还在穷观阵里，本座就会保障你的安全。
Rest easy, I can guarantee your safety while you're inside the Matrix of Prescience.
这不是三月七吗？好久不见了啊…你们离开贝洛伯格后，一切还顺利吗？
March? Long time no see... How's everything been going since you left Belobog?
列车没有回头，列车驶向了星空的另一端…因为这是它的宿命。就像在时间里前进的我们一样，无法倒回过去。
The Express never looked back, it headed straight for the other end of the galaxy... because that was its fate. The same goes for us — we can't return to the past.
三月七，不要回忆过去，那对你无益有害。请你相信我。
March, don't dwell on the past, it won't do you any good. Trust me.
…怎么你记忆中的每个人都在阻止你回忆…事情变得越来越奇怪了……
...These warnings are ongoing... The situation is becoming stranger by the minute.
唉…我也觉得奇怪，但走一步算一步吧！
It sure is... *sigh* Let's press on and see what awaits.
我们初到贝洛伯格的第二天，银鬃铁卫对咱们几个穷追不舍，然后才遇到了希儿。
I remember our second day in Belobog was mostly us being hunted down by Silvermane Guards... We didn't meet Seele until way later.
所以希儿不应该出现在这段记忆中。她就是这段记忆中的「干涉源头」。
Which means... Seele shouldn't be appearing in this memory. She's the source of the interference.
In which case, we must eliminate her.
Seems like you don't trust me.
我…我没有不相信你的意思…只是……
I—It's not that I don't trust you... It's just...
不必回答，不必歉疚。那只是试图阻碍你的一个幻影。
An answer is not required. She is merely a mirage hindering your progress.
这是什么？我瞧瞧…「黑塔空间站自研」？
What's this? Let me see... "Developed on Herta Space Station"?
看来这就是「异物」了。接下来回溯的经历，应该是我第一次遇见{NICKNAME}的「黑塔」空间站。
Seems like this must be the foreign object. The next experience should be meeting {NICKNAME} for the first time — Herta Space Station.
只可惜到最后本座也没看到雪国的绝景，而是在一个域外客栈的大堂里待了这么久…看来这地方让你印象很深。
...Shame, we didn't get to see the stunning vistas of the snow plains. This hotel lobby must have left a deep impression on you.
在宾馆里美美地睡了一觉，醒来发现自己变成了通缉犯…印象确实是很深。
Well, waking up after a great sleep in a comfy bed to find out you're a wanted criminal... tends to leave a deep impression.
现在出发去下一站…呃不，上一站了，咱们走吧！
Let's move on to the next stop... Uh, I mean— the last stop. Let's go!
只要你准备好了就可以出发。
太好了，这次只需要摸一台显示器，而不是什么滚烫的加热器……
Phew, I'll take a monitor over a red-hot heater any day...
三月，清醒一点，我们要抓紧些了。
March, wake up — we have to hurry.
Huh? Are we going? What about Miss Fu Xuan?
符玄？那是谁？没时间做白日梦了，现在空间站很危险。
Fu Xuan? Who's that? There's no time for daydreaming — the space station is in crisis.
太卜大人？听得见吗？糟了…一定出了什么麻烦！
Master Diviner? Can you hear me? Darn it... Something must have gone wrong!
怎么办…符玄小姐不在，突然觉得有点瘆得慌……
What am I gonna do... Why did Miss Fu Xuan pick the scariest time to vanish...
本座现在越来越确信，你的记忆遭到干涉了…只是不知道这干涉究竟从何而来……
I'm getting more and more evidence that your memories have suffered interference... but I don't know where from...
没办法了…看来这次真的只能靠我自己了。
*sigh* Looks like I'll have to do it by myself this time.
三月，你不记得自己的经历了吗？你手边那柄长弓便是证据。
March, have you forgotten your past experiences? Surely your bow there is enough evidence for you.
你曾是一位巡海游侠，你与同伴为了抵抗虫群残余而鏖战，你在爱墨瑞得救援行将被黑洞吞没的世界，你粉碎过原始博士精心罗织的阴谋。

You were once a Galaxy Ranger engaged in a bitter fighting battle with the remnants of the Swarm. You rescued a planet in the Emerald system that was about to be swallowed by a black hole, smashing through Dr. Primitive's carefully-laid plans.
在翁瓦克的战斗中，你深受重创。为了保护你，义侠之首将你封入寒冰中，待你自行复原。
You were severely wounded during the battle for Vonwacq. The leader of the Rangers encased you in ice to protect you, and waited for you to recover.
可那柄弓…不是姬子姐给我打造的吗？你的谎言太拙劣啦。
My bow... But Himeko made that for me! You're lying...
三月七，就算回望，你也只能找到混沌多变的过去。
March, if you insist on looking back, you'll find nothing but confusion and chaos.
你是宝钻世界亚德丽芬唯一的遗孑，最后的公主。那颗星星在纳努克攀升的瞬间被焚烧成了黑曜的地狱。
You were the last princess and also the last survivor of the diamond world, Adlivun. The planet was burned to an obsidian hellscape the moment Nanook ascended.
你的父母怀着绝望将襁褓中的你送入寒冰的航船，又怀着希望目睹你没入浩瀚星海的惊涛巨浪中。
Filled with despair, your parents swaddled you in warm clothing and placed you into an ice ship. As they watched you sink into the turbulent waves of the starscape, they felt a newfound hope.
你被籍籍无名之辈们拣到，抚养。你是唯一的救主，重生的许诺。
You were found and raised by strangers. You are the only savior — the promise of rebirth.
这…这不是我在小说里给自己编的经历吗？
Wait... I wrote that! That's a story I made up about my past!
可恶，居然把我的想象都给翻了出来。
Great, forget memories, now everyone gets to see my imagination...
三月七，星穹列车无名客的一员。
March 7th, one of the Nameless aboard the Astral Express.
在被姬子拣到后，自封印其身体的六相冰中得到解放。她丧失了自己对过去的回忆。
After being picked up by Himeko, she was freed from the Six-Phased Ice in which she was encased. She lost all memory of the past...
因为她本就没有过去可言。她曾是一位星神，星神无有过去，当彼等飞升的那刻起，其存在的过去与未来就被命途所淹没。
...because she had no past to speak of. She was an Aeon, and Aeons have no past... From the moment they ascend, the past and future of their existence becomes inundated by their Path.
三月七所犯的过错，便是丢失了属于神明的权柄。
March 7th's mistake was the loss of the authority of the Aeons.
这么离谱的事情…我连想都没想过。不过，你说的很有可能喔！
Could it be...? That never even occured to me... but I guess it's not impossible!
小三月，不要继续回忆了。
March, leave your memories in the past.
有什么必要去回想那些过去的事呢？你已将它们遗忘，而这正意味着它们对你并不重要。
Why do you insist on returning to them? If they were so important to you, wouldn't you have remembered them?
无名客登上列车的那一刻，就意味着重获新生，我们脚下的将是一条永不回头的道路。
The moment a Nameless boards the Express, a new life begins. We set out on a new road, never to return.
去探索吧，去开拓吧，不要用回头来玷污无名客的荣誉。
Explore, trailblaze, but do not dwell on the past... you'll tarnish the reputation of the Nameless.
{NICKNAME}也绝不会在这里咄咄逼人，劝我放弃对我而言重要的事情。
{NICKNAME} would never try and force me to give up something so important to me.
我不管你是谁，现在立刻消失，让出路来，不要再冒充我的朋友了。
I don't care who you are — disappear right now and let me pass. And don't you ever pretend to be one of my friends again.
Thanks for your help, Miss Fu Xuan...
哼，我答应过要看顾你。何况我受惠于「{RUBY_B#博识尊}遍智天君{RUBY_E#}」，绝不能容忍有人设置障碍，阻挡他人探寻真相。
Hmph, I promised I'd watch over you. Besides, I've been blessed by the {RUBY_B#Nous}Wisdomwalker{RUBY_E#} — I will never tolerate efforts to impede the truth.
刚才那个人说自己是流光忆庭的「信使」。流光忆庭…他们为什么要阻挠我？
That person said she was a messenger. The Garden of Recollection... Why would they come after me?
忆庭中各怀异志的人可不少，仅凭一句自报家门没法确认其中原委。
Many members of the Garden have their own agenda — it's impossible to confirm anything from a cursory introduction.
这里就是星穹列车了吧？看起来，你快要回溯到自己所经历的源头了。到那时候，大衍穷观阵就可以开始演算了。
This is the Astral Express, no? It would seem that you're nearing the source. The Matrix of Prescience Ultima should start making further calculations soon.
你还记得自己是在什么地方被发现的吗？
Do you remember where it was exactly that you were discovered?
他们当时…把封住我的冰块就放在了如今我住的客厢里。
They... set the ice down in one of the passenger cars — it ended up being my room.
那就穿过这节列车，找到你的房间吧。
