Then let's pass through this carriage and find your room.
怎么回事…怎么又回到起点了？
What's going on... How come we're back at the start?
是那个「信使」，她又在干扰你的行动了。
It's the messenger. She's interfering with your movements again.
我当然希望能收留她…或者说，仅凭最基本的道德判断也能得出结论——既然我们发现了她，就必须照顾好她。
Of course I hope we can take her in... Or rather, I can offer a conclusion based on the most basic of moral judgments: Now that we've found her, we have to look after her.
但是，我也很担心这样的选择会不会给星穹列车带来麻烦……
But naturally, I'm concerned about whether or not this places the Astral Express in any danger...
星穹列车是欢迎每个人的帕！不用担心，你只要做出当下最正确的选择就好，帕姆会为此后一切问题负责的。
The Astral Express welcomes everyone! Don't worry — do what you feel is right, and Pom-Pom will take care of the rest.
有你这句话…我大概能安心一些了。只希望她能在列车上住得顺心，不要被我们这些怪人吓到……
Thanks... I feel more at ease now. I just hope she'll have a good time on the Express and not feel too alienated from the rest of us...
不用担心帕！帕姆都说了，星穹列车是欢迎每个人的帕！
Stop worrying so much! Pom-Pom will say it again: The Astral Express welcomes everyone!
封住那个孩子的像是冰，却没有冰的物理性质…真是怪了。
It seemed like that kid was trapped in ice, but the substance doesn't share the same physical properties... How bizarre.
这些晶体在不同条件下，呈现出了至少六种晶相结构…「六相之冰」，银河真是一道深不可测的谜题。
The crystals show at least six structures under differing conditions... "Six-Phased Ice." The galaxy really is an enigma.
他们都同意收留你。我是个被放逐之人，你看起来也不像有可以归去的地方…但至少在这里，我们都不会是孤身一人了。
Everyone agreed to take you in... I'm an exile, and by the looks of things, you might not have a home to go back to, either... But here on the Express, nobody is alone.
姬子小姐说你的身体并无大碍，但也不知道你什么时候才会醒来……
Himeko said that your vitals were all stable... she just didn't know when you'd regain consciousness...
干扰你的人始终在阻挠你前进……
The interferer has been thwarting your progress this whole time...
也许「后退」才能找到你的过去。
Maybe the only way for you to find your past is to take a step back.
「不要回头，继续向前走。」我完全明白了，只要和干扰者反着来，就能找到出路。真不愧是我。
"Don't look back. Keep going forward..." I get it! If I do the exact opposite — I'll find my way out! You're a true genius, March.
在你打开这扇门的同时，穷观阵也会开始对你的过去进行演算。
As soon as you open this door, the Matrix of Prescience will start calculating your past.
准备好了的话，就开始吧。
既然你那么想知道自己的过往…那跟我来吧。
If you are truly set on learning about your past... then come with me.
好难受…符玄小姐，怎么突然就中断了推演？
Ugh... Miss Fu Xuan, why did the simulation just cut off like that?
I'm fine... Just a little light-headed is all...
我甚至还没搞清楚发生了什么，就被弹出来了……
I don't know. Before I could figure out what was going on, it spat me out...
穷观阵在刚才的那一瞬间停转了。
...And the Matrix of Prescience stopped at precisely the same moment!
三月，自打你触摸那块「冰」之后，我就再也观测不到你了。究竟发生了什么？
March, I lost sight of you once you touched that block of ice. What happened?
三月七和符玄向你讲述了刚才发生的一切。你也向她们讲述了关于「信使」的事。
March and Fu Xuan try their best to recount everything that just happened. You also tell them about the Messenger.
所以…那位神秘人的确是流光天君的使者。
So... That mysterious girl was really a messenger of the Glowswather?
所以…是浮黎？和我的过去有关的星神是「记忆」的浮黎？
Glowswather... you mean Fuli the Remembrance? Are they the Aeon connected to my past?
不，还不能这么断言…只能说，很可能是一位星神封印了你的记忆，但祂未必是流光天君。
No, it's too early to draw such a conclusion... All I can say is that it was very likely an Aeon that sealed away your memories... but not necessarily Fuli.
也许「信使」所说的「保护」，就是在暗示流光天君并非封印你记忆的罪魁祸首。祂插手只是为了保护你不被封印的记忆所伤害……
When the messenger spoke of "protection," perhaps she meant the following: The Glowswather wasn't the one who sealed away your memories. THEY are interfering to shield you from these very memories.
所以到头来还是一无所获。
Looks like we came away empty-handed...
那岂不是什么都不知道？
Sounds like we're still none the wiser...
我觉得倒也不至于如此悲观啦…至少我知道了流光忆庭这条线索？
It's not so bad... At least I know it has to do with the Garden of Recollection, right?
看来想寻回记忆，已经超出大衍穷观阵的能力范围了。
It seems like retrieving memories is beyond the operational spectrum of the Matrix of Prescience Ultima.
没关系啦！太卜大人肯伸出援手，我感激不尽啦！
That's alright! You've helped me so much already, Master Diviner. I owe you a big one.
如果没别的事的话，我得赶紧组织人力检修一番…可恶，若是穷观阵有所损伤，我会心疼死的。
Mm... If you'll excuse me, I must organize an inspection of the Matrix... Ugh, fingers crossed there's no damage done.
那么咱们就先走一步了。{NICKNAME}，赶快闪人吧，我怕太卜大人查出什么损坏，要向列车寄天价维修账单哩。
We'll leave you to it then! {NICKNAME}, run — if we broke something there'll be a huge bill to pay!
我刚才一摸口袋，突然发现口袋里多了这么个东西。
Huh, I just found this in my pocket... How did it get there?
这应该是一个光锥吧？在穷观阵里面，那个奇怪的声音不是说，要送给我一个礼物吗…看起来就是这个了吧？
Looks like a Light Cone. Didn't that weird voice in the Matrix say something about a parting gift? I guess this is it.
这里面封存的是我的「起点」…不知怎么，我总觉得他们没有恶意……
My "origin," huh... I don't know why, but the voice sounded friendly to me.
是吧…所以这份礼物，我也就欣然笑纳啦！
Well, guess I'll keep it then!
唔…毕竟你比较谨慎嘛。但无论如何，礼物没有不收的道理，不然多没礼貌啊！
*sigh* You're too cautious. A gift is a gift — it's rude not to take it!
虽然在穷观阵里真是吃尽了苦头，但拿到了这个小礼物，就觉得还不算坏。
Jumping through all those hoops in the Matrix was pretty exhausting, but this little gift makes me feel like it was worth it.
改天还要去好好拜谢一下符玄小姐，真是多亏了她的帮助呀。
I'll have to find time to thank Miss Fu Xuan properly. I really owe her one.
话说，你不觉得这光锥里面的我特别可爱吗？
Hey, the "me" in the Light Cone looks kinda cute, don't you think?
嘿嘿，因为本姑娘就是实诚。
Hee-hee, just telling it like I see it.
你原来是口是心非那一型的啊……
Not as cute as the real you.
那是自然的。光锥哪能和活蹦乱跳的本人相比呢？
Obviously! How could "Light Cone me" be cuter than actual me?
得赶紧组织人力检修一番…可恶，若是穷观阵有所损伤，我会心疼死的。
I must organize an inspection of the Matrix... Ugh, fingers crossed there's no damage done.
欢迎光临「梦境贩售店」，星穹列车的开拓客！
Trailblazers from the Astral Express — Welcome to Dreamscape Sales Store!
Is that usually how you welcome customers?
请见谅，对于您这样身份尊贵的客人，我难以找到更妥帖的称呼。
Please excuse me. I struggle to think of an appropriate way of addressing such esteemed guests as yourselves.
Long time no see, ol' big eye.
Long time no see, diamond in the rough.
您一定是来体验那枚梦泡的，我已做好准备。请注意，虽然鄙店的商品均已通过「<unbreak>027</unbreak>号-欠损费勒斯」和「<unbreak>076</unbreak>号-实在界荒原」两项安全协议检验……

You must be here to experience those dream bubbles. I've already made the necessary preparations. Be careful, though — we did pass the safety inspections stipulated by "Article <unbreak>027</unbreak>-Damaged Faris" and "Article <unbreak>076</unbreak>-Real Wasteland..."
但这场梦…它是一段尚未经过修饰和打磨的新鲜记忆，生猛又刺激。
...However, this dreamscape will feature unfiltered and unpolished fresh memories. It will make for a very vivid experience.
资深玩家将这种梦称为「刺身」，我不确定这点是否合您胃口。如有任何不适，请立即离开梦境，并寻求专业的医疗帮助。

Veteran gamers call this type of dream a "thrill-dream" — I don't know if you're into that kind of thing? If you feel any discomfort, please leave the dreamscape immediately and seek professional medical help.
——很幸运，我正是一位优秀的医生，虽然是精神科的，哈哈！让我们开始吧。请您闭上眼睛，将额头抵在梦泡上。
...Luckily, I just so happen to be an excellent doctor, albeit a psychiatric one, haha! Let us begin. Please close your eyes, and rest your forehead on the dream bubble.
对了，那位优雅的女士临行前还有一句赠言——
Oh yes, I nearly forgot — that elegant girl mentioned something before she left—
「这段记忆的性质有些特殊，为了其他顾客的梦境体验，还请不要向任何人透露它的结局。」
"The nature of this memory is special. Don't ruin the dreamscape experience for anyone else by spoiling the ending."
I'm not so sure about this...
如果您需要时间准备，鄙店愿意无限期等待。
If you need time to prepare, we can humbly wait as long as you need.
准备好体验黑天鹅女士的美梦了吗？——请您闭上眼睛，将额头抵在梦泡上。
Are you ready to experience Miss Black Swan's dreamscape? Please close your eyes, and rest your forehead on the dream bubble.
如果您需要时间准备，鄙店愿意无限期等待。
If you need time to prepare, we can humbly wait as long as you need.
黑天鹅女士的梦泡到此为止了。请问您对这次体验还满意吗？
That's the end of Miss Black Swan's dream bubble. Are you satisfied with your experience?
我也认为这段美梦相当有趣。您在其中收获了快乐，黑天鹅女士也一定会感到欣慰吧。
I also found this dream suitably fascinating. You've gained joy from it. And Miss Black Swan surely also feels gratified, yes?
如果下次有缘再见，我会向她转达您的好评。
If we meet again, I will pass your esteemed praise on to her.
我理解。梦境本就是十人十色，注定不会适合所有人。
I understand. The dreamscape is inherently different for everyone, so inevitably there are some people who it won't suit.
但我想，黑天鹅女士留下这枚梦泡定有她的用意。不过，这就不是我一介局外人能妄断的了。
But, I also think Miss Black Swan must have her own reason for holding on to this dream bubble. And as an outsider, that is not my place to judge.
的确，那些谜题对于您这样经验丰富的开拓者而言，是有些简单了。
Sure enough, those puzzles are going to be easy for a Trailblazer with the vast experience that you have.
不过恐怕那位花火小姐又会辩称：「我们是『假面愚者』，又不是『假面天才』！」…哈哈。
But I'm afraid that Miss Sparkle would argue: "We're Masked Fools, not Masked Geniuses!" ...haha.
我注意到，这段梦里似乎出现了您熟悉的人。需要再次提醒，梦只是梦，在匹诺康尼，梦可以被加工，也可以被篡改。
I noticed that the people in your dream were familiar to you. It's worth repeating that dreams are just dreams, and in Penacony dreams can be processed or even tampered with.
梦中之事不可尽信，更何况是他人的梦境。如有任何想要确认的信息…还是在清醒的现实中完成吧。祝您做个好梦。
Things in our dreams cannot be trusted, let alone in someone else's dreamscape. If there's any information that you'd like to confirm... please do so by the cold hard light of reality. Sweet dreams.
这可真是一场特别的美梦。您注意到它嵌套式的结构了吗？在梦境中参与出演一场舞台剧，就像梦中梦一样诡异又迷人。
What a special dream this has been. Did you notice its nested structure? Being part of a play inside the dreamscape is as weird and captivating as being in a dream within a dream.
能再和我讲讲黑天鹅的梦泡吗？
Can tell me more about Black Swan's dream bubble?
（自从三月拜了彦卿和云璃两位师父学剑，列车里都听不见她的声音了……）
(Ever since March started learning swordplay from Yanqing and Yunli, her voice has been absent on the Express...)
（也不知她学得怎么样了，怎么连个人影都见不着？）
(I wonder how well she's progressing. Where has she been these days?)
你没来的时候，我已经逛了…找了一圈，三月七不在这儿。
I was looking around before you got here... I already looked everywhere, but March 7th is nowhere to be found.
So, no need to keep looking for March 7th?
不用找了，就当她是逃课成功好了。
Nope, let's just assume she successfully skipped class.
算了吧，就当她是逃课成功好了。
Forget it, let's just assume she successfully skipped class.
三月七练剑算是勤快，这些日子也没怎么休息，确实应该给她放一天假的。
Actually, she's been quite diligent in her swordplay practice and hasn't taken many breaks lately. I think she deserves a day off.
再说了，我过去练剑的时候比她更会逃课——有了兴致，我能练个三天三夜；没有兴致，师兄师姐谁也找不着我。

Besides, I used to skip classes even more than her back when I was still learning. If I was in the mood, I could train for three days straight, but if I wasn't in the mood, none of my seniors could find me.
所以，我也算是能理解她吧。
So, I can understand where she's coming from.
那我…是不是可以回去了？
So then... can I go back?
不用回去，我叫你来就绝不会亏待你。
No need. I asked for you to come, so I won't send you away empty-handed.
看来三月这都是跟师父学的。
Looks like she learned it from her master.
既然来都来了，我请你去吃点好吃的吧。
Since you're here, let me treat you to some tasty food.
今天，我对你更有兴趣一些。
I'm more interested in you today.
Let me be clear, I'm not learning swordplay from you.
听灵砂姐姐说金人巷里有好吃的，走吧走吧。
Lingsha told me there's tasty food in Aurum Alley, let's go there.
好嘞，两位里边请，想吃点什么呢？
Alright, come on in. What would you like?
老板，这菜单从上到下每一样各点一份吧。
Well, we'll have one of everything on the menu.
Hmm? Do you think it'll be enough?
她是担心咱们俩吃不下…
She's worried we won't be able to finish it all...
Don't worry, there are two of us.
我一天也就五十块零花钱。
I don't have much money on me right now.
Don't worry, I've got enough money with me.
…那、那这样吧，我先去做几道菜你们先吃着，不够再加。
Well... then I'll start making a few dishes, and if you need more, just let me know.
Are you sure we don't need to look for March?
不用，我考虑过了，今天就放一天假吧。
No, I've thought about it. She deserves a day off.
Yeah... Ahem, I mean, not too much, actually.
爷爷说了，在外结交朋友，花钱绝不能手软。所以你的胃口怎么样？
Grandpa said to never be stingy when it comes to making friends. So, how big is your appetite?
我是小鸟胃，吃不了多少。
Then we can bring the leftovers to Grandpa.
My stomach is a bottomless pit!
Then eat to your heart's content!
Did you just say you're interested in me?
准确来说，我对你的剑很感兴趣。
Well, to be more precise, I'm interested in your sword.
我听彦卿聊起过你，他说你的实力不可小觑，武器形制也很别具一格。
Yanqing mentioned you before. He said that you're not to be underestimated and that your weapon has a unique shape.
所以，我一直对你的剑很感兴趣：重量分布是否均匀，用什么材质铸成，嵌入何种机巧，又以什么样的剑法运使……
So, I've always been curious about your sword — how the weight is distributed, what material it's made of, whether it contains any special ingenia, and what kind of sword techniques you use...
可是我用的不是剑，是球棒。
It's not a sword. It's a baseball bat.
Just the opposite — this is fascinating!
Alright, alright, it's not anything special.
你将球棒，你最信赖的伙伴——也许仅次于三月七、丹恒、瓦尔特、姬子和帕姆的伙伴，放在云璃面前。
You place your beloved bat, your most trusted companion — perhaps second only to the likes of March 7th, Dan Heng, Welt, Himeko, and Pom-Pom — before Yunli's gaze.
So, it really is a baseball bat.
爷爷说了，剑无定型。你这球棒倒也算是一种「剑」。不过爷爷还说了，物肖主人形。你知道吗？你的武器会反映出你的习惯和性格。

Grandpa said that a sword doesn't have to be constrained by its shape, so in a sense, your bat is a sword too. He also said that a weapon mimics its master, so your bat actually reflects your habits and nature, you know?
让我猜猜，你是一个…不遵循常规的人，喜欢即兴发挥，面对真正的强敌也能从容应对，我可有说错？
Let me guess, you're someone who... doesn't follow the rules, enjoys improvising, and can handle yourself well against tough foes. Am I right?
你在我身后装摄像头了吗？
Have you been secretly filming me?
准吧？我猜你平时还总说「规则就是用来打破的」之类的怪话。
Amazing, right? And I bet you always say something silly like "Rules are made to be broken."
你说错了，我非常遵守规则。
Oh, you're mistaken. I always follow the rules.
是吗？我一向是不会看走眼的。
Oh, really? But I never guess wrong.
我曾经还见过不少道貌岸然的剑主，说起谎来就像是吃饭喝水一般自然。不过剑总是诚实的——剑会告诉我，它的主人不过是「附庸于神兵利器」的宵小之辈。

I've come across so many sword wielders who acted all righteous and moral but were really just liars. Their swords always told the truth though. They told me that their wielders were just a bunch of frauds who relied on their divine weapons for everything.
迄今为止，我猎获数百柄剑皆是如此。这些剑会被逐一熔断，绝无例外！
I've hunted down hundreds of swords like this so far, and every single one of them has been melted down!
你会抢走别人的剑并熔断它？
Wait, you take people's swords by force and melt them down?
我只对那些失格之人发起挑战，而熔炼是我保护那些剑器的方式。
Yes, but only for those who cross the line. Melting their swords is my way of protecting those weapons.
就没有误判、错判的时候吗？
But what if you make a mistake?
剑比语言更为真诚。比起判断一百句话，判断一柄剑更容易，所以我很少犯错。
Swords are more honest than words. It's much easier to judge a sword than to judge someone's words, so I rarely make mistakes.
说回来，光是观察剑还是不够的——爷爷说过，言语能欺瞒人，表情能欺瞒人，在生死相搏中，剑招从不欺骗人…演武仪典近在眼前，你会上台的对吧？对吧？

But just looking at a sword is not enough. Grandpa always says, words and expressions can be deceiving, but in a fight to the death, a sword's movements never lie... The Wardance is just around the corner. You'll be participating, right?
云璃小姐，对善战之人来说，演武仪典确实是个一展身手，博取名声的好机会。
Miss Yunli, for talented swordmasters like you, the Wardance is a perfect opportunity to show off your skills and make a name for yourself.
不过像{NICKNAME}这样早已为仙舟立下赫赫功劳的老朋友，怕是没必要在演武台上出风头。
But for people like {NICKNAME} who have already made significant contributions to the Xianzhou, they maybe don't need to prove themselves on the Wardance stage.
两位真是贵人多忘事。自我介绍一下，小女子夕葵，是驭空司舵的秘书，之一。
Ah, I supposed busy people have short memories. Please let me introduce myself. I'm Xikui, one of the secretaries serving the Helm Master Yukong.
这位是驭空大人的秘书。
感谢{NICKNAME}介绍，小女子夕葵在司辰宫担任司舵秘书。
Thank you for your introduction, {NICKNAME}. I'm Xikui, and I work in the Palace of Astrum as the secretary for the Helm Master.
唐突打断二位实在抱歉。只是刚巧听两位谈起演武仪典，{NICKNAME}又是老熟人了，我才过来打个招呼。
I apologize for interrupting your conversation. I happened to hear you discussing the Wardance, and since {NICKNAME} is an old acquaintance, I thought I'd come and say hello.
Are you hosting any guests, Miss Xikui?
演武仪典召开，罗浮上来了不少异邦外域的客人。像我身边这位，是来自遥远星辰卡勒瓦拉的客人，帕沃尔先生。
Yes, with the Wardance approaching, many guests from afar are pouring in. Mr. Paavo here is one of them. He's from the distant planet Kalevala.
帕沃尔先生的故乡才受邀加入泛银河贸易体系不久，这一次他带着使团前来仙舟做客，不仅为了生意，也是为了归还属于仙舟的东西。
Mr. Paavo's planet recently joined the Pan-Cosmic Trade System. He brought his delegation here this time not only for business but also to return something that belongs to the Xianzhou.
夕葵小姐，说是「归还」，不如说「送回」更恰当。虽然它属于仙舟，但咱们毕竟千里迢迢，费了不少周折才把礼物送到。

Miss Xikui, the word "gift" is perhaps more fitting than "return." While it did once belong to the Xianzhou, we faced many tribulations to be able to deliver it here, so it should be considered a gift.
抱歉抱歉，是我的措辞不当。帕沃尔先生的使团送回了一柄流落异乡多年的仙舟宝剑。
I apologize for my poor choice of words. Mr. Paavo's delegation brought a legendary Xianzhou sword that had been lost for centuries.
怀炎将军打算在司辰宫亲自致谢，将宝剑作为罗浮演武仪典胜者的奖品赠出。我和帕沃尔先生正打算前往那儿。
General Huaiyan plans to personally thank them at the Palace of Astrum and present the sword as a prize to the champion of the Wardance. Mr. Paavo and I were actually on our way there.
听两位兴致勃勃地聊着演武仪典，不知道你们有没有兴趣一同顺道去司辰宫看看热闹？
Since you two were talking so enthusiastically about the Wardance, maybe you'd be interested in joining us at Palace of Astrum?
两位好啊。来罗浮仙舟一趟虽然不容易，但这儿的光景确实和故乡大不一样，真是不虚此行。
Nice to meet you both. The journey to the Xianzhou Luofu wasn't an easy one, but the scenery here is worth it. It's completely different from my homeland.
等司辰宫的赠剑手续完成，我会在这条街道挑选一处清静的地方，栽下幼苗，届时我的任务也就完成了。
Once the formalities at the Palace of Astrum are finished, I'll find a quiet spot on this street and plant a seedling, and then my mission will be complete.
英雄之剑物归原主，可喜可贺，可喜可贺！
This sword of heroes will finally be returned to its rightful owners! I couldn't be happier.
你对鄙人的家乡感兴趣？呵呵，那敢情好，欢迎阁下有空来咱们那儿做客。
Oh, you're interested in my home planet? That's great! Your Excellency is welcome to visit us at any time.
虽然贸易航线刚通，从庇尔波因特出发，大概需要两百个系统时的跃迁才能抵达。不过咱们那儿真的很不错！
Even though the trade route just opened, it still might take around two hundred system hours to get there from Pier Point, but our planet is really great!
就是平日里冷了些，饮食单调了些，房子也没庇尔波因特那么高。但是不打紧！咱们那儿发现了储量巨大的超钛矿藏，要不了多久就会繁荣起来的！

Sure, it's a bit cold, and the food is a bit repetitive, and our houses aren't as fancy as those on Pier Point, but that doesn't matter! We've discovered massive supernium deposits, and we're on the path to prosperity!
喔，你说「米卡•奇瓦沙」啊！那可是把不得了的剑。它在我的故乡有着崇高的地位，曾经帮助神话英雄斩妖除魔。
Oh, you mean the Miekka Kivessä! It's an incredible sword. That weapon helped the legendary heroes of my homeland slay demons and is highly revered.
同时它也是选拔君主的剑，据说卡勒瓦拉的先民国王们都曾得到这把宝剑的回应，因而拥有了称王的资格。
It also has the power to choose monarchs. All the ancient kings of Kalevala received a sign from the sword, showing they were worthy to rule the land.
按照传统，历任国王会将剑刺入石碑，只有受剑认可的英雄才能拔出它，继任王位。
According to tradition, each monarch would plunge the sword into a stone, and only a hero recognized by the sword could pull it out and ascend to the throne next.
这是什么生物识别技术？
Is it some sort of biometric technology?
这把宝剑还能选贤任能？
That sword can actually appoint worthy monarchs?
这都是过去的传说，现在谁也没见过。
Well, those are just legends from the past. No one today has witnessed it firsthand.
Why don't you keep the sword for yourselves?
一来嘛，时代变了，议会成立，「拔剑成王」的神话早就是个笑话了；二来，<color=#dbc291ff>拔出这柄剑，以及辨认出它仙舟来历的，并不是卡勒瓦拉人，而是一位天外来客。</color>

Well, times have changed, and now that we have a council in place, the idea of a sword crowning a king has become a joke. Besides, <color=#dbc291ff>it wasn't a native of Kalevala who last pulled out the sword and recognized its connection to the Xianzhou ship — it was a visitor from afar.</color>
虽然对卡勒瓦拉而言它是件颇有历史价值的古物，但毕竟它不属于这个世界。
While the sword holds great historical significance for Kalevala, it doesn't truly belong to our world.
关于要不要把剑送回，议会里的老东西们吵了一架，却难得有了一致的意见：让「米卡•奇瓦沙」回到它该去的地方。
The old timers on council had a heated debate about whether to return the sword. They eventually unanimously agreed to let the Miekka Kivessä return to where it truly belongs.
没有比这更好的安排了！
I'm going to witness its return, too.
好极了，能有这么多人见证宝剑归还，真是荣幸。
Wonderful! It's an honor to have so many people witness the sword's homecoming.
好极了，有这么多人见证宝剑归还，真是荣幸。
Wonderful! It's an honor to have so many people witness the sword's homecoming.
Let's head to the Palace of Astrum together, {NICKNAME}?
I'm not interested in the sword, to be honest.
可是我很感兴趣，毕竟那可是演武仪典的奖品！
But I am! It's the prize for the Wardance, after all!
虽然我不懂那些真真假假的传说故事，但品鉴真正的宝剑，只需一眼我就能明白。
I might not know all the stories and legends, but I know a legendary sword when I see one.
I'd love to take a look at that sword too.
对吧对吧，还真得感谢三月七逃课，咱俩才有机会能凑上这场热闹。
I know, right? Thanks to March 7th skipping class, we get to join in on the fun.
爷爷平日总会叫上我一起赏剑。今天这番场合却没向我提过一个字。真是奇怪。
Grandpa always asks me to go look at swords with him, but he hasn't said anything about this one. It's really weird.
不过既然有人邀请，那是最好不过了。{NICKNAME}，走吧，我们一起去瞧瞧。
But now that we're invited, let's go and check it out, {NICKNAME}.
再过一会儿，怀炎将军就会在司辰宫中举行赠剑仪式。{NICKNAME}不去瞧瞧吗？
General Huaiyan will hold the sword-gifting ceremony at the Palace of Astrum soon. Are you interested, {NICKNAME}?
你来了，走吧，一起去赠剑仪式！
There you are! Come on, let's go to the ceremony together!
I've got something else going on.
在仪式开始前，请允许我感谢骑士银枝。感谢他让我们得知宝剑的来历，也感谢他一路护送，令我等不辱使命，平安抵达。

Before the ceremony officially commences, I want to express my gratitude to the Knight Argenti. Thank you for enlightening us about the sword's origin and for escorting it here safely so that we may complete this ceremony.
我，帕沃尔•卡拉萨加，谨代表卡勒瓦拉使团，将宝剑「米卡•奇瓦沙」交还仙舟联盟，它本来自仙舟，也应当归于故乡。
On behalf of the Kalevalan Delegation, I, Paavo Kalastaja, am here to return the legendary Miekka Kivessä to the Xianzhou Alliance, its rightful homeland.
感谢卡勒瓦拉的还剑义举，也感谢纯美骑士的侠肝义胆，怀炎在此借罗浮宝地，正式奉迎宝剑归乡。

I'm truly grateful for Kalevala's noble act of returning the sword and for the Knight of Beauty's chivalry. Now, as we gather here on the Xianzhou Luofu, I officially welcome the sword back to its homeland.
「米卡•奇瓦沙」，是个不错的名字，想必与它所经历的一切有关。
Miekka Kivessä. It's a fitting name for a sword with such a legendary past.
但我依旧还记得这把剑自出炉之日起所镌刻的字铭，孤云。它出自朱明仙舟焰轮铸炼宫的匠人「含光」之手。
I still remember the name engraved on this sword the day it was forged, Guyun. It was forged by Hanguang, a craftsman from the Zhuming's Flamewheel Forge.
虽然神锋蒙尘、遍布裂纹，但此剑筋骨正如仙舟云骑，历战不折。只需觅工造司良工修缮打磨，便能令它重焕旧日神采。

Although its blade is worn and cracked, its essence remains as resilient as the Xianzhou Cloud Knights. All it needs is some repairs and polishing by the skilled craftsmen of the Artisanship Commission to regain its former glory.
老朽决定将这柄孤云托付给罗浮工造司修复，作为本次罗浮演武仪典守擂胜者的奖品。它将被用于斩杀孽物、卫蔽家园，如此便不负卡勒瓦拉使团迢迢还剑之情。

I've decided to entrust this sword, Guyun, to the Luofu Artisanship Commission for restoration. Furthermore, it will serve as the prize for the champion of the Luofu Wardance. This sword will be wielded against abominations, to protect our homeland, and live up to the mission of the Kalevalan delegation that returned it from so far away.
感谢将军，卡勒瓦拉不胜荣幸。
Thank you, General. It is an honor for Kalevala.
请这位骑士和使团成员一同，前往工造司，在那儿——
Now, esteemed Knight and delegation members, please head to the Artisanship Commission, where —
No! This sword was forged by Hanguang...
云璃！这位客人将你父亲的遗作带了回来，还不快快致谢！
Yunli! These esteemed guests have brought back your father's work. Where are your manners!?
没想到这把剑竟然出自令尊，能将它物归原主，真是——
I didn't realize this sword was actually forged by your father. Returning it to its rightful owner is —
爷爷，现在就把那柄魔剑给我，我要熔了那人留下的祸根！
Grandpa! Give me that cursed sword right now! I'll melt away the remnants of that man's curse once and for all!
云璃，不得无礼！快向远道而来的客人道歉！
Don't be rude, Yunli! Apologize to our esteemed guests from afar!
但是对不起归对不起，我还是会亲手熔断…这柄魔剑！我绝不会让它落在任何人手里！
I'm sorry for making a scene, but I have to melt down this cursed sword! I won't let it fall into anyone else's hands!
就是考虑到这样的情况才瞒着她。本不欲节外生枝，却反倒弄巧成拙，冥冥中莫非真有天意？
This is exactly why I didn't want Yunli to know about this. I didn't want to create trouble, but trouble found its way here anyway. Perhaps it really is divine intervention?
{NICKNAME}, could you please keep an eye on Yunli for me?
交给我吧，不会让她惹事的。
Sure thing. I'll make sure she doesn't get into any trouble.
That is a tall order, but I'm counting on you.
将军的家务事，让我去不好吧？
General, is it really my place to get involved in your family matters?
哪有什么不好的，麻烦你了。
Don't worry about it. I need your help on this.
抱歉，让各位见笑了，我们继续。
I apologize for the unfortunate interruption. Let us move on with the ceremony.
在怀炎的请求下，你为了追上云璃而暂时离开了司辰宫。
At the fervent plea of Huaiyan, you temporarily depart from the Palace of Astrum to pursue Yunli.
（不出意外的话，云璃就在这附近吧……）
(Unless I'm mistaken, Yunli should be around here somewhere...)
Stop watching me, and say something!
哎哟哟，要掉小珍珠了吗？
你想要哭的话，我可以帮你。
If you want, I can make you cry, too.
你不会是爷爷派来找我的吧？
Did Grandpa send you to look for me?
Oh, so now you're a mind reader?
其实我是关心你才来的。
Actually, I'm here because I care about you.
先说好，我会守在这里，趁守卫不备把魔剑拦下来，接着在所有人反应过来之前就把它给熔了！你拦不住我的，没人能拦住我。

Just so you know, I'm here just waiting for the perfect moment to snatch that sword. And once I have it, I'll melt it down before anyone can react! Don't even think about stopping me. No one can stop me.
你要不解释清楚，没人会帮你。
No one can help you if you don't explain what's going on.
…你是爷爷派来的，他可不希望你来帮我。
...Grandpa sent you here. Surely he doesn't want you to help me.
你觉得我会允许你继续闯祸？
You think I'm just going to let you cause more trouble?
…你确实有些身手，但是我不希望你这个时候来阻止我。
...You do have some skill, but now is not a good time to try to stop me.
那是一柄「魔剑」，你听说过「魔剑」吗？
Have you ever heard of cursed swords? That sword is one.
So it's a sword that's been cursed?
从字面上来看，这么说也没错。
I guess that's what it means literally.
传说中失去资格的圣剑？
So it's like a sacred sword that's been corrupted?
看来你听说过不少传说故事，但我说的「魔剑」并不是那样的。
You've clearly heard a lot of folk tales, but that's not the kind of "cursed sword" I'm talking about.
所谓魔剑——即便从未受训剑术之人，只要握住剑柄，便有高深奥妙的剑技在脑海中闪现；即便是手无缚鸡之力的弱者，也能以惊人的力量和肉眼难及的速度挥剑。
A cursed sword lets anyone, even a complete novice, wield it with insane skill. Just by holding the hilt, even the weakest rookie can brandish it with incredible speed and strength.
三月七学剑也许能一天就毕业。
With something like that, March 7th could graduate in just one day.
那么，在哪能买到这种东西呢？
So, where can I buy one?
我不是在和你开玩笑，我要说的也不是什么荒诞不经的奇闻……
I'm not joking around, and I'm not making up some crazy story...
持有魔剑的人虽然能在剑技上一蹴而就，如同饱经苦练的高手一般，但这一切都有代价。
While a cursed sword grants instant abilities to its wielder, it comes at a cost.
就像是不断往铸炉中添加燃料一般，随着每次挥剑出击，持剑人渐渐会被掌中之剑汲取血髓，日日不竭，油尽灯枯。
It's like continuously adding fuel to a forge. With each swing, the sword drains the wielder's blood and essence. Day by day, the fuel will run out, leaving nothing but an empty husk.
用不了多久，就不再是由人役使剑，而是人成了一具被剑驱遣的行尸走肉，脑袋里充塞着种种嗜血好杀的念头。
Soon enough, it will no longer be a person wielding a sword but a mindless killing machine consumed by bloodlust and murderous thoughts.
这情况听起来十分耳熟…
不知你有没有听说过一种名为「岁阳」的精怪？这东西酷爱汲取人类的情绪与记忆，热衷操控血肉之躯。
I wonder if you've ever heard of a creature called a "heliobus"? It loves to feed on human emotions and memories, and excels at manipulating its hosts.
就像是被岁阳占据那样？
So, it's like being possessed by a heliobus?
你听说过岁阳？那样倒好，解释起来也不用多费口舌了。
Oh, so you're familiar with heliobi? That makes this much easier to explain.
所谓「魔剑」的真相就是如此，有痴于铸剑的匠人，将岁阳铸进了金铁之中，渴望让武器成为有灵之物。
There was a lunatic swordsmith who infused metal blades with heliobi, as he was obsessed with turning weapons into living things, and this is how cursed swords were made.
So, Guyun is one of those cursed swords?
所以你父亲是将岁阳铸进剑中？
So, your father sealed a heliobus inside that sword?
我知道在「赠剑仪式」上我做得不对。可我仔细思考过了，要是我不闯祸，要不了多久，那把魔剑就该闯祸了——所以还是让我来闯祸吧！

I know I shouldn't have caused a scene at the Sword-Gifting Ceremony, but I've thought this through. If I don't make a fuss now, that cursed sword will cause a whole lot more trouble. So, it's better if it's me causing the trouble.
…对了，他们不是计划把剑送去工造司修缮吗？怎么还没人出来…你有什么头绪吗？
...By the way, aren't they supposed to be taking the sword to the Artisanship Commission for repairs? Why haven't they come out yet... Any ideas?
也许司辰宫不止有一个前门…
Maybe there are other ways out of the Palace of Astrum...
看来在这里是蹲不到了，我得直接去工造司。
Looks like they're not going to show up here. I'll just head straight to the Artisanship Commission.
不管爷爷是出于什么原因选中了那柄剑。我都不能让它落入别人的手里。
It doesn't matter why Grandpa chose that sword, I won't let it fall into anyone else's hands.
我会像我过去做过的那样，一柄一柄地找到那人铸造的剑，将它们一一折断，尽数熔毁！
I'll track down every single sword he forged and melt them down one after another, just like I've been doing all these years!
{NICKNAME}，事出紧急，我们先就此别过了。
（听她刚才的话，似乎准备潜入工造司带走那把剑？）
(Is she planning to sneak into the Artisanship Commission and steal that sword?)
(Maybe I should keep an eye on her...)
（工造司这么大，她会去哪儿呢？）
(The Artisanship Commission is so big. Where could she be?)
刚才有个小姑娘气势汹汹地向我问路。她说她是工造司的，你认识吗？
Just a while ago, a girl came up to me, all fierce and demanding directions. She said she's a member of the Artisanship Commission. Do you know her?
我不认识啊！既然是工造司的人，又怎么会不认得这儿的路呢？
No idea who she is! If she really works here, how can she not know her way around?
我认识，是朱明仙舟工造司的。
I know her. She's from the Xianzhou Zhuming's Artisanship Commission.
哦——这就不奇怪了，这就不奇怪了。
Oh, I see. That explains it then.
那怎么就不奇怪了？很奇怪好吧！
Explains what? It explains nothing at all!
你说的姑娘是不是提着大剑？
Was she carrying a massive sword?
身高没一丁点儿，手里的家伙事倒还挺吓人！
Yeah, she wasn't big at all, but that weapon of hers was pretty intimidating!
她气势汹汹就往工造司里冲，我也不敢多问啊。
She was in a hurry, heading straight for the Artisanship Commission, and I didn't want to ask too many questions.
「我是工造司的，你们这里存放贵重物的地方在哪？」我腿一软就给她指了去公输师傅金人仓库的路。

She said something like, "I'm a member of the Artisanship Commission. Where do you keep your precious stuff?" I got scared and pointed her toward Master Gongshu's warehouse where he stores his aurumatons.
等等，你怎么还给她指路了，万一她是来打劫的呢？
Wait, why did you give her directions? What if she's planning to steal something?
说重点，她人往哪儿去了？
Let's cut to the chase. Where did she go?
还能去哪？都说了，她要往存放金人的仓库去了，那里的金人都挺贵重的。
Where else? Like I said, she was headed straight for the warehouse, where all the valuable aurumatons are.
那地方可全是公输师傅的宝贝金人，等着瞧吧，她得不了好。
Yeah, that place is filled with Master Gongshu's precious aurumatons. I bet they'll give her a hard time.
那里的机巧守卫严密得很，希望小姑娘人没事。
The security there is tight. I hope that little girl is okay.
你怎么赶来了，我一个人闯祸就好，不想连累你。
What are you doing here? Look, if I get into trouble, it's my problem. I don't want to drag you into it.
现在是说这个的时候吗？
Is this really the time to talk about that?
我答应了你爷爷要看住你。
I promised your grandpa that I'd keep an eye on you.
那好，我们先砸了这些铁罐子，有话一会再说！
Fine, let's smash these metal cans first, then we can talk!
终于，全都消停了，多谢你帮忙解围。
That was the last of them. Thank you for helping me out.
虽然这防备周密…但这除了金人还是金人，存着刀剑的武库又在哪里呢……
This place is heavily guarded, but... there's nothing but aurumatons. Where is the arsenal...?
看起来为我指路的匠人也不知道武库在哪里，就这么翻找下去，也没有任何效率，说不定我还会被爷爷先带走……
Seems like not even those craftsmen know where the arsenal is... At this rate, we won't find anything, and Grandpa might take me away before I can do anything...
…看来你也不是单纯来帮忙解围，你是来阻止我的，对吧？
...You're not really here to help me. You're here to stop me, right?
我当然要阻止，看不得你闯祸。
Of course I'm here to stop you. I can't just stand there and watch you get into trouble.
你好归好，能不能阻止我就得看你的本事了。
But if you want to stop me, you'll have to prove yourself.
这魔剑可不止是你一人的问题。
You know, this cursed sword isn't just your problem.
…是啊，爷爷他老人家一言既出，不仅会在外来使团面前失信，对罗浮这边也不好交代。
...No, it's not. Grandpa made a promise to the delegation, and going back on his word would tarnish his reputation and make things difficult for the Luofu.
不过我想，若将魔剑长留在此，也是对罗浮不好交代。权衡之下，不如将魔剑熔了，让我一人来承担。
But leaving that cursed sword here will also make things difficult for the Luofu. So all things considered, the best outcome is for me to melt that sword down and take all the blame.
…你肯定心里在想，云璃这姑娘又冲动又蛮不讲理，对吧？
...You probably think I'm being impulsive and unreasonable, right?
我只是感觉你对魔剑过于执着…
Well, I just feel like you're too obsessed with cursed swords...
有吗？我表现得很执着吗？…好吧，我确实是这样。
Oh, really? Do I come across that way?... Well, I guess I can't deny it.
现在你有一个讲完谜语的机会。
Now you have a chance to explain yourself.
看来，你遇到过不少只把话说一半的人。
It seems like you've met a lot of people who don't tell you the whole story.
我感觉你还有什么难言之隐？
Looks like this is a sensitive topic?
你很敏锐，你说那是难言之隐也没有错……
You're sharp. Yeah, you could say it's a sensitive topic...
对啊，你竟然还是有自知之明。
So you are self-aware after all.
我、我也不是一直这样啊，要不是那魔剑……
H—Hey! I'm not always like this! It's all because of that cursed sword...
不妨坐下来，跟我好好讲讲…
Why don't you just tell me everything...?
{NICKNAME}，我欠你一个解释…不过，这儿不是说话的地方，咱们得换个去处。我得提前声明，我可没有消气，这…这只能算是中场休息。

Look, {NICKNAME}, I owe you an explanation... but this isn't the best place to talk. We need to find somewhere else. Let me be clear though, I'm still pretty riled up. This... this is just a temporary break.
记得我向你解释过，今天赠剑仪式上被送出的孤云，正是一柄被铸入岁阳的魔剑。而铸造它的匠人含光，是我的父亲。
I already told you about Guyun, the sword that was returned during the ceremony. It's a cursed sword with a heliobus inside. And Hanguang, the swordsmith who forged it... is my father.
除了爷爷，我很少向外人提起「含光」这个名字，就像你猜测的那样——我或许一直在逃避着再去谈论他，可只要我仍在猎取魔剑，我就没法避而不谈……

I rarely mention his name to anyone other than Grandpa. Maybe, like you said, I've been avoiding having to talk about him. But as long as my mission to hunt down cursed swords continues, it's impossible to avoid the topic forever...
不知为何，面对你，我好像能敞开心扉……
For some reason, I feel like I can open up to you...
关于含光的许多事情我已经记不清了，只记得当时焰轮铸炼宫往来不绝，异邦旅人踏破门槛，只求一剑，他们争相吹捧着含光为应星之后的运斤大匠。

Honestly, I don't remember much about him. All I know is that the Flamewheel Forge used to be a bustling place, with people from all over coming to get one of his swords. They called him the greatest master craftsman since Yingxing.
我虽然听不清他们详细交谈了什么，却仍记得含光锻出旷世神兵，求剑的异邦旅人则浮现出笑容——我曾以为匠人是给人带来幸福的职业。

I didn't catch all the details, but I do remember seeing him forge those amazing swords while the visitors watched with smiles on their faces. I used to believe that craftsmen brought happiness to others.
「自焰轮铸炼宫中所出的剑器蜚声星海，锋芒难当，无往不胜。得先生剑器者，纵使是荒野匹夫，也能削铁如泥，无往不利。」

"The swords crafted by the Flamewheel Forge are famed across the stars. They possess exceptional sharpness and invincibility. With these legendary weapons, even ordinary people can become skilled warriors, capable of overcoming the most formidable opponents."
含光贪心铸剑匠人的浮名，不停试探着禁忌的边缘，锻造出数百柄不应存世的魔剑，那些欲望扭曲的求剑人更是如蚁附膻，往来不绝。

But then, he became obsessed with becoming a famed swordsmith and started crossing all sorts of lines. He forged cursed swords that should never exist, and all those people who desired those twisted swords started flooding into the palace.
然而爷爷说过，好剑之人，必伤于剑。
However, just like Grandpa said, those who excel with the sword will eventually suffer by it.
异邦旅人如同泥沙俱下，求剑而未得之人，得剑而未尝所愿之人，亦或是单纯想巧取豪夺之人…在含光亲手铸造的混沌中，一柄剑锋刺向了他。

The palace was overrun with visitors from afar. Some left empty-handed, others got swords that didn't fulfill their desires, and some even resorted to stealing. And in the midst of all the chaos my father created, he ended up being stabbed by one of the swords he forged.
这一切是那么猝不及防，就在一瞬间，所有声音都像被滤去一样，只有筋骨碎裂、鲜血泵出的声音被无限放大——
It was so sudden and unexpected. Everything went silent for a moment. All I could hear was the sound of bones breaking and blood pouring out...
我一步都迈不出去。直到母亲将我从劈砍的魔剑前推开，我才能趔趔趄趄地跑起来。
I was frozen in place, unable to move. It was only when my mother pushed me away from the deadly swing of the cursed sword that I managed to escape.
再接下来的记忆已经很模糊了，我只记得心跳声、急促的喘气声，我听见焰轮铸炼宫的匠人不断大喊着「云璃快跑」，还有无数的惨叫声。

I don't remember much after that, except for the pounding of my heart and the sound of my own gasps of breath. I could hear the smiths in the Flamewheel Forge shouting, "Run away, Yunli!" and the screams of agony.
我的眼泪怎么也抹不净，什么也看不清，我越喘越急，再后来我摔倒在一片血泊之中……
My tears wouldn't stop, and I couldn't see anything. I kept gasping for air until I collapsed in a pool of blood...
…若不是怀炎将军及时赶到，我今天也许没法在这里同你对话了。
...If General Huaiyan hadn't arrived in time, I probably wouldn't be here talking to you now.
在那之后，怀炎将军收养了我，我俩以爷孙相称。但对我而言，他胜过那个造孽的父亲百倍。爷爷不仅教了我铸艺，还教会了我剑术。
After that, General Huaiyan took me in and treated me like his own granddaughter. To me, he is a hundred times better than my sinful father. He taught me forging and swordsmanship.
含光自食其果，但他留下的遗患却不能放任。按图谱所记，含光历年铸造的岁阳魔剑共计一千三百零八十二柄，其中形制特殊的计有一百八十二柄。

Hanguang paid for his sins, but his troubled legacy must not go unchecked. According to the records, he forged a total of <unbreak>1,382</unbreak> heliobus-cursed swords, and <unbreak>182</unbreak> of them had unique designs.
从入焰轮铸炼宫受训开始，我便立誓要猎尽魔剑。立誓至今，我已经猎取了有三百一十二柄。而孤云就是这第三百一十三柄。
When I joined the Flamewheel Forge for training, I made a vow to hunt down all those cursed swords. So far, I've found <unbreak>312</unbreak> of them, and Guyun will be my <unbreak>313</unbreak>th.
它会像其他魔剑一样——岁阳将被彻底分离，剑身化为铁水被铸进「熔铁剑骸」之中。
Like all the other cursed swords... I'll separate it from the heliobus, then I'll melt it down and make it part of the "Blade of Forged Remnants."
话已经说完了，虽然有些对不住爷爷…我还是得熔了这把剑。
I've said my piece now. Even though it'll be tough for Grandpa... I still have to melt down the sword.
不过，使团一直称它英雄之剑…
But the delegation calls it the "Sword of Heroes"...
那些来向含光求剑的异邦人，没有一个不打着光明正大的旗号。
Those travelers who came seeking Hanguang's swords all came in the name of justice and honor.
那些大英雄大豪杰里，多的是杀人盈野的刽子手。只因他们是历史的胜利者，便得到了英雄的美称。
Most of those so-called "great heroes" were heartless killers. They are only called heroes because they won.
那些被我回收毁去的魔剑，其中也有不少有着光鲜响亮的名头。宝剑与屠刀往往是对同一种东西的不同称呼罢了。
Many of the cursed swords I've destroyed had honorable and grand names too. A legendary sword and a butcher's knife are often just different ways of describing the same thing.
我觉得你最好和怀炎将军聊聊。
I think you should talk to General Huaiyan about it.
你是说…爷爷知道魔剑一事，却仍然将它选作奖品，也就说明了它没有问题？
So, you're saying... even though Grandpa knew it was a cursed sword, he still chose it to be a prize because he thought it wouldn't cause any trouble?
不对，怎么想都是爷爷有问题，你还记得吗？关于「赠剑仪式」，他是一点都没有告诉我，他肯定有什么瞒着我。
No, no matter how I think about it, something is definitely off. Grandpa didn't tell me anything about the ceremony. He must be hiding something.
再说我们俩今天都吵成那样了，要我现在回去找他聊聊？不行，至少今天不行。明天的话，我考虑考虑……
Besides, after our argument today, you want me to go back and talk to him now? No way, at least not today. Maybe tomorrow...
不知怎么的，和你聊完之后就像让脑袋淬火降温一般，现在我冷静了不少。
Somehow, after talking to you, I feel like I've cooled off a bit.
这样吧，明天我会找个时间和爷爷开诚布公地聊一聊。在他说出理由前，我暂时不会对孤云出手。
Well, I'll have an honest conversation with Grandpa tomorrow, and I won't take any action against Guyun until he gives me his reasons.
Don't forget to apologize to General Huaiyan.
Yeah, I shouldn't have done that in a public place.
无论如何都要谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。我们明天见。
Anyway, thank you, {NICKNAME}. We'll catch up tomorrow.
（至少要将工造司里发生的事告诉怀炎将军，现在回司辰宫一趟吧。）
(I should go back to the Palace of Astrum and tell General Huaiyan what happened at the Artisanship Commission.)
{NICKNAME}，我那孙女没有惹出什么事吧？
My granddaughter didn't cause any trouble, did she, {NICKNAME}?
你详细述说了事情经过，怀炎紧张的神色也变得缓和了一些。
You explain what happened in detail, and Huaiyan's nervous expression eases a little.
让你看笑话了呀。云璃与你讲了不少，不过，你也听听我这老头的说法吧。
Sorry for all this trouble. Yunli told you quite a bit. Now, it's time for this old man to tell my side of the story.
含光是老朽疼爱的徒弟，也是自应星之后焰轮铸炼宫里罕有的匠作天才。
Hanguang was my beloved disciple, a rare genius not seen in the Flamewheel Forge since Yingxing.
但天赋有时候也会成为一个人的诅咒。他对铸剑之事有着异于常人的热情，一直渴望打造出超越人智的刀剑，让人无需受训便能成为久历生死的老兵。

However, talent can sometimes be a curse. He had an unusual fervor for forging, and he dreamed of forging a sword with self-awareness that surpassed that of humans. He believed it would make warriors invincible without any training.
在他看来，以「朱明火」或是「炼石箭」之类的大规模火力消灭敌人固然有效，但只要战争中仍需要士兵接敌鏖战，不畏生死才是左右胜负的关键。

According to him, while weapons of mass destruction like Zhuming Flames and Alchemical Arrows can destroy many enemies, true victory lies with soldiers who fearlessly fight, ready to lay their lives on the line.
仙舟人铸造剑器时会赋以简单的灵智，便于士兵操纵。但要克服恐惧，培养敏锐的临战判断，仍需要漫长的时间不可，所以——

Usually, Xianzhou swordsmiths infuse a basic level of awareness into their swords to make them easier to wield. But even then, soldiers need to experience countless battles to overcome fear and sharpen their instincts, so...
他想到用岁阳吸取情感…
So, he thought of using heliobi to absorb emotions...
他想到用岁阳传递经验…
So, he thought of using heliobi to impart combat experience...
将岁阳铸进剑中，固然能令武器传递经验，克服恐惧，甚至代替人做出判断。但武器与别的工具不同，它的唯一用途只有杀伤敌人。

By infusing heliobi into swords, he managed to forge weapons that could grant their wielders strength and valor, and even make decisions for them. However, weapons are different from regular tools. They are meant to kill, plain and simple.
在无数战斗之后，嗜血、嗔怒、畏怖的情绪被剑中的岁阳汲取，握住它的士兵不仅会继承剑技，还会共享杀戮的情绪，成了被剑操控的杀戮傀儡。

After countless battles, all the anger, fear, and bloodlust are soaked up by the heliobi within the swords. The soldiers wielding them not only gain strength, but they also become consumed by the malice, turning into puppets possessed by the swords.
无论铸剑师怀着怎样美好的初衷，这些饱经杀戮的武器，最终都会沦为魔剑。
No matter how noble Hanguang's intentions were, those weapons, soaked in blood, turned into cursed swords eventually.
后来，含光在异邦旅人劝诱鼓动下不断铸剑。旅人编撰了各种需要神兵利器的理由——什么凭宝剑光复故国，什么凭仙人之剑斩妖诛邪……
Later, outworlders got wind of what he was doing and encouraged him to keep forging cursed swords. They came up with all sorts of reasons, from taking back their kingdoms to slaying demons...
而再后来的事你知道了——她的父母相继倒在血泊之中，焰轮铸炼宫的匠人们也多有死伤。云璃虽然侥幸逃过一劫，但她并没有从这段过去中逃出来。

And you know what happened next. That massacre took her parents' lives and the lives of many craftsmen in the Flamewheel Forge. Yunli managed to survive, but she couldn't escape the horrors of that day.
难怪将军不想让她看到那剑…
That's why you didn't want her to see that sword...
是啊。我不想云璃这孩子一生都活在她父亲留下的阴影之中…含光的错误，不该由他的女儿来背负。
Yes, I don't want her to spend her whole life trapped under her father's shadow... She doesn't deserve to carry the weight of his mistakes.
云璃虽然立誓要「搜猎魔剑，尽数断绝」。想完成这个誓言，所付出的代价绝不轻松——仅是跋涉星海寻剑，就无异于海底捞针。
Despite her vow to hunt down and wipe out all cursed swords, fulfilling that vow requires immense effort. Traversing the starry seas in search of the swords is like finding a needle in a haystack.
而要夺回魔剑，就要同杀孽缠身的剑主决斗，时刻徘徊在生死边缘。她收回魔剑三百余柄，所受过的致命伤也有三百余处。

And to reclaim those swords, she has to duel the bloodthirsty wielders, teetering on the edge of life and death. She has taken back over three hundred cursed swords and has suffered the same number of fatal wounds.
我收养云璃长大，是想看到她在天真烂漫的年纪做着天真烂漫的事，而不是踏上「猎剑」的旅途。
I took her in to give her a chance at a normal childhood, not to send her on a sword-hunting journey.
就算有朝一日她熔毁了所有魔剑，到那时她的人生又该去向何方呢？

那柄剑真的被铸入了岁阳？

云璃打算明天和你聊聊…
Yunli plans to talk to you tomorrow...
这柄孤云本应该成为一个契机——我会告诉她，她记忆中那个「父亲」并非是一成不变的，就算是她怨恨的含光也能打造出「英雄之剑」。

I also wanted to find a chance to tell her about the history and origin of this sword... but not during the ceremony. As you saw, it wasn't a good time.

既然我那孙女说要与我明日对话，我自会等等她。顺便一问，你照顾了她半晌，很累吧？

哈哈哈哈，那就多麻烦你了。

地衡司检查了存放孤云的武库，门窗均无破坏痕迹。除宽窄不过数掌的气窗外，没有任何可供窃贼出入的通道。

有没有可能是我偷了剑？

没想到，{RUBY_B#孤云}「米卡•奇瓦沙」{RUBY_E#}竟然被盗走了…嫌疑人竟还是怀炎将军的孙女？

「米卡•奇瓦沙」帮助过卡勒瓦拉先祖们创下基业，它绝不是什么「魔剑」！
The point is that the Miekka Kivessä did help the ancestors of Kalevala build a strong foundation! It's definitely not a "cursed sword"!
老夫什么都不知道，你问我也是白问。

The container used to seal Guyun is indeed a sight to behold. Its beauty is radiant. Perhaps it was this very beauty that has drawn unwanted attention.

剑匣的外壳上以高妙的技艺嵌入金属丝，勾勒出了莲花纹样，似在昭示剑匣的产地：朱明仙舟。
The sword case, masterfully adorned with metal wire inlays, traces the pattern of lotus flowers, subtly proclaiming its origin from the illustrious Xianzhou Zhuming.
