骑士明白骑士决斗的规矩，他不再争辩，而是满心期待着你和云璃能够倾听孤云的过去。
The knight understands the rules of knightly duels. He ceases arguing and instead eagerly awaits for you and Yunli to listen to Guyun's past.
朱明制式的剑匣，用来封藏孤云。它的锁扣完好无损，被轻轻打开；内鞘底部留下几片玫瑰花瓣，略显刻意。

A sword casket produced by the Zhuming that is used to seal Guyun. Its opened lock appears to have not been damaged. At the bottom of the casket, a few rose petals have been intentionally left behind.
…我的脑袋一团乱麻，且容我想想——
My thoughts are a mess... Let me sort them out...
剑匣并未上锁，显然只有将剑送来的人才能办到；而玫瑰花瓣，则是那位纯美骑士留下的。
The sword case was never locked, which is evidence that only someone who delivered the sword could have done that. And the rose petal was probably left behind by that Knight of Beauty.
但他到底是如何将剑带离工造司的？又为什么要在送还宝剑后将它偷走？还有，他为什么要在匣中留下这片花瓣？
But how did he manage to take the sword from the Artisanship Commission? Why did he steal it after returning it here? And why would he leave that petal in the case?
How am I supposed to know?
是孤云剑自己脱离了剑匣。那名纯美骑士所做的，只是打开锁扣，帮助它逃走。
Guyun flew out of the case on its own. The Knight of Beauty only unlocked the box to aid its escape.
别开玩笑了，剑怎么可能自己逃走？
Don't be ridiculous. How can a sword escape from a case on its own?
怎么，你是没见过飞剑吗？
You've never seen a Flying Sword before?
…我、我只在传说中听过「米卡•奇瓦沙」会飞，那退一万步讲，那位纯美骑士为什么要这么做？
I... I've only heard about the Miekka Kivessä being able to fly in legends. But even if it could fly, why would the Knight of Beauty do this?
我早说过了，那是一柄铸入岁阳的魔剑，一定是这把剑控制了银枝！也许在抵达罗浮之前，他就被控制了。
Like I said, the sword contains a heliobus. Argenti must have been under the control of the sword! Maybe he was under its control even before you arrived on the Luofu.
大毫执事官，骑士先生在哪？
Official Dahao, where can we find that knight?
呃，让我找找…银枝登记的星船「希世难得号」的停泊位置……
Um... let me see... the docking location of Argenti's ship, the One and Only...
{NICKNAME}，我们走！在那把剑完全夺取银枝心智前，要尽快找到他！
Let's go, {NICKNAME}! We've got to find Argenti before that sword completely takes over his mind!
纯美骑士，就是你偷走了孤云剑对吧？把它留下！你根本不知道那魔剑是有多危险。
Knight of Beauty, you're the one who stole Guyun, right? Hand it over! You have no idea how dangerous that cursed sword is.
危险？依我的愚见，真正危险的永远是挥动武器的手。
Dangerous? In my humble opinion, the real danger is always the hand wielding the weapon.
为什么现在要偷走孤云？
容我纠正您的说法：我从未试图偷窃这件武器。身为伊德莉拉的骑士，我誓言安贫乐道，绝不占有超出必要的财物。
Please allow me to correct your statement: I never attempted to steal this weapon. As Idrila's knight, I've sworn to live in poverty and possess only what is necessary.
所以，玫瑰是你故意留下的？
So, you intentionally left the rose petal behind?
正是。身为伊德莉拉的骑士，我誓言安贫乐道，对偷窃行为有所不齿——为了兼顾对孤云阁下的承诺以及骑士誓言，便只好留下玫瑰。
Yes, I did. As Idrila's knight, I've sworn to live in poverty, and I abhor theft. I had to leave behind a rose petal in order to keep my promise to Master Guyun and uphold my knightly oath.
我答应了帮助孤云阁下的请求，它希望我能带它逃离仙舟，作为将它拔出石碑的人，被它的纯美所打动的人，我不能辜负它。
I agreed to assist Master Guyun in its escape from the Xianzhou. As the person who pulled it from the stone monument, captivated by its beauty, I must not let it down.
我既不能留在武库中说服工匠，也不愿意如同窃贼一般带走宝剑。为此我留下了一个代表我身份的小小证据，希望能与各位开诚布公地谈一谈。

I couldn't stay in the arsenal to convince the craftsmen, nor did I want to take the sword like a thief. That's why I left behind a small piece of evidence that pointed to my identity in the hope of an open and honest conversation with you.
说一千道一万，你还是要带着魔剑离开仙舟，把剑给我！
Whatever your reasons are, you're planning to take the cursed sword away from the Xianzhou! Hand it over to me!
当初是孤云阁下的纯美打动了我，我才心甘情愿随旅团奔赴归剑之旅…但遗憾的是，孤云阁下的故乡并非它的理想归处，纯美骑士理应善始善终。

Back then, it was the beauty of Master Guyun that impressed me, so I willingly embarked on the journey to return the sword... But unfortunately, Master Guyun's homeland is no longer the ideal place for it to return to. As a Knight of Beauty, I must not abandon it halfway.
不行，他已经完全被魔剑的力量诱惑了。
Oh, no. He's completely captivated by the power of that cursed sword.
要怎么才能让他清醒过来。
How can we snap him out of it?
The solution is right in your hand.
简直就像是会洗脑的恶魔。
It's like a devil that can mess with your mind.
这才是魔剑的可怕之处。
That's what makes cursed swords so scary.
诱惑？在下被孤云阁下的纯美所动容了！
Captivated? No, I am touched by Master Guyun's flawless beauty!
在下反倒是疑惑，在场的诸位竟然没有一人能够读懂这柄剑，真是令人感到悲伤…我已经下定决心，要带着孤云阁下离开仙舟。
To be honest, I'm confused why none of you can understand this sword. This is quite heartrending... I've already made up my mind to take Master Guyun away from the Xianzhou.
魔剑已经影响了你的认知，我会帮你摆脱它！我会亲手打碎这个幻象——还有这把剑！
That cursed sword has messed with your ability to think, but I'll break you free from its grip! I'll shatter its illusion... and the sword itself!
美丽的小姐，若你执意要夺走受我保护之人…之物，请和我进行一场符合骑士礼仪的公平对决。
Fair lady, if you're intent on taking away this person... this sword that is under my protection, please engage me with a fair duel according to knightly etiquette.
作为骑士决斗代理人，银枝，向您发起挑战！
As a representative in this duel, I, Argenti, challenge you!
我以骑士精神宣誓，在纯美的女神伊德莉拉的见证下，我将成为孤云阁下的决斗代理人。
I swear on the spirit of chivalry, in front of Idrila the Beauty, that I will represent Master Guyun in this duel.
若我取得胜利，我希望孤云阁下能随我一同离开仙舟；若云璃小姐取得胜利，我会坦然接受失败，并将孤云阁下双手奉还——
If I win, you will allow Master Guyun to leave the Xianzhou with me. And if you best me, Miss Yunli, I'll accept my defeat and turn Master Guyun over to you...
云璃小姐，您是否接受挑战？
Do you accept my challenge, Miss Yunli?
就让我瞧瞧，你带走它的渴望，和我狩猎魔剑的愿望，究竟哪个更胜一筹！
Fine, let's see whose desire is stronger, your desire to take it away, or my desire to hunt down all cursed swords!
你不打算使用孤云与我一决胜负？
You're not going to use Guyun to fight for victory?
在下虽略懂剑术，但在如此庄严的决斗中，骑士理应使用日夜锤炼的技艺前来应战。
While I know a thing or two about swordplay, in a proper duel like this, a knight should rely on the skills he's honed day and night.
我输了。按照骑士决斗的规矩，我理应将孤云剑双手奉上。
I've lost. According to the rules of a knight's duel, I should keep my promise and hand over the sword to you.
但在此之前，我仍希望身为胜者的您，有雅量能倾听孤云阁下过去的经历……
But before I do that, I hope that you, as the winner, might have mercy and listen to Master Guyun's past experiences...
从被锻成那日起，这柄剑就已坠入魔道。现在，把剑放在我面前，让我击碎它！
This sword has been cursed since the day it was forged. Place it in front of me, and let me destroy it!
你为我已做了很多。现在该是我独自面对她的时候了。
You've done so much for me already. It's time for me to face her alone.
银枝取出伤痕累累的古剑。在所有人的视线中，剑缓缓升起，锋刃上似有火光舞动。
Argenti draws forth an ancient sword, scarred from countless battles. Before all eyes, the blade rises slowly, its edge dancing with the semblance of flames.
各位，我厌倦了战斗。我只想向你们讲述我的过去，讲述我为何想要逃离。
I'm weary of fighting. I just want to share my past with you, to explain why I wanted to escape.
在此之后，我的命运将由你们决定。小姑娘，你害怕见证我的过去吗？
After that, I'll leave my destiny in your hands. Are you afraid to witness my past, little girl?
害怕？你确实与其他魔剑有着不一样的气质，但这不过是为了利用好奇心来蛊惑我罢了。
Afraid? Well, you do have a different aura from other cursed swords, but you're just trying to use my curiosity to lure me in.
那你最是清楚，仅是一次触碰，我不会夺走任何人的理智。
Well, you know best that a single touch won't snatch away anyone's sanity.
I think it's worth a shot, Yunli.
好冷啊～明明战斗的时候没有体会，现在真是冻到骨头里了。
It's so cold here... I didn't feel it when I was in the thick of battle, but now it's freezing me to the bone.
真不愧是朱明仙舟的杰作。要不是你刚才接管了我的手，我恐怕会在刚才的战斗中身首异处了……
You're indeed a masterpiece from the Xianzhou Zhuming. If you hadn't taken control of my body, I probably would've been decapitated in that fight...
闭嘴，保持警惕！步离狼卒的狩猎永不休止。
Quiet! And stay alert! Borisin Wolftroopers never give up the hunt.
别这么严肃，聊两句嘛。距离咱们俩流落在这个世界快三百多个自转日了。发信器从来也没个响，看来联络大部队是指望不上了。
Hey, just relax a bit. It's been over <unbreak>300</unbreak> days since we were both stranded on this planet. The transmitter never rings, so I guess we can't count on that anymore.
这个世界的居民还在用驼兽拉车，让他们帮忙修好星槎显然不可能。
The people on this planet still use beasts to pull their carts. Obviously, there's no way they can help us fix the starskiff.
咱们俩的余生都要被锁死在这颗星球上了。
Looks like we're stranded on this forsaken planet for the rest of our lives.
余生，你们仙舟人的余生可太长了。感到绝望了吗？一个人，面对一个充满敌意的世界。
The rest of a Xianzhou native's life could be terribly long. Are you feeling any desperation? All by yourself in this hostile world?
如果熬不下去的话，可以把一切都交给我。你不必思考那些过于沉重的东西……
When things get too rough for you to handle, just leave everything to me. No need to carry the weight of the world on your shoulders...
好啊，如果真的熬不住了，我会把身体交给你支配的。
Yeah, sure. If I really can't handle things anymore, I'll leave my body to you.
But now is not that time.
凭你那样低微的本事，能反抗一整支步离人的军队吗？你到底在坚持什么啊？
Do you really think you can oppose an entire borisin army with your limited skills? What are you holding out for?
我被困在了这里，但这支步离人猎群应该也遇到了同样的困境……
It's true that I'm stranded here, but it seems like that borisin pack is in the same boat...
对了孤云，你知道「种子」吗？种子，是微尘般不起眼的东西。但只要细心栽培，再假以时日，它却能长成不可撼动的参天大树。
By the way, Guyun, do you know what a seed is? A seed may seem insignificant, but with careful cultivation and time, it can grow into a huge unwavering tree.
你说「仙舟人余生太长了」…没错，我打算用接下来的岁月培育一枚种子，名为「反抗」的种子，我要让这片土地的人们懂得拿起武器去反抗那些怪物。

You said that the rest of a Xianzhou native's life could be terribly long... You're right. That's why I intend to plant a seed named "resistance" here and nurture it for the rest of my life. I want to show the people of this land how to defend themselves against those monsters.
我已经…在这些人眼中看到了这种子。
I can already see the seed in the eyes of those people.
嘿嘿，你能做到吗？不如把身体交给我，杀一个够本，杀两个赚翻。
Hehe, you really think you can do it? Why not just give me control, and we can revel in the bloodbath together?
What was the memory I just saw?
那是我和一名云骑流落异星的记忆。
It was a memory of me and a Cloud Knight, stranded on an unfamiliar planet.
我和他坠落在了一颗被步离人占据的星球。只有…我们。
We crash-landed on a planet occupied by borisin. Just the two of us.
我能感受到，这是一场孤独的战争。
I can feel that it was a lonely war.
我还活着，可村子里那些年轻人……
I'm alive, but all the young people in the village...
他们死了，为你而死，为你承诺的「没有步离人的好日子」而死。
They died. They died for you. They died because of your big promises, promising them a life free from the borisin.
我品尝到了他们临死前的绝望。他们看不见这个日子到来了。你也一样。
I tasted their despair before death. They didn't see it coming, and neither will you.
我们…不能在这里停留了。去下一个村子吧。
We can't stay here... Let's move on to the next village.
为什么？你还在坚持什么？！你和你那支可怜的杂牌军已经打了三十多年仗了。你们从没赢过。你播种的根本不是「反抗」，只是「绝望」罢了。
Why? What's the point!? You and your sorry excuse for an army have been fighting for over three decades, and you haven't won a single battle! What you're sowing is not "resistance," but "despair."
这个世界已经无药可救了，它被步离人的猎群感染了！
This world is hopeless! It's completely infested with packs of borisin!
你看到过他们的数量，你也知道他们的手段…而你寄予希望的那些野人，他们只知道匍匐在地上，恭敬地称呼那些吃掉他们子女和亲人的怪物为「兽主」！

You've seen their numbers, and you know their methods... And those commoners you've put your hopes in, they just kneel down and worship the monsters devouring their children and families, calling them their Beastmasters!
你为他们斩下兽主的头颅，他们却害怕遭到报复，把你供了出来，这些事情，你全都记得的吧！
You beheaded one of the Beastmasters for their sake, but they turned on you because they were scared of the borisin taking revenge. You remember all that, right!?
我…记得！我记得我的第一次死亡。步离人…把我的头切了下来。
I... I do! I remember my first death. The borisin... cut off my head.
但我也记得，如果不是有个年轻人为了收葬我，冒险将它缝了回去，我已经彻底入灭了。
But I also remember that if it weren't for a brave youngster who risked his neck to reattach my head and give me a proper burial, I would've disappeared completely.
我记得这些人为我做的一切：放在山洞口的食物，缝补的皮袄，还有那些人加入我之前立下的誓言。
I remember everything the people did for me: They left food at the entrance of my cave, fixed my fur coat, and some even joined my resistance.
仙舟人的余生还很长，会有新的年轻人站出来和我一起战斗的！时间站在我们这边。
The rest of this Xianzhou native's life is still terribly long, and there will be new youngsters who will stand beside me in battle! Time is on our side.
你刚才说，这是一场孤独的战争。
You said it was a lonely war.
不，这场战争并不孤独，只是充满了绝望。
No, it wasn't a war filled with loneliness, but with despair.
多到我不愿再品尝绝望的滋味。
So much despair that I don't ever want to taste it again.
Where are you going, Your Highness?
我要…回故乡去了。回到天空之上，很远很远的地方。我不会再回来了。
I'm returning... to my homeland, a distant place beyond the sky. I'm not coming back.
可是…您要是走了，我们该怎么办？万一那些狼妖再度出现……
But... what should we do with you gone? What if those wolf demons show up again?
他们已经死绝了，孩子。他们已经被你们尽数铲除了……
They won't, my child. You've wiped out the last of them...
在我离开前，我要求你们为我做一件事。虽然狼妖不在了，但世间依旧还会有怪物。
But before I go, I need you to do one thing for me. Even though the wolf demons are gone, new monsters will appear in this world.
过不了多久，会有身披金色枝条，只知杀戮的妖魔在此徘徊。但是你们不必害怕。
Soon, a demon will appear, donning golden branches and knowing only bloodshed. However, fear not, my children.
我将这柄追随我征战多年的剑留给你们。用我这些年所教方法，你们必能将这世间最后一只怪物斩杀。
I'm entrusting you with this sword that's been with me in countless battles. Use the skills I've taught you over the years, and you'll surely defeat that last demon.
但是，我要你们为我建立一座石碑。一定要够大，够坚固，要将那怪物的遗骸牢牢压住，万世不移。这是你们欠我的债，你们必须做到，明白吗？

But that's not all. I need you to construct a stone monument for me. It must be large and sturdy enough to seal the remains of that demon forever. This is a debt you owe me, and you must fulfill it. Do you understand?
You lied to them, and you lied to me, too.
你答应在你绝望的时候，会将身体交给我的。
You promised that you'd give your body to me when you couldn't handle things anymore.
老朋友，仙舟人的余生现在到尽头了。
Well, this Xianzhou native's life has finally come to an end, my old friend.
那就给你个报仇的机会，来送我最后一程吧？
How about one last chance for revenge? Come and bid me farewell for the final time.
…他早已经做好了觉悟，我能感觉到无数复杂的感受在流淌。
...He had long since come to some understanding. I could sense a mix of intricate emotions flowing out.
这并不是嗜血、嗔怒、畏怖的情绪，他为你留下的是…寄托？
It wasn't bloodlust, or anger, or fear. What he left for you was... hope.
「他们已知晓如何反抗怪物，而世间仍有最后一头怪物在徘徊。除掉它，我的老友。」
"They've learned how to fight monsters, but there's still one last monster lingering in the world. Kill it, my old friend."
He left me there without ever looking back.
岁阳能品尝人类的情绪……
我的…情绪是什么味道呢，老友……？
How do my emotions taste... my old friend...?
一点点苦涩的怜悯，一点点滚烫的勇气，你心底最大的渴望是结束战斗。
A hint of bitter compassion and a touch of scalding courage. Your heart's deepest desire is to end war once and for all.
现在，战斗结束了…你听见了吗？
Now, the war is finally over... Can you hear?
虽然你已听不见了，老友，但我会尽我所能，结束这个世界的战斗。
Even though you can't hear me anymore, my old friend, I'll do everything I can to bring an end to all conflicts in the world.
所以，这就是卡勒瓦拉人所说的英雄之剑的过去？你帮助那个世界的人类结束了战斗？
So, this is the past of the Kalevalan people's Sword of Heroes? You helped the people of that world bring an end to war?
不，我没能做到。身为一柄武器，我只会成为下一场争端的开始。
No, I did not. I am a weapon, and I only became the cause of more conflicts.
卡勒瓦拉人的历代君王视我为天赋王权的标志，他们你争我夺，为了得到我发动战争。
Countless monarchs of Kalevala saw me as a symbol of kingship endowed by nature, and they waged wars in order to possess me.
我受够了那些人龌龊的念头，我也不愿再为任何人行杀戮之事。
I grew tired of their wicked intentions. I didn't want to kill for anyone anymore.
于是我回到了埋葬那家伙的石碑前——从此之后，再也无人能将我从石碑中拔出。
So, I returned to the stone monument where my master was buried, and since then, no one was able to remove me from it.
...But you allowed Argenti to take you away?
因为即便过去了这么久…我依然想让那人回到故乡。
Because even after all this time... I still wanted my master to come back home.
在赠剑仪式上，我得知自己会被赠给最好的剑士重新陷阵杀敌时，我感到了痛苦。
During the sword-gifting ceremony, I felt anguish when I learned that I would be handed over to the most skilled swordmaster and once again become a tool for killing.
那人将自己最深的渴望：「结束战斗」，铭刻进了我的剑身。
My master had engraved his deepest desire into my blade: End war.
身为被锻造之物，我的功能从一开始就已被注定，我必须成为一把武器，不断砍杀。
As a weapon, my purpose was predetermined from the start: I had to become a deadly sword that would relentlessly hack and kill.
可是当我的使命完成时，我是否能像那个人一样，拥有选择自己命运的权利呢？因此，我请求纯美骑士帮助我离开，不必再陷入杀戮和战斗的轮回。
But once I fulfilled my mission, would I have the right to choose my own destiny like he did? So, I asked the Knight of Beauty to help me break free from this never-ending cycle of bloodshed.
这千百年的时光，在一瞬之间成为了我理所当然的回忆。
These thousands of years have naturally turned into memories of mine.
…我好像，我好像明白了那位骑士所说的「纯美」究竟为何了。
...I think I understand the "beauty" the Knight was talking about now.
我们接下来，会去往下一个记忆的片段，出发吗？
Shall we proceed to the next fragment of my memories?
我倾听到了你真正的愿望，孤云。我感受到你已经厌倦了继续成为一柄剑，落入不知何人之手，进行你所不愿的战斗，难道不是吗？
I've heard your true desires, Guyun. I can sense that you're tired of being a sword, constantly serving new masters and fighting battles you no longer want to be a part of, right?
这是作为剑与生俱来的命运，我注定会落入某人之手，进行战斗。风能选择停止吹拂吗？云能选择停止漂泊吗？不能，这便是受造之物的命运。

But being a sword is my destiny. I'm doomed to serve some master and fight battles endlessly. Can the wind choose to stop blowing? Can a cloud choose to stop drifting? No, it's the same for me, a creation with a predetermined destiny.
不，你见识过无名的剑士如何决定自己的命运，孤云，当然你也可以。
That's not true, Guyun. That Nameless Swordmaster shaped his own destiny, so you can too.
我实在想不到，我作为剑以外的命运……
I just can't picture my destiny being anything other than that of a sword...
你记得吗？你在剑士的石碑前孤高的伫立，人们望向你，是因为你承载着对英雄的追忆。于是，那时的你就不再是一柄剑了，而是一块纪念碑！
Do you remember when you stood alone in front of the Swordmaster's stone monument? People admired you because you carried the memories of the hero. You were no longer a sword. You were a memorial.
…后来的我斑驳不堪，轻风从剑身上的空洞穿过，还会发出高低不同的音调，去向远方的山野——原来那时的我是乐器，我怀念作为乐器的时光。

...Later, as I became worn and weathered, the gentle wind would pass through the hollows of my body, creating melodic tones that echoed in the distant mountains. I became a musical instrument then. I miss those times.
受造之物是否有资格成为自己想成为的样子？当然可以！我会实现孤云你的愿望，我会将你铸造成另一种器物。
Can a creation become what it wants to be? The answer is "yes"! I'll grant your wish, Guyun, and transform you into something different.
可是，这是演武仪典的奖品，卡勒瓦拉的使团要是知道了…怀炎将军，将军您快说句话啊？
But this is the prize for the Wardance... If the Kalevalan delegation finds out... Please say something, General Huaiyan!
唉，老朽这个孙女，性格向来执拗。云璃，你真的确定要这么做吗？
Well, my granddaughter has always been stubborn. Are you really sure about this, Yunli?
If that's what you want, I'm on board.
You might as well ask Guyun's opinion.
完成孤云阁下的意愿，正是我抵达仙舟的目的。伊德莉拉在上，无论是铸剑为犁，或是其他，只要能让孤云阁下结束战斗，我都双手赞成！

Fulfilling Master Guyun's wishes is the reason I came to the Xianzhou. With Idrila's blessing, you could turn Master Guyun into a plow, but as long as it fulfills his wish to end war, I support it fully!
Then I'll leave it to you, Yunli.
最后，你们前往工造司的五兵坊，借用其中的铸炉。
Finally, you make your way to the Artisanship Commission's Pentad Armory, seeking the use of their forging furnace.
你在难过个什么劲啊，小丫头。是感到后悔了吗？
Why the long face, my child? Are you feeling regret, perhaps?
熔剑的时候你可比谁都斩钉截铁，怎么现在反倒一副心不甘情不愿的样子啊？
You were completely determined when melting down the sword, so why the sudden change of heart?
爷爷，我熔掉了演武仪典的奖品。你该怎么向罗浮交代啊？
Grandpa, I melted down the prize for the Wardance. How are you going to explain this to the Luofu?
好家伙，这么小的云璃身上居然长了这么大个良心。呵呵，不容易啊不容易啊。
Oh, am I hearing right? This little girl is worried about her grandpa! Hehe, didn't see that coming.
唉，如果一开始我能冷静地找爷爷谈谈…也许这件事不会闹出如今这样的轩然大波。
If only I had talked to you from the beginning, Grandpa... Maybe things wouldn't have escalated like this.
不过，孤云剑能得偿所愿，也是件好事。关于这点我倒是不后悔。
But at least Guyun got what it wanted. I have no regrets there.
云璃…你和你父亲，至少在这件事上还是有点像的。
When it comes to swords, you... you and your father are cut from the same cloth.
含光所造的其余武器，你还打算继续回收吗？
So, are you planning to continue melting down the rest of Hanguang's swords?
嗯。虽然孤云有些特别，但对于大多数持剑者来说，岁阳魔剑还是太危险了。
Yeah, Guyun is unique, but the other cursed swords are still too dangerous for anyone to handle.
只是在下次冲动之前，我会先等一等。
But maybe I'll try to be more patient next time.
好个「等一等」。记住今天，在将来的日子里，还会有许多需要我们「等一等」的事情出现。
"Be more patient." Well said. Remember what you learned today, because there will be many more situations in the future that will require you to "be more patient."
明白了。可是，奖品怎么办？
Understood, but what about the prize?
打从你在赠剑仪式上出现，爷爷心中就警铃大作。为此我特地准备了另一把剑作为替代。放心，剑里绝对没有添加岁阳！
Well, ever since you showed up at the ceremony, I had a hunch, so I prepared another sword as a backup plan. And don't worry, this one has nothing to do with heliobi!
对了，卡勒瓦拉的使节和那位骑士一同去了金人巷。他们打算挑一处地方纪念英雄。咱们一起去瞧瞧吧。
By the way, the ambassador from Kalevala and that knight went to Aurum Alley. They're looking for a spot to honor the hero. Why don't we go take a look together?
啊，怀炎将军怎么有空前来观礼？
Oh, General Huaiyan! What brings you here?
我的孙女在听闻「米卡•奇瓦沙」讲述的英雄传说后，备受鼓舞，特地要求我带着她来这儿看看。
Well, my granddaughter was inspired by the heroic legends told by the Miekka Kivessä, so she dragged me here to take a look.
Why did you choose this place?
我是卡勒瓦拉守碑人的后裔。在下的家族世世代代负责看护着那位无名英雄留下的巨大石碑。
I come from a long line of Kalevalan monument keepers. For generations, my family has guarded the stone monument left behind by the nameless hero.
数百年来，石碑底下生长出一株金色的树，枝条从未枯朽。卡勒瓦拉人视它为神话存在的证明。
Over the centuries, a golden tree sprouted from under the monument, and its branches have never withered. We Kalevalans see it as proof of the hero's existence.
在出发前，我从这株金树上折下一枝，希望能将它移栽至此，作为英雄回归故乡的见证。
Before leaving Kalevala, I took a branch from that golden tree, hoping to plant it here to represent the hero returning to his homeland.
甚好。仙舟人不设棺椁和灵位，能在故土上人来人往、烟火热闹之处安眠，想必他一定很满意。
That sounds good. We Xianzhou people don't make coffins or set up memorials, so I'm sure he would be happy to rest here where life is bustling.
英雄曾要求先民们在石碑上刻下一些文字。此次出访，我也将文字拓了下来。
The hero had asked our ancestors to carve something into the monument, so I made a copy of it too.
虽然岁月侵蚀了碑文，但它看起来似乎还能辨认——
While the inscription is pretty worn with age, perhaps you can still make out some of it...
「飘零他乡，身殒在即，幸不辱天职。」
"I have drifted far from my homeland and am on the brink of death. Yet, I take solace in having honorably fulfilled my duties."
「若有过客见怜，请携碣前黄土一抔，归葬罗浮。」
"Should you feel compassion for me, kind traveler, please take a handful of soil hence and bring it back to the Luofu."
帕沃尔先生，不知这位英雄是否在你们的历史上留下过名讳？
Mr. Paavo, I wonder if that hero ever left a name in your history?
抱歉，那位英雄战斗的日子已经离我们太远太远了，他没留下过任何可供旁人称呼的名字。但在我们的神话里，他从天上来到大地，我们称他为云骑士。
I apologize, but the hero's epic battles happened long ago, and he did not leave any name for us to call him. But in our mythology, he came from the heavens, and so we call him the Cloud Knight.
你也可以在这儿好好休息了，孤云。
Now you can also rest here, Guyun.
已经…联系不上云骑主力了。
It's already... impossible to contact the main Cloud Knight forces.
接下来，将是漫长而孤独的战斗。
What awaits me will be a long and lonely war.
我们已经反抗过一次又一次……
We've resisted time and time again...
世界的命运掌握在他们自己手中。
The destiny of this world rests in their own hands.
他们已经掌握了名为反抗的力量。
They have already gained the power of resistance.
这个世界将只剩下唯一的怪物……
Soon, this world will only be left with one final monster...
到底还是没能回到仙舟罗浮……
I never made it back to the Xianzhou Luofu...
我不想成为一柄杀人的剑。
I don't want to be a sword that brings death.
属于我的战争早已经结束了。
作为墓碑的岁月，是我最好的岁月。
The years spent as a tombstone were my finest.
有些伤感…我想在这儿待一阵。
I'm feeling a bit emotional... I'd like to stay here for a while.
这一路上谢谢你的劝诫，{NICKNAME}。无以为报…不知道你是不是有兴趣和三月一起在我这儿学剑？
Thank you for your guidance, {NICKNAME}. I'm truly grateful... By any chance, would you be interested in taking sword lessons with me, like March?
Maybe not, I have my baseball bat...
算了算了，我怕自己吃不起苦。
Thanks, but no thanks. I don't think I can endure the hardship.
我姑且算是「盗剑从犯」——怀炎将军让我在这金色树苗旁罚站，向往来行人传诵英雄和这柄剑的故事。
As a punishment for being an "accomplice" in the theft, General Huaiyan assigned me to guard this golden sapling and recite the story of the hero and this legendary sword to passers-by.
这哪里算是惩罚，我欣然接受！向仙舟住民传递纯美的信念，正是在下所求。
This is not a punishment at all, and I gladly accepted it! Spreading the message of Beauty to the Xianzhou residents is exactly what I desire.
不过，再过一段时间，我打算离开仙舟，继续旅行。希望我们有缘在银河相会吧，挚友。
However, I plan to leave the Xianzhou soon and continue my travels. May our paths cross again in the vast Cosmos, my dear friend.
完成植树使命之后，我们使团众人也将离开罗浮仙舟，当然，这一趟的经历也会变成英雄故事中的后日谈吧。
Now that my mission is accomplished, the delegation will be leaving the Xianzhou Luofu soon. But of course, the experiences here will become an epilogue to the hero's stories.
这金色树苗也会成为仙舟日常风景的一部分，想必也是遂了英雄的心愿。
This golden sapling will become a part of the everyday scenery of the Xianzhou. I believe it's what he would have wanted.
一张式样普通的古筝。琴身与琴弦似乎由某种特别的金属铸造。
An unassuming ancient guzheng, its body and strings appear to be crafted from a unique kind of metal.
即便没有过客触碰琴弦，它依旧时不时迸出几个音符，像是在为某人哼唱不成调的曲子。
Even without a human's touch, it occasionally bursts out notes, as if humming an untuned melody for someone unseen.
请允许我真诚称赞你，这位女士，你的美丽如同纯真洁白的鸢尾花。
Please allow me to offer a sincere compliment, my fair lady. Your beauty is as pure as a snow-white iris.
这不是我的挚友吗？又见面了！
Well, if it isn't my dear friend! Glad to meet you again!
啊，我是说这位骑士是谁……
Um, I mean, who is this knight...?
我名唤银枝，来自「纯美骑士团」，受邀成为卡勒瓦拉使团的一员，护送宝剑「米卡•奇瓦沙」回归仙舟。
I am Argenti, a member of the Knights of Beauty. I was invited as part of the Kalevala delegation to escort the legendary Miekka Kivessä back to the Xianzhou.
不知在下是否能有幸得知你的名字？
May I have the honor of knowing your name?
真是美丽的名字！不知道你是否听说过纯洁无瑕的伊德莉拉女神的圣名……
What a beautiful name! I wonder if you have ever heard the holy name of the pure and flawless Goddess Idrila...
啊，云璃，来了啊。你的消息倒是灵通…罢了，眼下这般场合，你可千万记得不可无礼。
Oh, you're here, Yunli. Didn't expect you to be so well-informed... Well, now that you're here, don't forget your manners.
无礼无礼…我才刚到这里有什么无礼的。真是的，天底下哪有像我这么懂礼貌的孙女啊？
Manners, manners... Come on, you won't find another granddaughter as polite and well-behaved as me!
罢了罢了，你能注意这是个庄重的场合就行。
Well, just remember this is a very serious ceremony.
帕沃尔先生，让您久等了，我们开始「赠剑仪式」吧。
Sorry for keeping you waiting, Mr. Paavo. Now, let the Sword-Gifting Ceremony begin.
云璃说自己没有偷剑，我愿意信她。
Yunli says she didn't steal the sword, and I am willing to believe her.
自始至终，闯进工造司的不速之客只有一名嫌疑人，那就是云璃小姐。
Throughout the entire incident, there was only one suspect who broke into the Artisanship Commission, and that was Miss Yunli.
云璃小姐想带走孤云，来到工造司大闹一番，却在途中被你阻止。
Miss Yunli caused a ruckus at the Artisanship Commission, trying to take away Guyun, but you stopped her in her tracks.
与你告别后，她假意离开，实则孤身闯进了武库，窃走了宝剑孤云。
After bidding farewell to you, Yunli pretended to leave but snuck into the arsenal alone and stole Guyun.
整个案件没有别的嫌疑人，我们也没有找到其他证据。
We haven't found any other suspects or evidence.
你的说法不太严谨，我、银枝还有使团成员也来过工造司。
Your statement isn't quite accurate. Argenti, the delegation members, and even me, we were all at the Artisanship Commission at some point.
你说的不错。但他们在送剑后便走了，负责交接的匠人证明他们不可能带剑离开。
True, but they all left after delivering the sword, and the craftsman overseeing the handover confirmed that they couldn't have left with the sword.
我们也调查过了，孤云交接前，工造司入口的机巧鸟拍到了{NICKNAME}离开…反倒是没有云璃姑娘离去的记录。
We looked into it as well. Before Guyun was handed over, the cycrane at the entrance of the Artisanship Commission captured {NICKNAME} leaving... but there's no record of Miss Yunli leaving.
砸坏了金人，我怎么还敢从正门出去嘛？
Why would I dare leave through the main entrance after smashing the aurumatons?
没错，至少在那个时候，云璃并没有窃走宝剑，我们去的是金人仓库。
Exactly. So at least Yunli didn't steal the sword at that time, because we were at the aurumaton warehouse.
如果你的证言可信的话——没别的意思，毕竟每一份证据都应当被审视。
...If your testimony is reliable. I'm not implying anything, but we need to scrutinize every piece of evidence.
我和云璃分别后，还特意发消息叮嘱了公输师傅。
After Yunli and I went our separate ways, I messaged Master Gongshu to inform him about the incident.
后来过了很久，公输师傅表示工造司已经验收了宝剑，至少到那刻为止，云璃是没有嫌疑的。
And much later, Master Gongshu told me the sword was confirmed safe. So up until that point, Yunli couldn't have stolen it.
你还给公输师傅还发了信息？我完全不知道！咳，这倒是个证据。
Wait, you messaged Master Gongshu? I had no idea! Well, that's some solid proof right there.
不过，也仅仅证明到那时为止，剑尚未被窃走。
However, it only proves the sword wasn't stolen up to that point.
你好像漏掉了什么关键证据。
Looks like you're missing some crucial evidence.
整个武库并未有被人撬开的迹象，要说有什么证据，就只有剑匣了。
There are no signs of the arsenal being broken into. So, the only real evidence is the sword case.
没有被撬动痕迹本身就是可疑的证据。
No, the fact that there are no signs of a break-in is suspicious in itself.
（该用哪个证物来说服大毫呢？）
(Which piece of evidence should I use to convince Dahao?)
我仔细观察了剑匣的锁扣，它没有任何被暴力撬动、破坏的痕迹。
I carefully examined the lock of the sword case, and there were no signs of tampering or damage.
剑匣打一开始就没锁上。
It means the case was never locked in the first place.
剑匣一开始有没有被锁上，这一点只有将宝剑送来工造司的人最清楚。
As to why the case was never locked in the first place, only the people who delivered it to the Artisanship Commission would know.
除此之外，我还在匣中找到一样东西。
Plus, I found something else inside the case.
（该用哪个证物来进一步说服大毫呢？）
(Which piece of evidence should I use to further convince Dahao?)
我在剑匣底部夹缝中，找到了这个。
I found this in the crevice at the bottom of the case.
玫瑰…花瓣？呃…多半是我搜查时大意了。这东西怎么会在剑匣里？
A... rose petal? Hmm... I must have missed it during the search. But why was there a petal inside the case?
我不清楚。但我知道，那位护送宝剑的纯美骑士，在他走过的地方总会留下一地难以打扫干净的玫瑰花瓣。
I don't know, but I do know that wherever that Knight of Beauty goes, he always leaves behind a trail of rose petals that's almost impossible to clean up.
呃，也许…等等，让我再考虑一下。
On second thought... maybe let me think about it again.
你想清楚，我的逻辑可是无懈可击的。
Take your time. My reasoning is solid.
…在我看来，这毫无疑问是一场「谋杀」。
...In my estimation, there's no question about it. This is murder.
谋杀…这个词对我们太陌生了。在家族的保护下，匹诺康尼不可能出现任何伤亡。
Murder... Such a foreign word to us. The people of Penacony could never come to any harm while under the watchful protection of The Family.
在梦中，就算一个人被铁锤殴打千百下，充其量也只是在现实酒店中醒来。
In a dream, even if you're bashed a thousand times with a hammer, at worst you'll still wake up in reality in a hotel.
话不能这么说啊，就算结果构不成伤亡，这犯罪意图…也够明显了吧？你们特地过来封锁现场，不就是因为这案子性质恶劣？

Not necessarily. Even if the result does not constitute harm, the criminal intent is... clear enough? You specifically came here to cordon off the scene because of the unsavory nature of this case, right?
你说的也对。即便不会真的受伤，但好端端走在大马路上，就被人用锤子一顿乱砸…这绝不是该发生在匹诺康尼的事。

You're not wrong. Even if there are no casualties, being smashed over the head with a hammer in the middle of the street for no reason at all... this is not the kind of thing that happens on Penacony.
二位既然是橡木家系派来的，现场就任由你们调查了。我会在一旁待命。
You are guests of the Oak Family, so you may investigate the crime scene. I'll be on standby over here.
好姐姐，你究竟使的什么法子，让她转眼就相信咱们是什么「侦查人员」……
Are you a witch!? Just how did you manage to convince them in the blink of an eye that we're some kind of detectives...
只是一些「记忆」层面的暗示。如果一件事出现在所有人的记忆中…那么它就是「事实」。
Just some suggestions at the memory level. If something happens in everybody's memory... then that something becomes a fact.
若时间再充裕些，让她相信我是「同谐」本人垂迹也不是不可能。
If we had a little more time, I could have even convinced her I was Xipe the Harmony.
只是一些「记忆」层面的暗示。如果一件事出现在所有人的记忆中…那么它就是「事实」。
Just some suggestions at the memory level. If something happens in everybody's memory... then that something becomes a fact.
比起说明——你要亲自体验一下么？
Rather than hearing endless explanations, would you like to experience it for yourself?
不用了不用了，您这本事还是留着对付敌人吧！
No no no, hey, you can save that for the enemy!
…「花火大人的尸体」也能算是一个角色么？
...Does "Miss Sparkle's body" even count as a real character?
怎么不能呀？那三个小剧场，可是每个都出现了「花火大人的尸体」哦。
Why not? "Miss Sparkle's body" appeared in all three of those skits just then.
虽说是有些刻意的强调，但也并无不可吧。那…这位桑博先生又是？
It's a little bit forced, but it's fine. So... who is this Mr. Sampo, then?
美丽的女士，我一早就向您坦白了——我真的什么都不知道，只是帮朋友送封信而已。
Beautiful lady, I already confessed everything to you earlier on — I really didn't know a thing. I just helped a friend send a letter, that's all.
原来，是我从最初就落入了愚者们的陷阱。
So I've been running a fool's errand this whole time.
亲爱的，何必这么认真呢？你不是玩得很开心吗——至少我很开心呀。
My dear, why so serious? Haven't you been having a great time? I have, at least.
你拿走「记忆」，我收获「欢愉」，我们能从彼此身上各取所需。既然这么投缘，你我又都是孤身一人…何不与我同行，一起跳支双人舞呢？
You take memories, and I get joy. We get what we need from each other. Seeing as we're such kindred spirits but also such loners... Why don't you come and work with me? We can dance ballet together~
哦…我是否可以理解为，一位假面愚者向我发出了合作的邀请？
Oh... am I understanding this correctly? A Masked Fool, inviting me to work together?
一场空前绝后的好戏就要在匹诺康尼上演了，来不及登台的人，就只能退居幕后。
A show of unprecedented splendor is about to be staged in Penacony. If you're too late to take the stage, you can work behind the scenes.
要欣赏这出戏剧，你只能凑上台前，站到聚光灯下，看一切围着你手舞足蹈——跟我走吧，这里才是最好的观众席！
If you want to appreciate this drama, you have to stand up under that spotlight as you take the stage and watch the dancing envelop you — come with me, this is the best seat in the house!
…虽然不明白，你为何如此执着于破坏家族的藩篱。但我已说过，忆者帮不了你，另请高明吧。
...I don't really understand why you're so fixated on destroying Family barriers, but as I said before, a Memokeeper can't help you. It's frankly above my pay grade.
另外，我也不觉得你孤单。哦，我不是指他，而是说你背后……
Also, I don't consider you a loner. Oh, I don't mean him, but rather behind you...
雇佣你来匹诺康尼的那位，应该不希望你和其他势力暗中来往吧？
The one who hired you to come to Penacony probably doesn't want you secretly linking up with other forces, right?
虽说记忆就像深海，但想一鱼两吃…海里的鱼可未必合你胃口哦？
Memory is like the deep blue sea. But if you try to catch two fish with one cast... You might not be satisfied with your catch.
那你的意思，是要拒绝咯？
忆者…你觉得你能安然离开？
Memokeeper... Did you think you could just leave?
亲爱的，不吓你了。你会知道答案的，迟早的事！今天就当浅浅认识下，什么时候改变心意了，就来「酒馆」找我吧——前提是要找得到，哈哈！

My dear, I don't want to scare you. You'll know the answer sooner or later! We're just getting to know each other a little today. If you ever change your mind, come find me at the tavern — that is, IF you can find me, haha!
咦，我这是…这里不是贝洛伯格？
Eh, this is... This is Belobog, right?
别担心，太过粗暴的方式有违我的记忆美学，所以等我离开所有人的视线，你们就能重新想起一切了。以及……
Don't worry. Such a crude approach violates my aesthetics of memory, so once you leave my sight, you'll be able to remember everything again. And also...
对不起哦，亲爱的。心仪的舞伴…我已经有人选了。
I'm sorry, my dear. My dream dance partner... I've already got sights on someone else.
…真是的，我又不会真的对她做什么。
...Really, I wouldn't do anything to her.
别管那忆者了，来聊聊我的事吧。该帮的忙我都帮了，按照约定——
Don't worry about that Memokeeper. Let's talk about my thing. I've helped you out with everything you've asked, as agreed...
该把我的「面具」还给我了吧？
Shouldn't you give my mask back to me now?
从什么时候开始，假面愚者也要遵守约定了？
Since when did the Masked Fools suddenly start respecting agreements?
——哈哈，开玩笑的！我就爱看你这表情，拿去吧，酒馆地窖的钥匙，在左手边第三个桶里。别说是我给的。
...Haha, just kidding! I love seeing that look on your face. Take this key to the tavern cellar. Third barrel on the left. You never saw me.
不过啊，桑博…时隔这么久，你怎么突然想起拿回面具了？这不像我认识的你呀……
But Sampo... After all this time, what made you suddenly want to take back your mask? This doesn't seem like the Sampo I know...
让我猜猜——雅利洛-VI大灾将至了，对么？
Let me guess: A catastrophe is coming to Jarilo-VI, am I right?
这个嘛，无可奉告。不过我很喜欢你说过的一句话——「好戏就要上演了，来不及登台的人，就只能退居幕后」——很有道理。
Well, no comment about that. But I loved that line you said, "If you're too late to take the stage, you can work behind the scenes" — That really makes sense.
偶尔，我老桑博也想上台献丑一番。
Sometimes, even an old-timer like me feels like taking the stage and making a fool out of myself.
要是你万策尽了，记得联系我哦。我这个人很重视情谊。
If you're all out of options, please get in touch with me. I'm the kind of person who values friendship highly.
免了吧，你离贝洛伯格远一点，就是帮了我大忙啦。毕竟花火小姐寻求的「欢愉」…桑博可不敢恭维啊。
Forget it. You'll be doing me a favor if you stay away from Belobog. After all, the Elation that Miss Sparkle seeks... isn't something ol' Sampo can stand by.
走了，替我向乔瓦尼问个好。
Go. Tell Giovanni I said hi.
知道啦，我就是随口说说，别当真嘛。一个两个都这样……
Fine, I'm just spitballing here. Don't take it so seriously...
那么接下来…我们来聊聊你这位「同伴」吧。
Then on to the next order of business — let's discuss your companion, shall we?
「忆庭的忆者，我注意你很久了。」
"Memokeeper of the Garden of Recollection: I've been watching you for quite some time."
「入住酒店时，你就在偷看我。来到梦境后，我去哪，你就跟到哪：商业街的橱窗里，艾迪恩公园的水面下，甚至酒杯的倒影里，无处不在！」

"You stole a glance at me when you first entered the hotel. You followed me wherever I went inside the dreamscape: In the windows along the commercial street, in the pondwater reflections of the Aideen Park, even in the reflections of the wine glass... Everywhere!"
「——亲爱的，你是不是暗恋我呀？好呀，既然你对我这么感兴趣，咱们就玩个游戏吧。」
"...My dear, do you have a crush on me? Well then, seeing as you're so interested in me, let's play a little game."
「我在奥帝购物中心附近给你留了道谜题，解开它，证明你有能力取悦我。如果你能做到…我们也不是不能谈谈。」
"I left a puzzle for you near Oti Mall. Solve it and prove that you're capable of pleasing me. If you can solve it... then we can talk."
「别让我等太久，亲爱的。在匹诺康尼被搅得天翻地覆前，试着找到我~抓住我~阻止我吧~」
"Don't leave me waiting, my dear. Before Penacony gets flipped upside down, try to find me~ catch me~ and stop me~"
事实上，来到匹诺康尼的忆者不止一人，她把我和其他人弄混了。不过也无妨……
There's actually more than one Memokeeper who's come to Penacony — she mixed me up with someone else. But no harm, no foul...
面具中提到的地址就是这里，只是没想到…花火小姐口中的游戏竟是在匹诺康尼街头「大开杀戒」。
The address that the mask gave you is right here. But you never would have thought... that when Miss Sparkle mentioned a game, she was talking about wanton slaughter on the streets of Penacony.
收到如此直接的挑衅，我也多少被激起了些好胜心呢。
Such a direct act of provocation is enough to get my competitive side worked up too.
姐，您饶了我吧，她说的这些我真不知道——都给你查过脑子了。
Madam, forgive me. I had no idea about anything she said — As you saw, I went through a brain scan and everything.
我只是朋友一场，帮她送个信而已——谁知这不是送信，是下战书来了啊！都说两军交战不斩来使，您放我走吧，你们玩得太大了，我实在陪不起……

I am just a friend, helping her deliver a letter, that's all — I never knew this was actually a declaration of warfare! They say you shouldn't kill the messenger — so maybe you can just, you know, let me go. You all are the big shots here. I'm really not on your level...
很害怕的表情呢。放心，既然此事与你无关，我不会为难你的。就当陪我走走吧。
What a frightened look you have. Don't worry. Since this has nothing to do with you, I won't be suspecting you of anything. Why don't you come take a stroll with me?
哎哟，看来这「侦探助手」我是逃不掉了…行吧行吧，唉，都什么事儿啊！
Ah, seems like I can't escape being an assistant detective... Fine. It's all fine, no big deal!
二位想知道什么尽管开口。
If there's anything you'd like to know, please ask away.
是位星际和平公司的职员，叫沙马里。听目击者说，有个人高马大的壮汉，穿得宽袍大袖，和沙马里擦肩而过时，突然一锤子砸了下去…
An IPC employee named Shamari. Eyewitnesses reported that a tall, strong man wearing a large robe with long sleeves walked right past Shamari, then suddenly assaulted him with a hammer...
沙马里当场就不行了，一下从梦里惊醒了过来。那凶手也转眼消失不见。
Shamari collapsed on the spot and woke up from the dream. The murderer vanished in a flash.
唉，一听就是花火干的。她最擅长的就是变化成其他人的样子。
That sounds just like Sparkle. Her best asset is transforming her appearance to look like someone else.
Regarding the Sweet Dreams Troupe present at the scene of the crime...
Who are those two little guys?
似乎是袭击者从别处偷来的美梦剧团，故意放在这儿的…真气人，简直就是不把公共秩序放在眼里。
Seems like the assailant stole the troupe from elsewhere and deliberately placed them here. What nerve... They don't even have the slightest consideration for public order.
那俩东西一直不肯说话，不知道二位能否撬开它们的嘴。
Those two have clammed up. I wonder if you two could help pry open their mouths.
看来那就是花火留给你的谜题了。
Looks like a puzzle that Sparkle has left behind for you.
Regarding evidence at the scene of the crime...
因为是突发事件，没什么有用的线索，只有袭击者使用的凶器，和受害者的证件……
This is a developing case, so there aren't many clues yet. All we have to go by are the weapon used by the assailant and the victim's ID...
那人没带走凶器，大概是在向我们挑衅吧…太可恨了。
They didn't even take the weapon with them. Sounds like they're trying to provoke us... Despicable.
那位沙马里先生现在在哪里？我想和他见一面。
Where is Mr. Shamari right now? I'd like to meet him.
恐怕不行。橡木家系出面安抚了他的情绪，沙马里先生对梦中的不可思议表示理解，前往其他梦境继续度假了。
I'm afraid you can't. The Oaks came forward and calmed him down. Mr. Shamari expressed that he understands the unpredictable nature of dreams, and went on to vacation in another dreamscape.
还是不要打扰他了。客人们的体验永远排在第一优先。
Best not to bother him then. Guests' experiences always have to come first.
等找到他，怕不是半个匹诺康尼都要被花火送回现实了……
I'm afraid by the time we find him, half of Penacony will have been sent back to reality by Sparkle...
看来我们不得不陪花火小姐玩这场游戏了呢。
Looks like we'll have to play this little game of Sparkle's then.
喂！亲爱的忆者？你要去哪儿？不会想逃吧？不会是怕了吧？流光忆庭就这？就这？就这？
Hey! My dear Memokeeper? Where do you think you're going! Don't think you can escape, hmm? Are you afraid? Is that it for the Garden of Recollection? Is that it? Is that all?
哎！这都是花火的个人发言，可不代表假面愚者啊！
Hey! That's Sparkle who's saying all that! She doesn't represent the Masked Fools!
喂！亲爱的忆者？你要去哪儿？不会是想逃吧？不会是怕了吧？流光忆庭就这？就这？就这？
Hey! My dear Memokeeper? Where do you think you're going! Don't think you can escape, hmm? Are you afraid? Is that it for the Garden of Recollection? Is that it? Is that all?
黑天鹅大人，我们总算等到您了！我是此地的捕头，旁边那位则是协助我一起办案的捕快。
Lady Black Swan, you're here! I'm the constable, and this here assisting me is the bailiff for this case.
哟，寒腿叔叔，你怎么叛变了？
Mr. Cold Feet — Why did you do it?
还真开口说话了！黑天鹅小姐，它们果真是冲着你来的——
So they can talk after all! Miss Black Swan, they're heading straight for you...
少插嘴，有你说话的份吗？咳咳…听闻黑天鹅大人智计超凡，想来定能解开这起「花火大人遇害案」的真相！
Don't interrupt. I wasn't talking to you. Ahem... I understand Lady Black Swan has quite the intellect. I'm sure you'll be able to get to the bottom of the Sparkle murder case!
「花火大人遇害案」？受害者不是星际和平公司的沙马里吗？
The Sparkle Murder case? Wasn't the victim Shamari from the IPC?
您弄错了，黑天鹅大人。遇害的分明是金槌家的家主，金槌花火大人啊！
You're wrong, Lady Black Swan. The victim is evidently none other than the matriarch of the Goldhammer Family: Miss Sparkle Goldhammer!
…哦，看来这是花火小姐自导自演的小剧场，和实际案件并无关联。「金槌」是她的姓氏吗？
...Oh, I guess Miss Sparkle has written herself into the skit here, and this has nothing to do with the actual case. Goldhammer — is that her real surname?
没听说过啊，随口编的吧。我看「花火」也不像什么真名。
Never heard of it. Sounds made up. Sparkle doesn't sound like a real name, either.
今天本应是花火大人在金槌府邸接见手下三位勇士的日子，可当勇士们走进府邸后，看见的却是「花火大人的尸体」。
Miss Sparkle was supposed to receive three valiant warriors at the Goldhammer residence today but upon their arrival, all they found was her body.
花火大人的脑袋被锤子砸开了花，当场毙命…多么残忍的暴行啊！
Miss Sparkle had been smashed over the head by a hammer, and died on the spot... Such a brutal act of violence!
据我调查，案发前日，三位勇士本应押送一批货物回到领地内，谁料在路上遭遇了山贼泯灭帮的袭击。
My investigations discovered that the three warriors were supposed to escort supplies back to their territory the day before, but they were unexpectedly ambushed by the Annihilation Gang.
三人九死一生，好不容易捡回一条命，但货物却被劫得不剩多少了。所以他们每个人都有为了逃避责任而杀害花火大人的动机！
They narrowly escaped and barely got away with their lives, finding their supplies almost completely raided. So they all shared a motive for killing Miss Sparkle — to escape punishment!
如此看来，是三位勇士联手行凶？
So the three of them teamed up to kill her?
不对，凶手只能有一个人！三个人都是凶手还算什么疑案…稍等…稍等……
No, there can only be one murderer! It's not an unsolved mystery if there are three murderers... Hang on... Wait...
If you can't justify it, don't bother...
有了！他们三人为争夺二把手的位置，关系极其紧张，根本不可能合作！所以必然是其中一人单独作案！
Got it! Those three were all vying against each other to be number two. They couldn't have cooperated on anything! So it must have been one of them acting alone.
其实不太讲得通，就算这三个人关系不好，可是……
That actually doesn't make much sense. Even if they were on bad terms, those three...
请黑天鹅大人开始调查吧！案发现场留下了许多线索，一定能帮助您锁定真凶。
Please begin your investigation, Lady Black Swan! There are lots of clues at the crime scene that are sure to help you apprehend the real culprit.
我已备好案件卷宗，您可以向我了解更多有关嫌疑人的信息。
I've got the case file right here. If you want to learn more about the suspects, talk to me.
黑天鹅大人，请容我向您介绍本案的三名嫌疑人——佐罗、钟珊和阿佑。
Lady Black Swan, please allow me to introduce the three suspects to you — Lefton, Zhongshan, and Wright.
佐罗是花火大人部下悍将，在对抗山贼时，奋勇抗敌，<color=#dbc291ff>右手不幸被斩断了</color>。现在正在练习用左手写字和拿筷子，真是可怜啊。

Lefton is one of Miss Sparkle's chief lieutenants, whose <color=#dbc291ff>right hand was unfortunately severed</color> while he was valiantly fighting off the Annihilation Gang. He's now learning how to write and hold a fork with his left hand — how tough that must be!
钟珊这人胆子比较小，遇见山贼转身就跑，结果撞到了山岩上，<color=#dbc291ff>整张脸都破相了</color>。可惜可惜，以前他可是城中难得一见的美男子啊。

Then there's Zhongshan — this guy's a coward who ran away as soon as the group spotted some bandits along the road. He ended up smashing into the side of a cliff and <color=#dbc291ff>getting his face disfigured</color>. It's a real shame, as he used to be one of the rare handsome men left around town.
最后是阿佑，这家伙贪得无厌，好不容易逃出生天，竟打算私吞剩下的货物，谎称是被山贼全部抢走了…佐罗和钟珊气不过，就<color=#dbc291ff>把他的腿打断了</color>。

Last of all comes Wright. This guy was so insatiably greedy that he still came back to try and embezzle the rest of the supplies after they narrowly escaped with their lives, lying about how the gang had taken off with everything... Lefton and Zhongshan were so incensed that they <color=#dbc291ff>broke his legs</color>.
等等，我给绕晕了…这左中右都是啥来着？
Hang on. I'm confused here... Lefton... Wright? Is this some kind of joke?
怎么样，您记住了吗？需不需要我再讲一遍？
What? Where did you get that idea from? Do you need me to go over it all over again?
我倒是都记住了。不过…看来「侦探助手」先生还有疑虑啊…那，麻烦你再复述一遍？
Got it. But... it sounds like Mr. Assistant Detective has his own misgivings... Would you like to go over it again?
佐罗是花火大人部下悍将，在对抗山贼时，奋勇抗敌，<color=#dbc291ff>右手不幸被斩断了</color>。现在正在练习用左手写字和拿筷子，真是可怜啊。

Lefton is one of Miss Sparkle's chief lieutenants, whose <color=#dbc291ff>right hand was unfortunately severed</color> while he was valiantly fighting off the Annihilation Gang. He's now learning how to write and hold a fork with his left hand — how tough that must be!
钟珊这人胆子比较小，遇见山贼转身就跑，结果撞到了山岩上，<color=#dbc291ff>整张脸都破相了</color>。可惜可惜，以前他可是城中难得一见的美男子啊。

Then there's Zhongshan — this guy's a coward who ran away as soon as the group spotted some bandits along the road. He ended up smashing into the side of a cliff and <color=#dbc291ff>getting his face disfigured</color>. It's a real shame, as he used to be one of the rare handsome men left around town.
最后是阿佑，这家伙贪得无厌，好不容易逃出生天，竟打算私吞剩下的货物，谎称是被山贼全部抢走了…佐罗和钟珊气不过，就<color=#dbc291ff>把他的腿打断了</color>。

Last of all comes Wright. This guy was so insatiably greedy that he still came back to try and embezzle the rest of the supplies after they narrowly escaped with their lives, lying about how the gang had taken off with everything... Lefton and Zhongshan were so incensed that they <color=#dbc291ff>broke his legs</color>.
以上就是三位嫌疑人全部的信息了。
That's all the intel we have on the three suspects.
That won't be necessary. I've memorized every detail.
就这点「证物」？这叫人怎么答题嘛……
Is that all the evidence? How are we meant to solve this with so little to go on...
吓我一跳！你什么时候跑出来的？
You scared me! When did you pop out?
你们发现的两件证物，是和沙马里遇袭相关的东西。花火大人物尽其用，将它们也当做了谜题的线索。
The two pieces of evidence that you found are related to the attack on Shamari. Miss Sparkle didn't leave them lying around for no reason — they are clues to the puzzle.
但还有一些别的线索，被放在了更不碍事的地方……
But, there are still some other clues that were placed in other areas so they won't spoil the crime scene...
这是否有些多此一举了？
不不，如果在犯罪现场放一堆无关紧要的东西，不就成扰乱搜查了嘛！花火大人可是守法公民，绝不给家族添麻烦！
No no, it's disruptive to have a stack of irrelevant things crowding a crime scene! Miss Sparkle is a law-abiding citizen who'd never bring extra trouble to The Family!
Seems quite nice of her, if you ask me...
看来花火小姐是想为调查再多添几分乐趣，我们就收下她的好意吧。请来这边，「侦探助手」先生。
Looks like Miss Sparkle is adding a little spice to the investigation. Let's take her up on her offer then — Mr. Assistant Detective, this way.
这张告示…似乎是花火留给我们的提示。
This notice... seems like a hint for us from Miss Sparkle.
刚听着还像个古代背景的故事，怎么突然冒出个人脸识别系统？
That sounded like a story from ancient times... and why did the facial recognition system suddenly go out?
This is so her style, isn't it?
嗯…这个小巧的装置是做什么用的，可以为我解释一下吗？看上去像是个按钮。
Mmm... What's this little device here for? Could you please let me know? It looks like a little button.
别按！黑天鹅大人，千万别按！
Don't push it! Lady Black Swan, whatever you do — don't push it!
这是花火大人留下的「相互保证毁灭」按钮，一旦按下，花火大人会立刻和整个匹诺康尼一起灰飞烟灭！
That's the "Mutually Assured Destruction" button that Miss Sparkle installed. Once pushed, Miss Sparkle and the entirety of Penacony will instantaneously go up in smoke!
与此同时，花火大人也持有一个相同的按钮。一旦她按下，您就会立刻和整个匹诺康尼一起灰飞烟灭！
Miss Sparkle also has her own button. The second she pushes hit, you and the entirety of Penacony will instantaneously go up in smoke!
这听起来…似乎没什么区别？
That sounds like... both buttons can do the exact same thing?
您不问问这是为什么吗？
Aren't you going to ask me why?
这又是什么东西…毛绒玩具？
且不论形象为何是星穹列车的列车长，这个玩偶也和案件有关吗？
Regardless of why it's designed like the conductor aboard the Astral Express, this doll — Is it connected to the case?
您有所不知，这在推理故事中叫「红鲱鱼」，意思是「误导思路的假线索」！

原来如此。但你这么直截了当地说出来，它不就没有用了吗？
I see. But when it's so obvious, doesn't that defeat the purpose?
这、这不是怕二位没能察觉花火小姐的巧思，误以为她随便扔了个没用的线索……

多谢你的良苦用心，那我们就假装被「红鲱鱼」误导了吧。嗯…这个玩偶也和案件有关吗？

Wamp wah — wrong answer. That's funky, but a wild guess.
既然你以这幅姿态站在我的面前，那我猜…答案是「垃圾桶」，对吗？
Seeing as you're right here in front of me like this, then I guess... the answer is "a trashcan," right?
卟卟——回答错误！你不会以为标新立异就能蒙对吧？
Wamp wah — wrong answer. That's funky, but a wild guess.
早上困困的爬不起床，中午东奔西跑到处忙，晚上累到趴趴，可还要抬起手刷牙——好可怜的花火呀！
When sleepy in the morning, she can't get out of bed. She runs about all afternoon in a fluster, so is exhausted by evening — but has to still raise a hand to hold a toothbrush. Poor Sparkle!
所以当然是「早上四条腿，中午两条腿，晚上三条腿」咯～
So naturally she's got "four legs in the morning, two legs in the afternoon, and three legs at night"~
What the heck was that jibber-jabber...
谢谢你的夸奖，亲爱的。不过鉴于你刚才的作弊行为，这次可没那么好糊弄了哦！答错了…就接受惩罚吧！
Thanks for the compliment, my dear. But you can't try to fool me seeing as you've just tried to cheat! Wrong answer... accept your punishment!
吓、吓死我了！这家伙怎么回事，怎么还突然动手了呢！
H—Holy smokes! What's up with this guy? He just came out swinging from nowhere!
喔，没声音了？这家伙可算安静了。姐，咱们赶紧打开盖子，把那姑娘揪出来吧……
Huh, no voices? This guy's pretty quiet. Miss, let's hurry up, flip open the lid and find the girl...
啊…啊啊啊啊！姐，你…你把花火给打死了！
Ah... Ahhh! Miss, you... you killed Sparkle!
这、这怎么可能？！匹诺康尼的梦里怎么会死人！流光忆庭的…你做了什么？！
H—How is this possible? How can people die inside Penacony's dreamscape? In the Garden of Recollection... what did you do!?
是你干的，对不对？在梦里杀人…只有「记忆」的力量能做到这事！你从一开始就计划好了，就因为她捉弄你，跟你开玩笑…你就要杀她灭口！

You did this, didn't you? Killing people in their dreams... only the Remembrance has the powers to do that! You planned it out all from the start. Because she teased you and was pranking you... you wanted to kill her!
哦…我懂了，你坚持不肯放我走，就是为了拖我下水啊！如果我不答应，下场…下场就会和她一样……
Oh... I understand. You refused to let me go because you wanted to drag me into all of this! If I don't agree, I'll end up... just like she did...
匹诺康尼的美梦中不存在死亡，这是家族的允诺，也是「同谐」的庇佑。就算是忆者也无法打破这道屏障。
There is no death inside Penacony's dreamscape. That's the promise of The Family and the blessing of the Harmony. Not even a Memokeeper can break this barrier.
不必如此大费周章，如果你只是想确认这件事…我已经把答案告诉你了，花火小姐。
There's no need to take such great pains. If you just want confirmation... I've already told you the answer, Miss Sparkle.
花…花火小姐？你在和谁说话呢？
Miss... Miss Sparkle? Who are you talking to?
「花火伪装成的另一名角色」…不就是你吗，「桑博」先生？
"Sparkle has disguised herself as another character"... Wouldn't that be you, Mr. Sampo?
…您要想指认我是花火，可得提出相应的证据才行。哦，证据怕是有点难了，所以…「推理」也可以。
...If you want to accuse me of being Sparkle, you have to provide the evidence. Oh, I'm afraid evidence is a little hard to come by... so "deduction" will do.
最后那一题的提示，稍稍有些明显了哦。
The hint for the final question was a little too obvious.
喔，是「密室杀人事件」？我还以为您不打算理会它了呢。
Oh, you mean the locked-room murder? I thought you weren't planning on doing that one.
那可是花火小姐的心血，我怎么舍得真的跳过呢？
All the painstaking effort that Miss Sparkle put into it — how could I ever miss it?
解谜的关键在于侦探提出的两个信息：第一，现场有很多血迹。第二，受害者明显已死去多时。
The key to solving the puzzle lay in two pieces of information put forward by the detectives: First, the large splatter of blood at the crime scene. Second, the victim had been dead for some time.
以我尚浅的认知，只能得出两个结论：其一是，凶手似乎没有制造「密室杀人」的必要，因为密室总需要一个存在的理由……
Based on my shallow understanding, I can only draw two conclusions: One is that the murderer did not need to create a locked-room case — because a locked-room always needs a reason to exist...
可按侦探的描述，这间密室并没能延缓目击者发现尸体，现场也没有可供嫁祸的第三者，而满地鲜血也不像是要伪装成自杀……

But based on the detective's description, this locked-room did not delay the discovery of the body. There was no third party at the crime scene to frame, and the blood everywhere didn't look like a faked suicide...
如此一来，凶手似乎没有制造密室的理由。也有理由推测，如果现场真的是密室——那制造出密室的人，未必是凶手。

That being so, the murderer seems to have no reason for creating a locked-room. There is also reason to speculate that if the crime scene was a locked-room — then its creator might not necessarily be the murderer.
至于第二个结论就更显而易见了。众人闯入现场时，助手为什么要冲上去止血？这样的专业人士，怎会不惜破坏现场也要抢救一个明显死去多时的人？

As for my second conclusion, it's even more obvious still. When everyone broke into the scene of the crime, why did the assistant rush off to staunch the blood? A trained professional was somehow happily destroying a crime scene just to save someone who's obviously been dead a while?
答案很简单——因为「侦探助手」就是凶手。
The answer is simple: It's because the assistant detective is the murderer.
当时走得匆忙，没有听完整个谜面，我姑且做出如下推测：凶手在前夜杀害了死者，但并没有反锁房门。
At the time I was in such a hurry that I didn't hear the whole mystery. I tentatively speculated that the murderer had killed the victim the night before, but hadn't locked the door from the inside.
因此当他得知这一信息时，就意识到是一息尚存的死者自己制造了密室。
And so when he learned this piece of information, he realized that the victim had created their own locked-room mystery.
为此，他必须第一时间赶到现场，确认死者是否留下了对自己不利的证据。而从他的行为来看，应该和那块画布有关吧，也许死亡讯息就在其上。

That's why he had to rush to the crime scene as soon as possible, to confirm whether or not the victim left any evidence implicating him. And judging by his behavior, it probably had something to do with that canvas, like some final words.
当然，这只是一个简单的思维游戏。谜底是什么并不重要，花火小姐只是为了暗示我一件事——凶手是「侦探助手」……
Of course, this is just a simple mind game. The answer to the puzzle isn't important. Miss Sparkle just wanted to pass on one hint to me: That the murderer is the assistant detective...
…也就是你，「桑博」先生。尽管我一直在使用这个称呼——但它最早是你提出的。
...which means it's you, Mr. Sampo. I've been using this term of address — but it was you who first came up with it.
有没有人说过，比起忆者，你更像是一位侦探。
Has anyone ever told you that you're more like a detective than a Memokeeper?
在我看来，这二者并无本质区别。循着水面上的细微波纹，使用一些能力和技巧，不断深潜，触及人心中最深的秘密，将其打捞，悉心保护……

In my opinion, there is no difference between the two. Follow ripples along the surface of the water. Use some abilities and tricks to keep diving deeper, and touch that secret deep inside people's hearts. Salvage it, and protect them carefully...
真相不会说谎，「记忆」也不会。
The truth does not lie. Neither do memories.
非常精彩的推理，已经无限接近真相了…只不过，我这还有另一个谜底，您想听听看吗？
Exquisite reasoning, and very close to the truth... But I have another answer. Would you like to hear it?
大艺术家花火反锁上卧室的房门，用红色颜料制造出了「到处都是血」的假象。而那位第一个冲进室内，并证明她已死亡的侦探助手……

The great artist Sparkle locked herself away in her bedroom, using red paint to create the semblance of spattered blood everywhere. And that assistant detective who was first on the scene who confirmed her death...
…并不是凶手，而是协助她诈死的「共犯」。
...was not the murderer, but rather an accomplice who assisted her in faking her own death.
遗憾，遗憾。亲爱的，你真的只差一点点点点就答对了。可惜，正确答案是——
What a pity. Such a pity. My dear, you were so-so-so-SO close to the right answer. Unfortunately, the right answer is...
Sparkle was disguised as Sparkle's body.
黑天鹅小姐，桑博先生，你们终于来了！我是匹诺康尼的「名侦探」，旁边这位是我的「侦探助手」。
Miss Black Swan, Mr. Sampo: You're finally here! I am the famed detective of Penacony, and next to me here is my assistant detective.
这里竟发生了令我们都感到棘手的<color=#dbc291ff>密室杀人事件</color>！
<color=#dbc291ff>A murder in a locked room</color> has left us all stumped!
As expected, another change in setting...
昨日，我和助手前来拜访大艺术家花火大人，并在她家中借宿一晚。可第二天早上，花火大人却迟迟没有从卧室中出来。
Yesterday, my assistant and I were visiting the famed artist Miss Sparkle, and we stayed the night. But this morning, Miss Sparkle didn't come out of her bedroom.
管家钟珊说，房门从里面反锁了，他本不该打搅…可花火大人从不会这么晚起床，而且无论他怎么敲门，里面也没有任何回应。

The butler, Zhongshan, said that the door was locked from inside, so he ought not to have disturbed her... But Miss Sparkle had never slept in so late, and no matter how hard he knocked, there was no answer from inside.
我一听就知道，这肯定是出事了！于是当机立断，撞破大门冲进了房间……
As soon as I heard, I knew something must have happened! So I acted decisively and broke the door down to get inside...
房间里到处都是血啊！「花火大人的尸体」就躺在正中央，面色白得像雪，一看就知道<color=#dbc291ff>死去多时</color>了……
The room was covered in spattered blood! Miss Sparkle's body was lying right in the middle, her face as white as snow. One look told me she'd been <color=#dbc291ff>dead for some time</color>...
我赶忙抓起一旁的画布为花火大人止血，可…哎，可怜的花火大人，还是永远离开了我们！
Thinking quickly, I grabbed the artist's canvas to staunch Miss Sparkle's blood, but... Alas, poor Miss Sparkle. She's left us now, forever!
当时在现场的，除了我俩和管家钟珊，还有厨师佐罗和司机阿佑…哎，黑天鹅小姐，你要做什么？
Besides us and Zhongshan the butler, Lefton the cook and Wright the driver were also at the scene of the crime... What would you like to do?
想必现在…花火小姐正在精心布置下一个「案发现场」吧？
Presumably... Miss Sparkle is now carefully arranging the next crime scene, right?
不如略过那些复杂的过程，和我来一场敞开心扉的交流呢？可能会有点痒哦。
Why don't you skip all this rigmarole and just have a heart-to-heart conversation with me? It might tickle a little.
嗯…诚实的孩子。我知道你在哪儿了，花火小姐。
Hmmm... honest kid. I know where you are, Miss Sparkle.
怎么了，「侦探助手」先生？你好像很心急的样子。
Huh, Mr. Assistant Detective? You seem to be getting anxious?
啊，不…我，这…哈哈，这密室杀人事件有点意思，我还想猜猜看呢……
Ah, no... I, it's... Haha, this locked-room murder case is pretty fun. I wanna guess who it was...
走吧——不能让女孩子久等呀。
Let's go — can't keep a girl waiting, can we?
喂！黑天鹅小姐，等一等，等一等！花火大人还有最后一件事要宣布——
Hey! Miss Black Swan, wait up. Wait up! Miss Sparkle has one final message to announce...
锵锵——现在就是一出戏剧最令人激动也最浪漫的时刻：挑战观众环节！
Ding-a-ling~ Now comes the most exciting and romantic moment in any drama: The audience challenge!
众所周知，可怕的假面愚者花火可以变化为其他人的样貌。而在这出剧目中，大反派花火已将自己伪装成了另一名角色。
Everyone knows that the mighty Masked Fool Sparkle can change her appearance to look like others. And in this drama, the villain, Sparkle, has disguised herself as another character.
那么请问——这名角色究竟是谁呢！
So then, I put to you: Which character is it!
另外，那位忆者不想挑战的密室杀人事件，若诸位有兴趣也可试着推理一番。花火好不容易想出来的谜题，可别浪费了！
Also, if you're interested in the locked-room case that the Memokeeper ignored, you can try out your powers of deduction. I put lots into coming up with the puzzle, so don't let it go to waste!
以上，便是「假面天才」花火大人的挑战书！所有线索已经备齐——祝君狩猎愉快！
Thus the Masked Genius Miss Sparkle has thrown down the gauntlet! All the clues are in motion — happy hunting!
Do you two need anything else?
Just want to confirm case details again.
请你再为我们说明下案发经过吧。
Please can you explain to us again the details of the case?
No problem. What would you like to know about?
是位星际和平公司的职员，叫沙马里。听目击者说，有个人高马大的壮汉，穿得宽袍大袖，和沙马里擦肩而过时突然一锤子砸了下去…
An IPC employee named Shamari. Eyewitnesses reported that a tall, strong man wearing a large robe with long sleeves walked right past Shamari, then suddenly assaulted him with a hammer...
沙马里当场就不行了，一下从梦里惊醒了过来。那凶手也转眼消失不见。
Shamari collapsed on the spot and woke up from the dream. The murderer vanished in a flash.
Regarding the Sweet Dreams Troupe present at the scene of the crime...
似乎是袭击者从别处偷来的美梦剧团，故意放在这儿的…真气人，简直就是不把公共秩序放在眼里。
Seems like the assailant stole the troupe from elsewhere and deliberately placed them here. What nerve... They don't even have the slightest consideration for public order.
那俩东西一直不肯说话，不知道二位能否撬开它们的嘴。
Those two have clammed up. I wonder if you two could help pry open their mouths.
Regarding evidence at the scene of the crime...
因为是突发事件，没什么有用的线索，只有袭击者使用的凶器，和受害者的证件……
This is a developing case, so there aren't many clues yet. All we have to go by are the weapon used by the assailant and the victim's ID...
那人没带走凶器，大概是在向我们挑衅吧…太可恨了。
They didn't even take the weapon with them. Sounds like they're trying to provoke us... Despicable.
I don't have any other questions.
谢谢，我没有其他问题了。
Thank you. I don't have any further questions.
不用谢，二位想知道什么尽管开口。
You're welcome. If there's anything you'd like to know, please ask away.
I don't have any other questions.
谢谢，我没有其他问题了。
Thank you. I don't have any further questions.
不用谢，二位想知道什么尽管开口。
You're welcome. If there's anything you'd like to know, please ask away.
接下来…来会会这两个小家伙吧。
Next up... let's interview those two over there.
那姑娘说它们一直保持沉默，但如果对你有反应，就代表它们真是花火布置的谜题了。
That girl said they're always silent, but if they gave you a reaction, it means they're actually one of Sparkle's puzzles.
两名猎犬家系的保镖保护着犯罪现场，确保不会有任何无关人员靠近。
The two Bloodhound guards are protecting the crime scene, ensuring no one unrelated to the matter is able to get near.
他们不会突然意识到，咱们根本不是什么「侦查人员」吧……
You don't think they'll realize we aren't actually detectives, do you?
当然不会。请多信任我一点。
No way. Please put more trust in me.
请黑天鹅大人开始调查吧！案发现场留下了许多线索，一定能帮助您锁定真凶。
Please begin your investigation, Lady Black Swan! There are lots of clues at the crime scene that are sure to help you apprehend the real culprit.
请问您还有什么问题吗？
Have you got any more questions?
I'd like to hear about the suspects one more time.
佐罗是花火大人部下悍将，在对抗山贼时，奋勇抗敌，<color=#dbc291ff>右手不幸被斩断了</color>。现在正在练习用左手写字和拿筷子，真是可怜啊。

Lefton is one of Miss Sparkle's chief lieutenants, whose <color=#dbc291ff>right hand was unfortunately severed</color> while he was valiantly fighting off the Annihilation Gang. He's now learning how to write and hold a fork with his left hand — how tough that must be!
钟珊这人胆子比较小，遇见山贼转身就跑，结果撞到了山岩上，<color=#dbc291ff>整张脸都破相了</color>。可惜可惜，以前他可是城中难得一见的美男子啊。

Then there's Zhongshan — this guy's a coward who ran away as soon as the group spotted some bandits along the road. He ended up smashing into the side of a cliff and <color=#dbc291ff>getting his face disfigured</color>. It's a real shame, as he used to be one of the rare handsome men left around town.
最后是阿佑，这家伙贪得无厌，好不容易逃出生天，竟打算私吞剩下的货物，谎称是被山贼全部抢走了…佐罗和钟珊气不过，就<color=#dbc291ff>把他的腿打断了</color>。

Last of all comes Wright. This guy was so insatiably greedy that he still came back to try and embezzle the rest of the supplies after they narrowly escaped with their lives, lying about how the gang had taken off with everything... Lefton and Zhongshan were so incensed that they <color=#dbc291ff>broke his legs</color>.
以上就是三位嫌疑人全部的信息了。
That's all the intel we have on the three suspects.
对于案件我没有疑问，只是有些好奇…花火是怎么操纵你的？
I have no questions about the case, but I'm just curious... How did Sparkle manipulate you?
我只是一介捕快，不清楚和本案无关的事情！
I'm just a lowly bailiff. I don't know anything except for this 'ere case!
看，这有张证件——「人才激励部，沙马里」…是受害者的东西？
Look, an ID card: "Talent Motivation Department: Shamari"... Is this the victim's?
随着沙马里先生的惊醒，他的随身物品本应一并从梦境中消失才对。这张证件应该是花火小姐放置的，为了证明她确实袭击过某个人。

Mr. Shamari's belongings should have disappeared alongside him as he woke from the Dreamscape. The fact this ID is here means Miss Sparkle placed it here on purpose to prove that she definitely attacked someone.
我的个乖乖，这锤子分量可不轻啊…应该就是「花火大人遇害案」的凶器了。
Holy moly, this hammer is super heavy... This must be the murder weapon for the Sparkle Murder Case.
花火小姐也是用它袭击了沙马里先生吧。
Miss Sparkle also used it to attack Mr. Shamari.
这东西我两只手拎着都费劲，真不知道花火是怎么用它来打人的……
I'm barely able to lift this using both hands. I have no idea how Sparkle could ever use this to hit a target...
So who exactly is the murderer?
根据捕快的供词，佐罗的惯用手受了重伤，甚至必须学习用左手生活。挥舞那柄巨型铁锤行凶…对他应该相对困难，甚至是不可能的事吧。

Based on the bailiff's statement, Lefton's dominant hand was seriously injured to the point where he had to learn how to live using only his left hand. Swinging that giant sledgehammer to murder someone... that must be hard for him. Probably impossible.
佐罗的嫌疑可以下降了。
Lefton's suspicion level can be downgraded.
呃…是这样吗，感觉证据有点对不上号啊？要不，再想想？
Er... is that so? I feel like the evidence doesn't really match? How about you think it over again?
So who exactly is the murderer?
记得「钟珊」是<color=#dbc291ff>把脸摔破相了</color>，没错吧？
Remember Zhongshan's face was <color=#dbc291ff>disfigured</color> after the incident at the cliff, right?
可怜的人，脸上受了重伤，就算能保住美貌，最近也不得不缠着纱布出行吧。如此一来，他是无法通过金槌府邸的人脸识别系统的。

Poor guy. He was seriously injured and was all wrapped up in bandages to keep his good looks safe. If that's the case, then he couldn't have made it through the Goldhammer residence's facial recognition system.
如此看来，钟珊不会是凶手。
That would suggest that Zhongshan is not the murderer.
呃…是这样吗，感觉证据有点对不上号啊？要不，再想想？
Er... is that so? I feel like the evidence doesn't really match? How about you think it over again?
这么看来，凶手也只能是阿佑了——有点简单啊。咱们把答案告诉捕头，看看它是什么反应吧。
By process of elimination, it seems that only Wright could be the murderer. That was easy. Let's tell the constable our answer and see what he thinks.
So who exactly is the murderer?
这人我印象很深，「阿佑」的<color=#dbc291ff>腿断了</color>。
I remember this one best. Wright has a <color=#dbc291ff>broken leg</color>.
呃…是这样吗，感觉证据有点对不上号啊？要不，再想想？
Er... is that so? I feel like the evidence doesn't really match? How about you think it over again?
捕头和捕快成了两具颓然的死物。看来，它们已经完成任务了。
At this moment, the constable and his bailiff lay lifelessly, mere husks of their former selves. It seems they have already completed their mission.
所以，你究竟为什么对花火的挑战这么上心？还是说…你关心的是她这个人？
So, why are you so focused on Sparkle's challenge? Or should I ask... are you more focused on Sparkle herself?
我说过，这只是出于一些…小小的好胜心。
I told you, it's purely out of a spirit of competitiveness.
以及，身为忆者，我也要履行自己的职责，去收获一些「足够有趣」的记忆。
And, as a Memokeeper, I also have to fulfill my responsibilities and harvest some interesting memories.
如何，黑天鹅警探，你找出凶手是谁了吗？
How's it going, Detective Black Swan? Have you found out who the killer is?
还有什么事吗，黑天鹅警探？

首先是店员阿佑，他是个皮皮西人，身高还不到花火大人的腰，这一点常被人取笑，令他变得有些阴暗。
First of all is the shopkeeper, Wright. He's one of the Pepeshi people and only stands as tall as Sparkle's waist, which is often a source of teasing for him. He can get pretty salty about it.
然后是富商佐罗。他想加入匹诺康尼的商事集团，同花火大人是竞争关系。也许这就是他的杀人动机。
Next up, you have the merchant Lefton. He wants to join up with the Penacony trading guild, and is in direct competition with Miss Sparkle. That could be a motive for killing her.
最后是赌徒钟珊。他曾在一场赌局中输给花火大人，不得不交出自己的传家之宝，可能正因如此，他对花火大人怀恨在心。
Finally there is the gambler, Zhongshan. He lost a bet to Miss Sparkle, and he had to hand over his family heirloom. It's possible he harbored a grudge against her.
只是有些好奇，花火小姐一人分饰多角，不会感到累吗？
I'm just a little curious. Isn't it really tiring for Miss Sparkle to play so many different roles?
你要真心疼花火大人，就好好表现，让她玩得开心点！
If you really love Miss Sparkle from the bottom of your heart, then behave nicely and let her have a little fun!
地上躺着一本账本，想必是花火特地留下的吧。
There's an accounting book lying on the ground. It must have been specially placed there by Sparkle.
扉页上写着「钱可通」…是个人名？代号？看着像是这账本的主人。
On the title page is written "Qian Ketong"... is that someone's name? A codename? I think it's the name of the owner of this book.
这位钱可通应该就是这次被花火盯上的受害者了。
This Qian Ketong person should be Sparkle's targeted victim this time around.
那小剧场里说，死者是被「勒杀」的，莫非这领带就是这次的双关凶器？
That skit before said that the deceased was strangled. Is this tie some kind of joke murder weapon?
领带标签上写着「佐罗大人御用」…似乎是花火小姐的个人物品呢。
The tag on the tie reads "Only For Imperial Master Lefton"... Seems like it's one of Miss Sparkle's personal belongings.
That's not how you use the word "Imperial"...
Open it up and take a look.
哦…您已经找到答案了吗？
Hmm... Have you solved the case?
「佐罗」是个富商，和花火大人龙争虎斗数十载，可真是势同水火啊！

这条领带是佐罗的东西，而它正是本案的凶器，还有比这更坚实的铁证吗？

Lefton snuck into the changing room and waited for poor Miss Sparkle to enter, before using this very tie to brutally kill her! And then he stuffed Zhongshan's ring into her mouth as a way to try and frame him.
真是一场惨剧啊，若不是有您这样明察秋毫的神探，凶手一定会逍遥法外！
What a tragedy. If it weren't for your incisive detective work, the murderer would still be at large!

Hmm? This evidence doesn't really prove that he is the murderer...
竟然不行吗？看来花火小姐比我想象中还要「严谨」一些。
It doesn't? Looks like Miss Sparkle is more careful than I thought.
哦…您已经找到答案了吗？

这「钟珊」是个赌棍，之前和花火大人玩捞金鱼，连传家宝都被赢走了。
This guy Zhongshan is a card shark who used to play "Get the Koi" with Miss Sparkle. He gambled away his entire family fortune.
证据就是这枚戒指，对么？
This ring is a piece of evidence, right?
赌徒钟珊穷困潦倒，怎会来到这样高档的服装店？因为他是来盗窃的啊！
What would a penniless wretch of a gambler like Zhongshan be doing at such a fancy fashion store as this? Because he was planning on robbing it!
他刚偷了佐罗的领带，正欲逃走，却看见赢走自己传家宝的花火大人。于是他闯入试衣间中，试图讨回戒指……

He'd stolen Lefton's tie and was just about to get away when he saw Miss Sparkle — the one who'd stolen his family fortune from him. So he darted into the changing room, and tried to get back his ring...
谁曾想，花火大人竟将戒指吞了下去！钟珊不得不用手中的领带勒住对方的脖子，阻止她将戒指吞下肚，没想到竟失手勒死了花火大人。

Who could've known that Miss Sparkle would end up swallowing that ring! All Zhongshan could do was use the tie in his hand to try and strap down her neck to prevent her from swallowing the ring — but he unexpectedly managed to strangle Miss Sparkle to death.
真是一场惨剧啊，若不是有您这样明察秋毫的神探，凶手一定会逍遥法外！

「阿佑」是个皮皮西人，花火大人素质很差，总是笑话人家长得矮。
Wright is a Pepeshi citizen, and Miss Sparkle can be very uncivilized — she'd often laugh at his height.
证据就是这张板凳，对么？
This stool is a piece of evidence, right?
花火大人一直戏弄可怜的阿佑，最终他忍无可忍，萌生杀意！
Miss Sparkle always teased poor Wright until he was unable to take it any longer. Eventually, murderous intent was born!
他利用职务之便，偷来佐罗的领带，对花火大人说：「大人，请移步试衣间，我要为您展示一条与您相称的领带。」
Taking advantage of his position, he stole Lefton's tie and told Miss Sparkle: "Miss, please come with me to the changing room. I'd like to show you a matching tie."
花火大人没想过阿佑会反抗自己，便随他来到试衣间。阿佑踩在板凳上，如平常那样为花火大人试戴领带……
Miss Sparkle never thought Wright would retaliate against her, so she went back with him to the changing room. As Wright stood atop the stool and helped Miss Sparkle try on the tie as usual...
然后他突然用力勒紧了领带！就这样杀害了花火大人！
...he then suddenly pulled it tight! And THAT'S how he killed Miss Sparkle!
