请问副警长小姐还在吗？
Excuse me, is the deputy sheriff still around?
它的工作已经完成，现在在休长假。有什么事就和我说吧！
Its work is done and it's taking a long vacation now. Come talk to me if you need anything!
但我比较喜欢副警长小姐的性格设计呢，能不能让它回来呢？
But I preferred the character design of the deputy sheriff. Can it come back?
不能！演这么多角色很累的。
No! Playing so many roles is tiring.
黑天鹅警探，您是想听听那些你们没猜到的解答吗？
Detective Black Swan, would you like to hear about the other answers that you didn't guess?
毕竟是你费心准备的谜底，我不想错过。
Why, I wouldn't miss it for the world — seeing as you put so much work into everything.
嗯？这证据好像没法证明他是凶手吧……
Hmm? This evidence doesn't really prove that he is the murderer...
竟然不行吗？我还以为每种组合都有一种解答呢。
Nothing? I thought there was an answer for every single permutation.
不要太过分哦，花火大人也是会累的。
Don't go too far. Miss Sparkle will get tired.
There is no murderer at all.
还是不玩了吧，我们的时间也没那么充裕。
I'd rather not play around. We don't have very much time.
还是不玩了吧，我们的时间也没那么充裕。
I'd rather not play around. We don't have very much time.
果真和你说的一样，解谜就是个幌子，那姑娘纯拿咱们寻开心呢。现在怎么办，就一直被她牵着鼻子走？
Just as you said, solving puzzles is all just a cover for something else. That girl is toying with us. What should we do now? Just keep getting led around by her?
花火小姐着实是位有趣的人。她的内心看似混乱，却又很容易理解，像一位舞台上的伶人，又像个渴望被注视的孩子。
Truly, Miss Sparkle is a fascinating person. She seems chaotic inside, but easy enough to understand — like a performer on the stage, or a child hungering for attention.
游戏马上要结束了…这一次，我们会追上她。
This game will be over soon... This time, we're going to catch her.
侦探和侦探助手成了两具颓然的死物。看来，它们再也无法完成任务了。
The detective and the assistant detective have become two lifeless bodies. It seems they can no longer complete their mission.
姐，你有这手段，怎么不早用？
Miss, Why didn't you just do this earlier?
如此粗暴的方式有违我的记忆美学，但有时为了结果…我也必须放下一些过程的矜持。
Such a crude approach violates my aesthetics of memory, but as a means to an end... I need to put this aside for a more indifferent process.
哇…看这一地狼藉，还有那两个奇形怪状的家伙，多半就是这儿了。
Wow... This place is a complete mess. And those two weirdos are probably here, too.
现场没有其他人，看来花火小姐用了相同的手段，把梦中的人「送回」现实了…我们先和那两位谈谈吧。
There's nobody else at the scene. Seems like Miss Sparkle used the same method to "send" dreamers back to reality... Let's talk to those two there then.
Press R to view case details
先给各位打个招呼，待会儿进了里边可别乱跑。
Just a heads up — please don't go running off once we're inside.
虽说你们是太卜的客人，但她本人最讨厌不守规制，问东问西的人…可千万别触她的霉头。

You may be the master diviner's guests, but she hates people who don't abide by rules and regulations, oh — and people who ask too many questions, not to mention... *sigh* Please don't push her buttons.
我们只是旁听一场审问，结束就离开。
We're just here for the questioning. We'll leave as soon as it's over.
我猜猜，是不是门突然坏了？
Let me guess, the gate isn't working?
搞不懂，大门被锁住了，以前没锁过啊…也没人提醒我带上钥匙……
I don't understand, it's never been locked before... And no one told me to take a key.
喂喂，食堂再难吃，也不能请客人吃闭门羹吧！
Hey! I know the food here sucks but that's no reason to shut the gate on our guests!
Are you really from the Divination Commission?
有没有一种可能，你被开除了？
Is it possible you were... fired?
没道理啊。我都被贬去管理书库了，她老人家还想怎样？
No way — she's already demoted me to managing the repository. What else does she want from me?
有没有一种可能，里面出事了？
不必惊慌！太卜司可不止这一扇门。我知道有个地方可供紧急时出入。
There's no need to panic, okay? This isn't the only entrance into the Divination Commission. I know an emergency access.
你可别吓我，有太卜坐镇，能出什么事啊？
Don't scare me! Master diviner wouldn't let anything bad happen on her watch.
我看你熟门熟路的，平时偷闲，没少从这扇边门走吧。
You seem familiar — is this where you come to avoid doing work?
姑娘你目光如炬，在太卜司当差的都管这扇门叫「逍遥门」。
You're pretty sharp. Divination Commission staff call this the "loafing gate."
平时若是闲得没事，咱们常常从这边逃出来在外面逍遥自在几个时辰。
When there's nothing to do, we often sneak out from here and spend a few hours lazing around outside.
几个…时辰？这种没用的信息我一点都不想知道啊。
...A few hours? *sigh* Do you have any vacancies?
这劳什子星核侵蚀，搞得都是什么事嘛。
Ugh, this Stellaron corrosion... what's going on?
惨了，这门也打不开，让太卜等得久了，一定觉得「不靠谱的青雀」又把差事办砸了……
Great, this gate won't open either. We've kept the master diviner waiting — no doubt she'll blame "unreliable Qingque" for messing up once again...
太卜派这么一位来接我们，还说没生咱的气？
I knew I'd offended that diviner — that's why she sent this girl to help us!
青雀小姐不介意的话，由我来检查一番？
Miss Qingque, if you don't mind, may I take a look?
哎？这…不好吧？我就是客气客气，其实也没什么不好的。
Huh? Oh, uh... no need. Actually I was just being polite, I don't see why not.
杨先生，我来教你。这东西可好玩了。
Let me show you — this thing is pretty fun.
嗨呀，杨先生真厉害！一个外人轻而易举地拿下了这扇门。我正式将太卜司「逍遥门掌门」的头衔移交给你啦！
Wow, you're amazing Mr. Yang! You handled that well for an outsider. I officially hand over the title of "keeper of the loafing gate" to you!
掌门，是看大门的意思吧？
不，我说这位青雀。现在可是上班时间啊，居然能见到你。
No, I meant Qingque. I didn't expect to see her here during work hours.
别冤枉我啊，我在认真上班的。瞧，这几位是太卜要见的客人。
That's unfair — I'm working hard! Look, these are the guests the master diviner wants to meet.
这回总该是在说我们了吧？
Are you talking about us this time?
是啊。好清静如那位大人，竟然也会准许外人登堂入室。
Yes! The master diviner rarely allows outsiders — she likes her peace and quiet.
要见太卜，径直去「穷观阵」那边就是。
If you want to see the master diviner, head straight to the Matrix of Prescience.
「穷观阵」欠缺人手，太卜正烦着呢。司内驻扎的云骑军忙着驱赶邪祟，不知几时能有下文喔。
They're short of hands — the master diviner is run off her feet and the Cloud Knights stationed there are driving away evil spirits. I don't know when they'll be done.
元会算法读取完成，输入玉兆运行。
Hmm. Meta algorithm reading complete, inputting jade abacus for simulation.
卜算推演，卦象已成。涨落幅度在泽兑之间，误差正负千分之二。
Divination inference complete, hexagrammatic position established. Fluctuation range is between the marsh and water trigrams. Error margin of <unbreak>0.2%</unbreak>.
算法本该无误，究竟是什么在干扰仪器呢……
The algorithm is correct. So what's interfering with the instruments...?
抱歉，云骑军正奉太卜之命整顿司部安全。前方区域暂不开放。
I'm sorry, the Cloud Knights have orders from the master diviner to secure the commission's safety. The area up ahead is temporarily closed.
…你们惊讶吗？我是一点都不惊讶。
下次能不能想点有创意的遭遇战呀！
Ugh, can't we run around to them for a change!?
青雀小姐，居然一声不吭躲在旁边。
Hey, Miss Qingque, care to get involved!?
我…区区一个卜者能干什么啊？如果你们不嫌弃的话，这就来。
I—I'm just a diviner, wouldn't I slow you down!? Ugh, okay, here I come...
前面便是我太卜司引以为傲的大型玉兆算端——「穷观阵」。
This is the Matrix of Prescience — a large-scale jade abacus calculation terminal. It's the pride and joy of the Divination Commission.
这一路走来，不时听人提起「玉兆」这个词。青雀小姐，玉兆是什么东西？
We've heard the term "jade abacus" a few times now. Would you mind explaining what it is, Miss Qingque?
A jade abacus is just... a jade abacus!
杨先生问的好问题，我一时半会儿也答不上来。容我想想……
Eh-he, that's a good question, Mr. Yang — it might take me a minute to give you an answer. Let me think...
《易镜窥奥》一书上是这么说的，「篆纹活玉，卜籀知玄」。
The book Glimpses Into the Beyond describes it as "living jade engraved with symbols for divination into the unknown."
就像刻印章一般，仙舟工造司的匠人们会在玉石晶格内篆刻肉眼难见的兆亿符箓，而后按照需要将它嵌入各式机关中，让它们根据设计好的意图运行。

Just like engraving a seal, the craftsmen of the Xianzhou Artisanship Commission carve faint symbols into pieces of jade, and then insert them into machines to get them to operate according to a certain intention.
有些玉兆小到可以收在手镯珠宝里。大的嘛，就被装进阵法里，用于推演变数，鉴往知来。
Some jade abacuses are small enough to fit inside bracelets and jewelry. We put the bigger ones into instruments of calculation so we can simulate the future and learn from the past.
就像这座穷观大阵，无论天理衍变，还是人世代谢。只要信息充足，任何问题它都能回答。

Take the Matrix of Prescience here as an example. As long as sufficient information is provided, it can answer questions on anything — from the evolution of natural phenomena to the metabolism of living things.
据说，其中的符箓和原理问道于「遍智天君」博识尊。其深奥程度，整个太卜司里也只得太卜一人谈得上了如指掌吧。
They say the theory behind the symbols was handed down by Nous, the Wisdomwalker. The principles are so profound that in the Divination Commission only the master diviner truly understands them.
好像是哦，但「玉兆」这个名字好听多了。
Seems like it, but "jade abacus" does sound a lot better.
而且，普通计算机哪有这么玄乎的来历？博识尊亲自指点的技术……
Besides, ordinary computers don't have cool backstories. Technology handed down from Nous, huh...
黑塔女士的空间站里，我都没见过跟博识尊有关的东西。
Even in Madam Herta's space station, I never saw anything related to Nous.
听起来确有相似之处，要是能有机会亲眼见识它的制造机理就更好了。
It sounds like similar technology. Maybe we'll get a better understanding if we see the manufacturing process with our own eyes.
那可不成，工造司「解玉厅」把籀刻玉兆的技术看得可严了。
I'm afraid that's impossible — the Artisanship Commission's Hall of Jadeology keeps a close watch over the jade carving process.
不过杨先生要是感兴趣，星槎海有家买卖玉兆首饰的店铺，得空了我可以带您逛逛。
But if you're interested, there's a shop selling jade abacus jewelry in Starskiff Haven — I can show you around when I'm free.
{NICKNAME}你听见了吗，她说带杨叔逛首饰店。嘻嘻，这光景我想想都觉得好玩。
Did you hear that, {NICKNAME}? She said she's taking Mr. Yang jewelry shopping. Hehe, that'll be interesting.
反正，不要纠结于名目之辩，只要机枢能有效运转，「玉兆」还是「计算机」又有什么分别呢？
Anyway, don't dwell on names. As long as the machine works, what does it matter whether it's a "jade abacus" or a "computer"?
就像今天，只要有人接引你们来此就行了，是青雀也好，白雀也罢，一点也不重要嘛。
Just like today — would it have mattered if "Baique" had brought you here instead of Qingque? It makes no difference at all.
快到穷观阵的阵心了，太卜应该就在那边等着我们。
We're almost at the Matrix of Prescience core. The master diviner should be waiting.
Diviner Fu, how are things progressing?
涨落在乾、震之间。行有眚，无攸利。
We're fluctuating between the heaven and thunder trigrams. A step forward bridges no distance hence.
...And for those who don't speak Fu Xuan?
{RUBY_B#大凶}大祸临头{RUBY_E#}——这就是太卜司今日的运势。
Ahem... it's an {RUBY_B#Great Woe}utter disaster{RUBY_E#}. How's that for a Divination Commission fortune?
「穷观阵」停转，符箓黯淡，司部内有星核邪祟未除。云骑忙于保护百姓，我欲恢复阵法，却无可用之兵。

The Matrix of Prescience has stopped operating and the symbols have dimmed. There are Stellaron spirits wreaking havoc inside the commission and the Cloud Knights are struggling to protect civilians. I want to restore the Matrix of Prescience but I have no forces available.
如此境地，还要处理将军交来的星核猎手，可不是大祸临头？
And on top of all that, General, we still have to deal with the Stellaron Hunter you handed to us. If that's not an utter disaster, then I don't know what is.
哈哈，在我眼前的可是人称「未卜先知，法眼无遗」的符卿啊，趋吉避凶不是你的看家本领么？
Haha, but you're Fu Xuan the seer — the boundless omniscient! Bringing luck and avoiding misfortune is your strong suit, isn't it?
这盅鸡汤就不必灌了吧，将军。运势涨落是天理之常，不要想着耍小聪明逃避唷。
You don't need to flatter me, General. It's natural for fortune to fluctuate — there's no escaping it.
太卜司不过是将吉凶摆在眼前，尽力做出对的选择罢了，并无扭转乾坤的神通手段。
The Divination Commission simply does its best to uncover the good and the bad and then make the right decisions. We have no magical means to turn the tide.
正因如此，才须得符卿出马。要克制能观测未来的星核猎手，非得未卜先知的符卿不可。至于人手助力——我岂会没有准备？

And that is precisely why we need you in charge. When it comes to handling clairvoyant Stellaron Hunters, who better than Fu Xuan the seer? As for reinforcements, you didn't think I'd be unprepared, did you?
太卜大人，虽然没收到您下令，我还是把客人给您带来啦。
Master Diviner, I've brought you the guests, though... it wasn't your order I received.
…将军在用人方面，着实是见缝插针，毫不手软啊。
*sigh* So, general... even guests are on the payroll these days?
来都来了，总得人尽其用嘛。
Well, since they're here already, I may as well make use of them.
未经本座允可，踏入穷观大阵，不合规制——
Entering the Matrix of Prescience without my permission is a breach of protocol...
若这么说，倒显得本座不通人情了。见到各位，真是意外之喜。
*sigh* ...would be an ungracious thing to say in the present circumstances. I admit, I'm pleasantly surprised to see you here.
青雀这孩子虽然平时看着不靠谱，关键时刻倒也尽力。
Qingque is often unreliable, but she comes through for us when the need arises.
能尽情差遣的人来了，高兴吧？
Glad to have us as your errand runners, aren't you?
是可以用心托付的人。哼，本座可不像那位将军。各位并非太卜司门人，岂可随意使唤？
It's nice to have people I can entrust with difficult matters. I'm not like the general, and you don't even belong to my commission — I certainly won't be bossing you around.
我还以为你要把咱们拒之门外。
I thought you were going to have us escorted out.
本待「穷观阵」运转，再教各位见识我太卜司奇技…唉，让客人久等，是我失礼。
I was waiting for the Matrix of Prescience to resume operations so that you might gain insight into my divination techniques... *sigh* It was rude of me to keep you waiting so long.
别客套啦，那位将军的话我们也不是没听见…有事你就交给我们好啦。
No need for the formalities, we heard what the general said... If you need something from us, just say the word.
唔，那本座也不啰嗦：太卜司人手不足，我需要各位帮忙重启穷观大阵阵基——再顺道翦除星核邪祟。

Very well, then I'll keep this brief. The Divination Commission is currently understaffed. I need your help to restart the Matrix of Prescience's base terminals... and eliminate the Stellaron spirits along the way.
我们来办，不算窥探机密吧？
Won't we be breaching Xianzhou secrets in the process?
本座说不算，自然就不算了。
Yes, but you needn't worry. You have my permission.
I don't know anything about this Matrix of Prescience.
我让青雀随行，负责重启阵基的事宜。至于翦除邪祟……
Qingque will accompany you. She'll be in charge of restarting the terminal. As for eliminating the spirits...
{NICKNAME}，我给自己算了一卦，发现咱们仨都是劳碌命啊。
Psst, {NICKNAME}... I hath divined our future — we're destined to be errand runners forever...
说出那个有魔力的字眼！
噢，只是简简单单，放之四海皆灵的一个字：「请」。
青雀，重启阵基的事情就拜托你了。
Qingque, restarting the base terminals will be your responsibility.
还有，忘掉刚才你看到听到的一切。
Oh, and forget everything you saw and heard just now.
这是什么恩将仇报…不赏我也就罢了，还要给我加活……
Is this what I get? No reward and a bunch of extra work...
太卜大人要我带上你们几个一同去重启穷观阵的阵基。
*sigh* The master diviner wants me to restart the Matrix of Prescience's base terminals... and bring you along for the ride.
I sense a promotion and a raise!
我可是费尽心机，才调到书库这样不显山露水，可以上班摸鱼的好地方。
Ugh, I worked so hard on getting transferred to the repository — it's the best place to slack off and be invisible.
这下好了，我的太卜司轻轻松松职业生涯彻底泡汤了。
Now I actually have career prospects... this is terrible.
这办不好怕是有被逐出太卜司的危险。办得好，那以后上面交代的任务还不是滚滚而来？
If I screw it up, they might fire me... but if I get it done right, they'll send me more work!
早知道，我就该留在那儿继续打牌……
I'm gonna ask more questions next time... I could be playing celestial jade right now.
早知道，我就该留在那儿继续打牌……
I'm gonna ask more questions next time... I could be playing celestial jade right now.
It's been a while, my astral guests.
多得你们，罗浮才能顺利将卡芙卡归案，容我道声感谢。公司为「星核猎手」设下悬赏以来，还从未有过抓捕纪录，呵呵，今日便由仙舟先得一筹。

Thanks to you, the Luofu has successfully brought Kafka to justice... I am truly grateful — there hadn't been a single Stellaron Hunter arrest since the Interastral Peace Corporation issued their bounty. Hehe, this is a victory for the Xianzhou.
你们和公司是竞争对手吗？
So, are you guys and the IPC in direct competition?
彼此行于不同命途，何来竞争？联盟矢志巡猎一切不死孽物，公司一门心思实现它的「存护」。联盟和公司偶有合作，但毕竟不是同道中人。

How can we compete when our paths diverge? The Alliance has taken an oath to hunt down undying abominations, while the IPC is dedicated to their "preservation." The Alliance and the Corporation occasionally work together, but ultimately, our ways are different.
只不过，由仙舟拿下公司的通缉犯，于我个人私心而言大为快慰，哈哈。
Still, it's a pleasure for me to be able to say that the Xianzhou has captured a criminal wanted by the IPC, haha.
天价悬赏金我们五五分账。
待此间事了，星核之患拔除，卡芙卡便于仙舟无用。你若有心悬赏，自行带她去见公司便是。联盟对公司的赏金毫无兴趣。

Once this is over and the Stellaron curse has been lifted, the Xianzhou will have no more use for Kafka. If you wish to claim the bounty, feel free to take her to the IPC — the Alliance has no interest in the IPC's reward.
不过，那位「刃」也是我仙舟的要犯，这人便不能给你。
Blade, on the other hand, is a wanted criminal for the Xianzhou — he must remain with us.
你安排后手，却不告诉我们。
You didn't give us the full picture of your plan for Kafka.
符卿的阵法可以压制卡芙卡。为了出奇制胜，只能秘而不宣。希望不至于让各位怀疑我的诚意。
Fu Xuan's Matrix of Prescience was able to go one step further than Kafka. To maintain the upper hand, I had to keep it a surprise. I hope this hasn't made you doubt my sincerity?
下次可别准备这样的「惊喜」了。
Next time, maybe ease off on the surprises?
我保证，下次若有计划，一定开诚布公。
I promise to be more transparent next time.
现下卡芙卡无意开口，星核猎手的意图不明，仍需要倚仗太卜司的力量廓清真相。
At present, Kafka has no intention of speaking and the Stellaron Hunters' motives remain unknown. We must rely on the power of the Divination Commission to unearth the truth.
将军所指的「廓清真相」，就是以阵法审问卡芙卡么？
"Unearth the truth..." You mean interrogate Kafka with the Matrix of Prescience?
没错。「穷观阵」是太卜司重器，原是用来占算航路，问卜未来。
Precisely, the Matrix of Prescience is the Divination Commission's ultimate weapon. It was originally used to calculate navigation routes and predict future events...
但「星核猎手」的秘密非得撬出不可，我也不得不跳脱常理一次——用「卜算」来推知她的意图。
...but the secrets of the Stellaron Hunters cannot remain hidden any longer. I have no choice but to move beyond conventional protocol — we must use divination to ascertain Kafka's intent.
「穷观阵」能否运行，事关重大。我在此拜请各位，帮助符太卜完成阵仪。景元感激不尽。
Everything hinges on restoring the Matrix of Prescience, which is why I would like you to help Diviner Fu complete the setup. I am eternally grateful for your assistance.
本座镇守在这「穷观阵」的中心，一旦三座阵基重启，卡芙卡的审问就可以开始。
I will guard the Matrix core. Once we've restarted the three terminals, Kafka's interrogation can commence.
事毕之后，我会给你们足够的时间和她谈谈。
When we're finished, I'll give you enough time to talk to her.
启动「穷观阵」会发生什么？
What happens when you activate the Matrix of Prescience?
一经启动，「穷观阵」会演算属于「卡芙卡」这一目标所蕴藏的信息，将其中与仙舟相关的部分送入卜算者的识海。

Once activated, the Matrix of Prescience analyzes all the information contained in the target — Kafka in this case — and transfers anything pertaining to the Xianzhou into the diviner's consciousness.
盖因人无时无刻不行于命途之上，在时间与空间中移动，成就种种因果。
Every one of us walks a Path, moving ceaselessly through time and space, creating all manner of karma in our wake...
事情办得怎样了？本座仍未感应到三座阵基的联结。
How are things progressing? I have yet to sense the connection between the three base terminals.
为何不拿它来推算星核的所在？
Why not use it to calculate the location of the Stellaron?
卜算不是谈空说玄。条件不足，所占对象不明，答案就像星海捞针，你懂我的意思吧？
Divination is no mere conjecture. If the parameters are insufficient and uncertainty surrounds the target, then it is like looking for a needle in a galaxy. Do you understand?
何况自打星核邪祟入侵太卜司开始，它所造成的干扰已经大大降低了卜算的准确度——或然误差有千分之二那么多！我不能容许测算结果有此舛错。

Furthermore, interference caused by the Stellaron spirits that infiltrated the Commission has greatly reduced the accuracy of our divination. The margin of error could be as high as <unbreak>0.2%</unbreak>! I cannot tolerate such inaccuracies in our interpretations.
对了，阵基重新启动了吗？为何「穷观阵」仍然没有反应？
So, have you activated the terminals yet? Why is the Matrix of Prescience still unresponsive?
What if its calculations are incorrect?
没有万一！…因为意外是不存在的。
There is no "what if"! ...Because nothing remains unforeseen.
「穷观阵」的算法「大衍万化之道」会对事物命途中所有捉摸不定之处，以无可计数的枚举法加以占算。一旦将尺度放眼万古与星海，世间便不存变数了。

The Matrix's algorithm is known as "the way of all change" — it accounts for every unpredictability on the Path of all things with uncountable enumerations. When your objects of measure are eras of time and oceans of stars, there are no true variables in the world.
…多余的问话到此为止！三座阵基启动了吗！
...No more questions! Have you activated the three terminals!?
这就去。真是比闹钟还催命。
Say no more. Seriously, please don't say anything else.
让我瞧瞧，这儿是宙合阵。
Let me see, this is the Temporal Terminal.
所谓「察宙合之势」，听说这座阵基是专用来调取「时间」相关的信息。
"Observes the potential of the temporal plane." They say this terminal is designed to retrieve information related to time.
什么呀？你只是把那些符文拼了个七七八八，这就算完啦？
What? You just matched up those symbols. Is that it?
越是复杂的东西，操使起来越要追求简单——所谓「大道至简」，懂不懂？
The more complex something is, the more important it is to keep it simple. Don't you think?
这么简单，你家太卜怎么不亲自前来？
If it's so simple, why didn't your master diviner come and do it herself?
嘿嘿，也许她骨子里和我一样，就想偷个懒呢？
Hehe, maybe deep down she just wants to be lazy once in a while — like me!
这里该是「界寰阵」了。听说这座阵基是专用来调取「空间」相关的信息。
This must be the Spatial Terminal. They say this terminal is designed to retrieve information related to space. You probably could've guessed that...
让我猜猜，「时间」、「因果」…接下来这个阵八成应该是和「能量」有关了吧！
Let me guess — time, karma... I bet the next terminal is energy-related!
很遗憾，这处阵基唤作「界寰阵」，据说是专司读取与「空间」有关的信息。
Darn, the Spatial Terminal. They say this terminal is designed to retrieve information related to space. You probably could've guessed that...
这里该是「业成阵」了。听说这座阵基专用来梳理事物的因果联系。
This must be the Karma Terminal. They say this terminal is designed to establish the causal relationships between objects.
让我猜猜，「时间」、「空间」…接下来这个阵八成应该是和「能量」有关了吧！
Let me guess — time, space... I bet the next terminal is energy-related!
很遗憾，这处阵基唤作「业成阵」，据说是专司梳理因果联系的。
Darn, the Karma Terminal. They say this terminal is designed to establish causal relationships.
呼，有惊无险。这下三个阵基都启动了。
Phew, we did it. All three terminals activated.
咱们回阵心，向太卜复命吧。
Let's go back to the core and report to the master diviner.
你们做得很好，我已感应到「穷观阵」的符箓重新被点亮了。
Well done, all of you. I can sense the Matrix of Prescience symbols re-illuminating.
接下来，我会审问卡芙卡。位于阵心的人，或许会感受到一些…冲击。
Now, to interrogate Kafka. Those of you in the core may feel a few... impacts.
需要这么大阵仗吗？我说过会配合你们的呀。
Is this really necessary? I said I'd cooperate with you.
你是擅长以「言灵」术搅乱人心的通缉犯，本座对你的话毫无兴趣。
I have no interest in the words of wanted criminals — especially those skilled in the art of manipulation...
想说什么都可以，不过，本座只会相信「穷观阵」的卜测。
...so say what you will — I'm here to witness the divination of the Matrix of Prescience.
太卜司自有办法从你身上挖出真相，远比话语所说的更多。
The Divination Commission has ways of extracting the truth, and they're far more effective than a conversation.
那就请太卜见证我的命运。
Then please, Master Diviner, witness my destiny.
你…就为了这个？为了这种事情？
T—That's it? Is that what you want?
So, how do you like your truth?
...But, the Matrix of Prescience cannot be wrong.
Has Kafka pulled one over on us again?
卡芙卡与星核无关，倒是你们…居然是你们……
Kafka has nothing to do with the Stellaron, but you... It's you...
哈！荒谬！竟然会有这种事……
Ha! Absurd! I'd never have thought it...
I sense more Fu Xuan riddles on the horizon...
你们自己去问她吧——想问多久都行。
Ask her yourself — take as long as you wish.
本座必须立刻向将军禀报，恕不奉陪！
I must report this to the general immediately. Please excuse me!
我知道你还有很多疑惑想找卡芙卡问个明白。
I know you still have many questions for Kafka yourself.
想从卡芙卡那里知道的事，现在就去问吧。
If there are questions you want Kafka to answer, now's the time.
There are so many things I want to ask...
那就去吧，我们会在这里守着。
Actually, I don't have anything to ask her.
她的目的和你的过去，难道你不想知道吗？
You don't want to know about her motives and your past?
Is there anything you want to know?
我也有很多疑惑——但我可以等。
There are many things I want to know — but they can wait.
卡芙卡会给你怎样的答案呢？我也很好奇。
What will Kafka have to say to you? I'm curious to find out myself.
你自己去吧，{NICKNAME}，我才不想和那个女人说话呢～
You go, {NICKNAME}. I don't wanna talk to that woman.
你也要小心啊，可别又被成熟的大姐姐给骗了。
Be careful though. Don't get fooled by her again.
开玩笑，我可是此道高手。
Are you kidding? I'm an expert now.
给你点阳光就灿烂了是吧。
Huh, I wouldn't go that far.
明白。愚我两次，其错在我。
Got it. Fool me twice, shame on me.
...Fool you what now? Ugh, stop it, I'm getting Fu Xuan vibes.
最容易上当受骗的是你吧！
Nah, you're the one more likely to get fooled.
哈，我警惕性超高的，除了你，丹恒，杨叔和姬子姐，我谁都信不过。
Ha, I'm the queen of vigilance, thank you very much. I don't trust anyone except Dan Heng, Mr. Yang, Himeko, and you.
要小心啊，可别又被成熟的大姐姐给骗了。
Be careful. Don't get fooled by her again.
真不好意思啊，让你看见我这么狼狈的模样。
I'm sorry you have to see me in such a sorry state.
好啊，都依你。就当作我们不怎么熟吧。
Fine, if you prefer. Not friends.
Are you alright? Are you hurt?
你在关心我吗？我很好，仙舟对待俘虏一向很客气。
Concerned about me? I'm fine, the Xianzhou is always courteous with its captives.
You don't look like you're in a sorry state to me...
真的吗？那就好，我可不想在你记忆里是很糟糕的样子。
Really? That's good. I wouldn't want to affect your image of me.
在列车上，我没有和你说话，因为那时我就知道在这里，你和我会单独交谈。所以我想，干嘛不把一切都留到现在呢？你好像有很多事情想问我。
I didn't talk to you on the train because I knew you and I would get to talk alone here. Worth waiting for, don't you think? You seem to have a lot to ask me.
…艾利欧说，他预见了三个问题，但本质上都是一回事。如果我听到了其中之一，就把此行的目的，一五一十地告诉你。
...Elio said he foresaw three questions, but they would be the same in essence. If I were to hear one of them, I would then tell you the objective of this trip in all its detail.
既然你问了那三个问题之一，就说明一切都很顺利。准备好听我的答案了吗？
Since you asked one of the three questions, it means everything is going smoothly. Are you ready to hear my answer?
仙舟的星核之乱，与我们并无直接关联。但如果你站在艾利欧的视角，那么，也不能说星核猎手是无辜的。我们早已预见了这一切，但我们无动于衷，直到合适的时机才投身其中。

Xianzhou's Stellaron problem is not directly linked to us. But if you look at it from Elio's perspective, you can't say the Stellaron Hunters are completely innocent. We foresaw all this long ago, but chose to remain indifferent until the time was right for us to get involved.
符太卜之所以惊讶如此，是因为她发现了三个事实：第一、星核猎手不是仙舟的敌人，这你已经知道了，虽然你始终不信。
Diviner Fu was surprised because she discovered three truths: One, the Stellaron Hunters are not enemies of the Xianzhou. You know this now, though you refused to believe it.
二、将星核带入仙舟并启动的另有其人，这其中既有内忧，也有外患。罗浮内部的叛徒和外界的敌人想要颠覆仙舟。太卜急着去找将军，想必是为了告知这一点吧。

Two, someone else brought the Stellaron into the Xianzhou and activated it — a result of internal unrest and external aggression. Traitors on the Luofu and enemies from outside want to overthrow the Xianzhou. The master diviner is in a hurry to find the general, presumably to inform him of this fact.
可是，太卜知道的就只有这么多了，因为艾利欧也没有将关键的信息告诉我。他预见太卜司会对我使用「穷观阵」。为了防止发生意外，此时此刻，我只知道仙舟联盟应该知道的事。

However, that's all the master diviner knows, because Elio withheld key pieces of information from me. He foresaw the Divination Commission using the Matrix of Prescience against me. To guard against setbacks, he ensured that I knew only what he wanted the Xianzhou Alliance to know in this moment.
至于第三个事实，恐怕仙舟联盟做梦也想不到…哈哈。第三个事实是：如果星核猎手不是这一切的始作俑者，那么我和阿刃出现在这里是为什么呢？

As for number three, even in their wildest dreams, the Xianzhou Alliance could never have guessed it, haha... If the Stellaron Hunters aren't the cause of all this, then why are Bladie and I even here?
听上去很荒诞对吗？怪不得符太卜也不信，但穷观阵不会骗人。所以答案就是这么有趣：星核猎手出现在此，阿刃被捕，我被引入这座穷观阵，都是为了将你们——星穹列车带来仙舟。

Sounds ridiculous, doesn't it? It's no wonder Fu Xuan doesn't believe it either. But the Matrix of Prescience doesn't lie. The answer is just that bizarre: The Stellaron Hunters appearing here, Bladie getting arrested, me being lured to the Matrix of Prescience... it was all to bring you, the Astral Express crew, to the Xianzhou.
星穹列车要来到罗浮，没错，而且还要在仙舟做出一番大事：在艾利欧选择的那个未来里，「巡猎」的力量是不可或缺的。为此，你们必须和联盟产生联系……

In the future that Elio chose, the power of The Hunt is indispensable. That's why the Astral Express crew had to come to the Luofu and achieve something important for the Xianzhou. You had to establish a connection with the Alliance...
所以我一定要把你骗来这里。我需要你直接接触罗浮将军，帮助他们解决星核之乱，让联盟欠下一份人情。这样，在未来的未来，在最为关键的时刻，仙舟将助你一臂之力。

...and that's why I had to trick you into coming here. I needed you to meet the Luofu's general in person and help him resolve the Stellaron crisis. I needed the Alliance to owe you a favor. That way, in the future, at the most critical moment, the Xianzhou will offer you their help.
如何？是不是很意外呢？恶名昭著的星核猎手做了这么多，只是为了让你成为仙舟的英雄——谁也想不到这样的剧本吧？
What do you think? Surprised? The notorious Stellaron Hunters did all that just to make you a hero of the Xianzhou... Quite the plot twist, don't you think?
What is this future you're talking about?
我说了：艾利欧没有将关键的信息告诉我。未来的可能性无穷无尽，在错误的时间得知了正确的事情，也会将我们长久的努力化为乌有。
Like I said: Elio withheld key pieces of information from me. The future holds endless possibilities. Knowing the right thing at the wrong time could spoil all our hard work.
关于未来，我只能告诉你一件事：在最好与最坏的那些未来里，你们终将直面「毁灭」的纳努克。届时你会需要所有的帮助，因为那将是属于星神那个层次的残酷战斗。

There is only one thing I can tell you about the future: In the best and the worst cases, you will eventually have to face Nanook the Destruction. When that time comes, you will need all the help you can get. It will be a brutal struggle of Aeonic proportions...
那是你、我、星穹列车都无法企及的层次，在绝大多数的未来里，命运就在那一刻终结。但如果按照艾利欧的「剧本」走下去，最终会有一线生机。

...proportions that neither you, nor I, nor the Astral Express will ever be able to reach. In the vast majority of futures, that's when destiny ends. But if we follow Elio's plan, there may be a glimmer of hope on the horizon.
…知道吗，{NICKNAME}，即使「星神」，也是可以被杀死的。
...You know, {NICKNAME}, even Aeons can be killed.
这又是什么怪东西？看起来像是个门楼子成精。
What the heck is this? It looks like a walking gate...
不要紧张。仙舟上哪有什么鬼魂精怪，不过是个把守阵法的金人罢了。这样的东西在仙舟重地里到处都是。
Take it easy, there's nothing supernatural on the Xianzhou. It's an aurumaton — it's guarding the Matrix of Prescience. They're stationed at various strategic places.
它蹲在那里，就像把「生人勿近」四个字贴在了脸上。你说…咱们就这么当着它的面走过去，它会不会突然暴起伤人？
I feel like it needs a sign saying "mortals forbidden" or something... Are you sure it won't fly into a rage if we walk past it?
我们奉太卜之命前来启动阵法，是熟客不是生人啦。
We're here by order of the master diviner to restart the Matrix of Prescience — friends not foes.
三月，你还真是言出法随啊！快，快做点什么帮帮我！
Ah...! March, you should join the Divination Commission! Q—Quick, do something!
…知道吗，{NICKNAME}，即使「星神」，也是可以被杀死的。
...You know, {NICKNAME}, even Aeons can be killed.
你们的剧本是…杀死星神？
So your plan is... to kill an Aeon?
哈，怎么可能？那不是我们的愿望。
Ha, are you kidding? That's not what we want.
我只想告诉你一些曾经发生过的事：那些陨落星神的故事。
I just want to tell stories from the past: Stories about Aeons that have fallen.
杀死星神？人类的力量办不到。
Killing an Aeon? Humans don't have that power.
That's right, it would be impossible for a human...
所以我并没有说「星神」会被人类杀死，不是吗？
...but then I didn't bring humans into the picture, did I?
星神怎么可能会被杀死。
How could an Aeon possibly be killed?
是吗？陨落星神的故事有很多呢。
Is it so unthinkable? There are many stories about fallen Aeons.
「不朽」的龙、「纯美」的伊德莉拉、「秩序」的太一、「繁育」的塔伊兹育罗斯、以及…「开拓」的阿基维利。
Long the Permanence, Idrila the Beauty, Ena the Order, Tayzzyronth the Propagation... Akivili the Trailblaze.
这些都是曾经响彻寰宇的名字，现在，祂们都消失了，只剩下无主的命途。
These names were once known all over the universe. Now, THEY've all but disappeared, leaving behind only masterless Paths.
令「星神」陨落的方法，人类目前所知的，有三种。
Currently, there are three ways an Aeon can perish known to humanity.
第一、概念重叠的命途之间会产生碰撞。更宽广的命途将吞并狭隘的那条——「秩序」的太一，就是这样被「同谐」的希佩所同化。
One: Paths with overlapping concepts will eventually collide, and the broader Path will engulf the narrower one. That's how Ena the Order was assimilated by Xipe the Harmony.
第二、星神与星神之间的神战。更强大的一方将消灭弱小的那方——这就是「繁育」塔伊兹育罗斯的陨落。也是仙舟联盟在「巡猎」的引领下行遍星海，诛除「丰饶」育化的孽物……

Two: In a war between Aeons, the stronger side will annihilate the weaker one — that's how Tayzzyronth the Propagation fell. Under the guidance of The Hunt, the Xianzhou Alliance travels the universe exterminating "abominations" cultivated by the Abundance...
...so the Xianzhou too are engaged in this process.
仙舟为什么想杀死「丰饶」？
Why does the Xianzhou want to kill the Abundance?
据我所知，联盟的前身本是寻找药师，渴求赐福的「求药使」。他们成功见到了星神，得到了能治愈死亡的赐福：「建木」。

As far as I know, the predecessors of the Alliance were the Elixir Seekers. They searched for Yaoshi and longed for the blessing of immortality. When they eventually found the Aeon, they received a blessing that did indeed prevent death — the Ambrosial Arbor.
结果，不死的诅咒污染了他们。而「巡猎」出现，一箭斫断建木。从此，为了令不死诅咒自星海断绝，联盟便随「巡猎」追逐着药师的痕迹。

...But immortality turned out to be a curse for the Xianzhou. That's when The Hunt appeared — firing an arrow and felling the Ambrosial Arbor. Ever since, the Alliance has followed The Hunt in pursuit of Yaoshi, erasing the curse of immortality from the universe along the way.
塔伊兹育罗斯是怎么死的？
「不朽」消失后，祂的命途被塔伊兹育罗斯分裂，诞生了名为「繁育」的星神。据我所知，虫皇塔伊兹育罗斯并没有存在太久。

After the disappearance of Long the Permanence, Tayzzyronth divided the Aeon's Path. In the process, Tayzzyronth became a new Aeon known as the Propagation. My understanding is that Tayzzyronth, or "Imperator Insectorum" to some, didn't last long...
寰宇虫灾诞生之后，多位星神将祂杀死。
...When the Swarm Disaster began to take hold, Tayzzyronth was attacked and killed by multiple Aeons.
阿基维利呢？祂死于星神之手？
What about Akivili? Did THEY die at the hands of an Aeon?
我不知道啊，阿基维利的消失非常神秘。能解答这个问题的，大概只有{RUBY_B#「智识」的星神}博识尊{RUBY_E#}了吧。毕竟，{RUBY_B#博识尊的诨名}机器头{RUBY_E#}什么都知道。

I don't know. Akivili's disappearance was very mysterious. {RUBY_B#Aeon of Erudition}Nous{RUBY_E#} is probably the only one that can answer that question. After all, {RUBY_B#Title of Nous}Droidhead{RUBY_E#} knows everything.
如何，{NICKNAME}，这些故事很新奇吧？
What do you think, {NICKNAME}? Fascinating stories, no?
它们是那种行走于正道的人，永远不会告诉你的故事。
They're the kind of stories that folks on the straight and narrow would never tell you.
Why are you telling me this?
Do you believe all this nonsense?
走吧，阿刃，还有两个地方要去。
Let's go Bladie. Two more places to visit.
卡芙卡跑了？可恶，这下怎么向那位太卜交代啦！
Did Kafka escape? Argh, how are we gonna explain this to the master diviner!?
如果她没有骗我，我们应该不用交代什么了…
If what she said is true, we won't have to explain anything...
这是青雀带咱们看过的那半截枯木吧，怎么突然长起来了？
Wasn't this the dead tree Qingque showed us earlier? How did it grow all of a sudden?
精彩，太精彩了！我好幸运喔，长生种活一辈子也没几个能看到这种奇观哇！
Amazing, absolutely amazing! Even the long-lived might not witness something like this in their lifetime! I'm so lucky!
也许是被施了强力的肥料？
Maybe someone applied a strong fertilizer?
The Ambrosial Arbor was imbued with some kind of power...
这么异常的能量…是「星核」。
Such extraordinary energy... It's the Stellaron.
杨叔的意思是…是星核导致了「建木」生长？
Mr. Yang, do you mean... the Stellaron is making the Ambrosial Arbor grow?
对，仙舟云骑在搜寻的那颗星核，八成就是这异相的元凶！
Yes, the Stellaron the Cloud Knights are searching for must be causing this anomaly!
除非卡芙卡欺骗了穷观阵……
Unless Kafka deceived the Matrix of Prescience...
不要慌张，符卿，相信穷观阵是不会说谎的。你所述的卡芙卡之逻辑非常可靠，它正为我添上了一块拼图。
Stay calm, Diviner Fu, the Matrix of Prescience does not lie. The logic you have laid out concerning Kafka makes sense — it has helped me to fill in another piece of the puzzle.
我知晓罗浮必有外敌，因为星核不可能凭空出现，一定有人用某种手段将它混入仙舟；罗浮之内患，则必是以丰饶之民自居的隐恶组织：药王秘传。

I agree there is a hostile external force at work on the Luofu. The Stellaron didn't appear out of thin air — someone managed to sneak it onto the ship. As for the culprits behind the Luofu's internal strife, I believe we are dealing with the so-called Disciples of Sanctus Medicus — that shadowy organization of the Denizens of Abundance.
卡芙卡的事实，恰好佐证我的猜想。
你…将军，你什么时候想到的？
You... General, when did you have these suspicions?
星核方露头之时。仙舟有帝弓司命护佑，若非另一位星神的令使出手，焉能混入罗浮而我却不知？故必有外敌。

The moment the planter of the Stellaron revealed themself. The Xianzhou has the blessing of the Reignbow Arbiter — only another Aeon's Emanator would be capable of sneaking onto this ship without my knowing. We are dealing with an external threat.
星核侵蚀诸处，却绕过神策府、幽囚狱两大机要，显然别有图谋。敌人如此谋划，定然掌握罗浮内部情报，故内患将出。想明白这两点没什么难的……

The Stellaron corrosion continues to flood into the ship, and yet it bypassed both the Seat of Divine Foresight and The Shackling Prison... there is forethought here — our enemy must have had access to Luofu intelligence for things to unfold in this way. It is evident now...
星核猎手不是幕后之人，这，我在看见那家伙的时候就明白了。但他为何而来，又为何引来星穹列车？…这块拼图，我却始终找不到。

The Stellaron Hunters aren't the ones behind the curtain... No, as soon as I set eyes on Blade, it was clear to me. But why is he here, and why did he draw the Astral Express? ...That piece of the puzzle still eludes me.
符卿带来的消息，让这块拼图合上了——哈哈，星核猎手果然有趣，绕这么大个弯子，目的竟是为了令仙舟与列车牵上线，谁又能想到呢？

Nevertheless, Lady Fu, your intel means the puzzle is more complete than it was before, haha. These Stellaron Hunters are a captivating group — such lengths to get the Xianzhou and the Express onto the same track. Who would've believed it?
正值用人之际，好心人送来免费劳力，景元就不客气啦。
We were in need of extra hands, and extra hands I have provided — no need to thank me.
将军，这时候就别慢悠悠的了！「建木」那里……
General, we must retain all urgency! The Ambrosial Arbor...
无需费心寻找了，那是「星核」。叛徒将它投入了建木所在的洞天，使建木重新生长——瞧，「药王秘传」终于忍不住动手了。

It's the Stellaron. No need to search high and low — the traitors have planted it in the Ambrosial Arbor's delve, thereby causing the tree to grow once again. The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus couldn't hold off any longer.
危机也是转机，知道问题所在，一切都好办了。
Every crisis is a turning point. A problem is easier to resolve when you know where it lies.
...Am I coming up with the plan again?
是呀，我就知道符卿必有对策。
Of course, I'm sure you have a countermeasure at the ready, Master Diviner.
依本座之见，眼下要务是召集云骑军，赶往「建木」根植的洞天，拔除星核邪祟，止住它重生的势头。
From my perspective, convening the Cloud Knights is our immediate priority. We must head into the roots of the Ambrosial Arbor, expel the Stellaron spirits, and prevent the Arbor's resurrection.
唔唔，符卿法眼洞见，必是解决问题最快的捷径。但有时候，最快未必最优。你猜猜，我早知星核所在，为何按兵不动？

Mhmm, as ever the master diviner's omniscia provides the fastest solution. However, sometimes speed is not everything. I have known the Stellaron's location for a while now, so why have I held back our forces?
哈哈，斩草要除根。再等上一等，「药王秘传」选在这个时机动手，就说明云骑已经控制了整体局势，叛徒沉不住气了，现在师出有名，正适合一网打尽。

Haha, pulling up the grass requires removing the roots. The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus have chosen to make their move now, which means the Cloud Knights have the situation under control and the traitors have run out of patience. Now is the time to capture them all in one fell swoop.
就这么白白坐着，万一有什么意外，将军如何担得起损失？！
You've been sitting on that this whole time? How will you justify the losses if something goes wrong, General!?
符卿呀符卿，我还有一支奇兵没用呢。
Please, Lady Fu, I still have forces to deploy.
正值用人之际，既然星核猎手有心让列车与我们缔结盟谊，景元就不客气啦。
We were in need of extra hands, and the Stellaron Hunters were kind enough to bring us together with the Astral Express — how could I look the other way.
Listen up! We've got a situation!
好大一棵树，突然就长了出来！
That massive tree has suddenly sprung to life!
我就知道，将军一微笑，咱们就要被差遣了！
The general's smiling again — definitely errands...
是本座的错，是本座对将军有了额外的期待……
It's my fault. I had higher expectations of the general...
你行行好吧！这支奇兵用的也忒频繁了，咱们罗浮上就无人可用了吗！
Please! We can't keep getting them to do everything for us! Since when did we run out of people on the Luofu?
You... Why are you staring at me?
我还要提醒将军！「建木」所在是秘中之秘，让化外民接触——
Do I need to remind you, general, that the Ambrosial Arbor's access point is a closely guarded secret? Allowing outworlders would be—
——有违规制。我也要提醒符卿，有仙舟而后有规制。危机之际，规制合用则用，不合用抛下便是。
A violation of the rules and regulations. I would like to remind you, Lady Fu, that the Xianzhou comes before its rules and regulations — all the more so in times of crisis.
所以，接下来我要做一个违背规制的决定。啊，也许还不止一个，哈哈，想想真是痛快。
As such, I am about to make a decision that runs counter to those rules and regulations. Oh, uh — decisions, plural. Haha, what a rare pleasure.
符卿，我将兵符交给你，由你来节制云骑军，在靠近「建木」的「丹鼎司」洞天之外策应。

Lady Fu, I hereby issue you with the military tally — the Cloud Knights will be under your control. You will act in concert with the other forces in the approach to the Ambrosial Arbor through the Alchemy Commission delve.
你不是一直想试试，当将军是种什么样的体验么？
You've been eager to discover for yourself what it is to be a general, have you not?
平时你却不让，这回突然…明白了，就依你说的办。
You've never given me the opportunity, and now suddenly... Understood, as you wish.
至于列车团的诸位…如今我正大光明地邀请各位加入封印星核的行动。
As for our Astral friends... I hereby formally welcome you all to join our operation to seal the Stellaron.
符卿会部署云骑，而我想请各位先行一步，取道「工造司」的捷径，再与符卿会合。
Lady Fu will deploy the Cloud Knights, but I would like you to set off in advance. Take a shortcut through the Artisanship Commission and convene with Lady Fu further down the line.
我可不敢命令贵客，只是同各位说好了我会开诚布公的。
This is no order, honored guests. I am merely stating what needs to be done, should you wish to help us.
看出来了，您从头到尾还真是不拿我们当外人。
You've never really seen us as outsiders, huh.
到底是将军，挺会差遣人。
此言差矣。我可不敢命令贵客，只是说好了开诚布公的。
This is no errand, honored guests. I am merely stating what needs to be done, should you wish to help us.
看出来了，您从头到尾还真是不拿我们当外人。
You've never really seen us as outsiders, huh.
Payment, or we go on strike!
我明白，我明白。景元岂是不懂知恩图报之人？
Understood, understood, worry not — I know how to repay a favor.
仙舟遭逢剧变，各位却始终不离不弃，赴汤蹈火。我内心感佩。
The Xianzhou has met with a dramatic chain of events, and each of you has chosen to stand by us. Your fearlessness moves me.
然而事起仓促，临敌之际我若与各位讨价还价，岂不是令各位的恩义失色，也令罗浮蒙羞？
Nevertheless, the enemy is upon us and time is of the essence — let us not allow monetary affairs to cast a shadow over more pressing matters.
不如等灾变平复，再来和各位谈谈「回报」的话题。
Once catastrophe has been averted, we shall discuss this in greater detail.
至于为客人引路的事情，还需劳烦停云小姐再辛苦一阵子。
Miss Tingyun, I would like you to continue to serve as a guide for our Astral friends.
…这也是小女子的职责所在，义不容辞。
我已嘱咐太卜备好星槎，为你们打开捷径。
I have requested that the master diviner prepare a starskiff and open a way through the shortcut.
「丹鼎司」、「鳞渊境」这两处洞天毗邻「建木」封印。有劳各位前往，一探究竟。
The Alchemy Commission and Scalegorge Waterscape delves are adjacent to the Ambrosial Arbor's seal. I'd like you to investigate these places.
What exactly is the Ambrosial Arbor?
那是由「丰饶」星神药师留在罗浮仙舟上的古物。能任意型塑生命，征服死亡的神迹。
It is an ancient artifact that was planted on the Xianzhou Luofu by Yaoshi, the Aeon of Abundance. It has the power to shape life and subdue death at will.
罗浮人的祖先正是服下了建木生成的神实，才得到了「无尽形寿」的身体，蜕变为长生种。
The ancestors of the Luofu people consumed the fruits of the Ambrosial Arbor and gained endless lifespans — thus becoming long-life species.
听起来可是个厉害的宝贝啊！
是啊，也是日后一切的祸根。
Yes... it was also the bane of everything to come.
建木重生，难道你们不高兴吗？
Aren't you happy about the Ambrosial Arbor's resurrection?
各位身为过客，对仙舟的历史了解不多，问出这样的问题也不奇怪。我来给各位讲个故事。
As outsiders, you are unfamiliar with the history of the Xianzhou. I cannot blame you for asking a question like this. Let me tell you a story.
很久以前，仙舟尚未升入天空前，我们的祖先生活在某个星球的大地上。和诸位一样，那时的仙舟人是寿不逾百岁的短生种。

Long ago, before the Xianzhou took to the skies, our ancestors lived on the surface of a planet. Like all of you, the Xianzhou people at that time were a mortal species with a lifespan of fewer than <unbreak>100</unbreak> years.
统治那片国度的帝皇无法忍受浮生如露，百年后基业为他人所有。于是他倾尽一切打造九艘巨舰，向传闻有神明垂迹的天外星辰进发，妄想求取仙方灵丹，驻颜长生。

There was a time when the ruling emperor could not bear his temporary existence, or the thought of his life's achievements being lost to another after his death. He became fixated on acquiring an elixir of immortality, and focused his power on constructing a fleet of nine ships. These ships would voyage into deep space, where traces of gods were rumored to exist...
是，也不是。说是，因为九艘巨舰饱经苦旅，最终见证了神明显化，自药师的示现中寻得了种种不可思议的仙道神通；说不是，因为舰队自此迷航，再也没能成功返回故土。

Yes, and no. He succeeded because, after an arduous journey, the nine ships eventually witnessed the manifestation of a god — Yaoshi's appearance provided for all manner of unfathomable celestial blessings... However, he failed because the fleet has been lost ever since, and has never been able to return to its home planet.
这倒也不坏。毕竟仙舟才是真正经历冒险的人，能得偿所愿也是好事啦。
That doesn't sound so bad. The Xianzhou people went on a great adventure and got what they wanted in the end, right?
不坏…？先祖们曾经也是这么想的。但是能赐予长生的神迹，不过是一厢情愿的美梦罢了。
Oh...? Our ancestors once thought so too, but the miracle of longevity was nothing more than a vain dream.
且拿罗浮来说：长生不死，看似是件美事。但随之而来的是人口膨胀，资源匮乏。为了争夺活下去的希望，永寿的天人欲做人而不得，乃至堕落成了野兽。

Take the Luofu, for example — immortality seemed like a beautiful thing. But what followed was population expansion and diminishing resources. In the struggle for survival, the immortals lost their humanity and degenerated into mere beasts.
在付出无数血泪代价后，罗浮人终于明白，「长生」不是什么平白赐予的礼物，而是残酷试炼的开始。
After paying the price with blood and tears, the Luofu people finally understood that immortality was not a free blessing, but the beginning of a cruel ordeal.
因为随后的岁月里，同受药师恩赐的丰饶之民为了夺取神迹，屡次侵凌仙舟，大造杀孽。

In the eras that followed, other beings that had likewise received Yaoshi's blessings repeatedly attacked the Xianzhou in an attempt to take the sacred artifact as their own. Countless atrocities were committed as a result.
侥幸活过战争的仙舟同胞，则堕入名为「魔阴身」的长生疾患中。
Many Xianzhou comrades who were lucky enough to survive the wars became stricken with mara — a condition that immortals are susceptible to.
若非有幸得到{RUBY_B#岚}帝弓司命{RUBY_E#}的启示和保护，今日的「仙舟联盟」也就不复存在了。
Had it not been for the enlightenment and protection of the {RUBY_B#Lan}Reignbow Arbiter{RUBY_E#}, the Xianzhou Alliance you see today would never have existed.
故事讲到这里，「建木」重生将带来何等灾难，诸位应该明白了吧？
At this point in the story, I assume you understand the disasters that the resurrection of the Ambrosial Arbor might bring about?
你刚才说，罗浮内部出了叛徒？
You said there were traitors inside the Luofu?
自帝弓司命出手斫断「建木」，它已枯死数千载之久。
Thousands of years have passed since the Reignbow Arbiter felled the Ambrosial Arbor.
除了熟知古籍和历史的人，大部分仙舟民众都只将它视作一截年头久远的枯木，连来历也不甚了了。
Most in the Xianzhou regard the Arbor as nothing more than the stump of a dead tree... Only those familiar with our history and the ancient texts know of its origin.
先贤将这截枯木置于众目睽睽之下，故意令它显得毫无紧要，实则以洞天之术层层封锁。即便向着「建木」前进，也永远无法抵达。

Our ancestors placed the stump in full view of the people precisely to make it seem unimportant, but in fact, they sealed it behind layers upon layers of delve enchantment. Even if one travels toward the Ambrosial Arbor, one will never reach it.
然而，如今有人将星核带上了仙舟，并投入建木根底。想借此外力，使「建木」复生，达成不可告人的目的。
Someone brought a Stellaron into the Xianzhou and planted it among the roots of the Ambrosial Arbor. They wish to resurrect it and achieve their hidden goal through external aggression.
提供星核之人，与启动星核之人，在我看来，这两拨人所求不同。
In my opinion, the force that provided the Stellaron and the force that activated it have different objectives.
事不宜迟，我们该出发了。
Let's delay no longer. We should be moving.
我已嘱托符玄，她会打开太卜司的捷径，为各位行个方便。
I have asked Fu Xuan to open a shortcut to the Divination Commission for you.
行有眚，无攸利…还真是应了卦象。可恶。
A step forward bridges no distance hence... Ugh, the hexagram was right.
断折数千年，原本死灭枯萎的「{RUBY_B#丰饶遗物}建木{RUBY_E#}」重生了，仙舟前途难卜。
The {RUBY_B#Relic of the Abundance}Ambrosial Arbor{RUBY_E#} was felled thousands of years ago... now it returns to life. The future of Xianzhou is difficult to divine.
哎？她竟然没有大发雷霆。看来是占了一卦，早就做好了准备。
Huh? She's not angry? *sigh* Is there anyone that isn't two steps ahead of us around here?
追她不过是徒费力气，「穷观阵」向我揭示了卡芙卡的清白。此际最紧要的事情是处理建木。
Pursuing Kafka is a waste of time and effort — The Matrix of Prescience informed me of her innocence. Our priority is the Ambrosial Arbor.
你要领兵攻打丹鼎司吗？
Are you leading forces into the Alchemy Commission?
打从星核开始侵蚀的时间算起，除了派驻在其他洞天的丹士医师之外，「丹鼎司」就再也无人回报。
From the time the Stellaron corrosion began to spread until now, the only reports we've received on the Alchemy Commission have come from alchemists and doctors stationed in other delves.
那里本是仙舟上炼制丹方，研究岐黄的地方。离「建木」的封印地十分之近。星核邪祟一旦爆发，恐怕已是凶多吉少了。

The Alchemy Commission is where the Xianzhou's medical research and production take place. However, due to its proximity to the Ambrosial Arbor's seal, I'm afraid the Stellaron spirits may have plunged it into a deeper crisis than we first feared.
而且，将军相信「丹鼎司」内有人背叛了仙舟。那些自称「药王秘传」的叛徒蓄谋已久，借着地利实施阴谋，我也得尽快行事了。

To make matters worse, the general suspects there are traitors in the Alchemy Commission. The self-proclaimed Disciples of Sanctus Medicus have been plotting this for a long time — now they're using the location to their advantage. I must take action as soon as possible.
将军要我们去往「工造司」…
The general wants us to go to the Artisanship Commission...
他倒真会差遣人。那儿离「丹鼎司」不过咫尺，恐怕如今也已经大难临头了。
He really is a delegator at heart, isn't he... There isn't much distance between the Artisanship and Alchemy Commissions — I'm afraid the former is likely also facing imminent catastrophe.
星槎已经备妥。我来为各位引路。
The starskiff is ready — I will lead the way.
我还打算再和其他人聊聊。
Um, I wanna chat with others as well.
本以为太卜司的事一了，小女子接引的职责也能卸下了。
*sigh* I thought I might be relieved of my guiding duties once the Divination Commission affair was over...
没想到将军对各位青眼有加，小女子也只能继续随行了。真是命运难料啊。
Who would've thought the general would take such a liking to you? I suppose I must accompany you further... Fate can be so unpredictable.
咱们也算出生入死的交情了。
Through thick and thin, we're like two peas in a dangerous pod.
恩公真是会开玩笑。和您一齐行动遇上的麻烦，比我随商团出航十年加起来的还多呢。
You have quite the sense of humor, benefactors... I've encountered more trouble with you than I have with the merchant fleet in ten years.
小女子希望接下来的路顺顺利利，你可要保护好我啊。
I just hope everything is smooth-sailing from now on — please look after me.
这可是为天舶司立功的好机会。
This could be your moment to shine for the Sky-Faring Commission.
小女子明白。罗浮悬危，六司成员应该齐心协力。
I understand. The Luofu is in danger, and members of the six commissions should stand united.
唉，恩公在「流云渡」的港口救我一命，我这回就当是报答诸位了。
*sigh* You did save my life at Cloudford... Consider this my returning the favor.
停云小姐是在害怕危险吗？
Are you afraid of the danger, Miss Tingyun?
将军也说了，仙舟之上出了叛徒。
The general said there are traitors aboard the ship.
但能将星核送入仙舟，避过监察，植入「建木」…只有六司的人才能办到了。
But only someone from the six commissions could bring the Stellaron into the Xianzhou undetected, let alone plant it within the Ambrosial Arbor...
小女子什么也没说，只是提出心中疑惑，恩公…恩公一路小心便是。
I am saying nothing of the sort, just raising a doubt, that's all. Please be careful, benefactors...
没别的事，我们这就出发吧？
If there's nothing else, we should get going.
恩公这是要启程了吗？小女子拾掇拾掇，这就一起走。
Y—You want to leave straight away? Let me pack some things. I'll be right there.
哎哟，吓死我了。「建木」长出来那会儿，我正躲在书库里吃零食呢。突然老大一棵树杈子就划破了天空。书里的说法果然不是假的。
Phew, that was scary. I was having a snack in the repository when the Ambrosial Arbor started to grow — the trunk suddenly shot right up into the sky. So the legends were right all along...
生活就是这样，充满了意外。所以能偷个懒让自己舒坦一会儿是一会。谁知道麻烦的活儿什么时候会找上门。
Such is life, full of surprises. That's why you gotta seize any opportunity to take a break — who knows when trouble will come knocking at your door.
这么大的事，你一点不紧张。
Given what you just saw, you don't seem rattled at all.
没事的啦。天塌下来，有太卜大人在，哦，现在还得加个将军大人，上前顶着呢。
It'll be fine. Even if the sky collapses, we have the master diviner with us to hold it up. Oh, and now we have the general here too.
我们这些小把式慌什么神呀，让大人物们为大事操心吧。这才是保持快乐身心的秘诀。
What do subordinates like us have to panic about? Let the big shots worry about the big events. That's the secret to happiness.
太卜就没交代你什么工作？
Didn't the master diviner give you any work to do?
交代了啊。她在路上瞧见我，让我去书库里翻阅「建木」相关的记载。
She did — she saw me on her way over. She told me to go to the repository and read up on anything related to the Ambrosial Arbor.
这种小事儿，搁我手底下那不是一刻钟就搞定了。
A simple task like that is only fifteen minutes' work for me.
我听其他人说啦，连将军都对你们客客气气，要请你们帮忙，可真了不得！我也没什么拿得出手的，喏，这本书送你吧。礼轻情意重！
I heard people say even the general has to watch his manners when asking you for help — pretty impressive! I don't have much to offer you... Uh, here! Take this book. It's the thought that counts!
本来还打算等太卜司下了班，拉着你们到处转转，再教杨先生打个牌。
I was gonna wait for the master diviner to get off work so I could show you around and teach Mr. Yang how to play celestial jade.
青雀小姐的好意，在下心领了。打牌的事，只能等下次有机会了。
Your kindness is much appreciated, Miss Qingque. As for celestial jade, we'll have to leave it for next time.
我知道，你们眼前重任在身，我也不好意思拿这事儿来耽搁你们。这点儿轻重缓急我还分得清。
I know, I know, you've got an important task ahead... sorry to keep you. Priorities are priorities.
那么，要平安回来喔，记得来「长乐天」找我玩。
Well then, get back safely. Remember to come find me in Exalting Sanctum!
本座还有将军交托的重任，请各位一路小心。
I still have important tasks from the general to attend to. Go carefully, all of you.
对了对了，太卜大人不替我们卜上一卦，也好看看有什么该注意的？
Wait, wait! Master Diviner, can you divine our fortunes for us? Is there anything we need to watch out for?
以我额间法眼观之，各位此行必然元亨利贞，无往不吉。
My omniscia has seen that your journey will be auspicious — everything will proceed smoothly.
真、真的吗？不用工具、不掐指头算算吗？
A—Are you sure? You don't need to use a crazy device or do more finger-counting?
I'm sure it's nothing we can't manage. Let's go!
{NICKNAME}说的好。多谢太卜大人的吉言。出发吧。
Well said, {NICKNAME}. Thank you for your assurance, Master Diviner. Onward.
{NICKNAME}，你要去哪儿？星槎就在前面，跟上我的脚步。
{NICKNAME}, where are you going? The starskiff is ahead of us — follow my lead.
为何还逗留不去？若是担心前路吉凶，本座已为你们算过啦，卦象是上上大吉。
What's the delay? If you're worried about the road ahead, I've already told you — the hexagram indicates an auspicious result.
不信吗？也好。命数涨落无常，相信天意，不如相信自己。
Don't believe me? Fine. Fate is fickle — better to believe in yourself than look to the sky.
咦？这地儿聚了好些人呀。看来今天罗浮宜歇业，忌开工。
Huh? Look at all the people gathered here... Not a good day for commuting on the Luofu.
这「工造司」的洞天早在星核侵蚀后就停摆啦。这些人怎么不搭乘星槎去安全区呢？
The Artisanship Commission delve should have suspended operations after the Stellaron corrosion began. Why haven't these people taken starskiffs to safety?
可能工造司比较爱岗敬业吧。想想太卜司的卜者，什么叫没有对比就没有差距啊……
Maybe the Artisanship Commission are just more dedicated to their work? The Divination Commission's diviners aren't exactly a hard act to follow...
毕竟是工作嘛，要靠它生活的。成年人的世界…呵呵，没有轻松二字。
*sigh* At the end of the day, work is work — you need it to live. Y'know March, adults forget what "relaxation" means after a certain age, hehe...
杨叔你这过来人的语气……
Sounds like you're speaking from experience...
Just speaking from the heart, that's all.
开拓之路也没有轻松二字。
The Path of Trailblaze doesn't seem to allow for any "relaxation" either.
杨叔那是有感而发，你说这个就叫矫情啦。
I think they call that "complaining from the heart."
当今这世道，又有哪条命途是轻松的呢～
Are any of the Paths in this world easy to tread?
没准他们是夹道欢迎咱们。
Maybe they're here to welcome us?
是啦是啦～恩公是将军请来的援手，放在故事里便是从天而降、救急救难的御史大人了。
That's it~! First you arrive out of the blue, then the general recruits you to the cause — it's like the stories where imperial heroes bring salvation to the world.
只可惜这些人见了咱们，却没献花问好——恩公的猜测未免过于自信啦～
Still, it doesn't look like they're rolling out the red carpet... We might be getting ahead of ourselves.
各位瞧，这「工造司」里尽是研造奇械机关的工坊，与挖空心思发明创新的匠人。
The Artisanship Commission is full of workshops, buildings, state-of-the-art mechanisms, and craftsmen designing brand-new concepts.
他们的传统便是隔三差五捅几个篓子——要么将洞天楼阁凭空变走，要么是机巧人偶暴动什么的。
Periodically stirring up trouble is part of their tradition... entire buildings vanishing into thin air, puppet riots — you get the picture.
恩公们可得小心了。依我看，里头怕是出了什么天大的麻烦，叫这伙匠人去不敢去，逃又无路可逃。
It seems like the craftsmen are too afraid to go in, but they have nowhere to run to either. We should take care, benefactors — something terrible must have happened.
但我们总是得往里走的，先找个人打听打听吧。
Either way, we'll have to go in. Let's ask around first.
*gasp* Are you guys Cloud Knights? Are you here to save us?
噢，瞧这身打扮…白高兴一场，原来是旅客啊。
...Your clothes. *sigh* I knew I was getting ahead of myself — you're just tourists.
在罗浮碰上这种意外，真替你们伤心。唉，我也伤心……
Sorry this crisis came during your trip. *sigh* I'm sorry it came at all...
不必伤心，救星这就来了。
Worry no more. The knight in shining armor is here to the rescue.
老乡，我是将军请来的救兵。
Fret not. I'm the cavalry the general sent for.
要知道伤心总是难免的…
There comes a time when we all feel sorry...
对，有什么困难就跟咱说～嘻嘻，你们的景元将军可是三请四邀，才说动我们来帮忙的哦，你就放一百个心吧。
Yeah, you just need to tell us what the trouble is, hehe~ General Jing Yuan pulled out all the stops to get us here — you can trust us.
…将军三请四邀？你们？别逗了，有罗浮的云骑军在，将军怎么可能派外人来啊。
...You mean the general invited you? Is that a joke? The Luofu has the Cloud Knights — why would he send outsiders?
工造司这儿出了大事，严肃着呢，可不兴开玩笑啊姑娘。
There's been a serious incident in the Artisanship Commission — nobody's in the mood for jokes, miss.
别在意，朋友，我们是真心想帮助大家，能跟我们说说这儿的情况吗？
You misunderstand, young sir — we genuinely want to help. Can you tell us what happened here?
What are you doing out here?
还能做什么，等着呗。里面危险，我们就逃出来了。
Waiting around, that's what. We ran away, it was way too dangerous in there.
我劝你们啊，要是还想活命，就别进去。
Please, if you plan on living a little longer, don't go in there.
工造司里闹了树灾。不知谁种的盆栽突然猛长起来，枝条有两人合围这么粗！在司里到处窜高走低，几乎要把这地方捣烂了。

There's been some kind of botanical disaster — it was like an ornamental tree somewhere suddenly started to grow. There were branches so thick you couldn't put your arms around them! It spread everywhere — the whole Commission is being destroyed.
我也纳闷，工造司只研究机巧匠艺，和无土栽培、快壮高之类的种植技术不搭边啊。这玩意是哪来的？
I don't get it, the Artisanship Commission focuses on the mechanical — we've got nothing to do with hydroponics or accelerated growth... Where did that thing come from?
不行啊，我师傅还在里面呢！
The worst thing is... my master is still inside!
公输先生是工造司「镕金坊」里资格最老的匠人，也是带咱们这个课题组的师傅。
Master Gongshu is the most experienced craftsman in the Artisanship Commission's smelting works — he's in charge of our research project.
出事的时候，他拉着我、子铭、云澈几个往外头逃。结果到了半路，他自己又转身往里面冲去了。
When the incident happened, he dragged me, Ziming, and Yunche to safety... But then he turned around and ran back in.
我得在这儿等云骑军过来，赶紧通知他们救人。
I need to wait here for the Cloud Knights so I can tell them to rescue him.
啥成果能比自己的命还重要啊？
Is research data more important than life?
咱们是正儿八经搞研究的，没有这种东西。
That's not how it works — the research comes first here.
Did none of you try to stop him?
